They have a lovely outdoor seating area, where the atmospheric lighting creates a fantastic setting for an evening meal. We also loved the visible kitchen concept. The service was genuinely charming. The food was delicious across the board: a refreshing Aperol, superb pasta, and a very good dessert. It just goes to show that the best discoveries are often the most unexpected ones. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDR-SaRXm78Y_NjfSkWlVVZ\u0026fid=0x0:0x7e25af400e5a1595"],"When":"2025-8-27"},{"Name":"Number One","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOipjLKs0VgUMXm39VPvQ3X-ObY42n8qdduIoojMwNA0jDo8M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just want to leave a note of appreciation for the absolutely outstanding carpaccio — the best I have tried so far. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Alberto Seghezzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXX2mixO0j7D2Eqzt8fmJgMjcUMLU9WOmCqe_wEy8C_ASawMJGF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place in the heart of bari.
We got to spend a lovely night in this Resturant, enjoy traditional and modern food, creating a perfect and surprising mix in tastes.
The service and atmosphere felt great since the beginning and the overall price is definitely worth for the quality of the food.
Will come back for sure","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCea32aYcmqtCQD3Tcocj3B&fid=0x0:0x7dc4188fea957296"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Valentina Fantauzzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlQcWXQ-UNkO0SBfOjmznvvIACHelmdFlB-zI80Kl28H_DwzGt=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Radicale is one of those places that truly represents the new wave of Puglian cuisine.
The menu is seasonal, well thought out and deeply rooted in local ingredients, yet presented with a modern and refined approach. Every dish feels intentional: clean flavors, excellent balance, and great attention to detail without ever being overcomplicated.
The atmosphere is contemporary and welcoming, perfect for a relaxed but high-quality dining experience. Service is attentive and professional, making you feel comfortable from start to finish.
Radicale is ideal if you’re looking for a place where tradition meets creativity in a very natural and honest way.
Highly recommended for anyone who loves good food and thoughtful cuisine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDilWBfm-OahMGoIkYFh3Ym&fid=0x0:0x7dc4188fea957296"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Attila Rektenvald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVozOY0uNeavupSJrAO1NfGUDktmb_4V6GhpPchQr6g3UtC-ew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice atmosphere, perfect music for the mood. The food was delicious, the tiramisu made the evening 100%. The staff was extremely kind. Special range of spirits, gins, rums and whiskies. Overall 10/10.
I had the Veal Carpaccio, and the Mediterranean red tuna tartare.
Thank you for the experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBHipF5weaNAOQsjExh91HD&fid=0x0:0x7dc4188fea957296"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Adelina Cardas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHJqVkIM4hLDELgsHIlx3lzObOq_WP_kfWAtgRRrF2mT7JTIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We wanted a nice dinner for my husband’s birthday, so we searched for a restaurant with lots of good reviews for a special occasion. I made an online reservation, but since it was a Monday, there were plenty of tables available.
We ordered several dishes:
Oysters – probably the best we’ve ever had! Very big and fresh.
Mini tartar cones (beef and tuna) – unfortunately, these had no flavor at all, not even salt. The beef ones were slightly sweet because of the cone, which didn’t really work.
Fried anchovies – listed as their “favorite of the month,” but sadly tasteless, even with the sauce that came with them.
Pasta dishes – I had the Tagliolino with honey and truffle, and my husband had the garlic, oil and scampi pasta. We chose them because of the great reviews, but they were both disappointing. The truffles had no aroma or flavor, and overall, neither dish was special.
Dessert (coffee crumble) – this was actually great! We really enjoyed the taste and texture.
A few other disappointing details: when I made the reservation online, I specifically asked if they could put a candle on my husband’s dessert for his birthday. They asked for my name when we arrived, so I assumed they had seen the note, but they didn’t do anything. Later, I noticed another customer blowing out a candle on their dessert, which made me feel ignored and frustrated.
Also, the wine situation wasn’t ideal. They didn’t have the first bottle we asked for, we switched to another one, and in the end, they brought something else entirely “because that’s what they had.”
Overall, we left disappointed. The service wasn’t terrible, but for a place with such great reviews, we expected much more from both the food and the experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCjeFhAXsokunIVUNtknXQl&fid=0x0:0x7dc4188fea957296"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Stanislav Markov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtx4mLlqYu-Ym46X_CGw1gmZWc2imGYtTkOOkBRXXuDWcb-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The restaurant is great. The food was amazing, the staff was very friendly, wine was great. The white truffle pasta was the best pasta we have ever had. The desert was super.

The issue - in every restaurant we have been in south of Italy, they like to put everybody in one place and leave the other free. They put us with more people in a small room with no ventilation, quiet and even when you talked it was noisy. I thought the restaurant was small, so I was okay with it. After that I went to the toilet and I saw that it is a lot bigger and it had maybe 15-20 more tables sitting empty in a very big, ventilated room. Even it looked quite nicer than the small room. They had only put 2 tables with people there. Also it was a little bit strange having no menus but I have mixed feelings about it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCglXAD9-jty0l9p-Mb_arb&fid=0x0:0x7dc4188fea957296"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Christina Parrella Grunwald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlGqf-c0jv4zDJ2BvienNPH1m5NETTXScjrWFXpWzznb083aGX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Located just off one of the main shopping strips in Bari… this place was great. Service was some of the best we received in Puglia. Everyone was kind and so accommodating especially since we are traveling with two small children. The food was excellent!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6-5pkKT5eJzi_H3g2pnwF&fid=0x0:0x7dc4188fea957296"],"When":"2025-8-25"},{"Name":"Fatih Gözenç","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUo2NIxaYWBkatZJ8g9mQ8qChYoJluOS2_RzBiayP4VeXCkvwwlIw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Very nice service and ambience, recommended for a romantic dinner for sure. Ordered a fillet, meat quality was totally fine but sorry to say, food portions were so small and condition of the salad was pretty bad (dated old ingredients). I was not expecting that because of a lot of positive reviews. But I believe that they're a good restaurant and will become better in short time 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMDHir2sia2ClQE&fid=0x0:0x7dc4188fea957296"],"When":"2025-5-12"},{"Name":"Raluca Berescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSUVvRHfSZKhx4rK6jmZSbxxtaTIDdAPr5Rz89JEEvvNga3JKz2w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We are really sorry to give a 4 star review instead of 5. This restaurant has all the perks in order to be a top one except the understaff issue. This creating unpleasant experiences. The food was really tasty, the portions are a bit too "fine dining" (pretty small) but the presentation and the flavor are exceptional. We ordered 3 appetizers (crostini with anchovies, frisella morbida di mare and riso patate e cozze) and 2 mains (tagliolino miele e Tartuffe and filetto di vitello) and they all were great. We were eager to taste their desserts and we ordered 3 of them but...now the restaurant was full inside and nobody cared about us anymore. We have asked 3 times for the plates (more than 30 minutes waiting) and eventually paid and left, not with a sweet taste :). Too bad, maybe they will do something to hire helpers in the season.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNSzuw2KdazwqpylTuEFKf&fid=0x0:0x7dc4188fea957296"],"When":"2025-8-20"}]

[{"Name":"Andjela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMzirNOb2EeAGRvTRFxhumf7fPiGsJ7yvnNFHv6TmftNquCImQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a good pasta. Super flavorful, perfectly cooked, and just really comforting. The sauce was on point and everything tasted fresh and authentic. Nothing too complicated — just really, really good. The staff was also super friendly and welcoming, which made the whole experience even better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA340ZuAuuV3uIeUzo_QJxc&fid=0x0:0x1a4a0895620eccc7"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Sasha Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpmP4gDap58Eu9__WG6rJSkO7LCxHUMq3KFwhhLcfnlsxxH1gV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Such a cozy local restaurant! We randomly walked in and were pleasantly surprised. They offer so many different types of pizza, but since both of us are a bit lactose intolerant, we ordered other dishes instead.

The staff were incredibly friendly and very patient when recommending options for us. The food was very tasty overall! The only small downside was that the grilled prawns didn’t seem as fresh as expected.

Still, it’s a really cute restaurant with a lovely atmosphere, definitely worth a visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMJ6tFJDzmI1CW1oDunidy&fid=0x0:0x1a4a0895620eccc7"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"Maria Kraisman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7pg9UePwSweuHG7XXp2qakNdsRTWJ6eLNyAx9woEjCt8-InA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"That was the best pizza in our lives 😋 we wanted to taste many other places in Bari and will return here again, because it was just excellent!

Would you mind telling me what limoncello that was or if you homemade it since I am living in germany and was just there for vacation?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpk1U4fPhnDMS2dR5JYyIi&fid=0x0:0x1a4a0895620eccc7"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Stefania Alexandra Parnau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzjCb-h24mUOHNt5HWQTVSZ_F9eonc7CLtY07jiilWuosVuHXB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We arrived here with high expectations after reading all the good reviews, but we were extremely disappointed.
A table was found for us quite quickly, and we ordered fried seafood, asking for it to be served before the pasta. However, it arrived after 25 minutes, and the pasta came after a full hour.
Even more frustrating, our pasta was served at the same time as that of some customers who had sat down just 15 minutes earlier at the next table.
The carbonara pasta was good, but the one with red sauce was terrible.
No one apologized for the incredibly long waiting time — 50 minutes for pasta? We were seated outside, it was getting chilly, and we just wanted something warm to eat before heading back to our accommodation.
After leaving the restaurant, I had severe stomach pain that lasted until the next day. Very disappointing...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3PnCKbFgLoME9UOmj_vNT&fid=0x0:0x1a4a0895620eccc7"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Freja Tousgaard Andersen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmAo87N-GJylM4ylWNeVIqYY4EffDKQKLLbyxJ1KffeIKDxWI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely amazing! Everything was delicious and the staff was amazing! Everyone was very welcoming and polite. We had the antipasti della casa, the piatto del giorno, and, of course, the tiramisu☺️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDx9Jjiw6tWNCwlxnKVtRpc&fid=0x0:0x1a4a0895620eccc7"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"AM S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfPH_CDwr8zP9ZFHrjtK8ShbG0J7pENBklEph8dDtIFEcEVltE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La Baresana is a true gem in the heart of Bari. From the moment you walk in, you’re welcomed by a warm and inviting atmosphere that immediately makes you feel at home. The staff is not only professional, but also genuinely kind and attentive – the kind of service that makes a lasting impression and adds so much to the overall experience.

And then comes the food… Absolutely incredible. Every dish we tried was bursting with flavor, beautifully presented, and clearly prepared with the utmost care. You can truly taste the love and passion that goes into the cooking here. It’s that kind of honest, soulful food that stays with you long after the meal is over.

If you’re visiting Bari, do yourself a favor and make time for La Baresana. It’s more than just a meal – it’s an experience. Because when food is made with love, you don’t just taste it… you feel it. And at La Baresana, they absolutely know how to cook with love.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIsZrP9QE&fid=0x0:0x1a4a0895620eccc7"],"When":"2025-4-10"}]

Exquisite food!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEN-WrJThxr_w8AE&fid=0x0:0x9b5bec50f78863d2"],"When":"2025-6-6"},{"Name":"Irene Moustopoulou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaXdDU0OOFisMYD-IXVlNcGg9ZzSwEO_1GLktA2NTHuCJF5gYIJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited Sappori Solari just because we craved a good steak...

Later on we had one bistecca fiorentina about 1,2 kg to share and some side dishes and oh boy everything was so fine... The steak was cooked rare and served on a cast iron plate witch you could continue the roasting as far as you wanted and of course we ate it medium rare.. perfection! We accompanied our dinner with a glass of local red wine as suggested by our very kind and helpful waiter!
Many thanks to the whole service team and my love to the chef and his kitchen team !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDFpa-grwE&fid=0x0:0x9b5bec50f78863d2"],"When":"2023-11-8"},{"Name":"Anders Svensson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoCQ0WU2gSMqQjmYgLSZzOsM07zpZCS0NJDZq2rHCXwrDXXWCm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was excellent with perfect taste and the only thing not perfect was that the pasta was a little cold.
The ordered food was delivered with a time gap and the same issue with the side dishes.
The recommended wine had a litte to heavy/complexed taste for the ordered dishes and there was traces of cork in one of the glases, the tryed to correct that error but without changing the glass or the opened bottle.
But overall this was a very nice restaurant well wort a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb18LjCQ&fid=0x0:0x9b5bec50f78863d2"],"When":"2024-7-30"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Diana Coyle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDdIFrL1Ygt4bzC_-gx9sInY7epfbkKpYb95bwkKGivFstOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La Cantina di Zio was an absolute highlight of our recent visit to Bari. The food was excellent, but what really stood out was the service. It genuinely felt like having dinner with family. Anna was an amazing host.

We were welcomed with complimentary olives, little taralli and bruschetta, and finished with limoncello, which was such a wonderful and delicious touch. Every dish we ordered was outstanding: orecchiette, gnocchi, pizza and risotto, all full of flavour and clearly made with care.

They also managed to fit all 7 of us in at short notice, which we really appreciated. And a special mention for the espresso which was easily the best we’d had in Italy so far.

Warm, generous, and memorable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhHokdgE_ujbNvkDv48G3W&fid=0x0:0x3f29301ac4e8d935"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Adriana Nyagulova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIX5NNdnDFXboARA_v1TPEM2b8Q20TUDSyULA3q4QPGQHiFOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful experience here. The food was absolutely exceptional — fresh, flavorful, and truly delicious. The service was very attentive, and the staff were incredibly warm and welcoming. They treated us with so much kindness, which made the whole experience even more special. As a lovely gesture, we were even offered a shot of limoncello from the house at the end. We would definitely come back and highly recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCAA3Re7ITJTsmOKmnjlhTQ&fid=0x0:0x3f29301ac4e8d935"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Denis Treskanica","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrmIkkkJlkKR4kuq-jLiqKwbqiVSMmaxHZaZZG4NyE1OGfIBSxxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came to La Cantina dello Zio on recommendation, and it fully lived up to it. The restaurant is located in the center of Bari, has a warm and pleasant atmosphere, and is almost always full, its a great sign. The staff is extremely friendly, fast, and efficient. A special mention goes to the mother and son from our region, with whom we had great communication and instantly felt welcome. The food is domestic, rich in flavor, juicy, and simply fantastic. Combined with the lively and authentic atmosphere, this is exactly the kind of place you want to return to. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC70ERY3xUSdGWAD4QgM98a&fid=0x0:0x3f29301ac4e8d935"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Tiberiu Dragnuta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXt0X8VU6C2tJ6EAWRSgZo4FuGzr79hO9cDrdgVhhvkhECd_8gR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything was amazing about this place, the food, the staff, the atmosphere, everything.

I definitely recommend any pizza which has a really good dough, and the tiramisu, which you have to try.

The waiter was fun and friendly even though he seemed tired.

They recognised us and they gave us complementary bruschettas and limoncello shots.

Overall I definitely recommend this place to have a nice dinner with your friends or family (or by yourself, no judging, haha)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyQcMC6niHP97X_Kki3Mxu&fid=0x0:0x3f29301ac4e8d935"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Jen Buchignani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2QECHgKETfvAHs28kakLdYwcZzSjjrgx-TYXMvmGdH0I5miY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment we walked in, we were enveloped in warmth and hospitality that made us feel like cherished family members. The intimate atmosphere strikes the perfect balance—cozy and inviting like your own dining room, yet elevated with impeccable professionalism.

Our server, Mauricio, delivered what can only be described as flawless service. Attentive without being intrusive, knowledgeable, friendly, funny, and genuinely invested in making our experience memorable—he exemplified what outstanding hospitality looks like. His service alone would warrant five stars!
The entire wait staff was amazing with smiles and great service.

And then there’s the food—absolutely phenomenal! Every dish was a masterclass in flavor, with each bite revealing layers of rich, carefully balanced taste. The portions were remarkably generous—we’re talking enough for a satisfying second meal the next day.
Perhaps most impressive? The prices were incredibly reasonable. We would have gladly paid double at comparable establishments for food of this caliber.

This is the kind of restaurant that spoils you for anywhere else. Outstanding in every conceivable way. We cannot recommend it highly enough!​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBIcGPqYa0irxZHej33itbe&fid=0x0:0x3f29301ac4e8d935"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Marko Kaar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyYMRoZOqV9U--vciEcCoYTm6CDAxMSjgOBwYsfVr-fexx8w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In Old Town Bari

We stumbled upon this place as we explored Old Town Bari. The tables outside were full, the plates looked excellent - and everyone was happy...

So we took a table for two inside. A tiny little table, with grand aspirations!

Service with a smile was provided by the entire crew...they all moved so quickly, with such purpose, my first thought was that they were the owners - you know that energy that I mean - attention to detail, friendly smiles, and immediately filled empty glasses. Oh, wait - they were never empty!

Our order was taken quickly, bruschetta brought to the table (we didn't order, it was automatic), olives...

The menu is pretty extensive (and very affordable) - but we were in Bari so had to have the orecchiette - I had it with frutti di mare (clams, mussels, shrimp and a fabulous red sauce), my wife had it with turnip tops...the juxtaposition of earth and sea was pretty amazing.

I am not typically a huge pasta guy... but... There was not a piece left on my plate. Perhaps one of the simplest, but best, meals I have ever had.

Grazie Zio for such a wonderful meal and a great experience! Magnifico chef!

To the Owner - your employees show incredible love for what they do!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXpFfV4_YrLvZn5STirqda&fid=0x0:0x3f29301ac4e8d935"],"When":"2025-11-20"},{"Name":"Charles Poon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRo77FX4BHZQlFYOFT23W4Ck9DqwU8t8YWLiGrbLoe3fjrAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was referred here by some friends I met, and I honestly don't regret it one bit. It feels like a family-run restaurant, and the atmosphere is so warm and welcoming. The quality of food is absolutely top-notch-everything was prepared with such care and attention to detail. The staff was incredibly helpful and attentive, making sure we felt right at home. It's no-frills, yet the quality is through the roof. The rumors are true-you absolutely have to experience it for yourself. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA87geFk5D1ak-X6lVwO6uS&fid=0x0:0x3f29301ac4e8d935"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Nash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmZBBU_nnznYp3b75VcG3NZ4VRdD9VEDH_knm42UbQbvScgnj_IA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came around noon and were sat immediately, but waited about an hour for food but they brought out complimentary bruschetta! The line to get seated after we got drinks got very long. At least an hour-hour 30 minutes wait time.  It was absolutely worth the wait - fantastic pasta! Very good portion sizes and amazing flavors. Really nice atmosphere outside with mix of tourists and locals.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwO5CWXkNv2GJ07-9yWpqI&fid=0x0:0x3f29301ac4e8d935"],"When":"2025-10-25"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Vlad Krem","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfsSxfiVeGMo8NvOkenoWKHurc6dsFpVcxk--VxpDZoxfS9TU8vg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was recommended by a local and I would say it was a total hit.
We went before rush hour and had a lot of tables available, but shortly after that it filled in quite quick. The menu is simple and not very big, mainly pasta. No pizza. And some local favorites. However, is something that surprised me that a restaurant with such a good recommendation in history didn't really follow the way the food was served.
We did start with the salad but we also had appetizers and main courses so we got the salad. Then we got the main courses and we kind of got the appetizer at the end which was a little bit weird.
Other than that you could tell that they are using good ingredients and local products because everything seemed fresh and made well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDO3W6eH5fqa4MUbbenn-1I&fid=0x0:0xca08c6f58a45dc7c"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Tiberiu Dragnuta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXt0X8VU6C2tJ6EAWRSgZo4FuGzr79hO9cDrdgVhhvkhECd_8gR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good experience and friendly staff. The food and the drinks come pretty fast and the vibe is really nice overall.

The food is good and I definitely recommend the Assassina pasta. The Ragu pasta was missing salt and cheese also the meat had some fat parts in it, we didn’t really enjoy it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCq9aTqJSdDB-5xaewb54NT&fid=0x0:0xca08c6f58a45dc7c"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Diane Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbBsNNVzbA4zkTIFB06TxaorfMWYxxKvOpRh6eFBna-3MIcuYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Was attracted by the Google reviews but was greatly disappointed after the experience. First, service was lacking as we were directed to a table in the most crowded section and directly beside a heater that was blazingly hot. We then asked for a change of seat but was given a shrug to choose anywhere on our own. Secondly which is the most important, the food was overly salty. The orecchiette was salty to the extent that I could not swallow more than 3 mouthful. The antipasti platter was also mediocre and not worth €25. The serving was big but given the taste of the food, it is a problem rather than a plus. Overall, it was the worst meal I had so far.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAoXLgI2oG2FSwuNanV7PoR&fid=0x0:0xca08c6f58a45dc7c"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Alexandru Haiduc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXN3j2ckA3roBY6Sfc6KfFyqkRhTRdOLyQiozuz5pvF8X4JHeti2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food and great serving! Tables are so close you must talk to people next to you. We met an amazing Austrian older couple and a great dinner sharing oppinions on our traveling experienced.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtWTPxhiMwVivuPDoSpIbd&fid=0x0:0xca08c6f58a45dc7c"],"When":"2026-2-17"},{"Name":"Brigitta Sch.J.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzd3V4ueNaj1hEPV7UjzXBNPMnDHZ_PFMML-7i4FpnSeJIQKkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food was delicious and the size is more than enough. The atmosphere and the music also great, but when you go to the bathroom and saw the dirty background and toilet are both disgusting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0UOJgiBq6VncN6TjDj4qf&fid=0x0:0xca08c6f58a45dc7c"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Natalie Asbo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXohrSFoQc1i_u3K6XcT9IBoC6PNsWhdWWMQ-wgr0sGe_3oecI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was gorgeous! Large portions and very reasonably priced. We went at lunch time and there was no que which was fabulous.
The bruschetta starter was amazing and good to share been two!
I had the beef ragu which did not disappoint.
My husband had the fungi spaghetti with truffles and it was absolutely amazing!
We are so delighted that we got to try this little gem. Worth the visit","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBIwxlCceLUREneh4dhbUBa&fid=0x0:0xca08c6f58a45dc7c"],"When":"2025-9-8"},{"Name":"Richard Doolan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVox8NPXFZBIhXIyJcOKmdTncUanIIaBtqp5uK3nUdpS9tJ1mE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A fabulous early evening dinner at Anto - the staff are welcoming, the food is delicious, the vibe is buzzy, and it has a wonderful atmosphere.

Loved the Polpette, the Orecchiette with Stracciatella, the Gnocchi, the Affogato. Lots of locals and domestic and international tourists - nessuno e straniero!

Thank you for the warm welcome on our last night in Bari. 🙏🏻 Everyone should eat here ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBXgGHVp6IVgu7sB4xMl49s&fid=0x0:0xca08c6f58a45dc7c"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Ana Paula Heidrich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUz7VUyRaETImNIUJTMIRrRlj3bjOMIEUEOOx7lz5LlvxKax52=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food of this place was amazing! Based off solely on flavour, I would recommend this place to everyone. However the service is bad, they forgot one of the plates, we had to reorder dessert a couple of times to finally get it and the electric power went down a couple of times while we were there because they had too much things running at once... they charge a 2euro service fee per person so you'd think they would have good service... all and all if you have time and patience the food is excellent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDshlvvrWfos3s5n6Nm0uHw&fid=0x0:0xca08c6f58a45dc7c"],"When":"2025-9-16"}]

[{"Name":"Paul B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOeyt0O01pJ0WYw3RK59CNN-N8BvU7A8_V8loRanQoZFVOHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mastro Ciccio was recommended to me by the Free Walking Tour guide and I am so glad he did.
Though it looks like a fast food restaurant, it’s the perfect spot for a quick, local, and delicious meal. The food is simple, full of flavour and portion size is good and is definitely value for money.
Its modern and comfortable inside, plus it has an outside terrace. Opening hours are good.The queues may look long but the actual waiting time is quite short and worth it.
Only intended to pop in once, but as the food was good,  I  went back the following night.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDy1VMjlpQPS3G1LO56Br56&fid=0x0:0x9eb4a306afb7e7da"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Trinh Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnEassYJgagY31TXB9GR35-agN11mt0bqaU9b1H6L1YRu-5qg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There is this waitress who are super nice and cheerful. She was mistaken with the combo salad i ordered, so she gabe me a bottle of water for free. Even the manager was really helpful and make sure i’m satisfied with the food. Great experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBWYCYK6V_EUBGD72CELdm8&fid=0x0:0x9eb4a306afb7e7da"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Bruno Del Nero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPJ3JfyY8ugEdweormDuaKwJMw8T-zE9UiCyOGf59Pzp7yqyVn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Very disappointing experience. As one of the most recommended places in Bari it was underwhelming to say the least. Expensive, you can get better food around the area for around half of the price. Beer ok not great, the bread was nice, octopus chewy, burrata tasteless, not creamy, tasted like cheap burrata. Panzerotto was ok, nothing special, but we order ragú and received a different one. We were the only customers at the time. Such a shame.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwocnQE4kJI3uv09i5I2k8&fid=0x0:0x9eb4a306afb7e7da"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Raluca Puiu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVx497b5gun52eZalEjs0bBU3Ce-nU01c_Q5nzgKGoO-LE-r6f=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In the heart of old Bari, on Corso Vittorio Emanuele II, lies MastroCiccio – a place less formal than a traditional restaurant, but full of personality and energy. The brand presents itself as a declaration of love for Puglia: “Mordi la Puglia” is their slogan, and every panino, fritto, or specialty served seems to tell a local story made from simple, carefully chosen ingredients. Nothing more original, nothing more authentic: Puglia in a panino – the MastroCiccio Bari experience.

Bari has a special kind of energy – a mix of sea air, sunshine, and good vibes, where food is not just nourishment but a way of life. Here, among the old streets and the smell of freshly baked focaccia bread, we discovered MastroCiccio – the place where street food becomes art, and every panino tells a story about Puglia, flavor, and passion.

The name MastroCiccio hides a story of resilience and determination. It all began as a childhood nickname, linked to the stature of Fabio Mastrandrea – the founder of the brand – but over time, it became a symbol of his personal journey and transformation into a mark of strength and professional success.

Founded in 2002, MastroCiccio has grown steadily, and after more than two decades in the world of fast gastronomy, it has become a benchmark of quality and tradition in the heart of Bari.

At MastroCiccio, the menu overflows with panini featuring octopus, burrata, panzerotti, seafood sandwiches, and other typical Puglian products – all displayed at the counter, ready to catch your eye before you even sit down.

Memorable flavors between ambiance and crowds

The star of the show is, of course, U Pulp! – the octopus panino. The octopus was tender and perfectly seasoned, while the bread was crisp on the outside and soft and juicy inside. At the same time, the panzerotto and burrata left their mark with creamy texture and Mediterranean flavor. Although the crowd almost made us give up, every bite proved that the wait was worth it – the intensity and freshness of the dishes make MastroCiccio a stop you simply can’t miss.

Another dish that caught our eye was the Burrozza Biancorossa – a burrata reinterpreted in a spectacular way: lightly fried until the outside turns golden and crisp while the inside stays soft and velvety. Under the delicate cheese crust lies a flavorful filling of Modena IGP mortadella, basil pesto (without garlic), olive oil, and a touch of pepper. The result is a delicious contrast between creamy and crunchy, between the delicacy of burrata and the boldness of the filling – a true homage to Italian culinary refinement.

An exotic Panzerotti also drew our attention, and we couldn’t resist trying it. The New Capagnore is a spectacular reinterpretation of Puglian tradition – an explosion of flavors that surprises from the first bite. The black dough, made from Altamura semolina and vegetable charcoal, hides a creamy, aromatic filling: slow-cooked octopus, silky burrata, melted mozzarella, and roasted tomatoes that add a sweet-tangy note. A parsley and anchovy pesto, completed with extra virgin olive oil and a touch of pepper, ties all the flavors together in perfect harmony. A dish that combines visual beauty with refined taste – intense, Mediterranean, and unforgettable.

Raffo beer completed the feast perfectly – smooth, refreshing, and full of local character, making room for the octopus to dance freely.

Tips to make the most of your MastroCiccio experience
• Visit during off-peak hours (after lunch or in the early evening) to avoid long queues.
• Definitely try the octopus specialties or those featuring local stars like burrata and seafood for the most authentic experience.
• Eat your sandwich soon after receiving it – it’s best when fresh, and you can always take your photos first.
• Bring some patience – popularity comes with crowds.
• At lunchtime, due to the high customer flow, the indoor temperature can rise a bit (perhaps also because of limited air conditioning) and space can feel a little tight.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANdbF6svYssyYHjMNarRnK&fid=0x0:0x9eb4a306afb7e7da"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Enrei Pata","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIwyQyrUrUS5oo5MBJN5VJrsbf4318ONTjorI3-QEwxHL7S3sC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited Mastro Ciccio in Bari and totally understand why it’s so famous! I got the Moooh menu with crunchy pulpo and my girlfriend had the orecchiette con le cozze — both dishes were bursting with flavor and perfectly cooked. The place was packed, full of locals and tourists, but the staff handled it well. We paid around €31 for two menus including drinks, and honestly, worth every cent. The cute atmosphere and quality food make it a must-visit in Bari’s city center.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8IZr70XAuvzO3mqId-AkX&fid=0x0:0x9eb4a306afb7e7da"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Yasen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNuLdeN6463kD7IGDCprOisKXVXiy-TZmuDyeb9ePH0S7KPVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A must-visit spot in Bari! They serve amazing octopus sandwiches — big, fresh, and incredibly tasty. The portions are generous and full of flavor. It’s a popular place, so you might have to wait a bit during busy hours, but it’s absolutely worth it. Definitely one of those local experiences you shouldn’t miss while in Bari!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqMCvclq_bkyO1v0bR-GDG&fid=0x0:0x9eb4a306afb7e7da"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Dávid Friedrich","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7Iw6brZwANduUmsqjTj1gQKsdxQkB57RKqM6N4U3OtW5rLbJz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A recommended place to eat if you come to Bari in my opinion. It is kind of a fast food restarant, but not the typical one, that is a huge plus.
For me the octopus sandwiches were the favourite food in Bari.
My only negative comment that the cozz&  pupozz we had in the menu, was very oily/greasy. All the other food was delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyZXVkmxsOIoiyO2z7IyJ_&fid=0x0:0x9eb4a306afb7e7da"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Irena Valcheva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5MAgQWtTFZRiSgBpsFPqDnqAo5nAHCY9aHRnsO2OPl0GQXc2r=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was amazing!  I haven’t tried anything like this before, it was an unforgettable experience. Service was great, the food was ready on time despite the huge amount of people that were coming on the never ending queue!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7CqC4izjkj6sdGPkYclvM&fid=0x0:0x9eb4a306afb7e7da"],"When":"2025-10-25"}]

The total cost was 30 euros.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBfact9nAVo5YP9pW4oOqr-&fid=0x0:0x3f11c7257f9f5ced"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Marlene Rusnak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIgy65DY59PuSoc07TqPVZ5NLDlMGCgnlWON5FhnNa7iZP-Jg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved Gola!! It was our go to place when we were staying in Bari. Everything was wonderful from the staff to the creative food menu to the hours which was so convenient for us. Wish we could have taken Gola with us to Rome!🥰","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA6ktynmQuDrbdVQH67h2kL&fid=0x0:0x3f11c7257f9f5ced"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"Adriana Z.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfHRV9oe6hccMG8-zkUxiewDLVl-GjYftlhKYuWoP3i5jBG44p2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a dinner party for my dad's birthday last week here and the quality of the food was beyond spectacular!

Fresh, tasty and very well presented! You can tell they do their job with passion and attention to details!

Being a vegan blogger myself I was very pleasantly impressed about their knowledge about dietary requirements, intolerances and cross-contamination.

I'm definitely going back when in Bari!

You must try their "assassina". It's their signature dish and the best one I've had!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRi9_72AE&fid=0x0:0x3f11c7257f9f5ced"],"When":"2023-4-10"},{"Name":"Sara K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOqCizYAGKPaj6pw4E-rgGCSQYF_FmrqoP3JTCr-r_nrbgLNzj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a lovely restaurant! The staff were so kind and the food was just incredible. Seriously, me and my brother agreed that the “Pulp Fiction” was the best octopus we’ve ever had and not to mention it was presented so beautifully!! The pastas were also amazing with freshly made sauce and you could just taste that it was made properly. I recommend coming here especially to try the octopus.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC2oYabMQ&fid=0x0:0x3f11c7257f9f5ced"],"When":"2022-4-22"},{"Name":"Cory Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5Fhaapx8f4_0iT8vyXb_U1-fgueMkHFDxVG6tdzBpYs4zAw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One word for this place - amazing!

From the moment you walk in, you feel like part of the family here. The owner and his staff are extremely welcoming and keen to ensure you have a wonderful dining experience!

We had the octopus, caprese salad and salmon to share as starters and all of them were amazing!

For main, we had the famous Puglian spaghetti all’assasina (even better… with gluten free pasta)! As a symptomatic coeliac I felt very safe eating here and all of the staff were very knowledgeable about cross contamination!

After travelling throughout Puglia, I can say that you will not find a better spaghetti all’assasina anywhere else!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAHZXC-2w2_DHiMPwWz52O&fid=0x0:0x3f11c7257f9f5ced"],"When":"2025-7-12"},{"Name":"Yiannis Verginadis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKNkGT-CPDIWb-sXVKAt9AkZ_2rQ9pNuDczNNfQV_f6R_wCEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good restaurant! Big portions and really tasty food! Try the tuna carpaccio! They also offer the homemade chips with BBQ sauce as a starter! The guy who served us was so polite and fast! Don't forget to tip!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICur52VuwE&fid=0x0:0x3f11c7257f9f5ced"],"When":"2022-8-9"},{"Name":"muhamad rausyan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLhs7npCYofLJFjxLBLiohqzbW_gMppOopJk1BOyiMOLwHIE5c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered a spaghetti with prawn, it appeared delicious to me. [{"Name":"José Isaac Velasco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFIX5i0lmykKOVGPa4c60Tsn_HM1un53IZW6oeTuZeyyirt1oh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was top notch, we decided to eat here because it’s difficult to find Georgian food where we live. Everything was so good and tasty. Georgian wine was also impressive, we came here twice in our stay in Bari, definitely a must.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzbdbGCGD-j8LnBNyFJQd5&fid=0x0:0xd4edf21f956bc195"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"Daniel Eng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxIrszGkB7uFfewklbLgPQOuge99dZmcZtXWefV9CBYr947PI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We really wanted to try this place when we found out there's a Georgian restaurant in town. The people that served us were from Georgia. This is our first time trying Georgian food and we loved it! Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIlaAz_4KqBGYwVlB34g1c&fid=0x0:0xd4edf21f956bc195"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"Marc Katsambis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6jyjyDbsOrCHytZk9pkK_bnLeKU6cX_jjhALjvK4vxVJfHVc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful meal at Old Tbilisi. The Kubdari, a decadent savoury cheese pie is a must. The kebabs and dumplings were both full of flavour, with loads of fresh herbs and spices, and the meat was deliciously juicy.

The service was very kind and friendly, too.

If you're looking for something other than Italian cuisine and want bright, fresh bursts of exciting flavour and quality food, give Old Tbilisi a try. You won't regret it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJqQ_7GdjoPLqAE&fid=0x0:0xd4edf21f956bc195"],"When":"2025-5-17"},{"Name":"francesco cisternino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV79BqZtoop_sv_JswfW9Ib7qMMlDzIgRODNCWP9kZInrOcUCTd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Last night, my partner and I stepped into Old Tiblisi in Bari with the curiosity of culinary explorers who didn’t even know what to expect—no map, no guide, just two hungry hearts and empty stomachs.

We decided to play tasting roulette and ordered a little bit of everything. The standout stars were the tender meat dumplings—each bite bursting with juicy, savory goodness—and the little spinach-and-walnut meatballs, which had just the right balance of earthiness and crunch. But what truly made the evening memorable was the hospitality of the owner.
It's to be mentioned that it’s rare these days in Bari to find a spot that isn’t just another sushi joint (don’t get me wrong—I love sushi, too—but it’s everywhere!), so discovering a place that offers something refreshingly different was a real treat.

We left already planning our next visit, eager to surrender our taste buds to the owner’s expert recommendations and dive even deeper into the Georgian flavors. So if you’re looking to escape the ordinary and embark on a deliciously exotic journey without leaving Bari, Old Tiblisi is your passport.

(Picky eaters from Türkiye here ahahah) Delicious food, great presentation, and flawless service. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKr2ut-n2Nv_cQ&fid=0x0:0xd4edf21f956bc195"],"When":"2025-5-6"},{"Name":"Matthias Boepple","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJXwYKuLKYHnfdr8U0mIEmoZuECGrrzAJOsTKQKMp9pmGxbew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Having been to Georgia half a year before my trip to Bari, I had no guilty conscious taking a break from Italian cuisine for some authentic Georgian dishes - and my expectations were surpassed! Delicious Khachapuri, khinkali and eggplant salad with some fruity wine (Kindzmarauni), only small minus point was the slow service for people sitting outside. Also good coffee and pastries for a small breakfast. Overall good value for money as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICD_LzRBg&fid=0x0:0xd4edf21f956bc195"],"When":"2024-3-25"},{"Name":"Kristina Laova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZMaGHE5hbEyU-w4WRbpVnsTxnd9X4fS523zgPVN7KhO29FfI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best Georgian restaurant in Bari! Amazing staff, food and drinks, reasonable prices, definitely recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4DSCs8dLtnqx_-8kqoiLm&fid=0x0:0xd4edf21f956bc195"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Afag Ahmadova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbAWJLcXZYqLu9YMuiJFin5Q0igNVZzhxTv8FU3NNwkt4hGLQC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Being a huge fan of Caucasian cuisine, I really appreciated the food there. We took different meals among which there were khinkali, ostri, khachapuri with egg, grilled chicken and eggplant rolls with walnuts - everything was yummy! The service was great, the host is very welcoming. The location is also great as it is situated in one of the central streets. Prices are very reasonable, the bill for two people was around 40 euros. All in all, I definitely recommend this restaurant if you are visiting Bari.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZ-vnkiQE&fid=0x0:0xd4edf21f956bc195"],"When":"2023-9-9"}]

[{"Name":"Jeremy G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXEzj1aad0VIrFiFc8DYgAYRBlBVX_1Mi9GECHQFBUl6208Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I ate here on 29 May. Food was incredible, and I was really surprised at how large the portions were for how they were priced. The lobster was huge, and for only 40 euros… this would have been double the price in many spots in Western Europe or North America. The service was a little slower as it was a Friday night, but hard to complain when the food is this great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELmZ1K3Vz8H1twE&fid=0x0:0x48276b5b8f02272a"],"When":"2025-5-31"},{"Name":"Wali Andrade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWefozeg9d2xfs4b4_ZQ1NQuOCkkAG_AqgD7p8N1pNc0laZ6ao=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super cozy ambient. My friend and I went there looking for a risotto we saw online. Although it was no longer on the menu, the chef kindly accommodated our request and it was simply incredible. Our server Gabrielle was very polite and professional. 10/10. My favourite dining experience in Bari","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQP0_yxOtdCWAPcDihd52k&fid=0x0:0x48276b5b8f02272a"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Kate Cast","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWht-FBH2S_BBJZsMqaSMi1MX-TorsyFCrO50oBXQgyLZkIda3r=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very nice presentation of the plates. Very nice atmosphere. A bit antic style but also elegant. Great service. My branzino fish came with kind of sweet salad and and potatoes cake gratin which all together is very particular mix but not really my taste. My bf took pasta with branzino which was well balanced and he really enjoyed the combination of red grapes with it. They also offered us a small “sporca musso” which was small dessert as thank you from the restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZ2pXO4gE&fid=0x0:0x48276b5b8f02272a"],"When":"2023-9-8"},{"Name":"Solène Aubert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnrdV-tUL6oB7hKo2TxqkyT2NdUBUfb_1sW4U2jTaxxLRD1LYP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing time at Ristorante Opera.
The service was amazing and quick. I ordered the tris tartar and the crab spaghetti and it was delicious. I highly recommend these dishes as they were both full of flavours and very fresh.
The prices are very reasonable since it’s high quality food, I ate for the same price in other restaurants in Bari where the quality of the service and the food were not this high. I went here by myself and was offered appetizers and  sweet treats at the end of the diner.
The atmosphere is warm and intimate, I think it is an amazing place for dates as well.
Best restaurant experience so far in Bari.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC91Lq6Lg&fid=0x0:0x48276b5b8f02272a"],"When":"2024-3-2"},{"Name":"Francesca De maggis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqjGdTNYK0dKEBz-fKAZchHZeQLBcggNnWpA3EWwOAt42ozQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great restaurant!!! It’s guarantee of high quality Italian food, great service and elegant location. Very particular Italian dishes enriched with international preparations and ingredients. SUPER RECOMMENDED!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1kdzU8QE&fid=0x0:0x48276b5b8f02272a"],"When":"2023-12-31"},{"Name":"Enzo M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdfzCA5bS2sy1bR6TfZjfnff2VMnP0k6_q_j8m8Xn60P9KMciUxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good seafood restaurant in the central part of Bari next to Town Hall. Great friendly service and elegant ambience. I love the more adventurous combinations of seafood with fruit and acidic tastes and this makes a place for pleasant surprises prepared by chef Lello Lonigro. Very strongly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDCloDiYg&fid=0x0:0x48276b5b8f02272a"],"When":"2020-9-25"},{"Name":"Alan Egan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVlDMa_vp-pGsavnt0ZEusrD9EtczImFLu0gDFFbSKU5_QDDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Unhappy Staff. After a rather grumpy perfunctory greeting by the female maître’d followed by a very minor ordering confusion (waiter’s issue - he was pleasant though) from then on there was a real dampener on the meal. Happy pills needed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Maria Frezzotti (Andrea F)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUU7kmm3TwWI_p3SLmHxZnS_MY4ilgrCtFQzvbVD_aYnCuOgcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Lovely little spot near Bari Vecchia. Not many tables inside, is better to book in advance. The spaghetti Alla chitarra with Nero Di seppia is a wow. A bit expensive but is worth it,  the service is great a bit too much on top of you but nice and they gave me the bill even if I did not finished my wine, very bad but anyway I enjoyed the food","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLnZ7jUg&fid=0x0:0x48276b5b8f02272a"],"When":"2024-6-29"}]

[{"Name":"Lisa Collins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLclBlv81hFZcfpK2QSjfmDWN3wuhhbyCJd56SzW2WSRMjNAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious food, fantastic service in a great location! After a fabulous first meal here, I loved it so much I came back again and again! The food was fabulous, authentic and unique (like the chef had carefully crafted each dish rather than feeling mass produced like in some tourist spots). I liked that the portions weren't ginormous, they were just right - so I could enjoy an entree, main and dessert (and limoncello, of course). It's also in a beautiful location in the square, and the staff were amazing - Angelo was my waiter, always very friendly and helpful despite my limited Italian! I will definitely be back on my next visit to Bari!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBu9Ikde6Iw7A43ADuNdQaj&fid=0x0:0xf1c8deb9e8f8a451"],"When":"2025-7-18"},{"Name":"Frederic Evers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdqcD4_kkS8A9oLw_EUq-OkIjFaawxIGJpj1BCBWL8YqH1-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic diner. All above expectation. I see people judging the menu but do not hesitate. So good and friendly. Don’t mis this opportunity. However, the white wine was excellent. The limoncello at the end was a kind gesture.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBHuNhS3AOWtPFKEsmzK5wR&fid=0x0:0xf1c8deb9e8f8a451"],"When":"2025-9-17"},{"Name":"Hilen Gomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYyTOwQXZWrLTdHJuhHzQDCp-99WW_1wLjnnRIQQC0x1hTyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellence 🌟

The food was absolutely delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCQQz8gwUaOMk4L0n5cqh5&fid=0x0:0xf1c8deb9e8f8a451"],"When":"2025-8-30"},{"Name":"Jamie Henderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFlKsyePp5rsyg_wDEHHrHMAgFOBIGhNjejmKE_SHITunJsV3z=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In town from London, and this is an easy 5 stars 🌟. Leagues above the others with miserably long queues and tacky music. It’s great food, served in a stylish atmosphere by exceptionally friendly people. We left stuffed to the brim with pasta and travel tips. We ate too quick to take great photos, t’was gorge.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8-tx92UoXHJg9sMW9FpIV&fid=0x0:0xf1c8deb9e8f8a451"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Natsu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyid7-1uB7PFJvRR-Lmo06-JWG5UsoeHaVaAbJllfJ8SC-dg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Il peggiore esperienza di Bari perche ci sono tanti bravissimi servizi & buonissimi ristoranti nella quella zona. Purtroppo non vale la pena per gusti e servizi costato quasi 60€.

Patate e cozze era troppo salate e grassa, la mia pasta vegana era buonissima(ma tanto olio!) ma servizi (quella signora solo parlato in Inglese molto strana invece noi abbiamo vissuto a Firenze e capito perfettamente in Italiano anche se ho avuto la faccia asiatica😅A me disrispetto quando parlo Italiana e cameriera risponde Inglese ma non corretto...altra signora era brava, ha avuto rispetto e tenuto Italiana)  e atmosphere strana😓

First time ever we had a bad experience at the restaurant in Bari. In general, sud Italia's service at the restaurant and cafe are very good as they are kind and nice(simpatici) so I had never treated such a weird way. We normally speak Italian since we lived in Firenze and my hubby has worked more than 10 years there, also I love italian language, and no problems speaking with Italians but a waitress person kept trying to use weird english even if we responded in Italian....why? Because of my asian face? The other staff was kind and managed all of our conversation in Italian, explained menu in details very well.

Loved their artsy plates and interiors but the seats that they booked for us were inside alley where all the staff and customers came and went all the time (and not the vigorous vibe but only busy, uncomfortable) so I couldn't relax and enjoy our meals for that.

There are so many good places and serve great vegan dishes in Bari so I wouldn't bother coming uncomfortable place with unworthy price and treatment again.

→to respond to their response: It doesn't mean anything if their english is incorrect and not well explained. If a staff rather explained better in Italian than English knowing WE SPEAK ITALIAN, then which would be the better as a good service? Normally clients don't appreciate rudeness, I think you better learn it rather than explaining a thing that was not actually happened(she was not explaining the menu in English, the other signora was perfectly done in Italian) in my case.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQlMfTcw&fid=0x0:0xf1c8deb9e8f8a451"],"When":"2025-3-2"}]

[{"Name":"valentina caruso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb54fhoOx5NWeT4iD4YsckJzKg15sftOdoceedruchE9Wj0Vf7FQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top-notch experience! The food was absolutely excellent, and the restaurant itself is beautiful—it has such a great atmosphere.
A huge thank you to our waiter, Nicola, who was fantastic and made sure everything was perfect. I was also so impressed by how well they accommodate gluten-intolerant guests; it made dining stress-free and delicious.
To top it all off, the price was very good for the quality you get. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5RGcPkRBW5_3xWUCF5nWu&fid=0x0:0x8afebb1b74ab9c54"],"When":"2026-3-8"},{"Name":"Захар Ткач","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXV4MbvtTxBO7poS8AJJTtQT6AiefqlPmtcgJB0CX2kBQkV_oIc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow. The food is really great and I'll describe it more in detail but first I want to say about the service. It's great. Waiters are very friendly and nice. We got a plate of raw seafood and realized we don't like it raw so they just took it and fried it for us.

Pasta assassina with octopus 10/10
Great texture, the octopus is perfectly cooked. Served beautifully and flavours are on point.

Grilled octopus 9/10
Delicious with perfect texture. It seemed very slightly overcooked for us but still very enjoyable

Fried seafood 10/10
Juicy and very flavourful

Highly recommended!
The place is really loud and tables are pretty small, I guess that's the only things someone may not like","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCrEzsNW1DB6qxGG7AcRfF0&fid=0x0:0x8afebb1b74ab9c54"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"sharvina lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9n2XzSCcZKOzTAZ42eB_i04Y3A6F5_NIz0UR3BgaLXzJnjQE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"When 2 of us entering the restaurant the waiter keep us outside and told us we need to order at least 3 courses, one starter and 2 main courses, after we said it’s totally fine then he showed the table.
I think it’s a bit rude to be honest, never have this happen before.
The foods taste good and fresh.
Price is a bit higher especially for the see bass, which is around 500 gram, it cost us 52 euro for one normal fish. I had the same dish in Rome and Venice and other bari restaurants , it cost around 20 to 30 euro. Maybe the owner can answer me why it’s so costly?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCW5ZBDhuHYJgp9rpVBzo5q&fid=0x0:0x8afebb1b74ab9c54"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"CAPATINA ROXANA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXN7OxCNsuEegMiaVIi5ISA8f4m7lIbIjWzMBO2ZRf63HQVSPoBrg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"2025.11/ The dishes were ok, average, nothing unbelievable special.

[{"Name":"Justyna M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLkiSPu6TWR50yRHM3S4nVwoIo4KDNViDK9mjnkVKL-qU6LQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On the last evening of our trip, we saw all the great reviews and decided to go — and we’re so glad we did! The food was incredible — the best steaks of our lives, and at a very reasonable price. All the sides, from the salad and potatoes to the wine, were amazing. We can’t wait for our next trip to Bari so we can come back to this restaurant! And we can’t forget about the staff — every single one of them was so friendly and helped us choose the perfect dishes","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3GdJmSQhZz55mUyaFeW8W&fid=0x0:0x4c0530e672101c57"],"When":"2025-8-5"},{"Name":"Magdalena Georgieska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOogP15WBKnht9wKW7PdiURXE9iTj_KAM6FXOGiU9lIY9h=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Antonio was very pleasant and he gave the right recommendations regarding the food and wine. The Spanish beef was well matured and full of flavour. The gorgeous slice of grass fed beef was marbeled by yellow fat. The beef was cooked to perfection, medium rare. The starter was equally impressive and consisted of tartar Angus beef and raw sausagees. The price was reasonable and the service was excellent. This place is highly recommended 🥰","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQCyPC1xX9CHdR008ZwWzp&fid=0x0:0x4c0530e672101c57"],"When":"2025-8-30"},{"Name":"Alexander Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGuhPYEXD9nxW6HNvOEmWawnJlsr9LG8AqgyVOtO7W37nVIFNi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very tasty meat, perfect doneness and beautiful presentation. Cozy atmosphere, polite and attentive staff. A great place for those who appreciate quality steaks and good taste.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzfS_9ZrtNswn9mATXzNPg&fid=0x0:0x4c0530e672101c57"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Cansu Kaplan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt3_I5ItiEaxbxq9mCkRTyTccHMbTmtvZftBr28aiP4VtUBSsX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We didn’t really enjoy the raw meats. The cooked meat, however, was quite good, and the service was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBr1UvlqBMapExkyRlqgwxw&fid=0x0:0x4c0530e672101c57"],"When":"2025-10-4"},{"Name":"Lucas Scheiblecker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK8teOCFIdPCfoBE_q1uFe970HD8wo1dxh5PYvAkNz-F-szLw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing food. The quality and Selection of the meat cuts was outstanding. Great execution. Definitely a top recommendation","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQB7irSCsXDaV2HqGUBClK&fid=0x0:0x4c0530e672101c57"],"When":"2025-11-3"},{"Name":"Rob Speld","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzheFbX1GbzSR-KhbU7GU4CR1TY29oonz5pGYSXjAxyweUcOELIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The quality of the meat is excellent, cooked with care over fire and full of flavor. Prices are very reasonable for what you get. The sides and condiments are quite basic, so there’s some room for improvement there. Adding warmer lighting could also really enhance the atmosphere. Still, a very enjoyable experience and a spot I’d gladly return to.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATBnuKN_LvVptYFFUa2n_V&fid=0x0:0x4c0530e672101c57"],"When":"2025-8-8"},{"Name":"Lukas Gruncl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5f6MCr4axW57hIUFVsWeu1ZFMioOc_S2eI39lEqq2KCpMh4M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An Unforgettable Steakhouse Experience at La Moderna Brace

Everything was absolutely perfect – from the first bite to the last sip. La Moderna Brace offered us not just a meal, but a full-on culinary experience with flawless service and a warm, authentic atmosphere.

We had:

🥩 Japanese Wagyu Carpaccio – silky, delicate, and beautifully balanced.
🌭 Raw Sausage – surprisingly refined, rich in flavor, and a true highlight.
🔥 Black Angus T-Bone – bold, juicy, perfectly grilled – a steak lover’s dream.
🐄 Swami Wagyu Rib Eye Steak – simply extraordinary. Incredibly tender and full of flavor – it melted in the mouth.

And the best part? All of this came at a very fair price, making this place a true hidden gem.
If you’re looking for one of the best steak experiences in town, La Moderna Brace should be at the very top of your list.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqgiTm2V0avOHtmI1xXbk4&fid=0x0:0x4c0530e672101c57"],"When":"2025-7-19"},{"Name":"Laurent LAURENT","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJrRK8QKi87CEGAMPgCSKj79tjKwtH0lfMjsEwG76VnZKlCow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A diamond in the middle of the real Bari where people really live and not in "rbnb vecchio Bari".
Meat from around the world is cooked perfectly
Wine is amazing and not stupidly priced.
Same for the meat.
And the service is very amicable.
An amazing dinner worth the walk.
I will definitely come again !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAUs0T8EWA5o6B8kJTj8tZW&fid=0x0:0x4c0530e672101c57"],"When":"2025-8-9"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Tzu Wei Lin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuTsGpy76fXuNWWY8UYkKvZ1jUoTZzaTzp8Oh8eUT_MCFklts=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"My experience at Le Nicchie left me rather confused. I was torn between a low rating and a three stars, but three stars feels fair.
The servers were polite, however the restaurant was clearly understaffed, especially for a busy Saturday night (full house). Only two servers were managing both the dining room and terrace, running food themselves and covering every table. Given the price point and upscale positioning, the level of service fell short.
Once our orders were placed, service quickly depreciated. There was no quality check at any point, and our mains arrived while we were still eating our starters. The starters were mediocre at best, as for our mains, my “riso patate e cozze” although was flavourful, the mussels were regrettably overcooked, and my partner’s “orecchiette alle Nicchie” was too salty. Plates were not cleared, no side plate was provided for the mussel shells, and table maintenance was poor throughout the meal. Given our server was busy, we quietly finished our meal instead of addressing our concerns.
We would have liked to order dessert, but the servers were overwhelmed and unavailable, so we asked for the bill and left.
On the way out, I noticed a staff member or manager, lady wear a black suit, sitting near the entrance watching shows on an iPad while the service team was busy tending to every single tables, a missed opportunity to support the floor.
Overall, Le Nicchie feels like a hit and miss. If the restaurant aims to be upscale, additional staffing is recommended to better meet the expectations set by its pricing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAY_dFSqNXLoVJbVk0O2rc&fid=0x0:0x340a2366db0c0c97"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"Soare Andreea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLI9A6EHY6F1hqRoZFcJJrVGPguvkp0oQbKTH5GMPedcuKI2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great restaurant! We went almost every day  and we were delighted with the dishes we have tried! They have the best food, the best service and the best vino della casa! Also, for dessert we highly recommend torta della nonna and panna cotta!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzFCbT9uI0C_YtsDc4CYvZ&fid=0x0:0x340a2366db0c0c97"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Pelin Kahveci","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcjR23LTEjrK2TItK0lDDBBDDqVSIVtm5IGdPQOAD4F-SkUBuc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I loved Le Nicchie! The food, athmosphere, the service etc everyting was amazing, perfecto! I went there for dinner, tried seafood pasta w a local white wine. It was so fresh and delicious. The staff was so kind in serving and suggesting good selections depending on your taste. The portions was big enough for me, the wine was local and w mild taste. I loved the seafood in the psta, all was fresh from the sea. I can say they do the best seafood pasta in Bari! The place has an outdoor sitting area so you can sit on the stret and enjoy the view of old Bari! The staff is so nice and friendly; the atmosphere is romantic and just good for dates. Indoor restaurant is also nicely decorated and you feel a local touch of Apulia. The prices are reasonable compared to the food and quality service. Centrally located in old Bari! Highly recommended, a must-try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArUz0Jhe7jo8eBKNsgiSwd&fid=0x0:0x340a2366db0c0c97"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Cédric Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXf8EDNtMHRjtTYT1iitZ9r809xXrWl6G-8SBUAaxGrROCV8tU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This charming restaurant is located in the old town of Bari, near the sea on a picturesque little street, with a nice and quiet terrace. If you don't mind spicy food, you should definitely try the local specialty, spaghetti all'assassina. All the other dishes we tried we very good too. Top notch, simply one of the best restaurants I've been to in Italy, south of Rome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDykg1QmLrkx1jIP0pn2Vd4&fid=0x0:0x340a2366db0c0c97"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Gian Coppola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzlLzOYOQ0mLkIlemTXdrgOQ0y7FEDQZMk06qNAY-CYYzCL7aa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you're visiting Bari you need to eat at Le Nicchie. The food is fantastic and very traditional, I would highly recommend the grilled sea bream and octopus, along with the Ragu. The staff are all lovely and very attentive, as are the owners! When we went back the next day with more people and kids they were really accommodating and were great with the kids. I couldnt recommend Le Nicchie more, make sure you get there early/late or book in advance!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzm_JYBy9epgSIctzal2bf&fid=0x0:0x340a2366db0c0c97"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Damian Górecki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjWLDRXc1JuFSMvpNelNtyYTDZLUXwEbiWO7Hy3jWNppmZUNnL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is where we had the best dinner during our stay in Bari. Everything was delicious, so good. The biggest surprise was the dish made with rice, potatoes, and shells. So simple, so perfect. Traditional cuisine from Bari is great. I’m also delighted with the pasta with zucchini, fish, and shrimp, I love these flavors. Add to that fresh sea bream and very good white wine. What more could you want? The restaurant is located on a side street, it has a cozy vibe. Fast and friendly service. You need to make a reservation because it's a popular place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANE8CFmhbzFteqNmSTxALI&fid=0x0:0x340a2366db0c0c97"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Karina Aneva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdUuESF_rNCqnnG0bdY7wDTIbZ_A_mpnmAuOm9dPpj0tfc1dpt-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience! The octopus was tender and tasty, the seafood pasta full of flavor and variety, and the tiramisu creamy and delicious. The waiter helped me choose a perfect wine. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_fiNoVKuPLGUi9EInat5x&fid=0x0:0x340a2366db0c0c97"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Michael Goff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPe_CYXFa6JhkgRZvc65_utGlEhRIX1yaytBKUK3Ggb8kTHIOk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The ambiance and flavors were everything I was waiting for! I ordered the cavatelli ai frutta di mare, and heaven was served. Nestled inside Barivecchia which already spills over romance and adventure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSiyyyGCRgO_oo-LWct1dV&fid=0x0:0x340a2366db0c0c97"],"When":"2025-11-21"}]
