Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUrAn1r9f6tfC9WX19U5Ra&fid=0x0:0x8c4d7db2e335c7f"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"Stephen Ryan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUk0hksL_KYFji9hjSQDzf4rqAIv2jlF61mm8wDXuDC-PXe_0shRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice small restaurant.  The staff are excellent, relaxed but at your service.  The dishes were a good size and affordable, but inconsistent across our selections, some better than others.  The wine was good but a little pricey.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRN0sz4tFrIZfU8hvWXk_n&fid=0x0:0x8c4d7db2e335c7f"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Dani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCBiN_PfrdKkXhD9QUMkixCMafekAw_x2hVQBUkovGWZT3roM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nikolaus – Il Bistrot Dal Mare is an absolute must for seafood lovers! The freshness of the dishes blew us away—especially the raw seafood platter, the perfectly cooked scampi, and the tagliatelle with baby octopus, which was out of this world.

The portions were generous, the prices were more than fair, and the friendly staff made us feel right at home. We loved the casual, authentic vibe—no frills, just incredible food and a great atmosphere.

If you’re in Bari and want delicious, fresh seafood at a great value, this is the place to go. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCvqu7HXTOGKUH2Eizgs8y-&fid=0x0:0x8c4d7db2e335c7f"],"When":"2025-9-8"},{"Name":"William Garnsey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUtvr30UUWwl41FgZxzSpXOKoQ2aIMU-bH-GEgESSA04Bx8PyS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I came here upon a recommendation from my Airbnb host. Claiming this was some of the best seafood and owned by by fishermen. The service was just fine and the environment was fine. But unfortunately the food really did not have any flavor. We had to primo piatto and to secondo piatto. The fried calamari was the best dish. The grilled vegetables were totally without flavor. Fortunately it was not a super expensive meal. But I truly was disappointed as I've heard so much good things about the seafood in Bari.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBwyNJ46i7xaZmV1FMCBRc&fid=0x0:0x8c4d7db2e335c7f"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Long Way Down","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW65Q7gDPbMpaHHr5CQ3ZPH1KHFXOfVbGYgbyr4a1jC17jt-ytH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fantastic carpacio and tuna tatar it was truly delicious 😁 staff was nice and spoke English so communication was easy. Didint like the paper plates. But I definitely recommend to check the place especially for the raw and fres fish.
Price was ok similar to other places.
Pasta was also very good 👍🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOglrx08zKYgCxXrhio_dU&fid=0x0:0x8c4d7db2e335c7f"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Orinta Mikutytė","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1XP-8sMFC-qdMrOLYzJut3I4xloAveIuAolfvnwnSjBma1O4TcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food, service are fabulous! Starter of catalan prawns - great taste, lots of prawns. Risotto with lime, pistachios, raw prawns very tasty, you can taste citrus and fresh prawns clearly. Swordfish was tasty, prepared ok. One star down because of the grilled octopus being too hard and grilled vegetables were too black.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB03UVOL3FCTjn4gwAE9J4c&fid=0x0:0x8c4d7db2e335c7f"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"Daiva T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFct4lfjvP6cQp6AEsbleVudG9GFXvtJTF600jxBngrfBJsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best raw seafood I've ever had. I've specifically asked for some extras and all was served with a pleasure. Great people are working in the kitchen. Good and fast service. The environment is very simple. Even the taxi was arranged. I think I'll go back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAu1bkcO9tZOphQjYzLfv9i&fid=0x0:0x8c4d7db2e335c7f"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Ashley Ng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJozhjVziu0RtWNyOUJj65nXvdLbk28RCpSDKWgaCMCLBuREg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Apparently three generations of this family have fished in here in Bari and it tells with some of the freshest seafood you will have. You can also see fresh produce displayed at the back of the restaurant that is named after their boat the Nicolaus. Simply done and really worth the experience. We came twice for the baked sea bream.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBA6QgHsKn_iW_GC42vcIgF&fid=0x0:0x8c4d7db2e335c7f"],"When":"2026-1-10"}]

[{"Name":"Molood Arman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBUnwgYVSSLHcuIqf_KXe5v74Dw1y1AnBI6K6aWrBN9iVfph_dYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"C’est Comme à la Madison is truly a hidden gem in Paris! The moment you step inside, you’re welcomed into a cozy and warm atmosphere that makes you instantly feel at home. The space is intimate, full of charm, and perfect for both a relaxed lunch or a special dinner.

The food is absolutely delicious. Every dish bursts with flavor and feels carefully crafted with love and creativity. Chef Mathieu is not only incredibly talented but also very friendly, making the experience even more personal and memorable. And I can’t forget to mention Emma, who is wonderfully attentive and welcoming. Her kindness and professionalism really elevate the whole dining experience.

This has quickly become one of my favorite restaurants in Paris, and I know I’ll be coming back again and again. Just a word of advice: don’t forget to make a reservation! The restaurant is small, and with such high demand for both lunch and dinner, tables go quickly.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Highly recommended — an unforgettable Parisian dining experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzUBXgkQ1MQz0_JpgMVPGH&fid=0x0:0x9a62171ae49b23d8"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"John T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcoS05Sp9ZGTNNXN-nUrFWWDGutANC5tkGcTSbX_0aapftE7Sb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This has become my favourite 100 sq.ft. in all of Paris. The food is fantastic.  The atmosphere is warm and honey.  The service is like visiting a favourite aunt and uncle… who know how to cook.  After chatting with the owner for a while before he opened one evening, I had a good feeling that this was a chef who cares about what he does, and he enjoys it.  After dinner I was sold and I returned every night for the rest of my time here.  At the risk of making it harder for me to get a table, this is a gem, even in Le Marais.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyL2IVlc-GtAlWU8GeM_WB&fid=0x0:0x9a62171ae49b23d8"],"When":"2025-8-27"},{"Name":"Utopia Equilibrium","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGB-2pgeNLUkVCHy7aiu1SNCxLw7Wg8EHmALcT4md5uqPEuw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a special place to dine at.  During an entire month of traveling in Europe, by far my favorite restaurant.  I was lucky to have dined here twice.  The chef / owner of the restaurant is a joy to watch - highly creative and his philosophy to food is all about what is fresh and best for that moment.  The menu changes each day, based on what is best for the day.  Go with the flow, go with the vibe, let yourself trust the chef and you will realise life does not have to be complicated to be happy.  Thanking you again Mathieu for two lovely meals in Paris.  I hope to be back one day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCNUotDP6win7GDQehoQUou&fid=0x0:0x9a62171ae49b23d8"],"When":"2025-7-9"},{"Name":"T Basaraba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK56T3yh6CoYsRpY5L4wpnK8h3lHVpI5vXe2soRxu6xedPVyg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was fantastic!  The food was out of this world delicious!  The service was top notch!  The best meal we had in Paris.  Make a reservation.  We watched several people be turned away because they were full!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDf8tXHd-OnM7iZwDF9Jz9y&fid=0x0:0x9a62171ae49b23d8"],"When":"2025-8-25"},{"Name":"Noor Tunnicliffe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6ZlFUcq8s6xnhpYrlQcGsM4vhzkdPz3UkD8iGslwAilzWZdRp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mathieu was extremely friendly and talked us through the entire menu. The food was excellent, especially the clams! The environment and service was brilliant. Would definitely recommend this small but exceptional gem to everyone in Paris. :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQuuPstAE&fid=0x0:0x9a62171ae49b23d8"],"When":"2025-3-3"},{"Name":"Haydar Celik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhSNLa9lQh9jnhjkivshJKtLKytp-XMFjg8oPR7eQ4Z2FPHhzo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a very pleasant experience. Home style dishes. Very simple but flavorful and delicious.
Smoked herring was my favorite. It was so fresh and full of taste.
Snails were good. I am not an expert of it.
The sausage was very light and delicious. Loved it.
Lastly, cream brulee reminded me how much sugar we consume in the US. Almost felt like it wasn't sweet enough, but definitely delicious.

Owner and the waiter were so kind and friendly. They tried to accommodate everything I asked. Customers were also feeling the home vibe.
Will come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn75GDsAE&fid=0x0:0x9a62171ae49b23d8"],"When":"2024-10-1"},{"Name":"June Tan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzOl8o4_H1W1CU1Beq2vEKSrwn5IdbV63WIkXI6prtdB7NU-k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the best meal we had in Paris, and we were very thankful and blessed to come across this lovely restaurant by sheer luck. This place is so cozy and the boss is so nice! Food feels homely and healthy and we love it! Everything seems to be made with extreme care. Pricing is very reasonable too. This is Paris best kept secret spot. I hope they stay well forever!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnrp6J0QE&fid=0x0:0x9a62171ae49b23d8"],"When":"2024-10-6"},{"Name":"Caroline Woodford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWweDDL8KzhgzHMxegyIyCz8C1VpMnL8fecTYQMUL39KCPpnblW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stumbled across this gem while searching for a foodie approved restaurant to have dinner on our girls trip. We were tired of the trendy tiktok spots and I'm so glad we made a reservation here. From the moment we walked in we felt welcomed and at home. The servers were so kind and Chef Mathieu is some sort of comfort food genius. Every bite was perfection, the herring was the best bite of smoked fish I've ever had. The fleur de sal, the wine, every detail was exquisite. Chef was even kind enough to share with me his pickled onion recipe. I will dream of this dinner for years to come I can't wait to come back. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Eric Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeLJiG6uqkpGs5iafQW7gzvC2_3R0PVEyR6ypyyvcos6A8-bQk_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went to Sphere after hearing a lot of praise, so expectations were naturally quite high. It’s a French haute cuisine restaurant that’s clearly well regarded, and to be fair, the food does live up to much of the hype.

The dishes were beautifully crafted and genuinely delicious. Thoughtful combinations, clean flavours, and strong technique across the board. You can tell there’s real care and precision in the kitchen, and nothing felt sloppy or rushed. From a purely food perspective, it was a very enjoyable meal.

That said, the overall experience wasn’t perfect. Service was alright, but could definitely be better. Nothing went wrong, but it lacked a bit of warmth and attentiveness, especially considering the price point and reputation. It didn’t quite match the level of care shown in the food.

The restaurant is also very popular, which means tables are placed quite close to each other. Seating felt a little tight, and at times it took away from the sense of intimacy you’d expect from a place like this. Conversations from nearby tables were easy to overhear, which slightly broke the mood.

Despite that, it’s still a lovely spot for a date night. The setting is elegant, the food is impressive, and there’s a refined atmosphere that makes the evening feel special.

Overall, it is a strong choice for French fine dining in Paris. Great food, good ambience, but service and spacing could be improved to truly elevate the experience from very good to outstanding.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5Cnon5bYVZDKNDiHIXEPi&fid=0x0:0xe1de61d4b89d1efb"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Imen Ghribi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYPWgUEK2XL48tHm_1z9zoL0liqlLV5xyKd_GqqP4US-tcUDoo8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Excellent business lunch, though a bit slow
​I visited Sphere for a lunch with friend. The main courses and desserts were beautifully prepared and delicious. The atmosphere is perfect for professional meetings. My only minor critique is that the service was a bit slow, so plan for a longer break if you are on a tight schedule. Overall, a great experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOsb4zbKSR4I_ujDRQUHal&fid=0x0:0xe1de61d4b89d1efb"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"R C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLM28yuRl9wzzKHVsb_nJkUaVzjlwxLjkkMHnDCBSZ9J_XSmw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an absolutely amazing time here.

This was our first fine-dining experience, and Sphère did not disappoint. Everything—from the atmosphere and ambiance to the service, food quality, and overall experience—was superb. We had the six-course tasting menu with the signature mocktails, and every dish was fresh, creative, and delicious. They also surprised us with a special birthday treat for my partner, which was an added bonus.

A special shoutout to Adrien (going by the name on the receipt), who was fantastic and considerate at introducing each course and taking great care of us.

100% recommend Sphère and would love to come back the next time we’re in Paris.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPXW9wL261fLJAS5miVeAC&fid=0x0:0xe1de61d4b89d1efb"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Yvette Hunter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmipBSFR-tgL5fJFdqO39PC1eQYwSL2My4fVCuix1Xki__afQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Celebrating a birthday as a solo traveler I always treat myself to dinner in preferably an upscale restaurant as a treat.  The Sphere made spending my birthday in Paris a memorable evening.  I became ill that morning and was reluctant in keeping the reservation however, chose to move forward and go.  The service proved to be excellent even prior to opening.  The service, decor and food created an atmosphere not to be forgotten.  During dinner I received an unexpected response from physician in the United States requiring that I go to the hospital.  On leaving the hostess was very gracious in assisting me in finding a hospital.  I left The Sphere feeling calm.  I want to say “Thank you for a lovely evening.” Food was delicious and enjoyed surprise birthday dessert.  Only regret, not being able to order three course meal. My next visit to Paris😊🎂❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCcghR70FSzAFW0eyUaRrhn&fid=0x0:0xe1de61d4b89d1efb"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Joan Iborra Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjDjm18WelSghtcpWe9s4_vLcGtLcpJZ1LGTvqZqyGKiayVA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My partner and I opted for the 4 step menu, which started with some little 4x one-bite dishes, a marinated seabass starter, a cod dish with a prawn and a black Angus steak, followed by a fig dessert.
Everything was delicious, you really get value for the money and I would really recommend. Maybe the 6 step could have been an idea as well, but with the 4 dishes we were nicely full and didn't feel like we needed more.
The service, in our case our waiter was Nils, was very good. They offer to adapt to our tastes, allergies, etc., gave good drink recommendations and was very attentive!
The atmosphere was nice, the interiors nicely decorated, we felt very welcome and comfortable all the time.
So, if you have the time and are looking for a fine dining experience outside the Michelin star category, this is your place to be!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYRnK7pXFvkvXc0wmvbdtp&fid=0x0:0xe1de61d4b89d1efb"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"Jaroslav Mida","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJrxV0SNhIlr_KqKIjBsnxHdJFsM7V9R8ABZopI6y2gTVyx3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved the place, food was very good, Neil, the waiter, was very kind and knowledgeable. The place is quite big, so it is a bit lost whether its fine dining or not (given the amlunt of tables). On the other hand, for such good food the prices are affordable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBXBkyClsCdbr_H1zGcXkpB&fid=0x0:0xe1de61d4b89d1efb"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Debbie Bradley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjrKWsXJqscEf-Sq_BCLVTFuaJ8ebkSouLEm2cPhKENudNlg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was one of the most enjoyable meals we have ever had. We have many dietary restrictions in our group and our waiter Nils worked with the kitchen to make sure we could enjoy the 6 course tasting menu. Highlights from our group for the night were the scallops, the lamb and the hake, as well as the mango “pre-dessert”. Nils spoke excellent English, which was helpful as we only know a few key phrases in French. We would definitely return if we have the opportunity.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCokAnEaHcUlTK2e6-TxkRy&fid=0x0:0xe1de61d4b89d1efb"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Madison Just","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuxZx1Twu6evEM_bT2w4YZVZkhulExZPqGlKO3VaP0eT3B-g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for a reasonably priced tasting menu to share with our family and Sphere had such great reviews! Overall, our meal was very good and servers were attentive. It was not the best meal we had in Paris but the price was okay for the quality of the food. Would recommend for those who have not done previous tasting menus and those who are needing high quality food for business - this was more a business environment than date night / family meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAw840IOZ5F74-895-tGaIK&fid=0x0:0xe1de61d4b89d1efb"],"When":"2025-11-28"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Karen Tuson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7Yd2Kv1EmZXLuwf6R2MhOGnX7LsqapPs-bzuYu30YrlJtfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great atmosphere- restaurant is full of both tourists and locals alike.
So good we have visited twice during our stay (2 ad 1 teen and 1 child)
Waiters very friendly, courteous and helpful. Menu has both traditional French and also Moroccan. Large choice and everything cooked fresh. Standard children’s menu as other places, would be nice to see something different.

Would recommend and I would gladly return -  a great evening had by all. Thank you Chouchou","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZiM0xH5kTPokCli-VrQLN&fid=0x0:0xa168c03346f62a0a"],"When":"2026-2-17"},{"Name":"ZL w","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIFxBPuQbn6qbnt8dGtwp6536PyF_-_CxSCrt7bs741BujD_A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food is really great here. Rib steak and confit duck are perfect. We also had some crêpe and brûlée, which we really enjoy. People are kind,and thank you for them providing us with good mint tee free of charge! We had a really joyful time here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALsuxXIMvqq5um_A5ULXay&fid=0x0:0xa168c03346f62a0a"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Karina O'Flynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVi0YvolGfEVVGXc_Tq3twZCd5PETytCh7yUKAEsLjAJ1DrJm6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stunning, stunning, stunning. Food was stun. Both the salmon tagine and the salmon in crème sauce were DIVINE. I actually cannot recommend these dishes enough. The crème sauce was surprisingly rich and decedent and had such a depth of flavour that paired perfectly with the melt in your mouth salmon. The tagine was yum yum yummy and was served with a huge plate of couscous.
The service was great and had some really good drink recommendations","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzowh6puoSwDxaqcN_3Zqw&fid=0x0:0xa168c03346f62a0a"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Megan Russell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL6fHNudu3FPsXN21GvjUjSBxwHlHvZmOQvfew5cudI5RiPssU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the best meal of my life here. The duck confit was genuinely the most decadent thing I have ever put in my mouth. The potatoes with the sauce were also amazing. They took Amex. I can’t say enough good things about this place. I’ll be back, and I’ll shout the good word to everyone I know who finds themselves in Paris.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRW3AZ8VpcqNtlbrZxQRb0&fid=0x0:0xa168c03346f62a0a"],"When":"2026-3-2"},{"Name":"Zoe Dahse","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXltK6hAisAAvOIzESUgU5Y9-mmrnrUitrKDdlD6MGOKQ8ot7V8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In the heart of the city, this place is a hidden gem - fair prices for extremely delicious transitional French, and North African cuisine. The duck was crisp and seasoned well, and the cous cous with lamb was a perfect flavor combination, and the staff (anis) was super friendly and helpful to show us exactly how to eat it. Also historically known for serving chouffe, a delicious Belgian beer that should not be missed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpoFKUQpRGHlj6aDgwXSuo&fid=0x0:0xa168c03346f62a0a"],"When":"2026-2-17"},{"Name":"CK Seethor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUVRkcLTJabcQILFNSfuIF_M-3pp1XgJm_7dFfILSiMmLsnIiBvbw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have enjoyed a lovely meal at Chouchou. The lamb and chicken couscous was wonderful. Large serving sufficient for my wife and I. Special thanks to Anais who served us warmly and made us feel welcome. The complimentary hot mint tea was an unexpected and pleasant touch to the end of our experience there!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAK0kHEl-K8p4-esz5_stFC&fid=0x0:0xa168c03346f62a0a"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"ManSze Yeung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKDHEfu4qe48EB01knis08EEC8dAwCR5r918rjm8EckTFRojg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is an excellent place with an amazing formule menu that is delicious all the time. It's great value for money and the food is made very well. The staff are helpful and quick and very attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZTOSqnIjVCj0VSJJWHEkC&fid=0x0:0xa168c03346f62a0a"],"When":"2026-2-26"},{"Name":"Patricia POH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCV9xmOkf0lcFYfrtlY0U9zW0I-33BhUS4Xcr8_f6-a1ph0MAd=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very attentive and friendly staff,
Good food and portion big for us. Must try the duck confit, creme brule and tiramisu...yummy! Recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRqbefnThGDZGf-hKrEoL3&fid=0x0:0xa168c03346f62a0a"],"When":"2026-2-20"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Chinchu Jayaprakash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUO3jpaxUG3BGaAVN3CFbSGL5MlRLjrDjkWzav2gubG7DLQ-8Z1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Opera and a dinner! One of the best experiences at a restaurant, ever! The staff are all talented to the heavens, the food is spectacular, and the entire evening went off without a hitch! Amazing and highly recommend it for a special treat!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDHEywzpCwVvsbB5peB3ZF2&fid=0x0:0xec1e3398fd34100a"],"When":"2026-2-2"},{"Name":"Ertan Karahan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGITz_1f4dEJ56MUj8GPjl9sX5AVCs1YQdymoq7a_Q7rs4Avoh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely amazing experience.
Fantastic food, beautiful atmosphere, and outstanding live opera performances.

We celebrated my wife’s birthday, and the singers came to our table to perform for her — a truly unforgettable moment.

Highly recommended for a special occasion in Paris.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kate","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLWOEXeZDrU6auF4uZcXzdTh37B8x2NZeNN7uGN6gmnddmhag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honestly incredible experience, service and food last night. The singing was outstanding!!!! We went with our 3 year old daughter too and they were very accommodating and went over and beyond to make us feel comfortable which I have heard is unusual in Paris at dinner service with kids. I had a very special birthday here would 100% recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_3dvuIw&fid=0x0:0xec1e3398fd34100a"],"When":"2025-1-18"},{"Name":"Matt Frauenzimmer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNNmahdsNzxwJarNLcc0m81h0YeBKWlnZ78aM6OjEpHzbfMog=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow, this place was amazing! The food was delicious, the service was top-notch, and the experience was truly memorable. I didn’t have time for a full opera event, but this was the perfect blend of both worlds. The lovely voices filled my heart with joy as I savored each bite and sip of my drink. It was a truly delightful evening. They even allowed my daughter to sing! Highlight of my vacation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnJKazHpQ9CtCAknFkYPTH&fid=0x0:0xec1e3398fd34100a"],"When":"2025-6-25"},{"Name":"Dora M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsIUy26OOMpXtfbqcwsPdRIQSCKtH3oHrkSJ-2YI3aW3bXAnY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was one of the highlights of my trip to Paris. The decor is theatre-like with heavy curtains, and the nice red lamps on the table. The welcoming staff is nice and smiling. We went on a Wednesday and had the full lyrical menu for half the price. We loved being “serenaded” with arias of different, well-known opera plays. They took especially good care of an old gentleman who had his birthday that night. The food was truly good, full of flavour. I would definitely recommend this place!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-zqvfyAE&fid=0x0:0xec1e3398fd34100a"],"When":"2022-11-4"},{"Name":"Celia SO Paris private tours guide","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0PlModeuVcoK7TpEcSKRJtIY_CawCOZQhwVUOBB4INRdyvkFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food is fresh and delicious. Our waitress Donna had given us good recommendations of dessert, they were excellent !

The singers sang some extraits of opera among us. The best moment was at around 10pm when they invited everybody to sing together.

A nice souvenir for our birthdays.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICjuOKYSA&fid=0x0:0xec1e3398fd34100a"],"When":"2024-4-17"},{"Name":"HJ Park (Rebecca)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUF57Ko-7MVlqw0JSvdaLdShyr9y8AotQ6chAZNF1WifUgLfxx-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Opera singers performing and serving at the same time, which was a very special experience. The food was just okay but the performance was gorgeous. Especially when they invited you to sing along! My friend asked for his favorite song and they accepted the request. Every singer was good but the Korean tenor had a really amazing voice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDho-aD_QE&fid=0x0:0xec1e3398fd34100a"],"When":"2023-3-16"},{"Name":"Robert LaBella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiqBhKVSfD62EVi9INV25KhlXAph83EcqXAzwT220kNi8yVDMHKw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Do NOT miss this place - it's fantastic! The food was exceptional as was the entertainment.

I jad the perfect eggs appetizer which was delicious. For the entree, I had the "chateaubriand" and it was probably some of the best steak I've had in Paris. The vegetarian canneloni was great and the yellow poultry Supreme was incredible - the chicken was so good I wish we could have had more. (See pics of all).

As good as the food was, however, the entertainment was even better! The singers were very accomplished and sand segments from various French, German and Italian operas. The men and women who sang were also quite entertaining: funny and charismatic. The pianist was fantastic, too.

I highly recommend Bel Canto, Paris as a great place for a wonderful meal. Don't miss out!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR_8LypwE&fid=0x0:0xec1e3398fd34100a"],"When":"2023-4-14"}]

[{"Name":"Aaron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUk4_NAhMyDInLJvg_LeUNb_Z8Pm8XFykLxvkLVvDr6FVnneDM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I discovered LouLou on the final day of my trip to Paris, and I wish I had discovered it sooner! Pretty much the entire menu can be made gluten-free, and I was spoilt for choice; if I had stayed longer, I would have liked to return to try many dishes. In the end, I went for the fish and chips.  The location is a short walk away from Notre Dame and Pantheon with Metro access nearby, but it is worth making a special trip to visit, especially if you are gluten-free.

The food was really good, it was super tasty and fresh, the batter was crispy, and the fish was of very good quality. The salad was good, especially with the dressing, and I also liked the pureed peas too which elevated the dish. Portion size was slightly small, especially for the price, but I did enjoy my food. I did find this place to be a little pricey, with my food coming to €30, there was also a small fee for paying via the QR code, so I opted to pay with a waitress instead.

For my drink, I went for the orange iced tea. I wasn’t a huge fan of this as it was slightly bitter, but again, it was fresh, and garnished with a generous chunk of lemon.

The staff were friendly, although I would have liked them to repeat gluten-free back to me so I felt more confident and relaxed eating here. The overall ambience was pretty comfortable and relaxed; it felt like a casual vibe yet with high-quality food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBYV0SxezryIYC-N6qUOwbY&fid=0x0:0x31d8bafe75893cec"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Anannya Roy Sen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQuVRi7RX2u7c3bRE6vviTh0Z1pJaP9Oyw9WiUziiWE34IP3gKCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We showed up at Loulou without a reservation on a cold, rainy Sunday morning. As tourists, we were hoping to avoid the usual touristy spots and enjoy a more local brunch experience, and this place delivered.

We only waited about 10 minutes for a table, and the service was excellent throughout. The staff was happy to customize my order, adding two poached eggs to my Bali Bowl, which I really appreciated.

We left feeling very happy and satisfied. It was the perfect start to a long day of exploring the city!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCA5Nw1v8xLKKrWJbZFpTwW&fid=0x0:0x31d8bafe75893cec"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Sarah Guzik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1lN97GsHiezjhDBgQ7biEEhioJilgDKK6jXgoDPGz2hJ0na6c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Lots of gluten free options, some dairy/lactose free options also. Great atmosphere and conveniently located near Notre Dame. Coffee was very good! My husband had the eggs Benedict which was good. My banana bread was rather dry but otherwise tasty. Açai bowl was good, but just tasted like banana.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChvx0ReY80GqfX3ZYIHeX0&fid=0x0:0x31d8bafe75893cec"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Maura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXW40T5ZlycRE73aulX-3uoWaZnswc9NwL4fkKTEC0MRHsyYwdC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We popped in for breakfast during our trip to Paris and had a delightful meal! We were looking for a convenient place close to our hotel and I’m glad we picked Loulou. The breakfast was great and the servers were very friendly. We had the Benedict and the avocado toast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHUHrqbF7KMbi-SL-sT2Rb&fid=0x0:0x31d8bafe75893cec"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Faith Adams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7ClZpcbSPHD1VIIBHtjKbUHv3BeKwZIB9mMX_hyrkHZ42RA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was pretty good, I ordered the Benedict and added avocado. The bacon was either too crunchy on one end and then not crunch and slightly cooked on the other end. Hollandaise sauce was really good! So was the recover pressed juice! Our server didn’t come besides taking our order but one girl helped us out more and was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0l7BnoCtw4SSpF60Sl6Z8&fid=0x0:0x31d8bafe75893cec"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"rajesh garg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIoSP9YemUlFd30DJYwNkU1HhE2nuqRhy2WTGuhiW7gkesfyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely place with a great atmosphere. The food and service were excellent—we had the Parmesan and chicken burgers, both delicious. If you’re hungry and want to enjoy good food in a lively vibe, this is a perfect choice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmamEtokj3t8nRsSJp6JKO&fid=0x0:0x31d8bafe75893cec"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Francois & Pam BELORGEY","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUtZaFjMRSARwpgXFz1c9_WNN7vFxzeMo6_K3V2F-M7dqDS6yQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place for brunch or coffee and cake. Australian/French owned. Highly recommend. Roman & Imogen were very lovely and welcoming staff, credit to the restuarant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-lo9R_yP_SnIivi12_JOt&fid=0x0:0x31d8bafe75893cec"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Zachary Wood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPBaDYnxqNMhped53Qq2SXbTIKyxEby8igmP5D76d8CgwNSzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best French toast of my life. The apple French toast had such a fluffy yet custard texture, and also the apples were cooked like a tarte tatin. The side of bacon was cooked really well, and the flat white with oat milk was well made. Definitely a good spot for breakfast in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJq1jj11qFWj-iEpklxF8i&fid=0x0:0x31d8bafe75893cec"],"When":"2025-12-4"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"STEK TAN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMlrMavkULH3hhLXTeZIA0jQVvZtZHmS5GkZhjCVjo4yXd5a2J=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This was one of the few places that my daughter requested us to visit while in Paris. We managed to get an early slot and queues were already outside before opening. We were given seats at the top floor, which apparently is the nicest floor although for some reason, I found it rather stuffy and warm despite being in Feb.

We ordered the famous truffles pasta and the lobster risotto. With great hype comes great expectations and unfortunately we didn't think the truffle pasta was that outstanding. In fact, I have tried much better black truffle pasta and felt that this was good, but not mind blowing like some of the reviews. The lobster risotto was outstanding! Lobster meat, not so much, but the risotto was so well infused with the right balance that both of us enjoyed it to the last lick. Service was attentive and friendly, no complains at all although we found the tables to be a little too small. The only thing I didn't like is that when you tried to pay with the QR code, there was a min tip of 5%. The reason why I like eating in Europe so much vs the US is the absence of mandatory tipping. I would have tipped anyways but felt that they shouldn't follow the US system to put in recommended tipping.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBW1vha416SAG5SNp7mdSd1&fid=0x0:0xc26d9bf3451087c"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"matty weis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQuctFtzZ58YU_O8QZuEqYddwmYm3_wjOb7GO5ZN8GcCIXZ9o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re visiting Pink Mamma, especially as a student, it’s 100% worth the hype.

I’m currently studying abroad in Paris, and this spot was such a fun experience to share with friends. The food was amazing everything we ordered was fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. From the pasta to the pizza, you can tell they really focus on quality ingredients and authentic Italian flavors.

The atmosphere is honestly one of the best parts. The interior is stunning floral ceilings, cozy lighting, and that iconic glass rooftop space that feels straight out of a Pinterest board. It’s literally perfect for photos. Every corner of the restaurant is aesthetic, so if you’re looking for a place to take cute pictures with friends, this is it.

The service was a little questionable at times not terrible, but slightly inconsistent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBEp8Mx-KiCENFtwbrBB15O&fid=0x0:0xc26d9bf3451087c"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Lena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWu0Oze1MTN1k4ud6Cn_snX-IwQXtlC6NpNNyWigxr4V-wo1Fk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We reserved a table right when the restaurant opened. We arrived 20 min early and people were already starting to line up in the reserved table line. Right before opening the staff hyped themselves up by signing. They then welcomed everyone extremely kindly and energetically. It felt very special. We got a table on the top floor where the room was decorated very nicely! We ordered two truffle pastas followed by a tiramisu to share. Everything was absolutely delicious. The pasta was not too creamy and tasted in just the right intensity of truffle. The tiramisu was scooped out for us and served on our plate. Tasted fresh and strong- just right. Definitely recommend trying this restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBEHtrlIGsmK9aZmqRv4916&fid=0x0:0xc26d9bf3451087c"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"pawinnamai chaiyaruek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmGHDRlTX7_kVEtyWLhKcwGMG3IJu_ryOLJcyJRYTJlHs4co0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The truffle pasta is delicious. All the pasta is aldente and we love it, give applause to the chef👏🏻👏🏻

Their service is amazing. Every staffs are so helpful and nice. They recommend a dish for us and also willing to answer every request from the customers.

We have to sit on the bar table. I think the place is a bit crowded. And for food blogger, I think the light and asmosphere is so hard to take an interesting picture😆","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAdk9DMyAxyNYX1BavNWwCj&fid=0x0:0xc26d9bf3451087c"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Alexander R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKTLPH1ePt0OaDQkAyZKepQPzeZXnf0Ng5jjvNJtSMTBXlh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good, but hyped. Reservation recommended! A breakdown.

- staff is superb 5*, very attentive, if you’re a tourist or not
- food is quite good, but the specialties are not spectacular. Steak tartare we liked a lot. Burrata pappa nice with red sauce. Pappardelle lobster was ok, not memorable. And the specialty pasta with truffle.. yeah it is nice but I've had better Italian pasta
- full of tourists and not all suited for a nice night out (see Asian tourist who sit in the place with hoodies, while others dress up). The door swings open a lot and it gets uncomfortable cold
- a few nice cocktails and the wine selection is quite good

Nice restaurant, hyped, and we think that a typical Italian would have been a better option. We booked well ahead, as soon as the dates came available.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7e9dXLTUNVLTfUzpEyTUf&fid=0x0:0xc26d9bf3451087c"],"When":"2025-12-25"},{"Name":"Brandon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmRp08NhJKFA_PbpttCbbdeu_Zz5BHa8NWWrYdiwj3VFxrC1AXRA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Extremely beautiful place, we were fortunate enough to sit at the rooftop garden for lunch. We came on a weekday and had a reservation.

The food however, is nothing to shout about. The truffle pasta is quite like a cream of mushroom soup pasta with an ever so slight truffle aroma, however as someone who likes mushroom soups I still quite liked it — albeit disappointed.

The pizza was also quite disappointing, having heard alot about it. The dough was too soft and squishy, and the slice couldnt even hold up on my hand. It was just overall lacking in that body and crunch. The flavours were quite nice though.

Finally, the tiramisu was the absolute worst thing we had. The ladyfingers were so bland and had no coffee taste no alcohol nothing. It was just a bland sponge in a sea of thick cream that also did not taste of mascarpone.

All-in-all, an okish lunch which was made nice thanks to the interior design and nice service. The food wasnt really that good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKg7RXpV26hSO668YLUjSY&fid=0x0:0xc26d9bf3451087c"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Hilla6","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4dXAtGa-yfU-FTPyLEyZK_k7BYHvjQ1UT1gpmYF22erO4HvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience!
Usually chains lose their touch, but not this one.
Excellent service and the truffle Tartufo pasta is to die for (best I've ever tasted!).

A bit of a bummer that they couldn't seat us in the sunroom despite our reservation (I guess we needed to change something while placing the reservation), but the fresh food and great vibes more than made up for it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYaSfx5rF3_6fRK-KPMq2x&fid=0x0:0xc26d9bf3451087c"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Rebecca Tannous","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoBPULqa5todYAQn3brW2C-L36GWSO4QsderzRXAIR3EQVJ_w-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my third time at Pink Mamma, and I have never left disappointed. The food was amazing we loved the pizza, the ravioli was very good, and the truffle pasta was exceptional. It’s not overrated, no matter what some online reviews say. The service is also great and the staff are friendly and welcoming. And the tiramisu is a must!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8I8pD6OuEzNJBT_6GOCqn&fid=0x0:0xc26d9bf3451087c"],"When":"2025-12-29"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Maykou Heu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuq9nabCrML5SnP_uFzC1BvZ0UhhC8Z7DrwVaqBWfB-1CFii86=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"My husband made a reservation for the evening, so the night sky was mostly dark. Not much to see.  So it was not as impressive as I would have expected. Day time would have been a better time to see the city from above.
As for the food, it was unremarkable. Had I looked at the menu, I would have skipped it altogether. The menu was crustacean/fish related. I know that if one can create a fish dish or related dish, it would be a Michelin chef. Yet, there were no explosions of flavors with each bite i took.. I was very disappointed in our dinner, from beginning to end. This is what I remember: the food was a bit too salty in my liking, very “fishy tasty“ instead of disguising the dish to be something outstanding and delicious. The “best” thing is the dessert, the chocolate mousse which I think is worthy of a chain restaurant but definitely not from such a big name restaurant in such a luxury hotel.
So for a Michelin star restaurant, the price was right but not for the food that was served.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAIp_tsiFfuWMne8ZiKwQeO&fid=0x0:0x6568bfb659691796"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"George Lagoudakis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCljv36XaCjUZND1gxzZB07Ivb0rywPKn-t36d-6bWQ40gcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Le Tout-Paris carries Arnaud Donckele’s signature in a way that feels more vibrant, more social, and undeniably more “now.” It’s a dynamic room busy, alive, full of covers yet it never loses control.

The energy is part of the experience: a Parisian restaurant that feels like the city itself, elegant but moving fast, confident, and intensely present.

What impressed me most is how clearly French it is, without feeling museum-like. This is French cuisine with posture and lineage sauces with depth, technique with discipline, products treated with reverence but expressed through modern proposals that keep the food exciting.

The classics aren’t repeated; they’re reinterpreted. You taste tradition, but you also taste intent: a chef pushing forward without betraying where he comes from.

Quite possibly the finest foie gras I’ve ever tasted a bold, modern interpretation that departs from the classic, yet feels impeccably true to its essence.

That’s the real achievement here. Le Tout-Paris delivers something rare: absolute respect for heritage, paired with a forward-looking sensibility that makes that heritage feel desirable again not just “important.”

It’s the kind of cooking that can carry French tradition into the next decade, and make the next generation fall in love with it for the right reasons: flavor, elegance, and the thrill of seeing something familiar reborn.

In short: top-level execution, a distinct identity, and a memorable, modern Parisian experience where tradition isn’t preserved behind glass, but served, celebrated, and confidently carried forward.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUVbhdMNhQ4gKNBmDnNoeE&fid=0x0:0x6568bfb659691796"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Weiting Liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxDMoVJ61h-eMmFUHrAlH_67r2Sm-Q3RohBZCC8Lax9isnujxB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came for lunch on 12/25 and only then realized our reservation was for the following day. The staff were so kind and still accommodated us.

From start to finish, it was an outstanding experience—attentive service, a relaxed yet elegant ambience, and truly memorable food, desserts, and views.

Our waiter (half-jokingly) said dessert would be the best part of the meal, and he wasn’t wrong. Every dessert we ordered was exceptional.

The oysters and the French toast were the best we’ve ever had!

Don’t miss the terrace—the view over the Seine with the Eiffel Tower in the distance is stunning.

Dining at Le Tout-Paris was one of the highlights of our trip, and we’re very grateful for the experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCU2bubYJjEO_L-bZYGppLM&fid=0x0:0x6568bfb659691796"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Shirley Chang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeT57rV3SRX0hqpJ1o7xwZNLQE_E3S2Q3sHTtsh0D-h2LqPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food and service deserve many more Michelin stars. Despite the high quality, the price point thankfully does not reflect that of a 5-star restaurant, exceeding our expectations for value. We had a wonderful time and enjoyed the beautiful view!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWlWRAeDDtj3jVqx1tuZS6&fid=0x0:0x6568bfb659691796"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Christina Huynh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyL-RLdaIOjA5hbaPZqnL2N9vfnHXKObk3ArCw0rHsjIJ-_v1DeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We really enjoyed our dinner here. The pigeon, mushroom tart, and mashed potatoes were delicious! My friend liked her lamb. Great wine choices per the sommelier. Relaxed atmosphere, not a rushed dinner at all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDaq7to2SEadK13Nv4G2nnp&fid=0x0:0x6568bfb659691796"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"Christopher Taylor II","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUR1aDf9yNDzKE1lQM__tJzzbBrTSfuBCk_uwwTd3H4635v4s4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Le Tout-Paris marked our first Michelin Star experience, and it certainly delivered on ambiance and service. Perched high above the city, the view from our table was absolutely breathtaking; definitely an unforgettable backdrop to a luxurious evening.
Service was superb, with staff that made us feel genuinely welcomed and cared for. The food was good, though not exceptional. For nearly $500, we felt the overall experience didn’t quite justify the price tag. Some dishes leaned heavily into complexity, which occasionally made them less visually appealing, though the flavors were usually solid.
If you're seeking a refined night out with world-class hospitality and stunning views, Le Tout-Paris offers a memorable experience—just be prepared for a splurge that may not fully deliver on culinary wow factor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBrhAHMlYSoMUdoZ4NTPSGq&fid=0x0:0x6568bfb659691796"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Oliver Cole","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpIYPgw8z-ksRLTJLwb0wVBpO9ESRQgsELGG1IkZjpbIzoqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a lovely dinner here whilst in Paris.

The views of Paris are stunning and rare to find a gem with such a beautiful view.

The service was very good and highly attentive.

Food was amazing and definitely worth the trip. We had the tomato tart which was excellent, the pork chop which was equally brilliant and the sea bass which was very good

Drinks are extortionately expensive but you know what you’re getting yourself in for when going to a restaurant such as this

Atmosphere is luxurious and everyone is smartly dressed giving it a wonderful feeling for a special Parisian evening

Overall it’s great for a special occasion and would recommend to others","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAp7I5P_25F2xaTdqULjh-b&fid=0x0:0x6568bfb659691796"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Christine Cullis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKzT3hV6kJagW5gxEGghuZfhzOwZQ2Aar_zN5XWXHP_nyjryA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Something very special about the relaxed yet sophisticated ambiance here, food is outstanding - service is impeccable , finesse with a warmth - .Restaurant amazing food and staff are so aware yet not intrusive.  Love everything about it . Sweetest spot in Paris","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJG6wraNpSgL_QUTHYLUkT&fid=0x0:0x6568bfb659691796"],"When":"2026-3-3"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Michael Riehm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSC_M7nGP6H1HIPdGj0Wl1FARtH6JgbInA_KA89h9oMvQCdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited from Toronto, Canada.

What a gem of an authentic French restaurant. This place is small but reaches high with its food. Their french onion soup was refreshing instead of salty. Their main steak tartare & scallops dishes were phenomenal! Lastly they have great daily specials and desserts.

Highly recommend this restaurant while in Paris!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCW87-19VGEN2p9Bn6yxd1q&fid=0x0:0x71c3b2229f4b62d7"],"When":"2026-2-12"},{"Name":"Meow Ne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8z9dVtJlMCpqrcPlHb9-y1p5CaHOendgFih6vMhFS6ujfj9Oh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited this restaurant in July 2025 after a day of exploring the Notre Dame Basilique and it did not disappoint! I tried tartare here for the first time and the meat was perfectly moist, nicely seasoned and tasted fresh. It was my first time to try such a dish, and I enjoyed it thoroughly. I had crème brûlée for desert and it had the signature crispy top layer and creamy goodness underneath.

Seating was plentiful, but I would say that if you come in a group of more than 4 people, you may have trouble finding seats as most tables had room for four chairs. Alternatively, you’d have to combine tables which may or may not be possible depending on how vacant the rest of the seats are. There was also outdoor dining space. Restrooms are located below ground.

The restaurant was well organized and service was relatively fast. Props to the restaurant owner for this one — A group of new customers came by looking for a spot in the restaurant, but it was packed that day and all the seats were taken. We were almost done eating and offered to leave so they could sit, but the owner insisted that we stay to enjoy the rest of our meal. Excellent hospitality that shows they care for the wellbeing and satisfaction of their customers.

Thanks for making my evening in Paris memorable!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDovF3VIPqornFRHvGqN5wx&fid=0x0:0x71c3b2229f4b62d7"],"When":"2026-1-9"},{"Name":"Connor Irias (crsly)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcw9m7tmnFodwgfKMCQoRuJ__zX0kY6j-U9bxPW7OELt9F7R0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredibly delicious family-owned bistro.

Decadent food, fast and friendly service.

Escargot was divine,
Caesar salad was super unique and loaded with yummy chicken,
Braised beef was deeply satisfying and savory.
My partner and I shared all of the above plus two glasses of wine for about 75 Euro total.

Good sized portions,
And the food is so good it feels like it could easily be pricier.

The place is small, so you’ll be sitting close to strangers… but the vibes are top notch thanks to the friendly owners/staff.

My girl and I are so glad we chose this place for our first meal in Paris.
There were some locals there too so I know it’s not some tourist trap.
Real deal fo sho.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCrmG0i1rHhzODe-TB2L1Uy&fid=0x0:0x71c3b2229f4b62d7"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"L Ali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtXy2nlkiUDx1x0lhpeqDB_MxysG2SRanBQ8TdpkoyJ3XnslmLMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very much enjoyed our visit but disappointed.  1730-ish reservation and saucisse was out for the day.  Clothes permeated with the scent of the kitchen.  Beef shin was the best meal of four (melt in your mouth) but the fries were spectacular.

Nonetheless, service was very good.  On the small side for the main dining rom with WCs clean and on the lower level.  Heard of this as a budget buy but not so much.  We would still return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPPXRawkvnGMlTfg206wN0&fid=0x0:0x71c3b2229f4b62d7"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Bobby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL3XLVe3hJacFKbpRVbkhkp54Tyk-2kGTw2tdABAj0We_SFoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here twice, once for lunch and once for dinner and the food never disappointed. Prices were affordable and food was amazing. Would come again if Im in Paris again","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDH6i2IANFr10mI6GrDm2Mq&fid=0x0:0x71c3b2229f4b62d7"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Emma Leibowitz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJkL7GF-xAQ3_oqsFCAX64bqoFal1DxVLpSVvZUR7PKFNb9TQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was delicious, the beef tartar was fresh and tangy from the mustard seeds (we replaced the fries with mashed potatoes) I didn’t take a picture but the burger was huge and it was ground steak. Escargot has a very savoury parsley butter sauce, perfect with bread (ask for extra to dip it in the sauce). Boeuf fondant has great home style mashed potatoes and delicious red wine sauce. I would definitely come back the next time I’m in Paris. Service was decent, we were seated upstairs and it felt like a private room with 5-6 tables with a nice view from the windows. Enjoy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAw-tBfuHcL3SMUxO0kb6nC&fid=0x0:0x71c3b2229f4b62d7"],"When":"2025-8-6"},{"Name":"Viveca Selander","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIJV4PfMJrWKDqKLntJhtiK0VCJvZuRttUyDCgycHDwJWHDgFE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very typical small French bistro. Great location, lovely food and good service. We had salads and cheeze. Very good quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDz7gsAbsTQqbJ_QODnVEuI&fid=0x0:0x71c3b2229f4b62d7"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Gio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHZN_1uq7D8EUs_4rrfsYKCJapiPfJB7c7EPB4wrQcKyFmzFM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A fantastic  dining experience.  They only have two staff serving when we went there.  Despite that, the attention given to every customer was amazing. It was fantastic.  We ordered from the menu of the day.  Price was reasonable.  The toilet is clean. .Would I go back?  Of course!  I am still under the influence of the lovely Chardonnay whilst writing this review😁 i do not lie under the influence!  Highly recommended!  merci!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDol-rWygE&fid=0x0:0x71c3b2229f4b62d7"],"When":"2025-4-29"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Fra Man","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCVdVoADszT21vlbMDn3_xD86UHa15q68vmveQUTOoBnMkR-fc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We had the Grilled Octopus and Zucchini Fritters to share as starters.
Mains were,
Mousaka, Grilled Steak, Duck à l'orange, Beef bourguignon.
Deserts Crème Brûlée, flambé Apple Pie.

Absolutely all meals were delicious, served hot and presented well.
The Beef bourguignon, wasn’t traditionally served in a pot rather in a plate with a side serve of white rice. Nevertheless it tasted great and had enough sauce that I could mop it up with the fantastic bread provided.

Service was prompt, friendly and helpful. They were very helpful with our nut allergies!
The menu has traditional French dishes and Greek.
Paired well with a nice Bourdot wine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDiz9CHLuCLag7PNdnfmBva&fid=0x0:0x1b056f83aebf2035"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Keisho Kimura","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvf7u2i--1yAg5bXy_3gKV6-P-bvOtSH76LfHncTTOpzwO6_o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The atmosphere is lovely — very cozy and charming with a warm, cute vibe. The food feels homemade. The beef bourguignon was okay but a bit bland and lacking depth. I noticed most tables ordered the cheese fondue, which looked much more special. I’d probably try that next time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA2bXJvHrryIIAxJojPF3tg&fid=0x0:0x1b056f83aebf2035"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"C and M Zimmerman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9WUaL3YORsFFjYWNhi8frCkLHHUkbtZM-dwUrt96Jri4DkA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good but not great.  Certainly good value for money and the home made profiterole off the Euro 21.50 lunch menu was excellent but the steak and moussaka were only OK, as were the salad and charcuterie appetizers, and the food really was dumped unceremoniously on the plainest plates possible.  See pictures.  A good deal overall and the staff are friendly and efficient and the atmosphere kinda kitschy and cute and you’d better like bouzouki music.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAivzzPKsiEpRVdnxcY3_s2&fid=0x0:0x1b056f83aebf2035"],"When":"2025-10-26"},{"Name":"Josh Green","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPylP1UnocFPkF6B5OSqJ6vDmCbKh-j8hfLDVctOH6U1VnXWuLPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a delicious dinner here, all ingredients tasted very fresh. The staff were very friendly and welcoming. There was also a good variety of mocktails on the menu that were fantastic. Would definitely come here again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpIUC8Nl-3m1zHCMVet6VY&fid=0x0:0x1b056f83aebf2035"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Taurai Kurebwa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9ra_GXDuaH9nII-OZxrRX0Ewtc3ox9UjfVSkf0-7Ipnmskvwl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Magnifique! That’s the one word I would use to describe my experience at Les Baux de Paris. If you’re looking for a beautifully set small restaurant with charming staff, amazing chef and Parisian cuisine look no further. Loved the plat du jour and chefs recommandations. Must visit if you’re ever in Paris.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBeAu075aodVo0edEdZeT5F&fid=0x0:0x1b056f83aebf2035"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Jane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqBhkRbkhx5ySgfQHcRWibaKmVjp99xaIkxQl9zwjoCvaYPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honestly a perfect meal. The owner was so kind and welcoming. The staff was very attentive and the decor was warm as if you were in a French home. I had the spritz, shrimp with warm goat cheese, and the filet de boeuf. Excellent!! This is a special place. I will return. Merci!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsgig74qka4CzsLJf3LiIB&fid=0x0:0x1b056f83aebf2035"],"When":"2025-10-5"},{"Name":"Belle Reviews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUDgHNJ0pHDVRsG65XwhBnVySvbwJ8n4rOR6uDXgIZRyeWWTHj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t rate this place highly enough! We were lucky to get a spot, were seated and our order was taken within minutes and the food came faster than we anticipated which we appreciated. I had the Boeuf Bourguignon and it was hearty and melted in my mouth. The food is really well priced. One of the best food experiences on our trip.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAe79vM444a5pKdppqqqSEZ&fid=0x0:0x1b056f83aebf2035"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Gavin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7AEA4QVq_N7jl3C7ssrSoqwp1Qx_Rj6V2WxWWj3NzOZxJLtVMpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great find
So we walked up and down Rue Mouffetard searching for a suitable restaurant. We started with Les Baux de Paris, but continued searching, just in case something even better was about. But we came back to it as it was the most appealing. The blonde lady who runs the place was very friendly, and very funny. She offered us an English menu - her own English, by her own admittance, was a bit weak, as is my own French but we got by fine. The waitress was also very good, friendly and has good English (thankfully) and also a good sense of humour.
There is a 3 course menu, which although called a Lunch menu, we were allowed to order from in the evening. It's good value (and the tap water in a jug is free!) . There is a "Sirloin with pepper sauce" and NO! You don't have to pay extra for it, like you do at home. I got it, and I liked it very much.
I promised them I would come back again, particularly as I was staying at the Young and Happy hostel immediately across the road. As we were out late the next 2 nights, we never did, but we made a point of going back there for our final evening, so impressed were we by them. Sadly, and unusually, it was closed that particular evening which was disappointing. But if I'm in Paris again, I would definitely go back ... even just for the laughs I had with the manager and the waitress - and the good food too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCBBg9jERpC0i_Fgdcshj16&fid=0x0:0x1b056f83aebf2035"],"When":"2025-9-15"}]

[{"Name":"C M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCB7STEltQFvi-2J5FsjS5GOtTDDThJOk7awwBX1oVsq6IiOaD0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A fun, colorful, and casual protein joint in the middle of town. The location was great and easy to find. The food came out real fast.
The portion was good and priced very reasonably. The meat was ok as well.
Service - efficient.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3RdYblXPMj8ro7HyOAJzD&fid=0x0:0xe1412a79ed1449bd"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"eliane kahwaji","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUu7Ka0ZxO_0TViS1eZFfq2o6zas7I5KqG3QTySN40plpm69lAxBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an incredible find! My friend and I stopped by La Brigade recently, eager to try their famous basquettes, and they definitely exceeded our expectations. We were two people and ordered one regular beef basquette and one regular chicken basquette, which was the perfect combination to share and sample their best offerings.
The food was fantastic. The beef basquette was the highlight—the meat was tender, rich, and flavorful, truly feeling like a slow-cooked masterpiece. The accompanying sauce was savory and perfectly complemented the beef. The chicken was incredibly juicy and packed a great punch of flavor.
The fries served with the basquettes were perfectly crispy and seasoned, too. The service was quick and friendly, and the atmosphere was vibrant and welcoming, making the whole experience highly memorable. If you’re craving high-quality, satisfying street food, this is absolutely the place to go.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3ikQemerc5RPiF9DPp5MZ&fid=0x0:0xe1412a79ed1449bd"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Cristina Alcaraz Chacón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWixParIp8FiddRJwdhyNdDCpMn9idum_383D77dpmxDqZ6ZK4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely place. Even as foreigners and without speaking the language, it was easy for us to order. The food was delicious and the staff very nice. We were served by two very friendly guys; I only managed to ask for Jeffrey’s name, but honestly everything was perfect! We hope to come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMx_d829jqbBf3JIpBNblx&fid=0x0:0xe1412a79ed1449bd"],"When":"2026-2-6"},{"Name":"C Yap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRewh4YckKdMXBhgvCG937R_N2QeuRjaDZFkYGjc5qvZ_KN-2-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Might be the best meal my husband & I had in Paris! Food here is definitely better tasting than most of the more proper looking Parisian restaurants we ate at. (at least for us) and MOST Definitely a great value for money for Paris/European standard.

Food is cooked well, good portion size, place is clean and organized, servers are friendly enough for Parisian standard 🤭 The Foie gras add on was well worth it, big serving and cooked perfectly.

The only thing I’d say that didnt quite like is the brewed iced tea. It just tasted watered down.

Overall great place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8m3tn1Ga9h9BzPRuwx2en&fid=0x0:0xe1412a79ed1449bd"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"İpek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnyRnQTrFIoN5sswyG5Jh3lWzq-0E0MFZ4_bwGEpGBi-gFAXk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered the hanger steak with pepper sauce and it was perfect. Their red wine was also good, and the prices were reasonable. Next time, I would prefer the meat medium rather than well done. My friends also tried the Roquefort honey sauce and the béarnaise sauce. The Roquefort honey sauce was very good as well, but the béarnaise sauce was a bit bitter. Definitely give this place a try if you’re visiting Paris.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAq9sZR7VD3suUGr0Wq0mGp&fid=0x0:0xe1412a79ed1449bd"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Fatima Alshammari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKoQiHQCCGm5jT5rEA5zxT7v5PgShoKp6gHZknUM-GuHao50Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amaazzinnggg food and staff!!⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We had beef and chicken you get to choose the sauces for me I had the pepper sauce it was delicious with the meat I enjoyed every bite of it! The fries were hot and fresh🫶🏻
Even the meat bowl was so nice. But the classics are the best for me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAF5OepPN5NoFbjG6dlggXP&fid=0x0:0xe1412a79ed1449bd"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Nareman Magdy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpwoIGFy3ZpLzFeNsh09sljmDsD2jdLyU_6tOngTe88zVYVd0n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food here was amazing. As a beef lover, I don’t come across places with good protein portions in Paris, this was one of them. If you have a big appetite I’d recommend ordering the 3 protein options plate. Loved the steak, we ordered all 3 kinds to try them all and the chicken breast was really tasty. My only regret is that I didn’t order more food.
Service was a little slow but it makes sense because it’s a popular place and each steak is cooked specially for you so I understand how hard it is to serve all at the same time
They gave us a complementary coffee for the delay of the order","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByQ_z7VMKUTsyS6aK2MhL2&fid=0x0:0xe1412a79ed1449bd"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Ali Gökdemir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMpGm0Uqne4udwfKzBs6MQH9HD1NDauZOrc7dxcxz9DYs8TRHniw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food tastes ok. You choose the number of meat you want to eat. Then the type of meat beef and chicken we chose, then sauce but sauces was mediocre. Tasted too sweet. The meat was cooked well. But salt is lacking. We asked a place to sit inside if one becomes available waiter said it's not possible as it's full of people. But then a couple arrived and they took them inside. Service could be improved. But overall it's ok.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqJqF65PveL7kC--aqaBYA&fid=0x0:0xe1412a79ed1449bd"],"When":"2025-12-21"}]

But tonight ‘Sacre Frenchy’ made me put Paris above NYC.  Wow! French Cuisine!  3 exquisite dishes. foie gras as starter, sweet bread and snails as main course ( very authentic french. Kudos to Arthur for his great service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBx1XoKGl41b1ZilIeBEzv3\u0026fid=0x0:0xb69d1c31a8140156"],"When":"2026-2-16"},{"Name":"Mai X","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2YCE4BlGjuPvueQNpYv57qch-ufrEqfNg63KQEvbzI3uAJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great lunch deal! From the moment we walked in, we felt welcomed and cared for. The service was exceptional, and our server Arthur was incredibly kind, thoughtful, and attentive. His recommendations were perfect, especially the chocolate soufflé, which was absolutely fantastic. Every detail, from the food to the atmosphere, reflected so much care and passion. We are truly grateful for such a beautiful experience and can’t recommend this place enough. 10/10!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBuE0bUHHk1teCfTFeAvDbJ\u0026fid=0x0:0xb69d1c31a8140156"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"zhi wei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITB0XpASYb_ypbap1PrZ7IsoopdHTqkGPfEPYEFySNvlroLw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great dining experience!\nOur waiter Mathis was very friendly, attentive, and professional. He made us feel welcome throughout the meal. Excellent service and a lovely atmosphere — would definitely come back （if I have a chance ）","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeTIOgISfQadpYUBxMeUbG\u0026fid=0x0:0xb69d1c31a8140156"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Amy Pittsinger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCEkNr-cqgltq830YQWPS2CEBkmhJzws3Rs30qplC_PTIeNa_f=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant was absolutely perfect for our quick 24 hours in Paris!
