[{"Name":"Chenbo Shen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZO3kcGCEnedx_P62K2k90S7r7KxzWg1YBiKf4l2rKcJF8PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was the best meal I had during my trip in Madrid. The set menu was incredibly reasonably priced; €22.50 included two main courses, a drink, a dessert, and a bread roll, plus complimentary ham, cheese, and biscuits. I especially recommend the oxtail; the meat was so tender and flavorful that you could easily tear it apart with a fork, and it was delicious with the crispy fries. The portion was so huge that I was already full after the first main course, and I had to take the dessert home. The owner was also incredibly kind; I ordered a glass of red wine, and she gave me the remaining small bottle. In short, if you want to try Madrid stew, I would definitely recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAa9R0KzNsFELAKFG-Zx4K7&fid=0x0:0x94eb7ad91cc23dc2"],"When":"2026-2-25"},{"Name":"Luka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRA_uEs-qNroI62dvUZPdzGkWlsPYbBikrR0ygPPmxC61gUH8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top tier restaurant i Madrid!!!! Get yourself over here and eat best meat in town!!! From great ambiend when you come inside there are very friendly and welcoming waiters. Is you have some questions ask them and they will find best solution for you. We payed for 2 persons about 70€ and it was worth every euro.
Every time we visited Madrid, this is our must have destination. Thank you guys","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsViMV3Fn7-bEBbPLauceS&fid=0x0:0x94eb7ad91cc23dc2"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"Norm Zurawski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCaW6h3gto1pOrk-lEGwxbUGPhhhmv60kseOM1E5ZCB3iOUaDe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We ended up here based on some IG mention I believe. I cannot remember the details of why but we did. The place was good, probably not necessarily the best place we ever ate but it was good and basic which was what we were looking for. We got a few dishes that were tasty. Again, all of them were good, not great.

Service was excellent and the atmosphere was enjoyable. Unfortunately the smell of cigarettes coming from outside was a negative but that has nothing to do with the establishment.

100% would come back here to eat again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmXYk-7CDaaqC4ZtDkOjkS&fid=0x0:0x94eb7ad91cc23dc2"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Magno Mascarenhas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEGuDsQ5sSsusX3pO8P7Pk-WBCmw7k37Y3-xzyIUUTphqOzaVanw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time in Madrid that was my first spot for a dinner, absolutely lovely food, a huge plate for two people, that’s a lot of food! Also the staff is so friendly and kind! 10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC4SJ-gTPYDD7djqGiz2N-k&fid=0x0:0x94eb7ad91cc23dc2"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Can Brbr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIlnri4NIi-sXNBZD0MAaBK-uUNA64ccDUU4Bp43JBaNoJeNBp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The atmosphere of the restaurant is truly lovely – stylish, cozy, and a great place to sit and relax. Unfortunately, I was disappointed by the food. I ordered a chicken dish that turned out to be very fatty and full of cartilage. It was hard to enjoy, and I had to leave most of it uneaten. The menu didn’t specify whether it was chicken breast or thigh, which I found misleading and led to false expectations. A real pity, as the place itself has great potential.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-SvFpJSAooMvkf0AcBNdC&fid=0x0:0x94eb7ad91cc23dc2"],"When":"2025-7-3"},{"Name":"Rawad Bitar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMj2shriHVythpiq6jHrIjjvwaIb5iLT4dS4jrPxY7q4xaPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice restaurant around the old town. The service is good, the waiters don't speak English but do their best to communicate with customers. The paella marinera is very good. The meat for two is ok, the meat is slightly chewy. The is even enough for three persons. The menu is in English and Spanish.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1jpfWwgE&fid=0x0:0x94eb7ad91cc23dc2"],"When":"2023-12-29"},{"Name":"Akash Paul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3zVnnOfsuvlG_UUMQyvMfFLMM-g3mNJWeHdKkVv7bYbdOusa5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Really loved the atmosphere and it was recommended to me by my colleague who is from Madrid. Tried beer and different wines","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbFoFn-zm8nIZQw1z3rFLG&fid=0x0:0x94eb7ad91cc23dc2"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"siwoo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8rOUoa8sNjZkRVJXIWkUiclg09Uej-Q89--GhtXhESkUFFODm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Paella is fine but oxatail is SUPERB!!! The ham is free but also good!!! Shout out to the ladies who are serving, very friendly and helpful!!!!!!!!! THUMBS UP!!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAmK0uv-winmqmaE5zV_6fn&fid=0x0:0x94eb7ad91cc23dc2"],"When":"2025-12-11"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Laura Brazdze","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRx4MgSNbbKG1uj_Kbz7JQ8-0JyKTA5NLXrAQhwvaXblAkww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Thanks for a really friendly staff. I ordered an octopus - got it delivered on my table in like 5-7 minutes. The dish was warm but not hot. So I don’t know if it takes so quick to prepare it and it’s getting cold quickly, or was it already made and heated. The taste was ok but nothing impressive. Looked better than tasted.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCxI6mNtloq9W8X0G5XTqb&fid=0x0:0x714e51ad654c3d4c"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Sveto Rakovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXELv1h6KNSxjLBZ4irfEkGKjzrypoUHg3izpRjZZ_yFLu388A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Real traditional Spanish restaurant ie tavern. Although it doesn't look inviting from the outside, the inside will amaze you with the intimate and relaxed energy that characterizes such local places. The service is fast and the food is really tasty, fresh and great! Special praise for the moussaka appetizer and ham croquettes. The main course with pork cheeks melts in your mouth! The prices are more than reasonable, and at the end there was also a nice gesture from the house, which treated us to a drink - limoncello. It is worth coming from further parts of the city, especially if you are a tourist!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNkKm-v1YcBxHAFfswV9xU&fid=0x0:0x714e51ad654c3d4c"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Eli Ben Gigi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdulNhOsPtNY65WhbllUQDEAtrENrIZ0UtPWAgJ6qL_Ti9ETgE5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A tavern restaurant with a relaxed, homely and pleasant atmosphere. Excellent, courteous and charming service. And every dish that arrived was wonderfully impressive with a local feel and unforgettable taste. A great place if you are looking for a break for lunch, or just a snack and a drink during your tapas round","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-7vHo2NZV40Z2qcTqgjv6&fid=0x0:0x714e51ad654c3d4c"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Momochang M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJP34HI8VaXwUrUnkc_ada9MlSrOJzCb9zH9yxdlofm1yHABb9q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of the most unforgettable restaurants during my 7-day trip to Spain
The guy who seemed to be the owner or manager was incredibly kind and friendly
He was such a nice person
Every time we called him over to order, he came over saying “Hi brother” and put his arm around my boyfriend’s shoulder😂
He truly made our night
He gave us a free shot of vodka? tequila? e before we even left a tip
We loved his personality and service so much, so of course we left a tip even though it wasn’t required","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAQ1tyBLbOVgX-4N0MI-PD&fid=0x0:0x714e51ad654c3d4c"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Yana Harasiuta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEWuNxTKRU5jpjEkpiUT0jENDpEbhCSoIkwZpv3qkk_yncuOM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We visited the restaurant around 1:00 PM. Although the place was empty, we were asked to sit at a specific table (which was fine and not my main complaint).

The main issue was the service. We waited a long time for a waiter to approach us. Eventually, I noticed the waiter behind a curtain, talking on the phone. He saw us, understood we were waiting, but did not end the call. Instead, he asked the bartender to take our order and left.

The food itself was flavorful, but unfortunately served barely warm. Both my octopus dish and my husband’s veal were cold inside, including the sides.

Overall, I am giving 1 star due to uncomfortable service and poorly reheated food.
That said, flavor-wise the chef deserves credit — the dishes tasted good, they were just not properly heated.( my bad I expected freshly cooked)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmkSUBvG0NLPwyPuxKp4B7&fid=0x0:0x714e51ad654c3d4c"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Coco A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIalt-bNSDrfYHY6jDG9H1u1NXgzsGgkbs1dGTZX2_n_dGCT_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So I saw this place on Maps. Super ambiance and staff. All funny and cheerful. Músic is great. Quite a small restaurant but u can eat at the bar.
Had a paella w seafood. Not an expert of paella but I would say it was very good. I would give it a 4/5. The sangria was good also and they offered me a digestive which was yum 🤩","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbkTDlpKaYzImCj-v2hQ3g&fid=0x0:0x714e51ad654c3d4c"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"hakan olgunsoy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVDjCFbBdLU326lhw312pS0L7JR3RI7fHatR78wyOfov2-fFbC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just a proper Spanish tavern! Liked everything we had. And service is fast, and the taste is great. Price performance is very good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAXpUQ-h9a1DlVs39V1s1g&fid=0x0:0x714e51ad654c3d4c"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Yong Zhi Neo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7a-x4vSLnv15tC5pa4M9gr714ozfb7n6wVp0nX8CPHVD4TQk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went here for dinner. Heard it was famous and turns out it was just ok. Not too amaze but also not bad. It’s those kind of restaurants you will go back again cause it just very casual.

The food is a bit salty tho….. and water are charge for €2.10.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBuhq1rHAucDIaVPD_s8AK4&fid=0x0:0x714e51ad654c3d4c"],"When":"2026-1-11"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sarah T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXU-2jEnkoi-WZ1YPW4rsQInXX5bfQkTgWZFxgOoCxSLrQHuIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cafe Madrid is the best spot in Dallas. Hands down. I take all my out of town friends, family & coworkers here. It holds so many great memories. Earlier this month we had our engagement party here because cafe Madrid holds so many great memories for us! The service was amazing (as always) and the management was extremely well organized throughout the whole process (special shoutout to both Donica and Yasmine!).

We loved the food and all our guests had a great time. If you’re looking for a spot to hold an event or party, this is your place! (And get the croquetas, they’re my favorite!!!)

We love you Cafe Madrid❤️thanks for all you do","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWUSAt_Ev4SR490zKbt3wA&fid=0x0:0x8609a4eaa2c77944"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Deets stuff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL55Ogt9mFVKN0HZBM3O-GJuYh_ZchbBfd7B_SQi0W9h3LuHSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just WOW! What a phenomenal experience! Food was fantastic, the ambiance was perfect and the staff was unbelievably kind! Meeting the owner was a surprise bonus! Thank you for your outstanding everything!! We will definitely be back! ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCztjCKOAZWosTrf92Ze-Fz&fid=0x0:0x8609a4eaa2c77944"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Ray R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvHngl0r_O9MlAAuOqN_viSBM61hOmdXTI_J0c_7-naWlWTisG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The ambiance here is great and the service was friendly, and professional. Unfortunately, that’s where the positives end.

The food was a big disappointment. The paella was warm at best and completely bland. It honestly felt like it wasn’t made to order but reheated instead, especially considering I was dining there about two hours before closing. For a Spanish restaurant, that’s pretty unacceptable.

Overall, this place is fine if you’re just looking for a nice atmosphere to drink wine and socialize, but if you’re coming for the food, I’d suggest looking elsewhere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDys8Ib5ZBeiENh1WsXoN5y&fid=0x0:0x8609a4eaa2c77944"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"mshotokg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdV24yzbt2QpJcHMSMAJtPFhnUgDOZqcNfs74xI0SKnlsKGPaO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great service. They need to improve the patatas bravas! The croquetas are amazing. The pulpo and gambas à la vinagreta are wonderful! The flan with chocolate cake was on the dry side.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBuPXAnoI18BGSQG2bFDm2H&fid=0x0:0x8609a4eaa2c77944"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Haley Brit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHxQGrH9VkvwchSD9vAIQZsn_5Cq4fyf-VhIo7idORiK7jMA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We cannot sing high enough praise to Cafe Madrid! We went on Flamenco Friday and had so much fun. The dancers were incredible and so friendly. They even sang my friend happy birthday!

My friends and I used to live in Spain and we all agreed that this was not only the most authentic Spanish food we have had in the states, it was so delicious! The patatas bravas were the best patatas bravas I’ve ever had.

In addition, everyone on the waitstaff was so attentive and kind. We also had the privilege of meeting and talking with the owner, Donica. She told us the story of her passion for Spain and how she brought that to manifest into the restaurant. It was truly and amazing night.

If you want to support a small, woman owned business that has amazing food, a great atmosphere, and incredible service, go to Cafe Madrid. This would also be a great venue for a larger party or celebration.

THANK YOU Donica and everyone at Cafe Madrid for making last night so memorable!

With gratitude,
Haley, Gabby, Emi, and Erin

(Las chicas de Sevilla)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Peyman Yazdizadeh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIwU5Kb18lF0FN7msFZsn9OgnEYTPO0UHH_OhAmOPZ3DtbwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The tapas were the best I’ve had so far! Diego M, our recently hired server, took excellent care of us. We trusted his recommendations, and every choice was spot on. Thanks to his service, we loved the whole experience.”","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJYfWd0JROxobU5GhdhsZ2&fid=0x0:0x8609a4eaa2c77944"],"When":"2025-8-24"},{"Name":"Ella Schamberger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJw8pkmqeUNvb0nrmguyc5hqtFpNUyFXfxRVQBsQqWts-vfxKk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Caroline as a waitress and she made the experience (which was already wonderful) 10x better! Food and drinks were fabulous and the ambiance was wonderful. Will definitely be coming back for the happy hour!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4plbEq9Vz8rpxslnWp_k-&fid=0x0:0x8609a4eaa2c77944"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Alex Ozlowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvGO549P713CPw8lptLDY0y-CLd0CjIlX0z4ycHnjPpJ-Suw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"we loved our dinner here! it was easy to make a reservation with Cafe Madrid for my friend’s 30th birthday dinner.

the food was delicious. our group ordered plates in trios of protein, carb, & veg, & every plate was delicious. the shrimp, lamb meatballs, & fried feta in honey were group favorites.

the service was excellent. our waiter took great care of us, kept our glasses full of sangria, & added a little extra flair to the birthday dessert.

the ambiance was charming & comfortable. it was friday night so they had live musicians playing well-balanced instrumentals.

absolutely will be back soon!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Patrycja Baran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLB_R-PqnF9djTWQ5lLLBSZpUxdAfnUba_9htWDT-MLvRWThjk7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a great time here. The food was fresh and really delicious, the drinks were also amazing. Everything was really tasty and well made.

The staff were so friendly and made us feel right at home (the owner was especially nice and caring), which we really appreciated.

We’ll definitely be coming back next time we’re in Madrid. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4Q7-iav8haZrzU4Gfme65&fid=0x0:0x4996aec265aeb58"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Anna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKK2bFMWN_YJKwVHzgcMylIsSdlLcJA3PitkFI1N8LFUps0Gg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great dinner experience! The octopus risotto was outstanding and definitely the highlight of the evening. The staff were very friendly, all the other dishes we tried were delicious, and we actually came back a second time because it was so good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBTYoIdi6vsB3hnMTKaBKaf&fid=0x0:0x4996aec265aeb58"],"When":"2026-3-5"},{"Name":"Philip Milne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrZnRWBP0RJremIwZdM04w2Q8RXCA8HT3LZAk0AJEbCdDKzOUy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Needed somewhere to eat on our last day in Madrid and with so many restaurants, very hard to choose.   Wanted something local and a bit out of the normal tourist area.

ChatGTP suggested this (and others) but this  restaurant suited our itinerary for the day.

Didn't need a booking and a nice ambience in the place with a large Spanish family,  always a good sign.

My dad had beetroot risotto and I had to go for the paella, I had wanted one all weekend.  I had no idea if it was a good paella but it was tasty and lots of shellfish in it.  My fingers were stained yellow afterwards from hopefully the saffron.

Nice, small place. Tasty and decent price, with decent sized portions.  Would recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBEjMNgNwsWa1WSG2HWwELi&fid=0x0:0x4996aec265aeb58"],"When":"2026-2-9"},{"Name":"David Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzA6qR6JXw70kLvfAREE479ZcmCJKsu3LUExkLoNDYJhRShHhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Pretty average. Maybe we got a bad night but food wasn’t hot, plates cold, presentation not great and service really slow. A number of wines not available. Nice staff but just not enough for what is a busy restaurant . Goats cheese salad however was excellent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBeX22ctQmBAcEBL3-_AMaa&fid=0x0:0x4996aec265aeb58"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Marina Vavilova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoiRmu_hZwzV3DOAEp1Mg1ZgBfkP4ujYqqP78WD5RQiPjEeFHE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a lovely place with a great atmosphere and very friendly staff. The food was absolutely delicious — we especially loved the seafood risotto and the paella. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADXv2P7a-_v8H_KTpK-uiL&fid=0x0:0x4996aec265aeb58"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Lauren Bermudez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqwqUfAVeponG4Bmf1erKWp0IfhpNJhBy3FSkSx_Eu5oufyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing food and drinks!! We planned to stop here then explore the city a bit more, but we loved it so much we ended up spending our entire night eating and drinking at El Típico. Everything from dinner, to drinks and dessert was so good and very well priced. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA1BjadNA7SDn2PO36QUQx6&fid=0x0:0x4996aec265aeb58"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Rod delAngel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3XBiPwzvrhH6BB5e6xyBTOTOqQmV1ysxKz6owlRMvI7UqevH_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went for dinner and honestly  i would highly  recommend this place! The service ... they were sooo kind and the food unreal! The patatas, the bao, the ham, the  tortilla de patata everything,  the vibe the nusic , everything  made of it special  night! Thank u so much!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAi5EhUSDI1smtfR5WgWa8t&fid=0x0:0x4996aec265aeb58"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"Natalia Zielińska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7DsA6qGCo3PihMYABxu9CfOulUnPZEm06eps4bXIHGAZoozCi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had such a great time here. The food was super fresh and really delicious – you can tell they care about what they serve. The drinks were also amazing, really tasty and well made.

The staff were so friendly and made us feel right at home. The owner especially was great – he checked in a few times and really made an effort to be sure everything was perfect for us, which we really appreciated.

We’ll definitely be coming back next time we’re in Madrid. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrCM8Lwgu07ayDB2ffDulP&fid=0x0:0x4996aec265aeb58"],"When":"2025-7-21"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Stephane Levratti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBFXJNN8XkwmhLXLnrULAHiWogTcquts-UlQquMINtoyGop2um=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visitors love the generous tapas like ham, cheese, anchovies, empanada, and meatballs, paired with affordable wine, sangria, or vermouth. The narrow, quirky decor and lively music create a genuine Madrid atmosphere, popular with locals and tourists.
Very good staff, friendly and quick service.
Staff receive consistent compliments for friendliness and quick service. Prices offer great value, with drinks around €3-4 including high-quality snacks.
Get the sangria jar for 12€ !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB97nboVtkvzBFvXqOnkmvz&fid=0x0:0x4a3d06b30aa9d2cd"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Julie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXH7UdXF38H7tw2bKYGWUbsn1Cs7gUvRNDSveMuy1E2EBafPiY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cute local bar with warm vibes and friendly staff! Reasonable prices and drinks came with a free tapa. You can choose the portions of your draft beer and food. E.g. Tapa or 1/2 Racion or full Racion. The morcilla was nice!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQpLV-TQ9ajwKMFeu4jIiu&fid=0x0:0x4a3d06b30aa9d2cd"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Devildman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0sWDXvNgtsw4PeZ9G6QObofyTQZB3Q9aN9y4BCu8g1NVXCclW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found a seat quite quickly, the server was welcoming and Warm.

Food was best served through selection of tapas portions. The vermouth was exquisite.
Meatballs were excellent and so was the Iberico Jamòn

Would return for sure A++++","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBu9QrOv6-0sv24opkNlTfw&fid=0x0:0x4a3d06b30aa9d2cd"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Penny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjVPiYDhIq_CXeXcB2rWxw4lKNq9VJCYrAUVv5NKCJa3C3FATZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We walked past this small but charming bar with my friend around dinner time and decided to give it a try — and it turned out to be the right choice! We ordered a mix of ham, some sangria, and beer. The waiter brought us cheese and bread as well, and everything was absolutely delicious 😋. The ham paired with the cheese and bread was just perfect. The staff were very friendly and welcoming, and even though the bar is small, the atmosphere was great. I’ll definitely come back here the next time I’m in Madrid!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCcWivZ5IjvIg70Bc3Fz0cO&fid=0x0:0x4a3d06b30aa9d2cd"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Anushka Dhar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2JdlLE5eQvOtSCnkCBCNV822ZRdPWzyMkflacxdqd9WxQDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a wonderful experience. The atmosphere felt warm and inviting, and the decor was charming, and the place had a really pleasant vibe. The staff were incredibly friendly and attentive. I was a solo diner and they were quick to point out that I was over ordering, and I really appreciated that as they prevented me from wasting food. I ordered the jamon Iberico and queso semi curado de oveja, along with jerez dulce creem and they were all absolutely delicious. It was fun watching the staff slice the ham right in front of you. I’m already looking forward to coming back and trying more from their menu. Highly recommend this spot to anyone who loves great food and a welcoming dining experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxO7Cxh-OFk7Bx3fbTxtQ2&fid=0x0:0x4a3d06b30aa9d2cd"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Yue","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnDBtD-nsNRy2prJrUtFtTtnskj49AUUkw0k2sGiTjL1js8TuV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This local restaurant has an authentic Spanish atmosphere — the bull painting on the wall immediately sets the mood.

The signature Matador toast (ham, melted cheese, tomato, and spices) is a must-try, full of flavor and perfectly balanced. The Iberian ham platter is generous, offering a variety of cuts and cured meats, and pairs beautifully with a glass of Rioja Crianza red wine. The homemade veal meatballs are warm and comforting, tender with a rich sauce.

A pleasant surprise was the complimentary sheep cheese plate served with our wine — a thoughtful touch. Portions are great for sharing, prices are fair, and the service is friendly.

📍 If you’re in Madrid and want to taste real Spanish flavors, this is definitely the place to go!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiQfOR10JIVtL6F81YgQpM&fid=0x0:0x4a3d06b30aa9d2cd"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Sanja Grdinić","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVp09hD-1TpWwU7ZqmN9xM8T-_WK0-lqfpMQg3WM7YaaAYBO8uDhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best eats in Madrid for  jamón and salchichón. Albóndigas De Ternera En Salsa were so good. Place is a bit cramped but worth of squeezing in. Love the interior a lot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbm3QMGkswK_LF771eJ5EK&fid=0x0:0x4a3d06b30aa9d2cd"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Eric Fournier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXF2ayeKQZ2E9QDXmt7jxwajLKOqYDwYWvJI92uLk-2JC6WQ1SKOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an awesome time at Matador Tapas Bar! It's exactly what we were looking for in Madrid. The tapas were fantastic—super tasty and authentic—and the prices were really good for the quality you get. We loved the ambiance too, just a really great, lively vibe that felt very welcoming. There was one small hiccup where the waiter forgot a couple of the things we ordered, but they were really apologetic and it all got sorted out in the end, so it was totally fine. It didn't spoil the experience at all. We left really happy and would definitely go back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBO531nlzK6OMaukuCEWr9E&fid=0x0:0x4a3d06b30aa9d2cd"],"When":"2025-10-18"}]

[{"Name":"Todorov Victoria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIOWeMjvVPwOoTf32KjUXFeTYim5Qp5IUkubU_3I3lzWhe9Oyz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely surprised by this amazing place right in the center of Madrid! The American-Latin fusion cuisine is incredible and everything was excellent, made with fresh, high-quality ingredients.

I highly recommend the ceviche and especially the corvina tacos — they were outstanding.

The welcome and service were superb as well. I 100% recommend this restaurant!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdiGDQ5X53Jk0yGOKhawsS&fid=0x0:0x5d693e4f5fc0813b"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Elvira D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9MOUMabgbGl8IbquLED76IS5K1FgfxbT4cO_JIK2Koro05OQo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything my family ate was so delicious. Some of the best food we had in Spain. We went back twice! There wasn’t a single thing that we ordered and didn’t enjoy. I highly recommend Fiera, they were kind and the atmosphere was so cute and trendy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpQFtmEfuhrecdqF_6GVfr&fid=0x0:0x5d693e4f5fc0813b"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Nicole Gera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUL-25bII9dkECAEqBufm0RHqv_37Fz_aKn4ox9HvSi6vHIjt1sPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful south American food, we had the cheese empanada, the chicken arepa and the Cuban sandwich, and we were stuffed! The sharing litre of margarita is delicious but a warning to drinking lightweights,  it is stronger stuff than the taste suggests, and quite heady even if shared between 2. Dog friendly inside, such which is wonderful. Soundtrack is also cool. We had a great time and will go back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDdU_Na0ai-MmlC0p8F92eU&fid=0x0:0x5d693e4f5fc0813b"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Andra Jicmon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLNHS1YWCRi8FuVcBEOWx5o9eG4cYF7B9abv1nqIb3nCL11ONs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here was incredible- best place we’ve tried in Madrid in 4 weeks. The Cubano sandwich is so so delicious, the empanada was excellent and the tuna tosdada with crispy leeks was so good! The chicken arepa was fine but it had a bit too much sauce. Regardless, the dishes were excellent and we will definitely be going back. The atmosphere was very relaxed and the waiter was very nice and attentive. Great value for money too! Would recommend booking as they are usually fully booked, especially at the weekend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCox6LxjQE&fid=0x0:0x5d693e4f5fc0813b"],"When":"2025-4-20"},{"Name":"aleksandra pajic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7u6F0hUMehNHPX6CTLaWQshvwrYRF74Q4k-qVORYBxK2yLw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food! We found the place randomly when walking in the neighbourhood and had an amazing experience. Simple and short menu, great quality fresh food. We had the tacos gambas, tostada tuna and spicy mayo, empanada with meat, and tequenos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wai Mun Tham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVody7-mMRgeLDQLbpZYGdVtCf6bWG4PCIMsQyAHgg9xGmVy4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Popped in for lunch given the highly rated reviews, and this place did not disappoint! We were the only ones there (it was a weekday), and service was friendly and attentive. We tried their Cubano and Prawn Tacos which were flavourful and delicious.  Also got to try their Tres Leches Coconut on the house (which was such a lovely gesture). Highly recommend this place for a great dining experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHRKvJLHVAx9d8nfiDhvBO&fid=0x0:0x5d693e4f5fc0813b"],"When":"2025-9-17"},{"Name":"Adolf Dlima","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpoSt5cX51ETx5z_WJ1KNqCYSW_DL3YJ09Rpy_uzh7_-eauUtIpA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tooooooo good to skip if ur near Gran Via..

[{"Name":"Martyna Posłuszny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpOoT-LmMjnAoFZo_H3fKsE_oONx8HRMv-WbfwWqivUDU2gTIpKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"we had a nice dinner at D’stampa. we ordered chicken paella and it was really good. we ate this and the bread that was provided before and we were quite full. at the end waiters gave us two shots of limoncello which was very nice. i recommend booking a table if you plan to go there. i wish we were able to try more dishes. i would definitely come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzgECZ12RtDYKMMLPKsCC4&fid=0x0:0x9b8a3435e4ee8f4e"],"When":"2026-2-19"},{"Name":"J J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVflWxcbgM4WgQHuNfkoyFMIspv4flgB2QXJl_GTbZ7L7VFOvhJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had an amazing experience at this restaurant! We didn’t have a reservation, but the staff was so welcoming and quickly found us a table. I ordered the seafood paella with shrimp, prawns, and mussels — absolutely delicious! It paired perfectly with a refreshing sangria, and the chocolate cake dessert was the perfect way to end the meal. Fantastic food and outstanding service. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPs9SuySq33CuyooOFK8OW&fid=0x0:0x9b8a3435e4ee8f4e"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Hank Johnson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXO8WaR0fa7sa0f_WpEcoPtEJ1yNjv2cbmLXDMSKElaBAiaTGGZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nov 2025 US Travelers, party of 4
Our meal (Paella, salad, wine, cheesecake) was fantastic. No leftovers for us!
We Ubered to the restaurant - it’s tucked away but worth the effort to find.
Small- make reservations as place is busy!

Would have been a 5⭐️ rating but our service was slower than normal & I was solicited for a tip ( we’re Americans but travel Europe & know the tipping culture & practices). No bueno.

Hope that was a one off- strongly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_u9INfyBqlyEdt9Mzkoco&fid=0x0:0x9b8a3435e4ee8f4e"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Joe Zeidner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvE968-arRRYY5qgDaLjSCXpBaVEe1hgW3_Hz7i-t_EhXj-gSsGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was soooo delicious as was the ambiance but the rice was so above any place we have eaten in Spain. Mark Salvador was truly 5 stars - so attentive to our needs and with excellent English. Highly recommend coming here for a meal - you won’t regret it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqz54GWEHhalTRJELoHiOU&fid=0x0:0x9b8a3435e4ee8f4e"],"When":"2026-2-25"},{"Name":"BlairWitch I Sorceress","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUb-P5sYfTyeuDBKs_vaRjUoIucJd9oUjiIEH8zoU-25E-fdkZkcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was delicious (seafood paella), even do I will include a little more variety of seafood within the dish was ordered, service was beyond fantastic with cherry on the top  shot of limoncello, it complements very well after the savory feast.

Update: We have to come back for paella valenciana, an enjoyable classic savory dish of this location; all I can said is : we definitely enjoyed ourselves in this cozy location (make sure to make a reservation) with delicious food, drinks, without forgetting their very attentive, and friendly professional personnel; definitly when we come back to Spain, this is the first must stop to enjoy again an EXCELLENT tipic Paella.

Congratulations keep it going.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwGeHLl1MjjyQ_EcISS0Hg&fid=0x0:0x9b8a3435e4ee8f4e"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Tan Wen Ting Shanelle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3Il_f7VweJJLtHS08F_Tyx4iDtDdN-fnmj0HwjqMavnSnF0Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing place. Best food we have had in spain so far. Great service as well by Mark!! Very friendly workers and overall great experience!! will come back!!

If you want to come I recommend to book in advance to save the wait

Just to say again 🤣 the bread was delicious and the paella was so flavourful","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAuRyi_iZHoKCaHHqE066rj&fid=0x0:0x9b8a3435e4ee8f4e"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Isaac Mak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIsxj3mW-pdLJIXKjL-VpYngp0Yukj1JguR9N7rYoBCBbI3vg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant, without a doubt, is the best one (and top-of-mind) we had during our 2-week trip in Spain/ Portugal. Being an Asian with rice as the main staple, I would say the way they cook "arroz" is truly amazing and up-to-standard - at least for the palate of an Asian.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDCvIIbDDwwoQwoOkButSjb&fid=0x0:0x9b8a3435e4ee8f4e"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Gavin Russell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWc31BljV5-qexf8PWdenXBeyAYGPQUtG6_gqyU4oM8fPOWJhI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are looking for the best paella in Madrid, D’Stapa is the place.

We’ve been working in Madrid for a few weeks (from London), we love Spain, and have been going to all the top rated Paella restaurants. Hands down, this one was the best. Food amazing, service excellent.

Rice cooked perfected, with some bite, and the slightly crunchy pieces around the side, meats tender (we went for meat version), and full of flavour. It filled us up for the day. Although we hadn’t booked anywhere, and there was no space, but the restaurant kindly setup a table outside. It was 3 degrees in January, so nippy, but well worth the lunch (and we found it amusing) so best book in advance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXp5PPlO0ySl32BNXnRHqV&fid=0x0:0x9b8a3435e4ee8f4e"],"When":"2026-1-22"}]

[{"Name":"John de Souza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYUUPdXaxEVxOuRnuJyQZjc52PmG9ire4RF3bQ-6Ky8ZlC2fq3Rw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Run by brothers, this place has amazing food and cocktails. The ambience is beautiful, elegant and relaxing. The cocktails are innovative and delicious. The food is presented beautifully and tastes amazing. You should definitely visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDEDun55RfR3Dnqv2vNFzjF&fid=0x0:0x73f9d03c5fe29da"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Roya MJ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOkl-lu-199HrMd5mYOB00WjSiLt6v0W-Xd-gfEEaMkZixBOz8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a wonderful experience! Great food, great cocktails and great service. I have to give them a shout out as it’s the first time I’ve truly had craft cocktails and I’ve been in Europe since 9/5, bouncing between countries.

Now ,for the facts. There’s a stuffy restaurant upstairs and an awesome speakeasy downstairs where you can get great cocktails and food. Granted it’s a smaller menu than what’s offered upstairs, but was fine on my solo visit.

They also have a private dining room called the Hibiki that can be booked for parties of 6-10 and offer the full menu, including a chef’s menu with wine or cocktail pairings. Wowed!!!

Shout out to Victor and his crew for the 411 and a great experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBGwMbRqlBrwzyxk_NgVfcq&fid=0x0:0x73f9d03c5fe29da"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Madeleine Dieleman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVFk4NupipoXLc_9SNsxAKpEIJSwWCFtnLYo0zADDh-j2O5HF_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love love love the cocktails here. They specialise in different kinds of drinks. Every cocktail is made with a special infusion and combined with another taste that hits the spot. I always come here for a good cocktail night and there is still so much more to try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1pIVI8YY7l1YbpIXm1ZIl&fid=0x0:0x73f9d03c5fe29da"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Anton S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWwYyXm9QC53xdcYQo-cbblrDEM65S8LQ4a-wTQnPh1lJMK5pA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Atmosphere: 7.5/10 Japanese-themed downstairs, mellow but upbeat. Music volume is good. Seating includes bar spots and some tables for groups. Located in the basement level of Angelita Wine Bar & Restaurant. Design shows solid craftsmanship and refined attention to detail.

Drinks: 9/10 Recommendation: Raspberry & Flowers (for summer), Peppers & Eggplant Menu is high quality, with flavor-profile diagrams for guidance. Large selection. Flavors are well balanced. Coasters are present. Glassware is above average, with unique touches like double-wall cooling glasses. Garnishes are creative, and overall presentation—including ice work—is strong.

Service: 9.5/10 Water on arrival, plus complimentary snacks. Team is friendly, professional, and highly attentive. No reservations needed. Prices are average.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxsML0lRuHv4pBq31dDH5h&fid=0x0:0x73f9d03c5fe29da"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Season Chan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4a2OyaQCcAUsVFrhQX3cpm51esh3P8B3PY2URf27eN0rMQBNN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Angelita was such a pleasant surprise — delicious in the most impressively simple way. Every dish we had was fresh, honest, and full of flavor without trying too hard.

We started with what might be the craziest tomato salad I’ve ever had — incredibly fresh, beautifully balanced, and prepared in the simplest way possible. Then came the ratatouille, which completely changed my mind about the dish. I was never a fan before, but Angelita’s version truly blew me away — full of depth and flavor.

We finished off with the steak tartare, which was absolutely spot-on — perfectly seasoned and so satisfying. Among the three of us, we shared a bottle of white wine that paired beautifully with everything.

People were also raving about their cocktails, which we didn’t get to try this time — but it gives me the perfect excuse to come back. Next time, I’ll definitely be sitting at the bar to explore their cocktail menu","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD2w0cEfZUerGBsBj8kqW4K&fid=0x0:0x73f9d03c5fe29da"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Julianne Chifos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUW5k6WWLmtISj4SXAZtaAxL8QGta1gBD8kJiCIdAl7Wkg6iqlL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was delicious in impressively simple ways. Don’t miss out on the wontons (I ate mine too quickly and forgot to take a pic). We also got their pisto, tuna tartar, and an off-menu strawberry dessert. Highly recommend getting whatever wine they recommend to you since their wine list is fabulous.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCy3v9t-E2mptLAYwHRpxjv&fid=0x0:0x73f9d03c5fe29da"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"Moji Mates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbcDguG4SlM19WrDGtIoF_hPoyKGmyQrU2iZPjbifB9yn8zZo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Angelita Madrid, tucked into the city’s cozy Chueca neighborhood, is the shared invention of visionary restaurateurs David and Mario Villalón. Its cocktail venue is one of Madrid’s most subtly invigorating places to drink. In a restaurant scene that is constantly
reinventing itself, ‘Angelita’ doesn’t chase trends.

It defines its own universe. Finding the bar is part of the experience. Entering through the dining area upstairs, one is guided down an almost secret staircase to what might be called, Center Stage. This is
where cocktail magic unfolds in a profound yet personal way. Instantly the house lights soften. A cacophony of curiously muddled voices rises and falls in palpable anticipation of what comes next.
In a comfy blend of separate yet united, the bar and restaurant deserve their own spotlights. The menus evolve constantly. Angelita’s wine list can reach five hundred bottles. The motif is as thoughtful, expansive, and provocative as the impeccable dishes with which
it is paired. Oh, the food! So worthy of distinction, yet we will save it for another review.

In the meantime, cherish a seat at the bar. It offers the most captivating view in the house: front-row access to the choreography behind the counter. For it is here where libation artists distill genius from wildly enchanting ingredients. Rather than relying on
commercial bottles, Angelita cures and concocts its own spirits and infusions. Many elements are harvested from the family farm. They are rendered, blended, mixed, and tuned in exacting ways as much akin to science labs as gourmet kitchens. Fresh-milled
breadworks, savory almonds, fragrant herbs, just-pulled vegetables, and hypnotic botanicals are part of the alchemy. Nothing is off limits if it adds texture, depth, or aroma. The room reinforces this point.
Angelita’s bar is assembled with a mad scientist’s mindset: shelves lined with labeled jars of organic infusions; stainless-steel work surfaces burnished to a mirror-sheen; precision tools that appear to be of surgical grade; and beakers with rubber tubing.

And then there is the centerpiece: a rotary evaporator, or “Rotovap”, replete with condenser and flask. It is a serious instrument of culinary crafting that signals exactly what Angelita intends: Precision Perfection. The device allows distillation under vacuum at very low temperatures. In practice, this means Angelita can capture and condense fragile
aromatics. Citrus peel. Basil. Rustic spices. Floral notes. All without cooking them into acidic bitterness or diluted dullness. What ends up in the glass is absolutely clean, vivid, and true to the original ingredients. Think: flavor in hi-def.
Such standards carry through to presentation. The bar serves no ice in any of its drinks. Rather, cocktails arrive in exquisitely chilled glassware to avoid watering-down their preciously procured ingredients. Everything is measured on a digital scale, not rushed
through casual pours and bar jiggers. Each offering is intentional. Deliberate. Repeatable. Yet nothing feels clinical because the result is raw and primal pleasure. After the first sip an all-sensory message is received loud and clear:

‘This isn’t an ordinary cocktail bar.’ Angelita’s drinks are born on the family farm, expertly developed in a working lab,
and refined out in the open for all to witness and savor. Come ready to be mesmerized. Techniques will marvel. Flavors will enchant. Senses will exalt. At Angelita, craft meets captivation as mixologists explain the science that elevates liquid to Life.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDxtdZrEjzZiPMzoxI51ZzA&fid=0x0:0x73f9d03c5fe29da"],"When":"2026-2-6"},{"Name":"Sofia B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEXIYzxZrOE5wMXJL_Y8d5qnCf7PN6G6fENpporxjVVJbXRA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I enjoyed my time here. I loved how the waiter told us the story about its owners, how he passionately explained each drink. Loved the design, the crowd and how fast we were offered the table, despite it being full.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAgphPERdpR6uJVJDrAWzw&fid=0x0:0x73f9d03c5fe29da"],"When":"2026-1-22"}]

[{"Name":"Stella Gao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLixJBStFOXS-uIsUqtDQr4wrw3f7nohoBegBKeHizDpHkbOw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an amazing experience at this restaurant!👍Alex provided us with nearly perfect service — he was warm, attentive, and incredibly proactive. He even asked the owner for a Chinese menu for us, which made everything so much easier and more comfortable. He also took the time to explain the best way to enjoy the sausages, which we really appreciated.

The pork knuckle and the beer were both absolutely delicious and definitely worth trying. Highly recommended! 🍻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDccnUmF7Hp_qT3MlISK-lr&fid=0x0:0xdb4940eb3fc10d1d"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Tina Kapanadze","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsoyR0bJuJ_8IegVcNngJaPw5rsUXnx6kNirTWcum9YkReEtE5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ordered pork knuckle, beer, mashed potatoes, and fried chicken. Everything was truly delicious and freshly prepared. The flavors were rich and satisfying, and we really enjoyed the whole experience. The staff was very friendly, attentive, and made us feel welcome throughout our visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFAl9W7UQcQaMAaYByfLx0&fid=0x0:0xdb4940eb3fc10d1d"],"When":"2026-3-2"},{"Name":"Ezequiel Cabral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUn9GitHmlVwDf4JeSdaUlknm2nN2kctIcmhN15yUC9BJfULLa5_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a fantastic experience at Hofbräu Berlin. The place is massive and has a great atmosphere.

At first, I wasn’t entirely sure about it with the traditional outfits, decorations, and overall vibe, I was a bit worried it might be a tourist trap.

But I couldn’t have been more wrong. The food was absolutely amazing, honestly the best we had during our trip to Berlin.

Portions are huge, everything was delicious, and the staff was incredibly friendly and welcoming.

A great mix of fun atmosphere and genuinely great food.

Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUFDgRDhywrSYKlIrmkK_m&fid=0x0:0xdb4940eb3fc10d1d"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Marcus Sparrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBx1lAL8eX_wGFzdzQ8Dwm3kTd96sn8A-xU2ERhrSikdSoaofuEQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for my Birthday. Main idea was in Germany try traditional German Restaurant.

Seated very quickly and staff very friendly. Once settled and food ordered it all arrived very quickly. Can't fault the service or quality of food.

Loved the traditional dress of all staff.

It is a little pricey but it is worth it. Would recommend at least coming here once to experience the atmosphere and live music.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDOb8LXdO2UD-DS4jnCDgcB&fid=0x0:0xdb4940eb3fc10d1d"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Max Konovalov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKh98GCPSpqeXOmxBpAWPJDSotdopcb0L8jl29HT__me2SQSFWUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hofbräu is our favorite place in Berlin.

The atmosphere is truly German, full of energy, scale, and authentic Bavarian vibe. I especially want to mention the pork knuckle, it is absolutely top. We tried it in another place before and it was so so, but here the knuckle is juicy, perfectly cooked, with a crispy crust, exactly how it should be.

The waiters are very polite and professional, they clearly explain how to choose the sausages, the difference between German and Bavarian ones, and help without being pushy.

And of course the beer, the best one is the light Weissbier, smooth, not too strong, perfectly balanced, easy to drink and ideal with meat.

Overall it is top level, we are very satisfied and will definitely come back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChyO2hcRZJNJ8P7kRpozT2&fid=0x0:0xdb4940eb3fc10d1d"],"When":"2026-2-23"},{"Name":"Nguyễn Ngọc Lan Khanh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMwk4HsRL47UD0sPkQLnxu2GIvCsVjIHPH9xXsSOuabHHkRWBJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"had lunch here at around 1:00pm. the restaurant was quite crowded, but i still managed to secure a seat for myself. menu comes in all languages, perfect for tourists looking for a german meal.
i got myself half pork knuckle and boy, it was gigantic. the skin was crispy and salty, the meat was fatty and juicy.
the waiters were also kind.
if you are new to berlin, this is a spot to get to know berlin’s cuisine ;)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsABbG8Py8ngXPFzCjbBqz&fid=0x0:0xdb4940eb3fc10d1d"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Monika Fertacz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJj9lX3B5OHUGWfhZ5K6cbiEUT2KiYp_ykreAm001-_t5ClEjUPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A wonderfully atmospheric, traditional German restaurant with a truly authentic vibe. The place is lively and full of people, which only proves how popular it is. The service is outstanding – fast, friendly, and very professional.

On Friday evenings, there’s live music that adds a fantastic touch and makes the whole experience even more enjoyable.

The food is absolutely delicious! The pork knuckle is perfectly seasoned, juicy, and cooked to perfection. The schnitzel is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside – exactly how it should be.

Definitely a place worth visiting – I’ll happily come back again! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDfFyUk8UDqyjPTnjnfusr&fid=0x0:0xdb4940eb3fc10d1d"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Dave Cusack","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOqtN4VSgSseW38NI6EUe8lqahoiZDxxPXoOZqCcGKE6rMR6f8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love an authentic German experience?  Well don't go past the hofbrau pubs.  There are a few around and this one in Berlin is excellent.  They are not cheap but always a great feed and of course great beer.  The service is always first class, love it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvsvW6pw6Quvhz8qffBX6B&fid=0x0:0xdb4940eb3fc10d1d"],"When":"2025-11-5"}]

[{"Name":"T. R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwDPBdTgG4I_21J5f4yYlrZI2d-_solmN6wj1wX8EW8-21aQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful dining experience at Bless in Berlin. We started with several appetizers, including different types of tartare, summer rolls, and tacos – each one beautifully presented and full of flavor. For the main course, we enjoyed tuna as well as meat dishes, all cooked to perfection. To finish, we shared four different desserts, and the sticky rice was an absolute dream. Everything was outstanding. - a clear recommendation from our side.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBepfvICvsp6uON2QWYtuRo&fid=0x0:0x414b04762b9f4b36"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Advait Sukhtankar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX48IIIBcL3id3GvEVPX9T4SxIH6wCsrKwlSd05Kt9PEs6xm90a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the outside, this restaurant seems to be out of nowhere.
The atmosphere, the service and the food is just another level when you get in. Better to go with a reservation. Together with a Gin and a Margarita, we ordered Inci Chicken, Viet Tacos, Salmon Rolls and Prawns. Each preparation was unique and delicious. We ordered the starters again and simply skipped the main course.
An amazing evening spent.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8z9IF_xqjpzliIlyWN6my&fid=0x0:0x414b04762b9f4b36"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Anna Econ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-VYwhdmdQnQvKX788jIIlGctb-P5bvJAPXdjWwH5QGnCru9cOcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing New Year’s Eve experience at BLESS! Elegant atmosphere, outstanding food with creative flavors, and beautifully presented dishes. The service was attentive and warm, making the evening feel truly special. A premium restaurant that’s absolutely worth it — we would gladly return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCBRk2Xkl5cxrOW0UwVpQK7&fid=0x0:0x414b04762b9f4b36"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Katerina sh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRV4lyBNsRGXpVWhJbV3wosioY-ErEfNzLKuhyWcEtM_uX3dpL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a place. I am surprised by the quality of food. I took for lunch a soup and a dessert and all was delicious. And coffee!! Such a great taste 😍.
I paid for: appetizer with tofu, soup w/o meat (you can choose vegan or meat option price is 15 euro w/o meat and 20 with meat), dessert with sticky rice 🥰 and coffee +water. I paid for all 42 Eur plus tips.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDsJly3G6Oco9SIsXqRImi_&fid=0x0:0x414b04762b9f4b36"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Helena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQm9IC1aCWTMJ2d5lcjbkYEYqxavoXgr1m6xE-AwjCkOb872SV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The atmosphere was nice, it looks fancy and it’s nice to come here to maybe drink something but food and service wise not so much.
The starters were quite nice, the beef Taktaki was incredible and so were the fried mushrooms but the main dishes were questionable.
My Pho was with beef but the beef was very fatty and impossible to eat. The broth didn’t have enough flavor but the truffle mashed potatoes were okay.
Not to mention, we waited an hour for the food and the service was quite slow considering how many people were working.
Overall I am very disappointed since the food is expensive so you’d think it would be good but no.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHei0WUJAKTOVnPEDdXza4&fid=0x0:0x414b04762b9f4b36"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"Eugénie Noury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq-djbJGA9lIdvZgZLx16bCpDOQcNzedGlvCPpX5eCEl2ceRDI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very very good service and excellent food. I’m usually very picky with food but the starters and main dishes were a really good surprise! I will definitely come back. Also thank you to Trang for being the sweetest and most loving person ever, she made our evening even more special!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbdWZojAGHtZUv-Q0Ef-f_&fid=0x0:0x414b04762b9f4b36"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Shir Aroesty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkXoqrx7-TpRm7yiLlIvtA9HVHASf_GUha_36hs9CE-TN-_T3Xtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An excellent restaurant that is tastefully decorated. Beyond the pleasant atmosphere, the food was amazing. Simply a pleasure. The service was courteous, professional and fast. The cocktails were of a very high standard.
We returned to this restaurant twice during our stay in Berlin and will undoubtedly return again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCleJoWCmRdQ5sY1VGlj_63&fid=0x0:0x414b04762b9f4b36"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Mayowa Olaleye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGbqTvYCrU0MfsLGK1nIyBO_FTFDPlHcW07aupikNKRJvZUw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The aesthetics, service and ambience was great however the food is not of the best taste to be honest. I had the purple octopus, it lacks flavour, this is same for the salmon that my partner had. I also find it so ridiculous that the charged for water that was on our table, not like we even ordered or finished it. They should invest more in the taste of their food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiPK8busmai18cHW36FZRN&fid=0x0:0x414b04762b9f4b36"],"When":"2025-11-12"}]

[{"Name":"Beat A. Schwendimann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrRZ049FapT1f8QZLFx4UTCmdIygkgNvi0UCuFZP1EiRwNmppS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Enjoy Bavarian hospitality at its finest at Maximilians. Even though you're in the center of Berlin, you feel like stepping into a true Bavarian restaurant. The warm atmosphere matches the hearty food and the wide selection of beers. Vegetarians and vegan food options available, but the focus is on meat dishes. Friendly and fast service. As it is a popular place, reservations are recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBOXzGZ2HSe5BT3mgTKr_AJ&fid=0x0:0xee7212867d17fced"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Steph G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeZkpDT54qiB5hodQ2vmDgqnZ0Uh0LJkYqrxIVPpHgFL2ssIo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Maximilian is a Bavarian-style restaurant in Berlin. We didn’t have a reservation and the indoor seating was fully booked, so we were seated outdoors near the back entrance. Luckily, with heaters and good food, it didn’t affect the experience at all. That said, if you want to enjoy the live music inside, it’s definitely best to book ahead.

For drinks, we had hot chocolate and a MÜNCHNER DUNKEL beer — very smooth and refreshing. We were a bit greedy and ordered quite a few dishes for two people.
The Wiener Kalbsschnitzel (Viennese veal schnitzel) was well fried, not greasy at all, and paired nicely with cranberry sauce, which helped cut through the richness. The potato and cucumber salad was light and refreshing, though not particularly exciting.

The Halbe Haxe (half pork knuckle) had an outstanding crackling — easily one of the crispiest skins we’ve had, perfectly crunchy without being hard. Unfortunately, the meat inside was a bit dry rather than tender. The sauerkraut was chopped into small pieces instead of thin shreds and was very enjoyable.

We also had two white sausages with a pretzel and sweet mustard. After missing out on them in Munich (since they’re usually a breakfast item), we were happy to finally try them. The sausages were boiled, mildly seasoned, and had a lovely parsley aroma — light, delicate, and highly recommended.

Service was generally good, and it was understandable that staff were a bit stretched given how busy it was. Overall, a satisfying Bavarian food experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDcCb63Ih1Ux9c1G4SwO8xw&fid=0x0:0xee7212867d17fced"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"Kenneth J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKOo9Ng4P7WvPhXHlqwiCIyk2VXuQ4Y9soGmWrQ2Lnv7gmyfFWHA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"During our three-day visit to Berlin, we went twice for dinner and once for a few beers. Even though the restaurant was full, the service was really good. I can recommend the sauerkraut dish, it was really delicious. The second time I had the minced beef meatballs and mashed potatoes. The dish was good, but not as good as the sausage. The atmosphere was good and we had a great time there","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCMqKblfU3Cpe1h87g155CZ&fid=0x0:0xee7212867d17fced"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Zara Wickert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_EVpiKgdeVuylVF5LxZ4WD4QMsKvzDOH3NBquh-xX0--VHg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was absolutely amazing. Walked in without booking or even looking at the menu and it was just amazing. The staff were caring and the food was just amazing. Can’t say anything bad about the place. Sat for 3 hours drinking and eating and had an amazing time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGy3KdrPLoy9GbcZX05IuZ&fid=0x0:0xee7212867d17fced"],"When":"2026-2-19"},{"Name":"Vašek Killar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPTRLVpyG4HJmsTDBu9n47bksGuijjC5S1GCD3CUuH88TXtp2z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This Bavarian restaurant lies in the very heart of Berlin. Close to Checkpoint Charlie and right next to Friedrichstrasse. Interior is typically German and staff uniform is very traditional! Food was great, made from good proteins and tasted well! And beer was exceptional! This was my second visit and I’ll definitely come back 🤩","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAk6mZWCtNSC7V51Ol_u1YM&fid=0x0:0xee7212867d17fced"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Kyle Bryant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIo5NdhFy9vAkq9-phkSxnuzIP2GCqzAcynxzgH5aRq47Bmcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has amazing real nice warm inviting feel when you walk in. We had the pretzel with cheese ball, schnitzel, meatloaf, and one of the apple struessels. Everything was really good the mashed potatoes and the potato salad were both tasty. The schnitzel was perfect. Very tender and cooked just perfect. The meat loaf was a big slab and the fried egg on top real complimented it. The dessert was a great way to end it all. The ice cream had a wonderful rich vanilla flavor and it paired great with the warm sweet apple flavors.

Overall a pleasant experience and would come back to try more dishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRiwMobW8gLjw9WKoES1rr&fid=0x0:0xee7212867d17fced"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"ANNA SANTAMOURI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxMKEyfcapz6gjktwtQ6MMzKvGdLLDLKhpL65ReLugZnpqyZM2Og=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited this restaurant after a recommendation from the hotel we were staying at, as it was very close.
We were really very pleased. The food was very tasty. We tried Käesespätzle, Wiener Schnitzel, and salad. The prices are a bit high for us from Greece, but I think they are normal for Berlin. The staff was helpful, friendly and answered our questions with kindness and patience. We highly recommend it!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMniVUPn4dcXcfuP_Ft7ax&fid=0x0:0xee7212867d17fced"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"MC100","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb6ZdwkogzxmBcg5wZEmcmym0xFCeRv007DaelFO6ayyaDSwc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love this traditional German restaurant. So good in fact I went twice in three days!
Love the traditional lederhosen outfits!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAQdsheR_-KAo6VaXNnpODZ&fid=0x0:0xee7212867d17fced"],"When":"2026-2-24"}]

[{"Name":"Helen Black","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUuTIivgZkpq7JsET_08SeWckujNGxIv6A1mEf7PA_1cWeGO6EN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A wonderful view of Zoo Berlin and fantastic food too, we loved our visit. NENI have a few vegan options for Mezze all of which were delicious, we particularly enjoyed the falafels!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALb20MULs6TIjz__wDi8Ng&fid=0x0:0x7f67d148e844fc21"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Rashmi Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7Y5M_aGBGA2izoEwLdOmBnvI79Is0cMeaXKZNE_wa2OK2j-x0tQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Absolutely loved my experience at NENI. The atmosphere is vibrant yet cozy, the service is attentive without being overbearing, and the food is outstanding. Every dish felt fresh, well-balanced, and full of flavor, with that perfect Middle Eastern touch NENI is known for. It’s the kind of place where you want to take your time, share plates, and enjoy the whole experience. Definitely coming back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKEswZQ7iVh6PtJ3vAaDPH&fid=0x0:0x7f67d148e844fc21"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Ayush","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRUiy_ZoAyguegaYIJSSzfYzKeXkku0wK4lrAu55z_9EAPVSJV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Really enjoyed my visit. The skyline view is beautiful, the chef was very friendly, and the staff provided good service throughout. Food was tasty and the overall experience was very pleasant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCe0Ts4NVBOGcl-DjJNQaAI&fid=0x0:0x7f67d148e844fc21"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"Artyom Braslavets","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVYyk30xDRWYxGVnfZticB-Jv9XqEvvqHV6jSwzR0mulU8j-yG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overpriced. The meat was well-done instead of medium. The price does not match the quality and the service. They charge for simple water....?! good thing is the view.
What's really great - desert.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDTFb_St0XW113QKlrb0eVR&fid=0x0:0x7f67d148e844fc21"],"When":"2025-10-5"},{"Name":"Yeala Dremel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVo2JF1MgcPPkgHai2UfNbMssr2e7a3uWuvcFKOA5IKCUd1DNUFNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely incredible! I think it was the best food I’ve ever had in my life. Our waiter Fredrick was absolutely amazing, so attentive, so patient and super nice! The food was absolutely delicious, with different notes of flavors and fresh ingredients, absolutely wow! I will definitely come back and look for their other locations around Europe!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDk4MCGoNXyCxI9koLPXlkL&fid=0x0:0x7f67d148e844fc21"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Rodney Co","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOeSrVRpEEVe4vFgk0n_8S2MvhTMDb4MrypG-6zYyiub44QwjX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
NENI Berlin is a must-visit for anyone in the city! 🌟 The vibe is lively, stylish, and full of energy, with panoramic views from the rooftop that make the whole dining experience extra special. 🌆

The food is fantastic—vibrant Mediterranean and Middle Eastern flavors, all fresh, colorful, and bursting with taste. 🍴 The mezze plates are perfect for sharing, and every dish feels creative yet comforting. Pair it with one of their cocktails or a glass of wine, and you’ve got the perfect evening. 🍷

The staff is friendly and welcoming, always attentive without being intrusive. Service is smooth, and they make great recommendations if you’re not sure what to try.

What makes NENI stand out is how it combines amazing food, great design, and that unbeatable rooftop view of Berlin. A place you’ll want to come back to again and again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCrbAtn9-CL8WtWu2AhXh8P&fid=0x0:0x7f67d148e844fc21"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"sandeep malkani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh3aALIj5LCIec1ts9VV-oyKVoTUjJyN1god_fLVL_9B1NDyyp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Despite booking our table 15 days in advance, we were treated very poorly right from the moment we entered the restaurant. The staff and the manager were extremely rude and dismissive, showing absolutely no sense of hospitality or basic courtesy.

Our assigned waiter, Mr. Mario, was shockingly impolite throughout our visit. Not only did he speak rudely, but at the time of leaving, he even asked us to set the chairs ourselves after we had already paid the bill – something completely unacceptable for any dining establishment.

To make matters worse, when we pointed out that the cutlery was unclean, they flatly refused to replace it, showing zero concern for hygiene or customer satisfaction.

Overall, this was a terrible experience from start to finish. The entire staff seemed uninterested and unfriendly. I would never recommend anyone to visit this place. Save your time and money – there are far better restaurants that actually value their customers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvTiGdyKNCqypFVV86_30v&fid=0x0:0x7f67d148e844fc21"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Claudine Kouwenhoven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjcG_5W7000Evr3b6_RfYL6ZQPURM4sJSquVrF6C5j_lcOBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We were here for a drink only (monkeybar was closed). Very sweet workers. Beautiful view. The cappuccino was nice but the milk was not very well foamed, so could have been better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvy9f7ZP_Qg7_BwNY_WPFg&fid=0x0:0x7f67d148e844fc21"],"When":"2025-8-28"}]
