[{"Name":"Tatjana KS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrYTHZZetJcNWDZFfkvVQ1TbxHlOrFiIfBQjwgCuI8bMqbGvwvZg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great, welcoming atmosphere. Fast and courteous service.
Small menu, well executed.
Knedle were underwhelming (wrong texture and undercooked), lovely filling and accompanying vanilla sauce.
Definitely worth the visit.
Vegan & vegetarian are well looked after and have same number of choices as meat eaters.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyoWMEGti_FKdYU3uA-geT&fid=0x0:0xa32f86cbc9fe5051"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Catalina Ramos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFp2JXipLelnAua6llxXEJFEQ6dxBoBR8YXtb5ySoW5atxZL0wRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an excellent place! We’ve been to this place twice and will always return. They are quite popular so make a reservation instead of walking in. The food is great and the servings are hefty. The staff is friendly and attentive. We received free beers when we arrived. Highly recommend the schnitzel vom kalb (veal) and lachsforelle (if you feel like having fish instead). The potato salad that came with the meal is really excellent. But don’t forget to order dessert!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfu0C0Lye9bUWNQ-wbolj3&fid=0x0:0xa32f86cbc9fe5051"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Noam Ben Natan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5gucgvGYbnChaWFaIqI-UFK_DRRKaXqSl6XiLDt7YAXIc5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience! We're vegans that was craving a schnitzel and german food. Glad we found this place!
The vegan schnitzel is made of mushrooms, was super tasty, and the rouladen from some kind of a meat substitute, also, yummy.
We also took the apple strudel that comes with ice cream, it was delicious.
You also get a welcome beer, which was a nice surprise.
I think what we took was most of the vegan options. It was great and I recommend this place for vegans as well, but it would be nice to add another dish, maybe of a schnitzel made of meat or chicken substitute, even tofu would work.
Great atmosphere, a bit fancy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASrh4McIwfKH5mGIj5Qzpk&fid=0x0:0xa32f86cbc9fe5051"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Badr Al-Mojadedi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSRhLaEkRdYmm8IxqfRzZdV9SXVCBfRJCfwd4YgGnI0rS851qY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Simply the best schnitzel I ever had. I was served a huge piece of premium veal, breaded and fried to perfection. It was juicy, balanced saltiness, it vindicated my whole Berlin food experience so far. One cannot not mention the perfect fried potatoes, they were not fries, just creamy lumps of buttery potatoes with a nice crisp on the outside and it frankly coupled even better than fries with this dish. I also tried the Cordon blue which was nice but I think if they did a version with veal and smoked beef it would far surpass this one. I finished with the dessert tapas which I dug in before taking the picture. All three desserts were good in their own right, and I liked mixing up the dumplings with the ice cream but the ice cream was the best.

Special thanks to the lovely staff, they did everything perfectly start to end.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCK8Lu0vMYksy7nxo-InLqT&fid=0x0:0xa32f86cbc9fe5051"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Hwajung Hur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX95e-lve6s2S9LZ4rXNMWn-h9Laz4hlx3sZue_l77e7yRoTGJW3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best schnitzel I've ever had.
We ordered both the classic schnitzel and the cordon bleu, and both were great.
The sauce served on the side was very nice.
The restaurant gets very busy, so I highly recommend making a reservation in advance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzs7wymsFSaow5bB7GIgi-&fid=0x0:0xa32f86cbc9fe5051"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Alina Bordeniuc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1D2PRsmXJmXs3VJUQEYWlFZS25I-bILVvSSqd-pwAHT7ixXY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re a fan of hearty German cuisine and great beer, this place is an absolute gem!
The schnitzel was simply outstanding – perfectly crispy on the outside, tender and juicy inside, and full of flavor.
One of the most interesting surprises was their German tapas concept. It’s such a fun and unique idea to enjoy smaller portions of traditional German dishes, making it perfect for sharing and tasting a variety of flavors.
Of course, no German feast is complete without beer – and theirs did not disappoint. The selection of German beers was excellent, with something to suit every taste.
The atmosphere was warm and welcoming, and the staff was friendly and knowledgeable, happy to recommend pairings and explain the dishes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArq1Va_n8kphzy1VzVp-A4&fid=0x0:0xa32f86cbc9fe5051"],"When":"2025-9-3"},{"Name":"Abril Seyahian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1UpXbMrP-qdPmQQaPwIi--jje82UIcu_xlFc2yv2FXl9JrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Schintzelei is a lovely place to try traditional German food. We ordered the selection of three German tapas, which included delicious Berliner Bouletten and a goat cheese that was also very good. We also tried the pork schnitzel with potatoes, which was good. For dessert, we had apple strudel and the Fairground Schnitzel.
I recommend this spot if you want to experience typical German cuisine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB-LpgiZ_-34fob0djGI19g&fid=0x0:0xa32f86cbc9fe5051"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Dongting Xu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKk6S5CLqIGMMzAcip9gnwA53P8ukG2CaYOxnU9aFdcDE3MVRM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very big and filling portions, we all enjoyed our meals! The restaurant is tucked away, very cosy. We had the cordon bleu, veal, bavarian pork, and  country pig. Lovely sides on all our dishes. Friendly staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBSn3GTpmnaKGIylhn_A35B&fid=0x0:0xa32f86cbc9fe5051"],"When":"2026-1-4"}]

[{"Name":"Vladisto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUL6U2klVQZO_CQuWwh7wxEg-1pUhGFwriQzdlCqWxjmhPikNFE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A solid place for a city center with reasonable prices.

The service and atmosphere were excellent: a very friendly waitress, nice and attentive.
The venue is very cool: a combination of classic pub, but with big windows and nice views on the streets

But due to the food, cant rate higher. The food is not bad - we ordered crayfish soup (interesting flavour, but only one(?) piece of crayfish inside), liver with apples (simple and delicious) and a currywurst (main offender). The sausage looked sad on a big plate, was not cut and was served alongside cold potato salad. I’ve tasted better sausages in random markets of Germany. Big disappointment.

Overall, a pretty good pick, if you are looking for Berliner classics.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAqAlmi3vIZLgvhfBZRAIzK&fid=0x0:0x4174f7a2cb96cf37"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"Дарина Кітік","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZ2eazEo0LWWLl0O5qM0GghR5SukBr-NOxQoHvzs7a8NRa8lp-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is my favorite German restaurant in Berlin! The last time I visited the city, I knew that if I ever returned, I would absolutely come back here to eat. The service is wonderful, and the food is simply delicious. Every single dish is flawless, prepared with care and full of authentic flavors. I’m so happy to have such a special place on the map of Europe, a place I want to return to again and again for its impeccable taste. Next time I have the chance to come to Berlin, I will definitely visit again! The atmosphere is warm and welcoming, making every visit feel truly memorable. It’s not just a meal, it’s an experience I cherish.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDAy8ec9wggN0aHa6S3Ozsw&fid=0x0:0x4174f7a2cb96cf37"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtkdP_mM18EDPglD1kDO7_TtP3GzBbMsDqh4lPrgDSal6pKH4n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nante Eck is a charming spot where local flavor and friendly service come together seamlessly. From the moment you enter, you notice the cozy atmosphere that instantly makes you feel at home. It’s the kind of place where both regulars and newcomers are welcomed with genuine warmth and smiles.The food here genuinely reflects a love for tradition without sacrificing quality. Whether you’re indulging in classic German dishes or sampling daily specials, each plate is thoughtfully prepared and satisfying. Portions are generous, and the flavors feel authentic, making it an ideal choice for a relaxed meal after a day of exploring.The staff’s attentive yet unobtrusive service complements the overall inviting vibe. They are knowledgeable, eager to offer recommendations, and genuinely happy to ensure your experience is memorable. Payment is hassle-free, with a range of card options accepted.If you’re looking for a neighborhood spot that combines comfort, quality food, and a welcoming atmosphere, Nante Eck is definitely worth a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDxTyW1H9_kfWIqGWY_2X3&fid=0x0:0x4174f7a2cb96cf37"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"ANNA SANTAMOURI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxMKEyfcapz6gjktwtQ6MMzKvGdLLDLKhpL65ReLugZnpqyZM2Og=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Usually when I am not happy with a restaurant I avoid writing a review, I do not like to harm a business in any way. But this time I will make an exception and I will explain why below.
We visited the restaurant one evening in November, as it was close to the hotel we were staying at. The welcome was very cold, but since we went quite late we justified it. The pleasant surprise was an application on the table that gave you the opportunity to read the menu in your language. However, the food was generally mediocre and mainly the schnitzel I got was not properly fried while its breading was peeling off when I cut each piece.
But what saddened us was when we asked for the bill. The waiter came with the POS and a certain amount for us to pay. After the payment was made, as we were leaving we asked him to bring the bill. There we saw that we had also been charged a certain amount for a tip without our knowledge. The amount (10%) was not large, but we expected to be asked first, as in all the other restaurants we ate in Berlin. We felt that we had been cheated. We do not know if it was the waiter's initiative or the restaurant's policy, but it was an unpleasant surprise.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBJjgNR5UqJLsrxnSlWq8Gh&fid=0x0:0x4174f7a2cb96cf37"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Mr. P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJVt7lNDXAf85n66TWKoJZxB_5c6NUHlr8WL0dZnrQdLyobfb4V=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Pretty lame schnitzel. No taste whatsoever.  Chewy. Bland. Too oily, not salty and they are extremely stingy with cranberries sauce. I mean there was exactly one tablespoon of cranberry sauce for half kilo meat. Overpriced. I should have known when menu has English and it is on Main Street. Never again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdVgsRm84kOP4ZfTQd_Ek7&fid=0x0:0x4174f7a2cb96cf37"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"E L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMIxbMo3RXbWQSPtCsvOppF67wBXgyjBMzMeCX9Uk-SfF6ToN7pA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Loved the vibes - very old school Germany. Food was generally good! First time trying raw pork mince & it tasted fresh. Goulash & currywurst were tasty","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVH9Agatxf31jduXJStb75&fid=0x0:0x4174f7a2cb96cf37"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Rita Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocID2ZTS7BZMenKVZgqOExaXLfWkGTbRZxh_P5n7795LDFuxUlUi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"To be honest, I was a bit worried after reading a rather negative review from a month ago and even thought about choosing another restaurant. But since this place was only a few minutes’ walk from where I was, I decided to give it a try—and it turned out to be the perfect choice!!

The menu has a QR code that brings up a multilingual version with clear pictures and descriptions. The beer recommended by the waiter Kilian paired perfectly with the crispy pork knuckle I ordered. My husband’s Berlin-style sausage and potato salad came in just the right portion. The food was truly delicious, and the beer hit the spot. To finish, the apple strudel was the perfect ending to a wonderful meal.

Absolutely recommend it！！ 👍👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmbWF0f687ybPpIa4x_9hT&fid=0x0:0x4174f7a2cb96cf37"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Mark M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfuXRCgGv90ZK4jZswODawV22JSuq6OtdHXFn5lUvDQ7eFJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Didn’t make a booking, therefore had to wait. It’s clearly popular!
Staff were very friendly, speaking English and accommodating my fledgling German.
Food was brilliant.
Lard/gherkins/bread followed by Berlin meatballs.
Excellent","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChU9AzjpCnhfKVR2-MC3sm&fid=0x0:0x4174f7a2cb96cf37"],"When":"2026-1-18"}]

[{"Name":"Arturo J de la Torre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4svlOSylwofyFiZrZnGuVzzA73dUOQSJNJceSseRr_C8bjUN0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful evening at Sphere with my wife. The food was delicious, beautifully presented, and full of flavor. The service was outstanding-friendly, attentive, and very professional from start to finish.

What truly makes this place special is the breathtaking panoramic view of Berlin. Watching the city from above while enjoying a great meal creates a truly memorable experience.

Perfect for a special occasion or a romantic dinner. Highly recommended, and we would definitely visit again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLLoOsjn9tqGA5sYt31vxs&fid=0x0:0xa5c6ae67a29ab513"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"Vasia Pap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4s126KQhg_26j15Eks1iVGT4ZTfF6W9xy_Zwb89Z8-_xYwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had dinner with my partner at the restaurant on a Sunday night. The overall experience was amazing. Of course very pricey since you pay 57 (for both) only for the entrance but somehow expected!
The starters were ok nothing special and I wouldn't even recommend the prawn cocktail. The main courses were both great. The taste was perfect, however I would like the texture of the meat and the fish a bit more tender. The dessert, especially the cheesecake was amazing!
Miguel our waiter was very informative, attentive and friendly, yet very discreet. He was really taking the time to explain everything we needed to know. It was very much appreciated the fact that when we asked for recommendations he was very honest and didn't try to sell the expensive choices! We stayed at the restaurant for about 2,5 hours and were not rushed at all.
The view is breathtaking and the rotation makes it even better! We paid around 250€ for the whole meal, a bottle of wine and the the entrance fee. However the experience was totally worth it. I would definitely revisit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATpAm50B1xsrMafo3cB3ye&fid=0x0:0xa5c6ae67a29ab513"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Michal Bogdanski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVikcLn7Ru1npyBHXZSGiB8Cuq69SzYFrXc-JEu24MjxQUvoHJW6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food is ok, but weird - Schitzel with sweet potatoe?? It is also quite expensive tbh, but the views are impressive. Staff is extremely nice, bit one can tell they are busy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBt9B4tc4P1nG_ca4gTkfJO&fid=0x0:0xa5c6ae67a29ab513"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"A F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-cGmxLGj_a0Mn8RPR-UeAMpDbHqwFP1R5GOyFf2zkmXd3OkCO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"One of the worst food I have had. I visited with my family in the 25/12. Unfortunately the price tag doesn’t match the quality of the food and service.  It’s a shame because the location is fantastic. The overall experience was very bad from the food to the service that was very rushed and chaotic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBf6MWB5sJmfUwQy2XVZGkj&fid=0x0:0xa5c6ae67a29ab513"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Ester Latifi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGgrOQx5aNdAo0iNdS9OzamuP0aaSDDLIWZlLIPxDB6mougA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We had been here before and were excited to return for a second visit. Unfortunately, it was very foggy, so there was not much to see, but the bigger disappointment came when we ordered spaghettieis, a classic German dessert we were genuinely excited to try. Instead, we were given a box of regular ice cream. Given that the images clearly show traditional spaghettieis, this felt misleading and did not match our expectations.

The espresso martini, however, was amazing!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHiKcyIAn6YE3dtvo8l-hg&fid=0x0:0xa5c6ae67a29ab513"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Famille Girard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWS4MSGxWqVMOjQKgCGNjGH3-ehTwysHEtE9mFVN_pu-y-g0zU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Sphere restaurant, branded with Tim Raue’s name, offers a truly spectacular 360° panoramic view over Berlin — the setting is undeniably impressive. Unfortunately, the culinary experience doesn’t live up to the expectations.
We booked the visit with Currywurst set menu at €42 per person, hoping for a gourmet reinterpretation worthy of the chef’s reputation. It was a letdown: curt service, long waits (25 minutes for drinks, 35 minutes for the food), and a dry Currywurst with a bland sauce that barely tasted of curry. The bread roll arrived only after we asked if something was missing. The whole experience felt like a tourist trap, far from what one would expect from a chef-driven restaurant.
The most absurd moment? A beer charged at €10.50 — which we thought was included — justified by the waitress as a “beer with a panorama”… That line says it all.
We ended up heading back into the city and found an excellent kebab to round out the meal — far more flavorful and satisfying. In short: the view is worth a visit, but not the food. It’s overpriced for what’s served, and frankly, it doesn’t reflect well on Tim Raue’s brand. It certainly doesn’t inspire confidence to try his other restaurants.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDeANk2pI1ZlxWswHqAsTHP&fid=0x0:0xa5c6ae67a29ab513"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Isabella Winkler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmAWSGDSUsr8E4kOcXV0SOoEbUkTN6x36EiZREGQFnMGGRBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Entering Berlin’s High Society

The highlight of our weekend trip was dining at 207 meters high at Sphere Tim Raue, offering one of Berlin’s most unique culinary experiences – a refined journey paired with a rotating panorama from the city’s iconic TV Tower. The menu celebrates authentic Berlin flavors, reminiscent of grandmother’s kitchen memories, yet elevated with Tim Raue’s modern sophistication.

The three-course menu, enhanced by thoughtful touches from the kitchen and impeccable service, made the evening both memorable and delicious – all while enjoying dazzling views across the city.

Simply a must when in Berlin!

Thank you to the team for a beautiful evening and memory.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBy8dGmE7A7HOn3hc6WN-Mr&fid=0x0:0xa5c6ae67a29ab513"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Ricardo Alves","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGFGG6tEwDPoJTmkDgwG7OqPRsXSbe_iSImFNYI6sFQqwQWw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"View is nice as you can get much closer to the windows than on the normal viewpoint below, (windows are also much cleaner). We asked for a table next to the window and the hostess said no (altough there were plenty free). We were curious about Tim Raue food but it was disapointing. Solianka soup had too much mustard, meatballs too much pepper and salad not fresh (brown spots all over the arugula, letuce was not crispy, Onions and carrots cleary came from a jar).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATXd1TMwDdZhMZxNACuNQO&fid=0x0:0xa5c6ae67a29ab513"],"When":"2025-9-14"}]

[{"Name":"Jean Du","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV05z8KxXQ92A5Tftq_lYJL3bBb3ukawN5_4WCrdpwtFN5Y7lPr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This spot surprised us and exceeded our expectations. They feature a really good value mittagsmenu. I took the seasonal sausage peppercino pasta and it was really good (full priced item not on lunch menu).

Service was extremely personable and welcoming. It’s not necessarily a spacious space, the servers were really attentive to our needs especially since we have a stroller and came in with our baby.

Recommend for a decent Italian neighborhood spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAP4EFZ0hRc6bZ1wo88BKEa&fid=0x0:0x513ecc8184fdc3fd"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Darshan Gajara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVihxs4c0V8WmbaUrJdEelJ4-WDmZFQFmLi33x2QPO8Vp8dlE8u4A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very authentic Italian restaurant that will teleport you to the Italian country. You'll be eating at the typical clothed tables under the candle light. Ideal setup for a romantic date.

They've got a good selection of items but their seasonal menus always steal the show. We visited during the pumpkin & spargel seasons and were able to enjoy the seasonal pastas. Very delicious! They've also got good wine pairings with the food.

The staff is also nice and polite.

P. S. They didn't have tiramisu on the menu but we were able to order it and we absolutely loved it. So much so that we ordered another one soon after.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI-e7dsQE&fid=0x0:0x513ecc8184fdc3fd"],"When":"2025-4-11"},{"Name":"Viktorija Leščinska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPvSDY0InFSB3L5r5pdykHbTiCg048b_B9i68GsIEzMfnUOMY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We really enjoyed the food in this restaurant. Stuff is very helpful and friendly.. the restaurant offered us cappuccinos on the house :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvXk78lwk1DgHasRTsFitF&fid=0x0:0x513ecc8184fdc3fd"],"When":"2025-8-18"},{"Name":"Ayesha Shafiq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmXZli_k1tpzTyuHegQRIo8ct1yDCoameMrEvIEvKi46yo6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Trattoria Portofino offers delicious authentic Italian seafood with beautiful harbour views, though prices are a bit high for the location.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDui_2PEep4-TCVhX26NoHC&fid=0x0:0x513ecc8184fdc3fd"],"When":"2025-11-3"},{"Name":"Pieter Griffioen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLwoKK948OeKWrdUFlFCvqcGWJ9-B1w3-2WONaVJTat3Us6BQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On Sunday I had the pleasure of eating in this restaurant. Upon arrival we were kindly greeted by the staff who showed us our table and were happy to give us a taste of the wines to help us with our choice.
Throughout the evening the staff were very pleasant and the food was very nice.
Prices are good and the waiter pleasantly surprised us with some limoncello in the end. Would highly recommend this restaurant to anyone.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDf-sLybA&fid=0x0:0x513ecc8184fdc3fd"],"When":"2025-1-5"},{"Name":"O. Ehorg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlUaKV-L5R8YJq7Bxag3X5HOErbZJ8PYkMEOo1YVC0z-epVHc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"really great food and quite a good place to celebrate a birthday. its a really fair price and the staff are awesome there. also
the owners seem to be very hands on and a good base of regular guests.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jonx","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5Uyv4VcpEl4EyYiEcie2lEsM0a_YED6IjaCX1am6ZrpLt59pOjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What more can you want from an italien restaurant in the middle of Berlin. We walked past a couple hours before dinner and were intrigued by the decorative vegetable garden out front and the staff advised us to make a reservation if we wanted to eat dinner, which we promptly accepted and went on our way. As dinner approached and we sat at the table at our reservation, the waiters were extremely kind and passionate about making the experience as pleasant as possible. The food is reasonably priced but the quality of the pizzas could easily cost another 5 euros they were that good. Desserts were superb too, literally no complaints from me or my family. Top notch 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJ7szPAQ&fid=0x0:0x513ecc8184fdc3fd"],"When":"2023-7-17"},{"Name":"Fatemeh Farz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhX7s-qyW5kB7dnupIG7OKtYtZbRhOdCxrZTScm6YGLshH-dw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I have been there for our birthdays, and now it’s kind of become our tradition to celebrate our special occasions there.
Great for experiencing Authentic italian food in the heart of Berlin, the staff are really friendly and welcoming.
Reasonable price with good portions. For only £50 you can get 2 large pizza, wine, anti pasti and dessert. And the shots on the house :)

I highly recommend this restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr44faWg&fid=0x0:0x513ecc8184fdc3fd"],"When":"2024-7-10"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"V S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2j_ae2BTuAW1QtZi4G6WeQnE1wwrnP0PyJYIzLEGZmHZJkg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were very lucky to get a table here without a reservation but would recommend others to have one as the place was full. Great traditional German classics and really tasty beer too. Staff were brilliant and even were kind enough to translate the menu for us as it was a little difficult to read the handwriting. Would highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBNqdI1TmdfgF9mTvJVyPdB&fid=0x0:0x3c2d0dde90bfbe2e"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Fontas mos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIl7-FR9zoRR0z-tDzgjSX91vkXvneyI2oLALIdFgDOhoBnQA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Α Fantastic Dining Experience in Berlin

This restaurant was an absolute highlight of our trip to Berlin. The staff were truly exceptional—extremely helpful, friendly, and welcoming. They took the time to explain everything to us in perfect English, making us feel completely comfortable throughout the evening.
The food was outstanding, easily the most delicious we had in Berlin. The duck and the schnitzel we ordered were both phenomenal—perfectly cooked, full of flavor, and beautifully presented.
Highly recommended for anyone looking for amazing food and warm, attentive service. We’ll definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhec2xNYipJ4n-Km7hgHRc&fid=0x0:0x3c2d0dde90bfbe2e"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Anestis Maltezos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLy1jj2wcPN0fFgrNoo-m_tjPmUjNASdktFHqck_OOrMMIesw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A wonderful traditional restaurant in Berlin! The food was absolutely delicious, full of authentic flavors and clearly made with care. The staff were friendly, attentive, and genuinely happy to help with recommendations. The atmosphere was cozy and warm, perfect for a relaxed evening after exploring the city. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9kI26IqP2TL7WbS_HgrhI&fid=0x0:0x3c2d0dde90bfbe2e"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Amy Plankenhorn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvCuFElxho572cB0tUWfXFZGuq6AU8RuqX3wcvyPdMkpXc8MCKFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This tiny restaurant is exactly the German dining experience I wanted. The waiter explained the small menu to us, since it was written in German on the chalkboard outside. I had the pork loin special, which I still think about, and my friend had Schweinshaxe (pork knuckle). When I go back to Berlin, I'll go out of my way to eat here again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCBMlq-ZkDrbTR0wQlVOwi-&fid=0x0:0x3c2d0dde90bfbe2e"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Shane Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgYmsq8XcPvPRUf3_k5ehGG7T1keCDhj60lPQCOiTeb1UPu_s1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A family run, German restaurant offering a small menu with approximately eight items. All cooked fresh with love that day.

Oh my god the food is fantastic. We had venison, sausages, schnitzel and a new dish which was veal liver. The venison and liver dishes were unreal. Absolutely fantastic food and then strudel for pudding.

The staff were so very friendly. I am so sorry I left going here until our the last night in Berlin. The next time I am in Berlin I will definitely come back for more fabulous food and great company.

I can't recommend Hackethal's enough. It was the best meal we had in Berlin over the five days of our visit.

Congratulations and thank you team Hackethal's.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvcBhIwEKpOhiMBxP7h1WO&fid=0x0:0x3c2d0dde90bfbe2e"],"When":"2025-8-25"},{"Name":"Matthew Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXq-_V8bZ0km2j5mshCRggezAyIzkLteulM5FX6SLCd-qBDv5iv0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A delightful eatery serving food from a small but delicious menu. The service was fantastic with super friendly and helpful multilingual staff. The atmosphere was exactly what we wanted, not too loud or busy but just enough. A dish each plus a drink or two each and a shared dessert due to the ample portion sizes came to just under 60 Euros. Would 10/10 recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSYDg7_ofauHMHLgbD2dlP&fid=0x0:0x3c2d0dde90bfbe2e"],"When":"2025-8-12"},{"Name":"a2c7","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKy-ZSNrmQMMAr9QLhdqskmzkZ6wosPdfiAMS9HlgQadRibkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a find! This little restaurant is tucked away round a corner of a residential street. The staff are so lovely and so good at their jobs!
The food was divine - I just asked for what I wanted and was told how that would be served and the price.
They spoke perfect English and were happy to do so as well, which made things much easier.
100% recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJKmnbHHsZTdOg&fid=0x0:0x3c2d0dde90bfbe2e"],"When":"2025-5-19"},{"Name":"YY Wang Zimo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSS3ATTvv9Vm9idVEl_c6dZ2VI5HUNQFiWFsXF8qgG4ByLPIjw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing food service.
First, when I got there, I was lucky enough to find a parking place. Parking is very convenient, there are parking infront of the restaurant, or on the left or right.
The place is decorated a lot! It looks like a pub! Very interesting! You can seat down inside or outside, I chose outside.
As soon as you sat down staff came very quick, with a big smile. Which made the service so much better. Staff made sure everything is alright.
I ordered my food with my family, three delicious meals! Unfortunately, I forgot the names of the food!😂😅 Very quick food service, and delicious.
Really recommend this place! I would come here again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDbgM33TQ&fid=0x0:0x3c2d0dde90bfbe2e"],"When":"2024-7-31"}]

[{"Name":"Raja Chandra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWUn0WV65SmmA_HOXd7gOB-w96I-Y23qjUeF17PseLJ0BZXSif=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Went here daily for breakfast buffet when I stayed at the Mandala. The review is only for the breakfast buffet.

Ambience is awesome. Service is also great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWmIMOz_60dYs2RnikN5a7&fid=0x0:0x7b2115cb49fb6b1c"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"L & J Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdjRzqr_Pp4Yey6YsWxjnPvNoxH6QP8g3XJul0u6REVc47Ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best food experiences I’ve ever had. The aesthetic is on point. My friend’s food allergy was taken care of down to the detail. And the tastes all together—delicious! Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBYSDBHZQLNUmzcsMfJcnMo&fid=0x0:0x7b2115cb49fb6b1c"],"When":"2025-8-22"},{"Name":"Daniel Krüger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJg0m6oHvgXtzKMVDxXA2pGePo6dJlAnX3Et4dj6ymO0XKZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dining at it's finest! There are few things in life that provide joy, comfort and serenity like the facil's masterfully served, splendid dishes.
The service is excellent: swift, polite, calm. The sommelier had perfect wine recommendations at hand for our party of 9 persons. The maitre d' had several additional surprises (entrée & dessert) and they were super respectful, even though constantly at least one of us was wandering around with the kid we brought along (2 yo). Also, the kitchen prepared an extra pasta dish for the kid.
Food: from the first to the last dish, everything was splendid, we had beef filet, fish with caviar, beetroot and a nougat dish for dessert. Great, visuals, great taste. A very wholesome experience and a real treat.

If you get the chance, treat yourself here. It's a once-in-a-lifetime experience you'll definitely not regret.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHkZdqzXssMnOUIb1RogpH&fid=0x0:0x7b2115cb49fb6b1c"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Corvin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6uwIblzYUqX-5NtJaHhtDV_bx3YgoAOns8dv1z2jsDCG7uV07=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Facil was the first Michelin-starred restaurant we went to and we definitely made the right choice.
If you love food and are in the area, you should definitely book a table.

We were there for lunch because there is usually a set menu at dinner and we wanted to choose our own dishes, but we will definitely be back for dinner next time we are in Berlin.

The food is absolutely fantastic. Just look at the pictures. They are a work of art and absolutely delicious. Each dish has so much flavor and is unique in its own way. We especially enjoyed the desserts.

The staff are of course also exceptional and very nice. When we were there, they made a small mistake with the cutlery, which we wouldn't have even noticed if they hadn't apologized to us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBh0rTFmPgRhCdCF6LgHxQW&fid=0x0:0x7b2115cb49fb6b1c"],"When":"2025-7-12"},{"Name":"Adrian Alvin Catral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMAs7IaHzuG6TNZbKLuaWG6CEQJLaEp5PXtOlfXjChDBvaZEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dinner last night was nothing short of exquisite. From the first course to the last, every dish was thoughtful, beautifully executed, and perfectly balanced. It was not just dinner. It was an experience.

I would also like to extend my heartfelt thanks to everyone who helped make the evening so special. The discreet arrangements, the bouquet, and the thoughtful souvenir were perfect elegant, personal, and exactly what I hoped for. Your team managed to turn a dinner into a memory we will always carry with us.

Please extend my gratitude to the service team, the kitchen, and everyone behind the scenes who made this possible.

We look forward to returning to Berlin—and to Facil—again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2kPblnI5mo_iHVf1abh-z&fid=0x0:0x7b2115cb49fb6b1c"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Mathias Fuchs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXneHEZOS0rJxTEiibyO_k58hch4vOxY7dQCZtGLxNiBdlsBPQC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The atmosphere is calm and relaxing. The service is absolutely outstanding, on par with the 3-star Michelin restaurants I have visited. The food combinations and creations are highly original. However, the fish dishes are quite intense, which might be a concern if you're not fully enthusiastic about fish.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoxdahsQE&fid=0x0:0x7b2115cb49fb6b1c"],"When":"2025-4-26"},{"Name":"Dario","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAI5b_-sj4kK0qVYPQXMw-CBEIu7AfV71mmkNpGC1zIImVLA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nicely decorated restaurant with a perfect atmosphere. Perfect distance to neighboring tables so you almost feel like dining by yourself.
Super friendly and professional service. One downside might be the heavy rotation of staff attending to us. I think we had every single member of the staff at our table not just one responsible for us. That lead to wrong preparation of cutlery due to lack of information/communication? We would not have realized this mistake ourselves though, a staff member apologized for it and owned the mistake.
Never had such refined and extraordinary food in my life before. Great compliments to the kitchen for delivering such an experience. In particular the desserts were fantastic!
Absolute recommendation for everyone who enjoys food to visit the Facil at least once in their life.
We had a great lunch, thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXwYKHDQ&fid=0x0:0x7b2115cb49fb6b1c"],"When":"2024-10-17"},{"Name":"Sia Tsoutsas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVl1X07i7GzM2MZJ3UmXWpBNUbA7QrI1tKjVg_d3Cg3XTVHwZo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

An absolutely outstanding dining experience from start to finish! The food at Facil was nothing short of impeccable—each dish was crafted with precision, creativity, and incredible flavours. The service was equally exceptional, with the team ensuring every moment was seamless, from the perfectly curated wine pairings to the personalized menu experience. Every detail was considered, making it an unforgettable evening. A must-visit for anyone staying in Berlin","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCAxP__Qg&fid=0x0:0x7b2115cb49fb6b1c"],"When":"2025-1-29"}]

Hope you click LIKE if you find this review useful :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDD89fYyHGXIXphXI0ltjdX&fid=0x0:0xdac10a86a2cef2be"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Mark'S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwyRYOI7VHp6zyseDD6lT_8lFb8UUXE7orTzJvPzXtPGfruHs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Aapka Indian Food Restaurant, Berlin

After trying Indian food at 6–7 different restaurants across Europe and Germany, I finally found a place that truly captures the real and authentic taste of India. Aapka Indian Food Restaurant in Berlin gave me my first genuinely satisfying Indian meal on this trip, and I couldn’t be happier.

The flavors were exactly what I expect back home  rich, balanced, and cooked with authenticity rather than being overly adjusted to European taste. Every dish I tried had that original Indian aroma and spice level, something I had been missing badly. Unlike many other restaurants that claim “authentic Indian food” but end up serving fusion or watered-down versions, here the food feels like it was prepared with passion and a deep respect for tradition.

The atmosphere was warm and welcoming, and the staff made the whole experience even better with their friendliness and attention. The menu has a wide variety of classic Indian dishes, and each plate that came out looked fresh and appetizing. Portions were generous, and the quality was consistently excellent.

For me, this was not just a meal — it was like finding a piece of home in Berlin after days of disappointment elsewhere. If you are craving true Indian food with real spices, original flavors, and heartfelt cooking, this is the restaurant you must visit.

I highly recommend Aapka Indian Food Restaurant to anyone  whether you’re an Indian missing home flavors, or someone curious to try what authentic Indian food is actually like. This place has set the bar for Indian dining in Germany.
Owner is very friendly and nice guy .
Even some indian customer try to making problem workout any reason then owner handle them very good way .in fact I was there seatin next to them they were not good customers.
Even talk in Hindi trying to make some planing for blame to owner .
Really very sad .

Why indian customers do like that?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArYr68FsI3Bvl8lM5RrNRW&fid=0x0:0xdac10a86a2cef2be"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Miso Choi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLFLZm0Z__ZLBkSWxH7nZ1IUUkw12t_aEeykim697G_LaVAzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was my first time trying Indian food, and I had an amazing experience here. I’d love to come back again next time. Thank you so much for the great food and wonderful service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDWZP9c3ut1LUF03fC1ia_O&fid=0x0:0xdac10a86a2cef2be"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Anas Ahmed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhGUVzaluI3yaUAJK7kZzzBiTc6cEEV8j1XkvPjqwoNRryNinV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐☆☆ Aapka – Restaurant Berlin Alexanderplatz

I visited Aapka Restaurant near Alexanderplatz and found the overall experience average. The food was good, but the service needs improvement.

The staff members should be trained better on how to welcome guests — no one greeted us with a smile, and after finishing our food, no one cleared the plates until we asked. Small gestures like friendliness and attentiveness can make a big difference.

We ordered the Indian Veg Thali, which was actually great for two people — flavorful and well-prepared. The Mango Lassi was also excellent, refreshing, and perfectly balanced. However, the tea was disappointing — it had a very strong clove flavor, which overpowered the taste. I’d recommend using cardamom or a classic brand like TAPAL to make it more authentic and enjoyable.

On the positive side, the restaurant is clean, has a good seating area, and even provides a bathroom for guests, which is convenient.

Overall, Aapka serves good food, but the staff hospitality and attention to detail need improvement to match the quality of the food.

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ (3/5)
✅ Good thali and mango lassi
⚠️ Poor service etiquette
⚠️ Tea needs improvement
✅ Clean and comfortable seating","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCkGwBiGsCXVsaz0oqXw5Bu&fid=0x0:0xdac10a86a2cef2be"],"When":"2025-10-17"}]

[{"Name":"Doğuş Durmuş","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbyhRm_7opnl1hnbxBlXCUGkPk5HMqgBWDYOcGaQdkMj2k0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Let’s start with the positive things. The place is quite spacious, the ambiance is nice, and the Mexican music really sets a good mood. The staff are also very friendly and welcoming.

As you can see from the portions, they are huge. you will definitely leave full.

However, is this really an authentic Mexican restaurant? In my opinion, not really. It feels more commercialized than authentic.

First of all, there are no micheladas on the menu… excuse me, what? 😄 Also, the tacos are made with corn tortillas, but the crispy hard-shell style, which is not what you typically expect from traditional Mexican tacos.

At the same time, some very well known taco varieties are missing. where is my taco al pastor????

When it comes to taste, the food is quite average. Nothing extraordinary or particularly memorable.

Unfortunately, the prices are extraordinary and not in a good way. Overall, I find the place overpriced for what it offers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMW9oQ9N713I0ljJM-uADD&fid=0x0:0x7b3b8cce7a976303"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Niloofar Mirakbari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUstF7MbcTF6e3l5F8sDsHu913SX2_b5VNGeP2h9t9oo3s84Up7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was amazing! Overall, a pleasant experience, I’d definitely come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1P1dw1WgeYApKalnD_IPL&fid=0x0:0x7b3b8cce7a976303"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Good visitor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIHFgCxrktLdCtRTVpDBW9wLIQmj7XdUI9B2kShWAwOV0ftBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Delicious food and the portions are big enough. [{"Name":"Etem Alnigenis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz77K-x9VdAani8iw0Z3jihoxFOnHNUno9cjaf06eezsnuOfET=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Finest German cuisine at its best!
PeterPaul offers a superb modern take on classic German dishes — refined, flavorful, and beautifully presented. The atmosphere is classy yet comfortable, with excellent service that’s both attentive and genuinely kind. The staff’s food and wine recommendations are spot-on, and the bar selection is impressive. Reservations are essential. An must-try in Berlin, with excellent English-speaking staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXPcIitkuTH0NqkA10Axke&fid=0x0:0x1e84aa3b3e40a389"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Юля Шепелько","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUfO52ibbF3DdyiLnL17pKfQAgSBR1yWbZsFl_eW5xfKXBDqC7Eg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went with a group of five, and we started off with a delicate soup served in a cup. Among all the dishes we tried, our favorites were the buttermilk-marinated crispy chicken with watercress yogurt and the cheese dumplings.

The food was absolutely delicious, but what impressed me the most were the waiters. It felt like they weren’t just doing their job, but genuinely welcoming long-awaited guests into their home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgq9smpQUtGnpIyz-BeKlX&fid=0x0:0x1e84aa3b3e40a389"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Viajar Juntas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2abUg9b81Xh0W9hCd3m_hFjkoJfWw1asBhKte9O8e7QDeQ1KO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The service at Peter Paul restaurant was excellent ⭐️ .Everyone was kind 😊 and friendly 🤗 and that positive energy ✨ can be felt throughout the place. 🇩🇪We enjoyed traditional German dishes 🍽️, beautifully prepared with details that enhanced their flavors 👌. The wine 🍷 was excellent, and it’s honestly hard to decide which dish was the most delicious 🤤. I absolutely loved the desserts 🍰😍! Highly recommended 👍 and I would definitely come back 🔙💯.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAukGuEuybC9mLF4mhvHCOw&fid=0x0:0x1e84aa3b3e40a389"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Natalia Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX58myu4cDd0kS0633YloKtsxRc9GyGvhqfFWth53yaYY4izv1e=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favorites restaurants in Berlin . Excellent service , it does not matter how busy they are ;) food quality smooths in your month , and cost atmosphere! Always nice to be back here !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsvGY2nVITcQeOcY-o2KCZ&fid=0x0:0x1e84aa3b3e40a389"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Diego Castillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBLon3AWy8Q9uuF0cm-aWiD9qKSPNdQkHYr3ez31kH4AGPunugkw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My applauses to the chef and the entire team behind this new concept of German tapas. We were able to try many of the traditional German dishes and share. I fully recommend ordering the cheesy dumplings, they were my favorite plate of the night.

The atmosphere is very elegant and classy. Great decor and lighting.

The service is 5 stars. Clemence was very kind and helped us understand every dish and explain a bit about them. He also suggested a wine that was very good. I would definitely come back to PeterPaul, and I recommend anyone visiting Berlin to come here. The food is well thought and elaborated; it’s not your every day type of food. The combination of flavors will blow your mind.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD6aWXuWPMOheI9mN8TXDMU&fid=0x0:0x1e84aa3b3e40a389"],"When":"2025-9-22"},{"Name":"Abdulla Achilov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4gY_jYKciyqkuHqmOmyaM70dVVlpuspc6NyG5YL3WtHdvmp6v=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Love the concept of German cousins in tapas format. Food is very interesting, cheese dumplings are must to try!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBGLv4mIfURzqjLJssXuqiJ&fid=0x0:0x1e84aa3b3e40a389"],"When":"2026-2-6"},{"Name":"Patrick Reidlinger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKq1bnMt8-P2TOeeExmBxicBMfwbT8WcHQ4Te0c-Zjikv7Z2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing traditional German/Berlin dishes in a contemporary style. Plating and cocktails looked fantastic. Service exemplary. Loved the decor - lighting, decorations, and art were all great.

I'm sorry to be leaving Berlin before I get to try more of the menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCO9Tpe3zRo-zvvK0Ujahkz&fid=0x0:0x1e84aa3b3e40a389"],"When":"2025-8-30"},{"Name":"Ody Macedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQHnAFuvO8sOuQbvxi9TgvxJBdlvUk7RMT43ElDs-1Kl3kOFH9dQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of dining at PeterPaul in Berlin with my partner, and it was a truly delightful experience. The restaurant offers a unique twist on traditional German cuisine by serving classic dishes in small, tapas-style portions, perfect for sharing and sampling a variety of flavors.  ￼

Each dish we tried was flavorful and beautifully presented, showcasing the rich culinary heritage of Germany with a modern touch. The wine selection complemented our meal wonderfully, enhancing the overall dining experience.

The ambiance of PeterPaul is both modern and stylish, with dark walls and cream-toned seating creating a cozy yet sophisticated atmosphere.  Our waitress was exceptionally kind and welcoming, making us feel valued and ensuring we had an unforgettable evening. ￼

Overall, our visit to PeterPaul was a memorable culinary journey through German flavors, and I would highly recommend it to anyone seeking a unique and enjoyable dining experience in Berlin.

Can’t wait to go back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIpo36IQ&fid=0x0:0x1e84aa3b3e40a389"],"When":"2025-4-1"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Rosemary Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKLu8EccI-8O54PDdLSZgxlGNuMNmQ6hJt9e-kArs2P1cz5QA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been in Berlin off and on the past year, and sometimes you need to try something outside of the local cuisine. This Italian restaurant provides great food, thoughtful service, and a warm ambiance. I have dined here three times so far, and I will make this a regular stop in the future. The truffle pasta really lives up to the hype, and I say that as someone who is tired of the overuse of truffles and truffle oil for everything everywhere. Here they do it right. Personally, I think it's better without the parmesan bowl, but that's to your liking. My girlfriend ordered the steak, and this was the first time I ever tried steak at an Italian restaurant. It was cooked perfectly, and exceeded my expectations. I would say only the tiramisu was a mild disappointment, but I will try another dessert next time. The food overall was a hug, and it is my happy place. The service was excellent. With a restaurant so popular and always booked out, severs can take their customers for granted, but not here. Look forward to returning next year.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRulRXvJ2_JVKTYY4gtcqs&fid=0x0:0x243749f6e2811123"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Łukasz Nie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeRZYujsJRX5WkmFXQxgQwcU94gP1iU7YxdKZLPljg0YG9f7Bq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very elegant restaurant — I really enjoyed the interior design, the wine displayed along the walls, and the black-and-white photos, including “Scarface.”
The service was impeccable, and the place truly has an Italian vibe.

The food was delicious: the carpaccio was delicate, and the steaks were juicy and melt-in-your-mouth, with the pistachio topping being especially outstanding.
The vegetables were tender and well seasoned.
The espresso was terrific — rich, full of flavor, simply perfecto.

A fantastic place — I’ll definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAW7jS__nC3YlxQYjS9PUW&fid=0x0:0x243749f6e2811123"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Y T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwpqPyDK-HZXROxj67Z9kYzbCKtMPJ_Ntot5kA6nPvsLRgDxPf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a lovely lunch at this Italian restaurant. The food quality is well-matched to the price, and the service is great. We shared a variety of appetisers and main dishes, and everything was delicious! They also serve good coffee and have weekday lunch set.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAkRrcekdmdkKMXI8pVcz0a&fid=0x0:0x243749f6e2811123"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"Stas Shteinbook","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzFfzxBPYqXTt-VVOJaEIlVUW_XL6doGQMYvi24a2dVWjEVEc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing italian experience in berlin, very polite and good service. I especially recommend the truffle pasta and pistachio steak. Would absolutely visit again next time in berlin","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbA7mPgaezCbNCjOSAWt1T&fid=0x0:0x243749f6e2811123"],"When":"2026-2-9"},{"Name":"Michael Kolbash","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGe5djiJudsFo4Two6MQv3pVQ0GQKNfkpD6-6Lk9x9OJT7EA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely divine, beautiful food and presentation. The Tagliatelle con Salmone was phenomenal, one of the best dining experiences I’ve had yet in Berlin.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBO84T_5R0FN-A7K97qlPZW&fid=0x0:0x243749f6e2811123"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Tom Pelsnik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVL4peW9VVml2I-B2vj77hT8K4RbrdUYTczecbHha2xbDwJqSwr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I could not recommend this restaurant anymore! There's a reason why this has 4.9 stars and over 2,000 reviews. The owner Toni and his staff were INCREDIBLE! I alerted him that we were celebrating my wife's birthday and he rolled out the red carpet with champagne upon arrival and sang happy birthday with dessert. Our server was Lino and he was so kind and attentive. The overall service was to die for, even had help from Toni's adorable son. And the food was perfect as well. The restaurant is run with care and pride and a passion for customer service. I wish we had restaurants like this in the U.S. Thank you again, Toni, for making my wife's birthday dinner one that we'll never forget","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7_JvIZpvlMX1uuq2g4ep-&fid=0x0:0x243749f6e2811123"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Ellie Mcmillan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJ0aTdzM4QrWhusDPAwBTvH8sGKCUckb1d6dprnUlM97gRl_9e=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a fabulous evening at this restaurant! Did was delicious and staff could not do enough to help you! Special shout out to Tony, was amazing and made sure we had an extra special night! First time visiting and would definitely come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDr30DO1klHblwCDublSIBd&fid=0x0:0x243749f6e2811123"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Vaso Kriara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJHYodApnczFDanA9uAzhL5qvA4BtOOg-Tr5BWfsgm3a4L8ag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything was soooo good! The food, the service, the ambiance! We had an amazing starter with malfatti, a bolognese and the vongole linguine! Delicious!
Gigi was our server and he’s the best!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-lXHzTx-IGIlIiInbtWBX&fid=0x0:0x243749f6e2811123"],"When":"2025-11-4"}]

Just for something different! The atmosphere was cozy and gives you the vibe of a pub!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCjCz3MbsImwFglEYabG20T&fid=0x0:0x884cf3a61764e842"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Alex G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgrWVQACfy5Qdydcy4cYWaGWceljTlVG6VgxbUPt5nLkMGCw2P5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A true German cuisine gem in western Berlin! I absolutely loved the ambience and the food at Dicke Wirtin. The portions were generous, and the beer selection was impressive.

If it’s your first time in Berlin and you’re looking for a traditional German culinary experience, be sure to visit Dicke Wirtin.

Pro tip: Make reservations well in advance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDp69lvsg45heN8l1ttAdTV&fid=0x0:0x884cf3a61764e842"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"משה ד.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZqqRfjMsalRyIJRCBVL_Fd345vYJOaGZgg4qnhfMaMfGFQfBc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"What an unpleasant experience 🥺

We werer sitted in high uncomfortable table and chairs and ask for a normal table/chairs... even though there were plenty of emoty normal tables and that we did have appropriate reservation... "No we are fully booked".

The food was (at best) mediocre. Really nothing to write home about.

The place was very loudly, not very romantic either.

But the worst part was the 59 minutes we waited between the starters and the main dishes.

When asked what is going on... not even a simple aplogy... "You don't see it is full" 😡😡😡","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAadpd81JEyfoNK1X3AklAq&fid=0x0:0x884cf3a61764e842"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Dave Bull","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWHFHUnwpH537IQAy8lTavdZirHcYGmqoFHNeU7tQvTNqYk6Z4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fabulous experience. Booked table the day before on website and rolled in to the coolest decor and friendliest staff.
Schnitzel was ginormous, steak excellent, beer good and strudel to die for.
Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZ4Ys9ceS2l60Hs1bxZmt8&fid=0x0:0x884cf3a61764e842"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Jeremy H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKUrYQTShj6kvkl8uVfTo8HJvsOE76SYtueOtJ8EnYmgmcvy0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Visited here a few weeks ago with my partner while in Berlin. The reviews seemed fairly reasonable, and combined with the history this restaurant has, it seemed like a good place to have dinner (which I very much regret deciding to do). From the get-go, the service was subpar. We were greeted by a very blunt and standoffish middle-aged-looking female server, who I’m pretty sure made some unsavoury comments about me in German to her male colleague directly in front of my partner and me while we were waiting to be seated.

The beer was reasonably priced for central Berlin, and the food we had was delicious and cooked very well (we had the cabbage roulade). However, the price of the meals was not justified when comparing what other traditional Berlin eateries charge for similar dishes. It did seem like this place was a bit of a tourist trap, as the other patrons were all non-German speaking whilst we were there, and even on the menu, they try to sell their own restaurant’s merchandise (a bit of a red flag).

Lastly, the table service we received from our server left much to be desired. He was friendly, but unfortunately, his overall service quality was very poor. He did not check in with us regularly or ensure our drinks were replenished, which meant I had to grab his attention every time we wanted another drink. This was difficult, as he was dealing with many other tables during our visit. I would have much rather gone to the bar to get served there.

This substandard service discouraged us from wanting to stay for more drinks, so we decided to settle our bill. To top it off, our server very cheekily pressured us into providing gratuity, which I definitely should have declined after how unsatisfactory our experience was. There are so many more reasonably priced restaurants around Berlin with much better service quality. I will not be visiting here again and do not recommend anyone waste their time or hard earned money coming here as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbda2rHwUomB9QN9DyZngc&fid=0x0:0x884cf3a61764e842"],"When":"2025-11-17"},{"Name":"Anna Szabó","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWg499cCleSOgMQbgUBR8jnhMJq4-O92Q0sBHnUer833Fu_pyU8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to try genuine german food. The currywurst and the apfel strudel are both amazing. The waiters are joking around, so the whole atmosphere is really laid-back, and the aesthetics also worth the trip!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqwrIJL6J-QyNNvsmDQoXe&fid=0x0:0x884cf3a61764e842"],"When":"2026-2-2"}]

[{"Name":"Mathias Weber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhoxOnprB90SnTYVjB8mnCB7QwT5OAafNdlyLTVDLhbmSbU6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was super nice. The food is wow, so delicious and special. The waiter and the whole stuff were amazing and helpful. We had such good time and left so happy. Definitely would come again to try more...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_G58pgyfTxk-NvsaWgU2M&fid=0x0:0xa597995d977f1fd1"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Kai Oliver Goldmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKpG4VYm9BnrFYuwfPszomWIjCd3_XjAaiX0MVC5QeP8dJCWmtnA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We had a memorable evening at Loumi, with some excellent highlights alongside areas that could be improved.

Several dishes really impressed us: the squid with piment d’espelette and XO was bold and offered perfectly contrasting textures and flavors; the quail with cep, pancetta and brioche stood out as the most satisfying course; and the citrusy pre-dessert (sudachi sherbet with lemon verbena and almond) was bright and refreshing. Sitting at the counter also made for a lovely atmosphere and view of the kitchen. Henry was a fantastic host: attentive, warm, and clearly passionate about the wines, which were beautifully chosen.

The pacing, however, felt too drawn out at times - nearly 4.5 hours in total, with long gaps between some of the main dishes. Portions were very small, so our feeling of hunger only really subsided once the quail dish and brioche accompaniment arrived around 22:30 (and even after having pre-oysters). Some courses also lacked balance: the delicate kinmedai bream was overwhelmed by its vin jaune broth, and the final desserts didn’t quite live up to the expectations.

What surprised us was the absence of any extras or “gestures” one usually expects at this level: no amuse-bouche, no bread, no intermezzo, no petit fours. That’s fine in principle, but combined with the pacing and portion size, it left the overall experience feeling sparse.

And although we had flagged food intolerances by email, this wasn’t acknowledged during the evening. Even just a brief word up front would have been appreciated.

Overall, Loumi shows real talent and creativity, with standout dishes and excellent wines, but a few adjustments to pacing, portioning and communication would make the experience truly shine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBx4MjAXu7CQs1eq2t6kl1G&fid=0x0:0xa597995d977f1fd1"],"When":"2025-8-28"},{"Name":"Yerma Fugikawa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVc71utVWPs2a8SKz2Ig3gsvsc-1CgWjYzN_4bpJi36cZXrP74M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a pleasant surprise; all the dishes, without exception, were wonderful, especially the duck, which was sensational! We will definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCqZcGDk9AGPVesjphGghRX&fid=0x0:0xa597995d977f1fd1"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Se Sh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2WFLhczXuP0aDjAeCpTrBzrj7PJaXBmzAxbyQLK1tIog4xn2JgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service was top-notch – even to the detail of proactively noticing and bringing a little stool for my bag. The whole menu felt connected, and each dish had a fun twist, playing with surprising textures or tastes. Loved the vibe too - very classy while still really relaxed, and you could tell the staff enjoyed working together.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCow4vbGg&fid=0x0:0xa597995d977f1fd1"],"When":"2025-4-19"},{"Name":"Wooyong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXe1m8xViuK8eq-vOrG9tgAxX1252sPHSqFa4o2j69z_BDYjiXb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best hidden gem restaurants I discovered in Berlin—Loumi is a 10/10.
I loved every dish, and the interior design really hit me. The service team was super friendly and chatty. The food is on another level. I’m definitely coming back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw5N22Qg&fid=0x0:0xa597995d977f1fd1"],"When":"2025-3-23"},{"Name":"ST","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0jgkPNtJYkCPeNGlyBceZeEB1ia_cs6PuSVRtsuxt35VF0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best fine dining in Berlin for me.
For their dishes they use many interesting ingredients.
Service is very friendly and nice. Quite chill and laid back.
You need to book in advance as restaurant is small and has limited sitting capacity.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg0omU_gE&fid=0x0:0xa597995d977f1fd1"],"When":"2025-2-15"},{"Name":"Linh Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCwVkQTcvBZxpff-Za--NI_vlViXNpL__H6lOjJw7tqYJI9uJc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the small menu at Loumi. The value for money was unbeatable. Throughout the evening, the service team and the owners were attentive and took the time to chat with each table. The food was wonderful; we hadn’t had such good oysters in a long time, and most dishes had a special twist, offering a touch of creativity that’s often missing in similarly priced restaurants. They also had a nice selection of non-alcoholic drinks – the coffee kombucha, paired with the ice cream, was particularly good. This restaurant has a lot of potential, and I’m excited to see where Loumi goes from here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnmb6S2AE&fid=0x0:0xa597995d977f1fd1"],"When":"2024-10-7"},{"Name":"Brian Gorrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKetQ9zqbg1_7Het9ggbPlkziOR9b8Vo6jrMySBojpCiZ-yRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"LOUMI served us one of the most amazing meals we’ve ever had. From start to a beautiful finish, each course is deeply considered with an immaculate attention to detail for plating and presentation. The way all the delicate flavours and textures worked together was harmonious. Beautiful progression throughout the meal and each course delivered something different. The host and the wine selections paired beautifully throughout the entire night.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3mJCXQA&fid=0x0:0xa597995d977f1fd1"],"When":"2024-11-2"}]

[{"Name":"Caffè Doppio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwDQ6ZDrgHgCO6QSpN_xR9Idmdn0HNZmahxIot9nNK3cquJ0_s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place lives up to the hype! It’s a modern breakfast & brunch cafe with a big selection of menu. I wish I had more days to explore different dishes but I did fall in love with my waffle!!! I probably can say that this is the best waffle I’ve ever had! It’s very light- crispy on the outside and fluffy inside.
I literally wanted to ask them for a recipe 🤣

It was very busy when we got there, it was  that day when the weather was horrible and raining all day & night so all the indoor seats were reserved but we were lucky enough to get ourselves spots.

The service was very quick, we didn’t wait long at all for the food. The price is on the higher side but it’s definitely worth it!

Oh they also make service attires like aprons and restaurant staff uniforms which are very cool. I was so tempted to get myself a rain jacket.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVMXeNoi923tu1GhWuojo0&fid=0x0:0x4afd8b017502c65c"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"Julia M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGW59f7Aj_ppNS1uCHdZ12i4hdXYJvZ3nWxchOL7QXrh44_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So, so good. We went twice during our stay in Athens and had the pulled pork sandwich, bolognese, avocado toast, nectarine tarte tartin and a caramelised apple tart. All were amazing. We visited ~2 years ago and were impressed the standards are still high.

Drinks are not that great tbh (matcha quite watery) and expensive, but food I completely recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRp_bzFRxQIToLhh6G3RLW&fid=0x0:0x4afd8b017502c65c"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Angelina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKaYUcUJir1p2Mumpt5FG3ystVXp_lUh2zgSWtqtoeyhwH7Ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Loved this spot! The brunch and lunch options are amazing; everything is super fresh and full of flavor. The interior has a great urban vibe, modern and cozy at the same time. It does get quite crowded, but that just shows how popular it is. Definitely worth the wait!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9GeoHZ6v3o4FkAM99GMcw&fid=0x0:0x4afd8b017502c65c"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Kat St","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqQ7aKtYED-RgQA3HdNp8mH9ZiUP1_343Vsvd1_pkXEr-jkvY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A decent brunch place with lots of vegetarian and vegan options on top of a cozy urban aesthetic that blends right in the city. Indeed the spot has some apparel and accessories of its own that make a fair alternative souvenirs from Athens. You should definitely book a table if you're trying to grab brunch in the weekend - it is a very busy place for a reason","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBkDebkVoLiPiy-VtedmFuN&fid=0x0:0x4afd8b017502c65c"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Sarah Gradel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmz2bbqiZJtp5ph5hzlHN94k_bXwSoZ1sxuKTskyw_dOp6fLbC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This breakfast had me doing that stupid little dance in our chairs us ladies do. As an American, the quality and freshness of this food was out of this world. Huge Lucious blueberry’s and fresh Greek yogurt were a treat. This was better than any yogurt I’ve ever had. My husband ordered the waffles with cream cheese and berries, that had me rethinking my choice. The cream cheese was the star of the show, and I continued to look at him the same way my dog looks at me every time I have a meal. Would highly recommend this place. There is nothing more important to me than starting the day off with a great source of protein and fiber.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAi7laqZWbMmluJ8bEGhtB3&fid=0x0:0x4afd8b017502c65c"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Kai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJh9bybC14RyjGLUGwXHFdNZ8PwMB-zuZl01cdYGyxIOPosLLI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Makers make great brunch and coffee :).
I had a flat white and a egg waffle, loved both.
You may have to wait a bit to get a seat if you arrive around lunch time but it was worth it.
Not sure if I like that half of the cafe is a T shirt store/ merch shop but if the food and drinks are that good it doesn't seem to have any negative impact :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChOhURf_NGVBll0LgdjnWk&fid=0x0:0x4afd8b017502c65c"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Katherina Fragkedaki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJsuO-WEceeY29V8do_jESDvXBI4Jh0UnshKS6N6yfonka7ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice brunch place with options for vegeterians and vegans as well. Juice and matcha should come in larger portions. It's a unique concept with people sitting together at the same table. Good service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDidHllrDmgOcue-zQ6B7WV&fid=0x0:0x4afd8b017502c65c"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Maya Vovla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcu_6ErML9UBQpKThT_D8E-HC5IzdJ3wQyOe7xHCLUiOrMEww=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every bite felt like comfort and creativity combined ! If you ever find yourself in Athens, even just for a day, you have to stop by The Makers. It’s the kind of spot that makes your trip feel special. ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAoBBo5BGLTlXhx2GICrUby&fid=0x0:0x4afd8b017502c65c"],"When":"2025-10-13"}]
