[{"Name":"Ashley Thompson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjm-G9IYHA6iB6DajTs3vZdDSgW2cc5HS33OKau2-jnzhq3kA3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If brunch had a love language, Benedict Athens would be fluent. From the moment the plates hit the table, it was clear this place gets it. I ordered the raspberry and white chocolate pancakes, and honestly… they were unreal. Fluffy, indulgent, and filled with silky vanilla cream, then topped with white chocolate and a vibrant raspberry coulis that balanced sweetness with just the right hint of tart. Every bite felt dessert-level decadent without being too heavy.

My friend went with the portokalopita French toast, and it was just as impressive—rich orange-caramel syrup soaking into perfectly cooked French toast, layered with seasonal fruits, crème fraîche, citrus crumble, and (yes) raspberry coulis. It was bright, comforting, and very Greek in the best possible way—a beautiful twist on a brunch classic.

And let’s talk drinks, because brunch without mimosas is just breakfast. The mimosas here are chef’s kiss, and the mango mimosa stole the show—fresh, tropical, and dangerously easy to drink. Add in the lively brunch atmosphere, gorgeous plating, and that effortless Athens energy, and Benedict isn’t just a place you eat—it’s a place you linger. This is brunch done right, and I’d go back in a heartbeat. 🥂✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAm14Binwe0oEZ6YPEHQVc5&fid=0x0:0xbd5512eba1dc1789"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Caroline Shlian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOO3F_aEXHUDI-Z8nxSoqgaKudXA5_q2SNXhczGaMZPcpsdCog=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was perfect. Very special!
The manger and the waitress were so kind and helpful
We recommend this restaurant","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC8iA6flcxVPnQuX1V9mjLm&fid=0x0:0xbd5512eba1dc1789"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Rachel Wiggins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3z-gP8uryHk_CTB0BlJqFpV1d5jqQBN8_wJIPVM950QKcH5oLYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The restaurant is beautiful and the music is also great. The staff is very kind and the food is delicious! I would highly recommend stopping here. I got the french toast and I have to say it is one of the best if not the best french toast I’ve ever had in my life. They accommodated my allergy easily and it didn’t disrupt the original taste and recipe. Definitely stop by this restaurant if you have a chance! I also got the eggs and they were really good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANI-8gMQjj-AJ0jE54DlrW&fid=0x0:0xbd5512eba1dc1789"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Sofia Glantzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFRu0FYq056ltYtOxVfhsuYroLzC9V_5mu6NCi-wSfx7FBSigo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best brunch we be had in Athens and in general.
Excellent presentation excellent service and vibe.
Chocolate Pancakes and scrambled eggs from another planet!
Definitely worth more than one visit! 😏","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBX0ZITudXA4LGWQoRCcUAH&fid=0x0:0xbd5512eba1dc1789"],"When":"2026-1-9"},{"Name":"Nefeli Vitoraki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJcZVWCdsigkTSn85ePpswUhRrX8ceqU76DFqFL1MH8X_GA6hw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was excellent, the service was impeccable, super friendly staff. A new trendy addition to the neighbourhood of Omonoia! What a lovely meal!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8Fk-pH0QXNBbOqHZyu0cZ&fid=0x0:0xbd5512eba1dc1789"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Richard Dominguez Cid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwz_s3G6YnZ4kyPsomFNcMENl6Mc7dMlrdnNaqvTEb00sA1F4w7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Must-Do Brunch Spot in Athens – Near the Archaeological Museum!
I discovered Benedict Cafe on the last day of my short weekend trip to Athens, and I am so glad I did. This place is a hidden gem that perfectly blends international modernity with amazing local food quality.
Despite the interior being a bit tight (reservations are probably a good idea for groups or couples!), the atmosphere is absolutely fantastic—welcoming and vibrant.
The food and service were exceptional. The value for the quality you receive is top-tier. I would recommend this cafe with my eyes closed!
If you are planning to visit the National Archaeological Museum, this is a must-do as it is within walking distance. Along with Loukoumades, Benedict Cafe was easily one of the top foodie highlights of my entire trip. Don't miss it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPx7EznlF93sCYutWAgwZu&fid=0x0:0xbd5512eba1dc1789"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Natasha Mullis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWiR9VGiPP9-A_DjNMrEfBpX6OAGhCcwreW1bzndYn-29ZcqU73=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a delicious brunch here. The avocado Benedict and pistachio pancakes were very yummy. Would definitely recommend. We will probably be going back during this same trip for more brunch!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeJOUA11AxMvEDWZSindzX&fid=0x0:0xbd5512eba1dc1789"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Carleen La","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGKs9gwaPotcVToepuATH5KMg316A3jgQd7hR6Mixb3ng7VuzLlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything was really good.   We didn't have a reservation but they were able to seve is anyway since there was room.   The caramelized banana and Bacon pancakes were perfect.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnUriXakvc6_8-i5A8oyYC&fid=0x0:0xbd5512eba1dc1789"],"When":"2025-12-27"}]

[{"Name":"Jared Little","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwni-x2QBkzcCha9etPD9mW4mVYkqPvLoCrwKl2WKp-5TNtsEG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best coffee on our trip. The cappuccino was amazing and the vegetable cheese pies were warm and delicious. The owner is friendly and welcoming.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUVg5CmYVExDQz3lTawPSa&fid=0x0:0xeb524b482c97da5d"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Travel MacDougall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJmM3FRYOBMucvuWQ_P8uqZc52EeTLcHWKq9KzS-BJb7ZIWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the spanikopita spinach pie Nov 6 when I arrived in Athens.  It was fantastic.  So flaky.  I tried spanikopita 5 more times in Naxos and Santorini and none were close.  I fly home tomorrow but had to make one last stop here.  If you have it here you will be disappointed with any others.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChRj5_vIIskOIxeIXj4VK7&fid=0x0:0xeb524b482c97da5d"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Marko Seprak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuUjZuaVFm-wN67MEbbzkVe82W4RZBr_IvQ_LkAhco2SjUOA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here was genuinely great. They had the feta one, the beef one, and the tomato–olive–feta combo, and every single one of these hit hard. What really sold me was that they make everything with real olive oil instead of the usual cheap sunflower nonsense you get in the majority of the bakeries out there. Quality ingredients, clean taste and olive oil.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPPcWaa8VfltxOr7hpd9Bd&fid=0x0:0xeb524b482c97da5d"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Liberty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtltC4p4QcLcj0WSvTqrruvH9nRDUKTCCdLSPFDdHrPvVk1hTd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"the best spanakopita i tried my whole trip. they are one of the only places in this area that makes their phyllo fresh, and it truly shows. the owner is so friendly and kind. the coffee is amazing as well.

this place should have 1000s of 5 star reviews, but the rating alone should speak for itself. i visited twice in 3 days.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alyssa McLaren","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXP4al61KZFzlVSp9zzba-cq94LYyn2hT_h_tlj_6VcrlIgW6nI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was our very first stop after landing in Greece, and it did not disappoint. We were treated like royalty and served the most delicious spanakopita I have ever had, along with complimentary bougatsa.

The coffees were incredible, and the service was outstanding from start to finish. The experience truly set the bar high for the rest of our trip.

I would highly recommend visiting this café.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDnPy7Nx-f9GjU44Fj5jtf1&fid=0x0:0xeb524b482c97da5d"],"When":"2025-8-28"},{"Name":"Silvia C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJ0fhc6cYGncLmG9dnGd8o7g7WGX8Tkz96asw_lUzhpmep3fP8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We discovered this place on a food tour of Athens. Since then, we’ve already been back twice! Hands down, this is the place for the best spanakopita (spinach cheese pie) in Athens. The tiropita (feta cheese pie) is also amazing. The owner is really nice and welcoming. Highly recommend and we already can’t wait to go back!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPKm9Pvdt5XkBg&fid=0x0:0xeb524b482c97da5d"],"When":"2025-5-11"},{"Name":"Emily Yamamoto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3WW4j5d84_zmMtP2vndO2YPr92KXVbsTAoqfVryJw9Gb3S6TQtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Come here and eat the best Spanikopita, Bougatsa, Feta Pie and Coffee you'll eat in Athens. Came here as I was intrigued this was a stop on many food tours and ate here twice in 2.5 days. I see why it's part of a foodie tour!

The phyllo is hand-made, incredible and what makes this the best in town.  Crisp and shatter thin but not delicate where it flakes apart. Not greasy. Not soft and croissant like. The right ratio of spinach, feta and herbs. The Bougatsa is great as well. It comes out of a heated display case piping hot and he'll cut it for you if you eat it there. We bought one to go and carried it to the airport. Three hours later it was still warm with the crispy phyllo!

The coffees are excellent and his cappuccino is the best we've had as well. Super smooth, creamy and not bitter.

The owner is friendly and warm. The second time we came, he wished my husband a good day and patted him on the arm in such a nice way.

There are three bakeries just a couple of doors away from each other on this street. This is the smallest and so low key that you might walk past it but this is the best one.

Just walk on up from Monastiriki Square or down from the Central market and you'll find him. Gray walls and small display case. Three doors from Creme Royale.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDI1_UpxlVON32mng8C-nVJ&fid=0x0:0xeb524b482c97da5d"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"Missy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJp2WPqCAHc57aqWR6IgmTCyBHPg8tzhm5pXh1eoPn_kQSh4g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hit this great shop two days in a row! [{"Name":"Chris Gu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUefo3PJ3f4w4SNWSHYRPnFujGV22xETLc6ktj83RuF64AEqZWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"PLEASE AVOID THIS PLACE! My partner and I came here this morning. He had the chicken wrap, and within two hours he became sick with symptoms similar with food poisoning, including diarrhoea, fever, and stomach cramps. Since we ate exactly the same food last night, the chicken wrap from this place was the only thing he ate differently, so it seems very likely the chicken wasn’t cooked properly or was no longer fresh. We’ve now had to cancel our day trip tomorrow because of this. Very disappointed with this place.

Updates: The owner’s reply pissed me off again. Anyone with basic common sense knows food poisoning can absolutely cause a fever. We are 100% sure it was caused by your food that’s why I left the review here, bexause we don’t want any one else experience things like this.  and it’s defo not some virus like Covid — I am completely fine, and the only thing he ate differently was your chicken wrap. Since eating it, he has been sick, extremely weak, and still having diarrhoea and stomach cramps. I really can not feel you are sorry for this but refusing to think your food might have problems","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbQHMuJCGs6DBYxfucUBkO&fid=0x0:0x7a1564cc76f4139c"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Anna Radman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzWFiCSJXXmSfZOSHw2zshAb8KzfQbRhO6o1Br3B-uhoh_vC8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"found the nicest little coffee place! the people that work there are very friendly, they offer banana bread and some pastries as well and you can sit either inside or outside.
they also serve matcha - handmade not pre made (idk if pre made is even a thing here).

will be back tomorrow morning :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDcTHmmaPYlG-BwYT1B7IC&fid=0x0:0x7a1564cc76f4139c"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Jane L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJstdsVnfDptflEAAdE-1HE1POEpn5VTKYW8nooDfebV4OrLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We enjoyed our time at the café, which offers good coffee and a comfortably air-conditioned indoor seating area with pleasant décor. The outdoor seating is shaded by the balcony above, making it a comfortable spot even on a typical Greek summer day. The cake we ordered was a bit hard, but we haven’t tried any of the other food options. I’d recommend this café, especially as a relaxing stop after visiting the National Archaeological Museum of Greece.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxoLTlow9dUjvxKExb8Fbg&fid=0x0:0x7a1564cc76f4139c"],"When":"2025-7-24"},{"Name":"Ekaterina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqkRomxuVrXRWQraWQCbH6YmJVQT-8wVggZySrHTFY4cFjAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place became my favorite specialty coffee spot during my trip to Athens. Baristas are super friendly and helpful. Thank you! 🫶🏻","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoo5qnBQ&fid=0x0:0x7a1564cc76f4139c"],"When":"2025-4-28"},{"Name":"kerenml1606","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIndBCZoTj9Un-djPIuI0m2n9G1QMh4XhgM1SM-y59NL3qW0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"really enjoyed the atmosphere and overall experience. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Cynthia R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtOS2H3pEIfOQU3dMLQnZ9RT-V3IB6QCztnqwxAEItiyX4hoycTA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was an evening that we didn’t know what we wanted to eat so we found this little place to hang out until we figured it out.\nWhile we were there we had to give the barista bot a try! We ordered a coffee, an espresso, a tea and a hot chocolate. Of all the drinks, the hot chocolate was the best tasting. The other drinks were ok but nothing spectacular. It’s a robot following a recipe. Lol\nThe atmosphere itself was fun, the kids played a couple games while we chatted about dinner plans and then we ordered some wings to hold down the hangry peeps. The wings were very good! The staff was young but polite and friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMyLRQ-VrkncSmlOX0ewto\u0026fid=0x0:0x9e43c582768de376"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"RuthiC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU6zgZoanLz3-mOlYc5KgqoAVdDu3MzUJIU6U6uZDjyhxFWI5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Sign outside reads deli but I was suprised to find what was inside. As soon as we walk in  a gentlemen tells us \"we close in one hour for a private event\", given it's 1.5 hours left until event begins. I reply \"I  am just going to order a sandwich, we will be out of here before that.\"  We go order our sandwich at the deli.  No one to be found on how the gaming works. So we walked around spotted the same guy he's busy watching gaming going on. I ask \" can you walk us through how we rent this to play a game while we wait on our sandwich?\" He said \" it's $5 for an hour and turns around .\"   Sandwich is really good , place is really nice , robo coffee is cool and awesome to watch and  surprisingly really good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn1_G-FA\u0026fid=0x0:0x9e43c582768de376"],"When":"2024-10-1"},{"Name":"Joselynne Palomar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPzvGjL9vmj5kRu9c8p-4h1iKTAh1iwCTb1QT8br_YNsKZxp0NMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My new place to hangout. The pizzas are delicious and coffees too. They have a bar and sports tv. Desserts are good too. I’m happy we have this place here in Athens. Staffs are friendly and helpful. 👍","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bethany Hulsey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVv_lTXECy7MXjL0Z5Tw2jn4KUP1MfcE1wzQZ8ahO1zIkb41dYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s a “WFH” space on steroids with a robot that makes coffee and a new deli style sand which place going in their kitchen. We stopped by on a beautiful Saturday afternoon and they were closed, but we spoke to the owner who is in tech, from Cali. I guess they are primarily open during the week to work there. Lots of large screens, large office like chairs, booths with screens, etc Huge space, unsure about the coffee or food, but the coffee selling point is consistency because a robot makes it the same very time, unlike a barista. Curious who will be coming here in Athens, TX and how long this place lasts, but it appears cool.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhjsC7Yg\u0026fid=0x0:0x9e43c582768de376"],"When":"2023-3-8"},{"Name":"Kirsten Redd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ41eN8XcDARaBvok5-5GFzKxGUVaKKDQErsinaEcVXCFW-hA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Omg!!! The garlic knots are soooooo good!!!! The robot in the front tha does coffee and drinks is really cool. I got the strawberry lemonade and it is delicious!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Larisa Nolley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkfQFAaNQXxiCGtRr0ZAoHcVhrjJeR0rLBbmrE43WTEUwlbUOxvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband \u0026 I enjoyed our lunch here. All around 5 stars for this cafe - spacious seating, good food, \u0026 friendly staff. We didn't try the coffee robot but will definitely try it next time we visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZuuXTGA\u0026fid=0x0:0x9e43c582768de376"],"When":"2023-9-9"},{"Name":"Patrick Worley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-XeJTF0nIjuT2L_dKIb5iIE9kDEEKg_dvnbGW7Xqh3MNetIQy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Who knew…… the pizza would be so good. Yeah the robot coffee is neat BUT the open environment that kept the nostalgic old town on the inside is relaxing. I gave thanks to God our Father, then had the chicken bacon ranch - This is New York style floppy… The flavor was spectacular. Get ya some","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOlrVqeNfwZxgvhhTL7oKh\u0026fid=0x0:0x9e43c582768de376"],"When":"2025-6-19"},{"Name":"Jerid Heathman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUX1rN4kNfUaj6GPDC8lS45ewmW6ksy6_2UwSZqIp0mirYUkYM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to hang out! Good food, good games, and nice people. My son and I had an awesome time and we will be going back soon.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Hannah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHCpQ-7Kkphl1FIGpbQ0e3lPZWpuu4r7JHuHDZGhmZPpIAvkmD1Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exceptional Coffee, Friendly Baristas & Great for Takeaway

Kick in Kypseli is an absolute gem! The coffee is exceptional — rich, smooth, and clearly crafted with real skill and attention. Whether you’re in the mood for an espresso, cappuccino, or something more creative, everything tastes top-quality.

The baristas are incredibly friendly and welcoming, creating a relaxed neighborhood vibe that makes you want to come back again and again.

It’s also perfect for takeaway — quick service, consistent quality, and ideal when you’re on the go.

A standout spot in Kypseli for anyone who loves great coffee.
Five stars! ☕💛","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDaGwc4g5faCcjeZczEIRcW&fid=0x0:0xdd6ce889e1885ff0"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Julia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocITSFhpsolpgt7FYxOeySqyO3hovrQi4X0Z2vVUJBHbuMu5fQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very cozy space! Food was exceptionally delicious as well as the coffee. Everybody was so nice and the atmosphere was great. Will definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCT7xmqeFnGAMIVi3-NXEJ0&fid=0x0:0xdd6ce889e1885ff0"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Alessandra P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZVr6DWA1DpTyy48k2AVMIwoMLNsMp7mrRSbLvlOfBXc9e9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was in the neighborhood for a checkup and stumbled into the places on market day.
Great esthetics and music selection, it feels like being in Shoreditch but with an authentic Greek bakery next door. And the prices make you feel at home, too! 😆
Laptop friendly (but not good for taking meetings or calls as the music it's very loud), dog friendly and overall just a really nice place.
The service was great and the Matcha Latte even better. I will be back soon.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Konstantinos Christou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKci3JnOE7jKj9_Kt0dKyZSN9dtumly6a7kRKUpAEZ1afI0HUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Place has good coffee, especially when is prepared by a certain short hair, very friendly batista! Guys who run the place are kind. Nice area to sit and work 💻

Service depends on how busy the place is..
A bit pricy I would say, but yet quality/price ratio is high!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lady Globetrotter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnAJxiK9to9XzHdxMs9hxUitRm-9gep-dMmZ8kndnzC5bYqSM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good quality coffee.  But the atmosphere is not cozy at all. It is a place to take your laptop and work. It is suitable for that. Not for cozy cafe
sitting.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karitas Mitrogogos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWO5bRwGjXim0bh0ZtEFVgSZEKe0V-3RytcD5uyPl5kbtc0UmXc0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A truly pleasant modern spot in Kypseli that serves good coffee &  sweets ++ other goodies .... with a great vibe,  open & practical co-working space, a designer corner with clothes and accessories as well as an exhibition space in the basement. 😊👍

I really liked the outdoor seating, the coffee and their scrumptious tasting tripple chocolate cookie! 😋😊😋

Definitely going back for more soon! 😊👍😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDWr5jjCQ&fid=0x0:0xdd6ce889e1885ff0"],"When":"2022-4-7"},{"Name":"marine “Marine” pirodeau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIngMH4RAAC-5SFNAbXJ9lku_skEw8jRgA6dGIG3jFBl4UwuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you're looking for a place to brunch, this is it! Good service, good value for money, amazing sandwiches and desserts, the playlist is really nice:) I highly recommend it !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_KLS2B_iXeCkcYJGtOSSn&fid=0x0:0xdd6ce889e1885ff0"],"When":"2025-6-16"},{"Name":"Bill Korakas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKne7Fasbi0C4yR_ERar8bVgE3_PDws3YKkLoJesabMZJDDcA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Another beautiful space in the heart of Kypseli. A few stops away from the center of Athens a great spot to enjoy a cup of coffee and a pastry. Loads of spare to sit and study or work. The service was good overall and everyone was very polite and professional BUT the person serving us seemed to have very low energy and not enough knowledge about the coffees the shop was serving on the day. Coming from a hospitality back and London high standards of coffee culture I believe there is possibly a bit of room for improvement there. Worth the visit, I would happily go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3r4qp2gE&fid=0x0:0xdd6ce889e1885ff0"],"When":"2024-11-10"}]

[{"Name":"Mat Born","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcuMgpBxXa7LSneEcnHPizl5j6IJ95ibK8FlnRSkDKLgZmyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We can early afternoon, were sitted immediately by a very polite (and costumed) Waiting staff. The drinks were great (espressomartini and a wonderfull  recommendation from the waitress), we also ordered vegan cake, I've tasted better in my life but honestly the experience was great and we really enjoyed the decor, drinks, service and general vibe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD066uJ8Tgc3_qfVQa6FuZD&fid=0x0:0x3788ec5c0bfa59b9"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Alexandar Mitsev","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXa4A9WsXud_LgkXKXDuTd4qlVgBx75NiyCUTXYZVKkowycnGAD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The little kook is a big fiasco. Decoration is fun and interesting, worth seeing. But this is where everything ends. The rest is a culinary circus. Sweets are with cheap ingredients, lack of imagination high of sugar, low on taste.

The atmosphere is interesting at first, but after 10 minutes you realize that they only repeat the same song over and over again like one carousel. If the sugar bomb didn't make you dizzy, the music will surely do. But don't worry if you fell on the ground, the distracted and understaffed personnel will hardly notice you.

The toilets are awful. Not very clean and they lack the seats.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJtxhmIRrqdAlSYm9ORcN3&fid=0x0:0x3788ec5c0bfa59b9"],"When":"2026-3-4"},{"Name":"Mariea Preston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvvz7mUlEgS1fuMyg0n7Gl8mTlB39tgYovnhhvj2wPGowocw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a small district in the city. Little Kook have a cafe and a few other buildings which are interesting , such as a Christmas shop and pancake house. Food was great but portion sizes are way too much. I ordered the seeded bagel eith scrambled eggs and salmon etc. That would have been enough but it also came with a large bowl of overnight oats with fruit and honey. It was really tasty but thought it would be better to reduce the size. I had to share it and leave most of the bagel. Service is fast. The cafe is very interesting. Upstairs seating is a Christmas themed atmosphere. Would come again if I ever come back to Athens.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_7harixigK52bVCVs43ul&fid=0x0:0x3788ec5c0bfa59b9"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Dabu Paris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI8yQ4MVXVWmUpHv2fFcRHW1Hl8gLNEAEPHsJ-1B0k5AW50ug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a must see when you are in Psiri. If you are in Monastiraki just cross Ermou street and you will be in the Psiri neighborhood. The decoration changes according to the time of year and it is absolutly amazing,unreal. There are always LOTS of people who just come to take pictures and selfies so sometime you have to rub elbows to get the picture you want. This time we sat down for a coffee and a refreshment. We didn't have desserts, they are oversized but that wasn't the problem,it had more to do with the time of day. The service was great. Everyone was smiling and friendly and easy to talk to. I admire their courage because beacause it must not be easy with the large crowds this place has.
Our refreshments were expensive but that's to be expected. You pay for the atmosphere,decoration and all that goes with the place. Little Kook is a must in Athens!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3DWSxd7Hv2EGSodSiVDlr&fid=0x0:0x3788ec5c0bfa59b9"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Nektaria Kyriakakou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGVbc9_sAn3czoPMGx1Qksp_Lldf8P1O715W1CoHkcWbv4Y0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited Little Cook in Athens with family — including our young son — during the Christmas period, and it was absolutely magical. The decorations are unbelievable. It feels like stepping into a Christmas fairyland: countless lights, festive displays, and a truly enchanting atmosphere that both kids and adults will love.

The staff are very friendly, and the coffee and cakes are excellent. I would highly recommend trying one of their cakes or a hot chocolate. You cannot make a booking, but on weekdays you can often walk in without a queue. As you get closer to Christmas, you may need to wait a little, especially during peak hours.

The prices are quite high compared to other coffee shops in the area, even though it’s in a very central location. Some cakes and chocolates can feel a bit overpriced, but in many ways you are paying for the atmosphere and the incredible decorations rather than just the quantity. It’s not necessarily a place you’d visit very often because of the cost, but it is absolutely worth going at least once during the Christmas period for the experience.

The only downside is that because of the incredible amount of decorations, it’s not always easy to move around — especially with children. The toilets are also downstairs and the staircase is quite narrow, so that can be a bit tricky.

Despite this, it’s absolutely worth a visit if you’re in Athens. It’s one of the loveliest places we’ve visited with our son, and he loved it — which means we will definitely be going back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDAaY9o4MgTEv1NbnYecVCe&fid=0x0:0x3788ec5c0bfa59b9"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Kyriacos Mouzouris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjYM47xjYQRbkAmtSbG_KYLXNS1TaBgH0RXRl2Tm33hhIAHhO_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice place for families and kids. Price a little bit high but because of Christmas I assume that its ok... The place is placed in Athens Psyrri area. Also you can visit Akropolis and other historical place in Greece. In the place you can enjoy Christmas Swits hot chocolate, cakes coffee and more.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBgxWQdEXP1hobnsGJf7Oa8&fid=0x0:0x3788ec5c0bfa59b9"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Gary Watts","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl6EuIVk5mIlod9aX1yvyNmHP3pD8gy4EaEiPTjBcT4HEquzSI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is amazing and super packed with so many popular. As you can tell its like this every Christmas but well worth the visit if you can fight your way through the crowds. Interesting how they serve food and drink between all this. Decorations are abundantly shown and the atmosphere is very good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlcR9YGH_RfggEF0uuxhZG&fid=0x0:0x3788ec5c0bfa59b9"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"Bent_uaq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkgGJoMvFxMnCdSin6ahCzY3Ki8gIjm7BZ10p9YyGdCGqdMA5Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Little Kook 🎄🍰✨

It’s a restaurant and a set of themed souvenir shops, and the whole area feels like stepping into a Christmas fairy‑tale.
The decorations are incredible — full Christmas vibes everywhere, lights, ornaments, characters, and magical details that you really have to see in person 🎅🎁✨.

They also have cute gifts and souvenirs, perfect if you want something festive and unique to take home.
A fun, atmospheric spot that feels like a holiday world all year round 🌟.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKaJQVak-FssokbB7B02Lk&fid=0x0:0x3788ec5c0bfa59b9"],"When":"2026-1-30"}]

[{"Name":"Kimberley-Ann York","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWke44TavJvQ5gMrBQdE_f8NjL7XUYIFY7powxaX0LKhXqzmzx3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely cat cafe. Really wanted to take one of the Kitty's home. Owner explains the cats names and personalities. Beautiful mini shop with some cat merchandise in. This was the highlight of our Athens trip. Thank you 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDf1K_TrwgIS6iiCbpaqRGJ&fid=0x0:0x1ae0467c75941e19"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"Rosella Rojas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhm1gyeniiEyZYuLlB2Oa5cZwR8kNG7m1PyeaMIc4lU86tgyTE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I wanted to come to Cat Cafe Athens since the first day I was in Athens and when I finally did I wasn't disappointed at all. We arrived right before 5pm and most of the cats were super active and playful. The place is big enough, clean and not noisy so the cats are comfortable enough all over the place. I loved them all! Food was warm and nice. The stuff very friendly and welcoming. I definitely recommend this place if you are in Athens and are crazy about cats.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWeHMZ71W5CE58OzXFbWug&fid=0x0:0x1ae0467c75941e19"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Panagiotis Kpz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAd1nSX51_CrqKp22PGpA-VS-bcmtSzp3XPCGsc6JFMHeSCRYxqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Simple and lovely space with lots of cute cats (duh!). I had a snack and a drink, although I had to fight with a needy cat, but that's why we love them! The staff is friendly and I could tell they love their unemployed tenants. The place also offers adoption and they have given away lots of cats to their forever home so, go ahead and support them!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxU7sXt3kivxH4xwgCbv5x&fid=0x0:0x1ae0467c75941e19"],"When":"2025-9-4"},{"Name":"Carrie Kimberley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBikxWVuzKv7heQVVYg85rwxY5NV2nCMNx6K6rprsRDt_2SGxa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A cat lover's ideal spot! Clean, welcoming, and full of a wide variety of kitties (various ages, sizes, colors, etc.). I was sitting at a table reading the menu, and not even ten minutes later, a white and black kitten jumped up onto my lap and curled up for a snooze. It's the best feeling when you're missing your own kitties and get chosen as a kitty nap spot on your holiday adventure. 😻 I had a yummy iced latte, and there's a ton of other drink and snack options in their menu. Highly recommend if you're in Athens and want a kitty fix!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCNM1lw2ezZb9386ij6NPYr&fid=0x0:0x1ae0467c75941e19"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Stephen Asbury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcr5dONK4Oenu4QFggsSgEZA77fuwWSnyW9s2P-A7Qn26dedH4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife loves cats. So I took her to the Athens Cat Cafe. She LOVED it!

We booked in advance, and turned up at 12 noon when it opened. Our tickets included coffee and a snack each. We had paninis); they were very tasty.

The cats were lovely; beware they DO climb onto you (which my wife really liked).

Perfect for cat lovers 10/10.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDfkf_82i7ax2o2ne9F81g5&fid=0x0:0x1ae0467c75941e19"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Drew Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBXP3uObGJIHZc9zNe4IWEQUsfihtDJ_xnR-Ere3w99gctMQ-l=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A lovely experience.
This is the best cat cafe we have ever visited. We arrived about 13.15 on a Friday afternoon, the place wasn't busy but wasn't quiet either. The staff were very friendly and welcoming. The food is pretty good also.
But, of course, the star attractions are the cats. There are plenty of them here and they are all rescued and up for adoption. They are energetic and gregarious, we had a great hour or so as guests in their world.
Can't recommend this place enough.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDoIiM-QoQPvuThsRSnCqoZ&fid=0x0:0x1ae0467c75941e19"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"Oiiister","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWULj_gZ4h6VjOMC25cw9vwGLqMthy2hTaPSLKCTRfQ7QdUXYi2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was amazing, such a positive experience, it means a lot to be in a cat cafe that treats their cats well and also prioritizes adoption over display. Its like a home for the cats, and not a cat zoo.
It's a beautiful place that has a lot of heart put into it, and the food is great too.
Truly made my day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0woqok4IboRyUUP9rALEk&fid=0x0:0x1ae0467c75941e19"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"Sarah Baumann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK5kIIQEgbrZ7PA02ZgpwyxqJqS7FB0UoEMGPGL1bLefaguMg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely charming spot! The moment you walk in, you’re greeted by the smell of fresh coffee and the soft purring of friendly cats lounging everywhere. The staff clearly care about both the cats and the guests, making sure everyone feels relaxed and safe. Whether you’re there to unwind, read, or just enjoy some feline company, this cafe hits all the right notes. A must-visit for cat lovers!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC69JMsVuI5LZJRtDg-arGj&fid=0x0:0x1ae0467c75941e19"],"When":"2025-11-10"}]

[{"Name":"Sofia Lamas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyeRJxt5Rh4B-c9YiLj6OPl21kxQmIcunEcvaGKdqPKfBqRbRP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredibly good coffee! ☕️🔥 Medium roast perfection — they had Colombian 🇨🇴 and Ethiopian 🇪🇹 beans, plus so many cold and hot versions to try.
The staff was super kind and friendly 🫶, and there are tables outside to enjoy your coffee in the Athens vibe ☀️🇬🇷.
They even ask if you want sugar (my advice: always a No! 😉).
A great spot if you’re really into coffee — and even if you’re not, you’ll totally enjoy it 😂.
Tons of food options too 🥐, and the espresso was perfectly calibrated and absolutely delicious. 💫
A must for coffee lovers in Athens! ✨
(We where there 3 times in a week )","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAcqMTnVf56q3iqOmNOWW0P&fid=0x0:0x1760d48a5b637f7a"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Phoebe Dhi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWU_doQomVq60bIt4veYg24QU3_Gzq8q31Q1ItHAAIzMM29ZYMK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tailor Made Coffee is a little cute place with a cozy atmosphere and really nice coffee. It’s a great spot to stop by and relax for a bit. I tried the apple pie with crumble — the flavor was good, but it was a little bit dry for my taste. Overall, a pleasant café worth visiting, especially for the coffee.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWacqKOnNyRqHJB122owBk&fid=0x0:0x1760d48a5b637f7a"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Xinlang Feng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6dCIejoXP-rKp0QVfKo8MKoAWk-cWu6-tOU1oaIohKXWmHg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely coffee! We ordered double cappuccino and flat white, love the flat white a bit more than cappuccino:) only have 2 seats inside it’s a bit pity.
Minus 1 star on the vibe because people seating next to us are smoking. I know people are smoking everywhere is Athens. I just hate it","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0u08pWIwutc2QNTXnTY0H&fid=0x0:0x1760d48a5b637f7a"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"M W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJngiH8DB1brlBgBc2XD-euuk-8_qtpt9_FZ0vU5zYfb71hXt-B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"They have matcha and variety of pastries you can nibble on,
The matcha latte had sugar in it,  it was very sweet that I obviously had to ask if they added sugar to my matcha without my consent, but it turns out their matcha powder is sweet… be weary of that as it spoils the taste buds!
Very nice service, and the caffe has a beautiful setting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCpzWhfFqVB8oYD4E890LuA&fid=0x0:0x1760d48a5b637f7a"],"When":"2025-8-25"},{"Name":"Jono Kruger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLsbo8Y0iFyYs4vC2kJx5RVg0VPmJd2sIjgvIHL7s6PVpHPcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely coffee and friendly staff. Plenty of pastries to choose from and a wide range of great coffee options","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCiOLGWZpEnBJVNyiIAlpx&fid=0x0:0x1760d48a5b637f7a"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Trish Dunn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVK3c14Uz6G8Udz3IQHTBpz1iH3HYq5rm8ks3BGS2QMSi4JVsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Loved my cappuccino freddo. The service was great. We didn’t care for the pretzel. But I still highly recommend coffee and atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBlhdCIlJ47UNSDwIUtALYc&fid=0x0:0x1760d48a5b637f7a"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"C Man","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKV1hYXiQq4Bh1VvwdKf0CW9ctrWNvD-u7_7H9o0AZYPgVMTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great variety of drinks and snacks. Baguette and spinach pie were nice! I had the strawberry latte, I liked it but think I prefer normal latte or matcha (just my preference). We sat outside it was nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBL_dMttUaA9-OPdiZG8f6W&fid=0x0:0x1760d48a5b637f7a"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"Sofi Tch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIGyKib2I3G3LHCBPNx22OXkazD4lbI3ETG9bw9i8Ds0nPV6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tailor Made is a true specialty coffee spot. The quality of the beans and precision in brewing really stand out. The ambience is modern yet welcoming, and the staff are genuinely kind and attentive. A great place both for coffee lovers and anyone who just wants to enjoy a perfect cup in a nice atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhLuI1zsaK0Vjd-T3mvGFs&fid=0x0:0x1760d48a5b637f7a"],"When":"2025-8-22"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mihail Gaydarov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVnGnudhIfvQsWYoLgXlnAoFuAAoMDox1tv6pOq_m0qP7BZuuv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for brunch, great service and the food was delicious.

Ordered a bunch of plates - croissant brioche with a beef patty, avocado toast, eggs Benedict, and Japanese pancakes with Dubai style toppings.

We had an absolutely lovely time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC42pI3XOZNuzyalxqvRwXR&fid=0x0:0xc46f33544d6116da"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"George L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWX0IhTtwWsH8aLxwl7blel3oxJfCndsqwb2ZMQB4btDzDK5HK4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fairytale is an absolutely stunning themed café that truly transports you to a different world. The design and atmosphere are magical, and the menu offers a great variety of options, including plant-based milk alternatives and gluten-free choices. I especially loved the themed desserts, beverages, and food, which really tied the whole experience together. The only downside was that some of the couches were a bit dirty, which took away slightly from the otherwise enchanting vibe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCosM1iM8n0CvO9e8JxZK9c&fid=0x0:0xc46f33544d6116da"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Нейро Неджьведжь","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGTcaKvBCIsTdyC7FEJFZ09luGiWtJSzSJX_IpVf7_dZLvuC8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"It's a pretty nice place, but the service is really bad.
The waiters can walk right past you and ignore that you want to order. I decided to see how long it would take for a waiter to come over, and after 15 minutes, I had to call him myself.
They didn't bring any water.
After ordering coffee and waffles, the coffee (which was delicious) took 15 minutes to arrive, and the waffles took 30 minutes (it's unclear why they couldn't be served together with the dessert). The waffles were completely cold, meaning they hadn't been prepared recently.
Verdict: apart from the atmosphere, there's nothing to like here. The service is poor, and the food is mediocre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDl-TLF5TjaBYHRu6D8BC-&fid=0x0:0xc46f33544d6116da"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Mauredy Cataldi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKvmcb-ofL4gkbl4hQ22AstDynKCk494lWZHP_bHQ8M7zGGru0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Aside from the unbeatable location next to the best bars and restaurants in the center. My experience at this hotel was excellent from the very beginning. All the staff were incredibly attentive, always making sure I felt comfortable and well taken care of. They even had the lovely detail of offering me a cocktail and helping me with my luggage all the way to the taxi. You can truly feel that they put their heart into their service. Without a doubt, I will return and highly recommend it to anyone looking for top-notch hospitality.

Bonus: they have a partnership with a women focused initiative that produces the coffee they have in the room. It is amazing quality coffee! Great to know you are supporting the cause by staying here and enjoying a nice morning cup of coffee.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natalie Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGd41V2-TXFvvNr3w2wWZDqvQ7WWsAjbjQ09Eolehy0X-Ubw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had such a great experience at Fairy Tale Restaurant! The atmosphere is super cozy and charming, and the food did not disappoint. My favorite was the smoked salmon teriyaki salad and it was absolutely delicious! Perfectly balanced flavors and beautifully presented. Service was warm and welcoming too, which made the whole evening even better. Definitely a spot worth visiting!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hara Pipa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtVqmklK4wLs49cWZnM3_FXyxmJbiTo-H4yOvO9HfXJoq2Yg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"A HORROR fairytale!!
We visited Fairytale Café expecting a fun and family-friendly experience, but it turned into something closer to a horror story. One of the staff members, dressed as Wednesday Addams, approached our table and completely terrified my two children. Despite asking her politely to step away, she stayed near us, making things worse.

Both of my kids were crying and calling for help, yet no other staff members came to assist or calm the situation. It was extremely distressing for all of us, and it took hours for my children to calm down after we left.

This was a deeply disappointing experience!!!
Definitely not recommended!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marina Savvopoulou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_0x2RQ8JRE3TqTOV-Kmh-ZVHd7EwVrEBNay_AzlluZXynSZ74=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Overrated. The space is very small and nothing like it appears on TikTok or social media. Tables are too tight for four people, and the large plates make it even more uncomfortable. Orders arrived late, and the brunch options were disappointing. The waffle was burnt. Definitely not brunch-friendly or worth the hype.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChluCS1tPISsl2pfPe0Gco&fid=0x0:0xc46f33544d6116da"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Evgenia Tsiogka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjT-Kl3Jd-7XtV50X8WtrHkHx-1r-0cuQB_HwH_eokwVlbVnSd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an amazing time at the cafe tasting delicious desserts! The staff is super kind and helpful compared to other places around. Congrats for the amazing team!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Antje-Kathrin Schumann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVugv_hm6xB6TU_dUkmf4cR9UtYAXRcR33MCdFUi_lSeswcL2Qx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you want a really good coffee to go between two meetings or a shopping marathon to recharge your batteries, then this is the place to go.

👉 Tate Speciality Coffee

📍 Kolokotrani 25, 10562 Athens, Greece

It is in the city center.

☕️ Nice latte macchiato.

🪑 Interior kept in modern coffee bar style. The color palette is black and white as well as anthracite and wooden.

💁‍♀️ Friendly service.

When do you drink coffee here?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELnXnufoue3vzgE&fid=0x0:0xaa8d46e9b1db0e99"],"When":"2025-5-15"},{"Name":"A B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPQjZIuSsi923o5WeaZfcrS56ImTN6aF7eloDIR_KS7Cmy-N9jEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The flat white was very good. We had seconds. Wish they have some table and chairs tho.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCadftBDqJUUle4tYd6fLil&fid=0x0:0xaa8d46e9b1db0e99"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Shira Nagar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmbOUMO00BY_t2135Y5vQpfkf6p0TtQwFukIwGqDD4CuNJxgHH1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a good coffee! For an addict like me it was the best gem of this area!
4 days in a row I didn’t skip this coffee, easy to tell they know their coffee very well!
I enjoyed so much to start my day with your delicious coffee- I can’t believe it’s closed tomorrow on my last morning in Athens. Thank you guys! See you next time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnoObSIw&fid=0x0:0xaa8d46e9b1db0e99"],"When":"2024-9-21"},{"Name":"Phil J.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImcmcE3Q3fuGCn01uD1GO8kHVYvKFeM76_MkCKkWfmxp2xyumO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing local coffee place: Two cool gentlemen serve fresh coffee. I enjoyed my americano and the fresh protein bars with black chocolate. Cheers boys, down to earth and delicious!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matthew Levin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuzrf-1Pm4JyIMu4FVt5XIrGSS-5xl5-XRAqA0ZUcZ9muZwAj0MQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Kind of a weird experience here, The menu lists a cappuccino for €2 and a double cappuccino for €2.20, so I ordered just a cappuccino and she made me and charged me for a double. When I pointed out that I had ordered a regular cappuccino, she just shrugged and told me she made me a large one, so it's €2.20. 🤷‍♂️ The coffee was fine. Not the best cappuccino I've ever had, but not the worst, either.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjgJbLBQ&fid=0x0:0xaa8d46e9b1db0e99"],"When":"2024-4-27"},{"Name":"Lucy Hamidzadeh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV8vFld1757ifiHmnNAJtIS2-lvzIgBhbdp3FKfTyvCITsuU4uX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Superb coffee! Visited most mornings in my 2 weeks stay in Athens. Really great coffee, and really great owners. A cute place too. But yes, coffee EXCELLENT! Flat white with oat milk = top notch","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thomas Asimakis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXN3lCniZZrPtjtRJyMZPrAV6998ZwnaKsezSWOyXlcQZwogprz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As the name says “specialty” indeed the coffee is very special flavoured. Don’t miss it for a take away coffee or more","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ujjal Pathak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItoQr6Dknay_PUxlVu7FkeNu-nep3iBK8X4IEwXRoZKXdCfYU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As someone who lives in San Francisco spoiled with good coffee, I’ve to say this place blew my mind. Best coffee and service with free WiFi in all of Athens. My favorite is the good ole Latte but I also recommend Freddo Cappuccino. Best part - the owner, Stavros, is a chill dude inside and out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDVm8qvIQ&fid=0x0:0xaa8d46e9b1db0e99"],"When":"2023-12-16"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lulu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYQmLyBF_pfSnCBLMFhJtHwhrXLZIRfVfIVK46gkWFQdICyzSy6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"5-Star Review for Haraz Coffee House

A Luxurious Escape with Exceptional Coffee and Pastries
Haraz Coffee House truly lives up to its reputation as a bougie, fancy, and utterly luxurious spot—stepping inside feels like entering a sophisticated oasis blending modern elegance with warm Yemeni cultural vibes.  The interior is stunning: plush seating, stylish decor, ambient lighting, and an inviting atmosphere that's perfect for lingering with friends or solo.

The coffee is outstanding, made with authentic 100% Yemeni beans that deliver rich, bold flavors with a natural sweetness.  Whether you go for a classic brew or one of their signature spiced lattes (like pistachio or saffron), it's smooth, aromatic, and far elevated from your average chain.

The pastries are the cherry on top, freshly baked daily, flaky, indulgent, and perfectly paired with your drink.  I tried a few and they were all delicious, adding that sweet touch to make the experience complete.

If you're looking for a high-end coffee shop that's as beautiful as it is tasty, Haraz is a must-visit.  Great customer service, too.  Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCia_OnxhCPXOOHMdsuPGGo&fid=0x0:0x1d870e7ea407a547"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Katlynn Cha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyourleHu-zxTJ3H2r9YtsczYxoxZnQ4GRUMxnl9AeI6xXLVgI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"t was my first time visiting on a weekend morning and the staff was welcoming and helpful to advise what I should try. I explained I wanted a tea and something dark but not too dark and they recommended the saffron adeni - black tea with a mixture of spices and milk. It was delicious and hot. Also had some breakfast here. Plenty of indoor seatings for groups of all sizes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVCWwkuEnLgX3ezxvuNFd3&fid=0x0:0x1d870e7ea407a547"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Jennifer Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI129A9gb4Xa2gN2pjSPl_-hDd0Ji7WyOrIQA4QTGDNuG5tCA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place just became my number one coffee shop to come to. the service is absolutely amazing such wonderful staff and the coffee is one of the best coffee I have ever tasted. I love the atmosphere as well there is plenty of seating and makes it a great place to come drink some coffee while getting some work done. Please come and give this place a try you will not be disappointed! The mocha latte is absolutely delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9jPaPpWL7MsQi1qq6nTWi&fid=0x0:0x1d870e7ea407a547"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"Lee Huynh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUTrgAyiREaKtt-KzpBf7hxnrjYdCa98cEmo7AAQCm2UbgUJsk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This cafe serves delicious Yemeni coffee, lattes, frappes and a variety of pastries, including pistachio custard and Nutella croissants. The atmosphere is warm, friendly and welcoming. I love the beautiful decor and comfortable seating.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAchRoVSiUy4qHblKgukrzw&fid=0x0:0x1d870e7ea407a547"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Keewah Rebecca Parker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJsD3q-FjJn6Xn1Ys27RcUorYFvLTxD0nMZPhHK-ZadfciFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am from out of state and I need it somewhere to study. This place was so welcoming and so beautiful. I definitely recommend it if you want to go here to study or to hang out and play cards. It definitely is a peaceful and yet welcoming environment the product I had the tea was very delicious and the customer service was superb.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyc-nEkylhjqEeMCY8yfHm&fid=0x0:0x1d870e7ea407a547"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Ann M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLHpZFg-joPF5_zS6Jm5BhxMAtyXAMt6GedVThmCzk7EMj75g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This store is very nicely decorated.  This is a chain store.  Great vibe.  The coffee is seasoned with spice and upon first taste, it hits you in the face but once you are used to it, you will appreciate the flavor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA6hsNehNXI-4ITfJQ1A1AC&fid=0x0:0x1d870e7ea407a547"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Nabeel Ozman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUha5TtRTKlKL-A4_4XHNzpCRXpUevHbV26Ju06Fa3Nf8RlqTd9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came in later in the evening and the service was top notch. The male server was super friendly and gave us tips on what we should get, it couldn’t get any better.

We ended up coming again in the morning - worth the drive and definitely will be coming back whenever I’m in Texas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9m2oEnb02ANPFFPgNUjRE&fid=0x0:0x1d870e7ea407a547"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Carmen Nina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlESFhNT6CsZ-e7rejFKbkKIgfAL4AR0HvOuLbr1kf9zr18Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for a coffe place that is opened after 2PM and I found Haraz Coffee House. Very nice place, modern and clean. The pastries are so delicious, and the desert as well. We tried Turkish coffee - I loved the taste, and the way it's served.
Definitely recommending this coffe house.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiPLaawtNOCX8HlKrBV2DB&fid=0x0:0x1d870e7ea407a547"],"When":"2025-12-8"}]

[{"Name":"Jose Ley Jr.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWO5bn_ee0OSCQE7Hj6AKJ2gOtbpdSrY-xfTzRAnt0FrWO0q1k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I loved going into an old house and eating in it. Older windows that reminded me of a home I lived in back in the 90s. Lots of quirky knicknacks to look at.
The burger was pretty good with a: made-at-home style taste. My wife had a sandwich that she absolutely loved.
If I'm in the area again; I'll likely stop by again. There was a young man doing it all... cooking, servicing. Luckily it was just my family and another couple there.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7GIGs_WuK6KQbT0wgwZ9y&fid=0x0:0xaa2f5844a27fcecf"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Dee Dee Gould","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUcUE4_IAh7WTUtD6th65QlMKxZFCYl9qv_WdVFgyN8vf03vo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sasha was very friendly, and the drinks he made for us were so good!!  There's a variety of flavor options for the different types of coffee, but the one I chose this time was the Nutty Mexican frappuccino.  YUM!!

Friendly staff, delicious drinks, and cozy atmosphere.  Lovely coffee shop!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shannon Reed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYFAjIAqIencQMLBbm1-57ltEfcICekoN1rfKvr6bo5W0lcc0u=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is amazing! I came here twice and one weekend just because I was so impressed the first time. I had an almond joy mocha a latte and it was fantastic! I also had a blueberry muffin, and I think that was actually the best blueberry muffin I've ever had in my life. That is not an exaggeration. I would absolutely come back just for those blueberry muffins.

The second time we came back for afternoon coffee. And this time I got a plain mocha latte. This mocha was huge! I literally had to get a to-go cup because I could only drink about half of it, and it still filled up an entire small cup! I also got the classic sandwich, which was great. The atmosphere of this joint is impeccable. They played fantastic music, had great food, and the vibes were immaculate.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC55ZX1jAE&fid=0x0:0xaa2f5844a27fcecf"],"When":"2023-10-16"},{"Name":"Kristie W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJ7hUFZNyhwkvwRV0xCekoILrzqgUz54TpPvdG1DgkvGhfDzl1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As I walked into this enchanting place with flowers & plants galore, I gasped! Gorgeous and locally owned & the staff helps when you’re not quite sure what to have!!

It’s so cosy, nice & everything is yummy!  This day I tried green tea w/honey & lemon. It was excellent. I truly haven’t had anything I didn’t like!  Athens is know as the Home of the Hamburger and theirs are great!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDewZ38nQE&fid=0x0:0xaa2f5844a27fcecf"],"When":"2022-10-12"},{"Name":"Trish Ernst","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-7Pg832ulBCb0MMLMA1OY2pqCeCtiBxk584VZMwAz8S2PeJ2i3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the Ultimate and Sunrise breakfast. I had Carmel coffee with mine. The food was fresh and tasted great. It was definitely made to order. Matt’s service was attentive but not intrusive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwksaYKg&fid=0x0:0xaa2f5844a27fcecf"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"Jenna Grace","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqtBHCES2XSrN9qtX47ZGT8sYJCTTHXkclhqrXNX3I532oiOs8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were visiting from Dallas, came by this spot on a little whim, and the little whim turned out to be actual best thing ever. Inside and outdoor seating were cute as boots, super whimsical vibes and decor. We got the Bonnie and Clyde and Sunrise sammies, both delicious and well priced. The guy with the dark hair and beard who helped us (I can’t remember your name I’m so sorry!) was such a sweetheart and very helpful. I’ve been to $100+ spots in the city and they for real didn’t hold a candle to this place. Keep it up, we can’t wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCI9ZXLqAE&fid=0x0:0xaa2f5844a27fcecf"],"When":"2025-4-3"},{"Name":"Santrice Watson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmbgkJSViMKIU3LKlAxQ4RZPaprLsWKFza7S-6F9WJkiiYNIKj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been here all my life and I would have never even known about this place if it weren’t for wanting to try new things.  I’m so glad that I did because everything was amazing!! My smoothly was a true smoothie with whipped cream, and it was at least 24oz., truly worth every penny. The deli sandwich was shockingly better than any deli sandwich I’ve ever had. Of course I will be returning!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICbwriLKw&fid=0x0:0xaa2f5844a27fcecf"],"When":"2024-7-24"},{"Name":"Cheryl Tidmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzF-CjCYLLej5X5SgrrD6-uOWwbfEAtTjoN123zz_8np8bjjXY3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love everything about this place. We had breakfast there and decided Callaway’s is our new “go to” for a delicious meal anytime of day! I love dropping by often for a fabulous coffee. Great staff and cozy atmosphere!👍👍☕️","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Lela Avraam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXT2moqii8LP4lkWFTjc_eur2pYLwjfCerGmGs0y5qHRcS5ts=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a beautiful place!!! The decoration is amazing, their pastries so cute and tasty and top coffee!!! If you want to enjoy all these wonderful things you should check them out!!! The staff is very polite and professional and the service quick!!! Unique pastries and a lovely & festive atmosphere!!! For Instagram posts & artistic photos is the right place to be!!! Highly recommended!!! Honorable mention for the amazing raspberry sweet that was 10/10!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhFwntd58jDTptJix5fnzp&fid=0x0:0x52f1ae408d4ae376"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Megatron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBEZa5IoVVzEFR7jpes1YrhjrLUL4HtZvmgWhL9Ksy3sJUIXyf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful cafe and calm atmosphere. The desserts were also very delicious and obviously gorgeous. Workers were kind but a bit slow, although they were a bit busy on the day so I can’t blame them. Overall great experience♥️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBHfxmbuHRZQHYjBtl9bs7-&fid=0x0:0x52f1ae408d4ae376"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Ivanna Brus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbIvbpIEo3Ke2sYQEtOZfIwRF0pCSEn7RTNqCksjTqhrucNeOw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I will definitely recommend this café! The staff were so lovely and welcoming. I ordered a pink matcha and it was served with ice, but I actually wanted a hot one since it was very cold outside. When I mentioned it, they kindly offered to prepare a hot drink for me to take away on the house, which was really appreciated.

The only small issue was the serving time, the wait for the waitresses was quite long.

Overall, a great experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCBR0InYk4S6ng0haxOr9Td&fid=0x0:0x52f1ae408d4ae376"],"When":"2026-2-26"},{"Name":"Ola Ola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXo5o6jd7OR7h6nlPiajiCWxH73kFGd0VeCHdlr7ir1zpQYUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A beautifully decorated cafe with a pleasant atmosphere. The toasts and sandwiches are well prepared, and the raspberry dessert is simply a masterpiece and delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBfs6njWdPK0rSUCA0VPRxt&fid=0x0:0x52f1ae408d4ae376"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"Riddhi Jain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnSBAK0VGCHICVZY_-GxBxBl-8u0v7KMNw3C2cHUU-bJug-Tw9vg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely beautiful decor - it is what made us step into this place!
They have outdoor seating as well between their coffee shop and the pastry shop. The pastries and other desserts seemed so delicious! The staff is very welcoming and friendly despite the extremely busy evening rush we went in. Good place to sit outside and enjoy the vibe of the city. Would recommend this for the desserts and drinks!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhOzc7PmBcgqatdPMxD60d&fid=0x0:0x52f1ae408d4ae376"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Alex Serebrov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4lnJw-pXXZSSpA-iiZnSzONhQ-C0X3cGWpvI-zcDPVkNHZk4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have stopped there just to get an ice coffee,  but was captivated there by very cozy and cool atmosphere and irresistible sweets selection. I had they special limited edition ellyz cake and it was very good, which was a very good complementary to espresso tonic.
Unfortunately I had no time to explore their other options including savory dishes, but I definitely would when I am next time in Athens.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDHSufBYEBxxaAg2wHnKbCz&fid=0x0:0x52f1ae408d4ae376"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Elsa boulos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi-5A-qHNCcRHnq9FCbB_5mibFh96THpmuJVKmkoMixcKS8w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ellyz Athens is one of the prettiest coffee shops in the city — full of pink flowers and charm! The desserts are amazing and so Instagram-worthy, and while the salty food is more on the simple side, it’s nicely presented and tasty. A lovely place overall","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDahGK5Skx1i3Zeq40430iC&fid=0x0:0x52f1ae408d4ae376"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Vas Vas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3yMymYH_XRxYF31vUugb3bXglFUwNSPq11qiCgWx4n6Lp70Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We picked up this cafe as has an amazing view towards Erechthio temple and nice look and feel environment as a store.. however the service was not at the level should be .. even thought it was so crowded.. if you have alternative option you may select but if you like to give a try.. please do having patience….","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDPeEwNZb250U_1AeGW5RxF&fid=0x0:0x52f1ae408d4ae376"],"When":"2025-12-15"}]

[{"Name":"TopDawg Junk Removal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUJOknoQZIPRzbANLvxPYDYZOxPz9KQdJz_FJKbMIvBCrulM68=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Place is one of those restaurants that immediately feels welcoming the moment you walk in. The atmosphere is relaxed but polished, making it great for both a casual meal or a nicer night out. The menu has a solid variety, and everything we tried was fresh, flavorful, and clearly made with care. Portions were generous without being over the top.

Service really stood out — friendly, attentive, and never rushed. It’s the kind of spot where staff genuinely want you to enjoy your experience. Overall, The Place lives up to its name and is absolutely worth a visit if you’re in Athens. I’ll definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAM9XYIYoEzDG9iQy_yl6BW&fid=0x0:0xe413fa28c33837f4"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Jordan Forsyth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVixUtaZh-jfinARnoiykAXiKuqMtsolcHlLbKpa7aYYRtUBD3v=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My family and I really enjoyed our experience at The Place. We sat upstairs and all ordered different dishes. Chicken and Waffles, Shrimp and Grits, Bourbon glazed Salmon, and the Burger. Everyone enjoyed their food and I must say the bacon on the chicken and waffles really made the experience. To top it all off the Cheesecake was dense and delicious!
Our server Sam had helpful suggestions, was attentive with good conversation.
Before we were done we all knew we’d be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZ1dYn8ahirxOwMGHtNS8g&fid=0x0:0xe413fa28c33837f4"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Mariya Dan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXcWn5hUEbIq4KLAb6na4I6r7VOsYkhCcq8LKAvY2KMlYyEPZs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Place exceeded my expectations. Let's be real, most American cuisine restaurants are pretty formulaic. I expected the same here, but i was met with a $10 hefty portion of a delicious, tangy, buttery sandwich with perfect mashed potatoes. The workers are so nice and attentive, and it's definitely being added to my list of places with good tuna melts. Can't wait to be back for dinner!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyaCubdpnKTnr54zfUAtCw&fid=0x0:0xe413fa28c33837f4"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Isabel Yanes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgEKJ7UwmKe-9DRNwcOiCHh2TOvsURENaOXeLBwsz5fY-kPBzn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"*Delayed post from April ‘25

I was pleasantly impressed with The Place! It was recommended by a few friends and I’m glad we stopped in for Saturday night dinner, though I’ve also heard brunch is delicious, albeit busy. The service includes typical southern hospitality and is mostly run by college age students as expected. I loved our window seats that looked out at north campus with the Arch in view. Perfect for alumni in town looking to reminisce over a meal.

Food wise, I was concerned with what appeared to be stereotypical southern style food like fried chicken and shrimp and grits, but boy was I wrong!! The modern take on these meals satisfied my craving for familiar comfort foods, while elevating the quality and presentation to something I was proud to share with someone “not from ‘round these parts.”

I highly recommend the Southern Bruschetta because the Pimento Cheese is ON POINT. Also the Shrimp and Grits, which has unbelievably delicious flavor and texture. If you’re not hungry enough for an appetizer, a good combo would be the Fried Buttermilk Chicken Sandwich because it also comes with the Pimento Cheese. The chicken was beautifully fried and seasoned well. Can’t go wrong here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVvqlUyFQYmIOJ7FtZ-X4d&fid=0x0:0xe413fa28c33837f4"],"When":"2025-8-19"},{"Name":"Yoshi Kasahara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_eveXgJHMBmCxO_W_S06KuF3UdbTJn9WjhTnzoUb3ozTj1g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Stopped by to check out this place for potential upcoming party reservation.
Our bartender/server, Carleigh, was very attentive, informative, and personable.
