[{"Name":"Wei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL02XoGEcQ1_AqXQzqRXgCl6Bn_s4we8sJ5WeN85RtXCriIaA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was incredible good! The portions were big as well. We shared 3 main dishes; the beef brisket and lamb from the oven were amazing!!! The meat was perfectly tender and we loved the sauces from both dishes! We also got shrimp orzo; that one was just okay. The orzo wasn’t really necessary since the other two dishes were more than enough. The prices are a bit higher here than other local restaurants in athene, but actually its worth the price because of the good quality of food! Overall it was a great experience with excellent service!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQaDG_fqCGxs1LwXwYPoBM&fid=0x0:0x76477085b720f36f"],"When":"2026-3-3"},{"Name":"Lina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlSYdzVdotUjdMfiSPbSURkPer7oVTS7OaaDXCphMR_a_7EQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely amazing experience!
The food was incredibly good – we tried the lamb and the deer, and both were unbelievably tender and full of flavor. Truly outstanding quality.

The service was just as fantastic. The waiter Andreas - was extremely friendly, took the time to explain everything, gave great recommendations, and really engaged with us. You could tell he genuinely cared and wasn’t in a rush at all.

A truly great dining experience – highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDOS1LT7cDOzEcDAlv-OwDl&fid=0x0:0x76477085b720f36f"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Joel Pagett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9GzDV6w6mX_yH4nPmKzCVvFboz1VL5gy9IQQuNAQVjjVz8G_ABQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited A Little Taste of Home on my first night in Athens, having been recommended a visit. The restaurant is on a bustling street, and offers both indoor and outdoor seating, depending on what you prefer.

After being warmly welcomed, we sat down and explored the menu. To start, my husband and I shared some fabulous meatballs. They were delicious and a very hearty portion, too.

For my main course, I opted for a ‘Euphoria’ salad, a combination of smoked chicken, Gorgonzola, and strawberries—which sounded intriguing. It wasn’t something I’d had before, but the combination worked, and it was delicious.

The service was very friendly and attentive, and overall we had a great meal. I would definitely recommend a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwY8iVuhb0riaMNVt0l7Ex&fid=0x0:0x76477085b720f36f"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Sriwanti Bhattacharya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQRcZ1gm-kw3GEYMactZ8xpAn2sK_GHByBpraiQaBGcq2ng6-b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was simply out of the world!

Authentic Greek food, and delicious favours. The meat was slow cooked to perfection, falling off the bones, with a side of fresh Greek salad and a lovely wine collection.

We also had Ouzo, an anise-flavoured aperitif, considered the national drink of Greece. Washed it all down with Mastic Tears, a sweet liqueur produced with the mastika resin from the Greek island of Chios.

The owners and staff at the restaurant were kind and friendly and we had a great time chatting with them too.

Highly recommend to anyone who is looking for a  good meal after a long day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmwtKscW8X_F4Y4IMsrqTH&fid=0x0:0x76477085b720f36f"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Tereza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBr9y24j2zy-j-GPcMxi52uPZurjAnJ5UqTx5c01smiwPl9HgiQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went here with my boyfriend for our last late lunch in Athens. We were randomly recommended this restaurant by a stranger in a nearby café, and we were both absolutely thrilled. Honestly, it is my favourite memory from our trip.

The food was amazing, and so were the people. The atmosphere truly felt like home. Thank you so much for the food and for the aperitif for our way home.

If we ever find ourselves back in Athens, we will most definitely come again.

11/10 for everything.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmOBy4rAs1e-BfBDvNXQIw&fid=0x0:0x76477085b720f36f"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Bertrand Hieronymus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRUoitsLTRXI4XRG2O-ValB5sxr2nuGvu5_qrABLPaVWgslzo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely fantastic.
Not only from Greece, the restaurant takes inspiration from other countries.
We had the Euphoria salad, the hummus and the caramelized cheese dfor appetizers and all were awesome. But the mushroom pasta was yet even more 😍
Staff were friendly and smiling always here to help us.
Would definitely recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAaPZ2XlPobuhYrOVAET1K&fid=0x0:0x76477085b720f36f"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Vi Ngo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0r0EGcN7WP__l3Yk9BLQi1BIt4TaeeRzX1ft0M0aLDL0dAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cozy restaurant with friendly staff and amazing food at a reasonable price. We enjoyed the lamb and shrimp orzo as well as the greek dessert. We would love to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCLtdySr0x8e3RP9gka1ht&fid=0x0:0x76477085b720f36f"],"When":"2026-2-27"},{"Name":"Aliki Moysiadi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJefwLAfjArW71ghzAWjS3JBU7fFxMIHzj7PLri4ecv6KdEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a fantastic evening at A Little Taste of Home. The atmosphere was on point and the food was exceptional. We tried the fatteh starter, the tagliatelle with tenderloin, ravioli with wild mushrooms and rice noodles with mushrooms mains. Everything was lovely. The one thing that stood out was the hospitality and how welcoming the staff were. Would not hesitate to return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbwWkFzrPmD2iJJO3jvMK3&fid=0x0:0x76477085b720f36f"],"When":"2025-12-22"}]

[{"Name":"Giuseppe Fiodi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEY4eb6YCb0PNY9q1m4n1WQYD9wgvHUAoelFMzQCjmp73Cyg2s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm still sitting at the table waiting for the grill. A beautiful atmosphere with incredibly kind staff. Maria in particular is a cheerful and friendly girl. The menu is rich and varied. Highly recommended. Well done!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmTHFTS2GjH0gnnBMDefRk&fid=0x0:0xd2e12b82e54f59e6"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Nour Elimen Khalifa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGqu3Hof7HcZxu_5tZ5Hr3FRH-aSJgGI0pC8VF_hrQgdgaAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has been on my list for a long time, and it did not disappoint at all. Such an amazing Greek restaurant with authentic, ❤️delicious food. The ambiance is 100% Greek, from the music to the decorations. I highly recommend it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvft-AF7DWaoq2zgcW39TJ&fid=0x0:0xd2e12b82e54f59e6"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Yuan Feng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhhgfSdCA4-WZzwXswuUF0UsOBTOhonKiCnpusJVV3l5X55-9t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A cozy restaurant that offers local Greek food. I was a little bit sick that day so I ordered an eggplant salad and moussaka. They are both very delicious and easy to digest. The waiters are friendly and service is very quick. The grilled squid is also well done, a nice place to visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDfBgxlyK9pYis-FEQRYMdz&fid=0x0:0xd2e12b82e54f59e6"],"When":"2026-2-19"},{"Name":"mark dibeh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVouP7eMENqVcM5kJs7Es6WzX3l7j7ZI5gqYdGRvsUEbQwrnLE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"1- excellent fried chicken breast plate.
2- excellent grilled chicken slovaki.
3- very generous
4- friendly service.
5- little bit expensive for greece.
6- they give you a free desert and it is delicious.
7- best fried calamari and best sauce","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGeJHdp9I-7z0mTLUBvYXx&fid=0x0:0xd2e12b82e54f59e6"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Magda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURLxEB2VTEVbney-FBDPEKDgSptrQOK5keyR3_BlCyiXrG1nkF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's a lovely place. I'd recommend it.
Unfortunately the food in Athens is really disappointing and this is the only place we've found that had consistent good food.
The place is really cute and has a nice vibe. There's live music some evenings. Prices aren't crazy. Staff is nice. One real issue I have is that the tables are so close to one another that you basically sit with strangers if the place is full. It's not too comfortable. The place definitely lacks privacy.
A couple of times we got a free dessert and a glass of greek liquor.
I'd definitely recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLOsI93-own6ap_yDly4en&fid=0x0:0xd2e12b82e54f59e6"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Ethan Linklater","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW5YPc_QirxAPZjqddAhHcM1eNDKm7F8xz-G4PNQDW_oYJLDWS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Mironi was my first introduction to Greek cuisine, and they did not disappoint. The team was very friendly, and welcoming. The souvlaki was incredible, it could well be the best piece of chicken I've ever eaten. I'm not sure the name of the band that was playing, they were very talented.
Would absolutely recommend to a friend, 10/10. Worth coming to Athens, just to eat here","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC0ZmVE8vXsPCGzlEA63iR3&fid=0x0:0xd2e12b82e54f59e6"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Tiago & Rumi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpg22l9_hXP_jSbTp1kmEHmupgxIIjZfmZEPzrKUZVaniJ9pw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the best experience at Mironi! Food is incredibly tasty, staff is very friendly, they have live music in the evenings and they serve you the best dessert for free! They also gave us shots at the end with the bill, very nice gesture! We came back here twice just because everything was so perfect, highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBSUrXHvoouqSv19-UIXn1l&fid=0x0:0xd2e12b82e54f59e6"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Lefteris Mystakidis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKcQHhi70yn8nVu9CvwIP_Qgjrthc67mbKfUIyzBdCyN2cXFfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you find yourself in Metaxourgeio, Myroni is absolutely worth a visit. The food is excellent—high quality, flavorful, and generously portioned—served in a beautiful and inviting space. The service is quick, attentive, and genuinely friendly, while the prices are more than fair for what’s offered. A special mention to the owner, Antonis, whose kindness truly stood out and who treated us to a wonderful dessert. An all-around fantastic experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByftqJAhb24zFOcJX5CBbO&fid=0x0:0xd2e12b82e54f59e6"],"When":"2026-2-28"}]

[{"Name":"Trevor Curran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocISKExE0Y7LgYRemN9W5IVTVuAEYGBkk5iUDOaLSm00IcGtbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were a walk in and seated right away. We arrived at 5:50 pm, no wait. For a Friday night that’s amazing. was Our waitress Hallie was informative on their food options and drinks they offered. Our appetizers were calamari and raw oysters. The calamari is good had a little spice. For people who do not like a lot of spice might not be for you but for us it was amazing. The raw oysters were amazing and were from Virginia, tender and no complaints. I had the fried catfish plate and my wife had the muscle fettuccine.  The only thing we found different for us was the fettuccine had thin sauce and not thick besides that excellent dinner I would highly recommend this place if you’re out on town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDXjR2-nBuAPTRMd5MQBA1C&fid=0x0:0xef6677544e2597d8"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Mark N.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW1XIiXXU_I6KyPIblfcdho3L6Urq6OnMBUhgx5n8bRDcg5WU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a hidden gem in Athens. Ya gotta try this place!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAcMmwT0NkEOMxnoRy2fxI8&fid=0x0:0xef6677544e2597d8"],"When":"2025-8-30"},{"Name":"The Foody -Mpee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMOfYX7mwfndi9oiWhr8gy2L1eHicP1DhJ5daaLCdllXfp4yzs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience at Boathouse Bar & Grill! The food was delicious, and the presentation made it even better.

The Highlights:

The fish tacos were fresh and flavorful, with crispy fish, vibrant toppings, and a tasty drizzle of sauce. The side of beans was a nice complement.

The chicken fried ribeye steak was absolutely delicious—crispy on the outside, tender and juicy on the inside, and paired perfectly with rich gravy.

Izzy’s Cream Cake was the perfect way to end the meal. The caramel drizzle, fresh berries, and whipped cream made it a decadent and unforgettable dessert.

The atmosphere was relaxed, the service was friendly, and the food did not disappoint. I’ll definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA1Pz43gE&fid=0x0:0xef6677544e2597d8"],"When":"2025-1-29"},{"Name":"Gary Bergstrom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4GPZA2XNs1MFQjvN8Vmu9dSZasS4-MLWae4FKtRFo1Ek_gNTR6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food and drinks were top notch. The service was excellent and prompt. The food came out hot and it was the best pour in town during my visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDt3AekULg4PB1AA3CBOZ1z&fid=0x0:0xef6677544e2597d8"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"Heather M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVV42jvjZdErYkYlsbbghOxAlUf2p2RCupmuRjGwb_Vpd78Us65Fw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food, drinks, atmosphere, and service were OUTSTANDING! We were there at night, so we missed the lovely lake view, but still enjoyed dinner outside. Adimara was such a sweet and attentive server and I am so glad I took her up on her recommendation...the chicken fingers. I don't usually go somewhere new with chicken fingers in mind...but y'all...Check out the pic...they look like a whole chicken breast! So the size, crispy flavorful coating...the BEST...EVER! My husband had the catfish plate which was also really good! We were visiting from out of town but can't wait to go back here someday!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3udrlDg&fid=0x0:0xef6677544e2597d8"],"When":"2024-11-7"},{"Name":"TERRI DICKERSON","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLYtctWlbcczLrwXNa0pEOnIQBgwYa_pyt4tPp3K-akSGf8IA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here is excellent. I had the beer battered fish tacos and they were excellent!! Came with a side of beans and this place knows how to cook beans. The others in our group loved their food as well. Catfish plate and Chicken Parmesan with slivers of mixed vegetables and Grill Fish tacos.
Servers were friendly and very attentive. The food took a little longer than expected, but it was the lunch hour. Well worth the wait. We sat outside on the patio overlooking the lake. Si nice and beautiful Fall colors in the view. We will be returning!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICilbbVlQE&fid=0x0:0xef6677544e2597d8"],"When":"2020-11-9"}]

[{"Name":"dean chen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6byiTwMqCMNtL5aMwK-NhDkH8bPpYQXZ-QG2qD_GMuRq2cw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When so many reviewers said that everything was excellent, I seconded to that, that is TRUE! I just had a dinner at Oroscopo. From the complimentary breads/dips/soup to the salad, to the main courses, and to the dessert, everything was excellent indeed. I haven’t had such rich flavor lamb for years. The fish was so fresh and well grilled. And, the service was beyond the excellence. The staff were very polite and respectful. Their smiles were genuine. I love this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgVGNUHLql72o8o2ECoWq1&fid=0x0:0x68dbe9ba33174a8a"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Rocky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOPIFX3XWdhCodb8HWKr7CKyqAuTV27J27xAPlfeirqYonOYnn=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice and friendly people there. Dishes are delicious and in appropriate portion (tho I wish them to be larger haha). Music in the eatery is also soothing and great. Would give this a third try if I am in Athens again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC52MzarwmljLfdumuJpfHe&fid=0x0:0x68dbe9ba33174a8a"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Rachel Galea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqqHvrjvc1tFBfeD02m1z-IljofdIUbxLhyqQ4NJiSFRJKcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for our first night on our Greek holiday and was impressed with the food, but mostly the service! We were served complimentary soup to start, which was absolutely delicious. Our meals were great, the atmosphere was lovely and when we finished we were given complimentary dessert too. What a wonderful start to our holiday. Thank you to the team at Oroscopo!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClFnhEzEhbwYW_HHTs9_ii&fid=0x0:0x68dbe9ba33174a8a"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"D D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7COEABpOdWiM4Pse4fQ9uuMF9j3mRXkVbM8vPDacmToJTQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Lasagna came without sauce, dry, not edible.

Waiter said calamaries are fried, they were on grill.
Website menu was not up to date, we went there because of it but they did not have many of the stuff.

Waiter was extremely rude, he would not speak, just nod head and be passively aggressive.

Food was a real disappointment, dry weird space choices for classical dishes.

Waiters obviously have huge english barrier and think of you less as a foreigner, at least that was my experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBHXIqwTctu8HacO_iWppon&fid=0x0:0x68dbe9ba33174a8a"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Emily Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfvsBPjolxKH5izVUgp0J0awj8ftpheeG456ewwEuP7kdaQJS_lQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They did not charge enough!!! Everything… EVERYTHING was wonderful. The bread with tapenade and beet spread, the soup, the salad… we had two of the specials: braised short ribs with pear risotto and braised chicken/tomato with a pasta. If we didn’t have enough they brought us ice creams and sorbet.  Every bite we swore was the best until we tried another. The service was incredible.  I felt so at home, and I told one of our many servers that the food tasted like I had a loving Greek Grandma who made high-end cuisine.  We hope to go back before our visit ends!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwked6YODc7uyOa_hd1-xF&fid=0x0:0x68dbe9ba33174a8a"],"When":"2025-7-31"},{"Name":"Mary Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoL_yJ82HJaaqzfkj7_od1U_ZRFXJ8dID97RL7CYHcbZQ_CEFYNw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a lovely dinner here without a reservation. We loved everything we had, especially the bread, tomato salad and mussels.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgHn_orZ71GrHpqV8bq7wW&fid=0x0:0x68dbe9ba33174a8a"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Welcome to the Machineshop","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBZJUVoqs2KbP1LnGz8pJNikTtp1khRrN7jYmSu39-wDzhIn8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Started with a great leek potato soup. For the appetizer we enjoyed what I feel was hands down best grilled octopus in Greece!
I had the pork schnitzel, delicious huge portion than can easily feed two or even three. My wife had the hamburger which was very flavorful. Super friendly staff. And the complimentary ice cream hit the spot. My only regret is we found this restaurant the last night of our vacation, hope we will be back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD47nxDRnrSazb9u0aRkCdX&fid=0x0:0x68dbe9ba33174a8a"],"When":"2025-9-19"},{"Name":"Greg Connor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlkf00DzXwW5mH52i0sybYFhWUQJUVJetT9bKiYVWN_7ZoMtZXZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just amended after 3rd visit in3 days !!!

The Service here really sets Oroscopo apart from its competition.
Which, in a row of three restaurants and a bar and being next door to hotel that has a good restaurant also with rave reviews makes the difference.
The guys are all wearing HUGO BOSS polo shirts looking very smart everybody has a smile everybody has time. Nothing is too much the Pre starter bread and potato and leek soup on our first visit was a lovely touch as was the continuous supply of water which when it’s 35° you absolutely need the raspberry Coulis  and the free ice cream at the end of the meal all made the experience just a little bit more special
Greek salad was incredibly fresh and nicely seasoned, but the absolute humdinger is the beef short ribs.
Go to this restaurant just to have this dish and I promise you will not be  disappointed.
It was my son‘s choice. I was gonna go for the lamb but when he said I think Greek salad and beef short ribs that I was sold and it was exceptional. I can only thank the team And the Chef for making it a really special night as always we all ended up talking football with Greek teams and Premier League banter made us feel  incredibly at home and relaxed. This really is a super place to spend the evening drinking cold beer and chatting honestly we are so lucky it’s a stones throw  from our hotel and we will be going back tonight. It was that good.

OK, today is Sunday and we have visited every evening for the last three evenings on Friday evening, My son had the fillet steak black Angus medium rare. I had the moussaka we had a selection of starters see photographs below. Food is exceptionally good hence why we’ve been back now three times but again, I cannot emphasize how important the staff are in this absolutely Wonderful find of a restaurant..
And last night being Saturday, we had spent the day walking around the island of Poros  so we weren’t in the mood to walk very far from the hotel and yet again the guys at Oroscopo outdid themselves with some awesome truffle, ravioli, and chicken skewer

I simply cannot recommend this totally exceptional gem enough get the boys talking about football and you’ll be amongst friends immediately especially if you like Liverpool Man city or Man utd 😆

We still have five days left of our trip and we will definitely be back again thank you guys for making it such an exceptional part of our evening .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD56_x2ZXGGN3RmkMAN167X&fid=0x0:0x68dbe9ba33174a8a"],"When":"2025-8-1"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jared Guynes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUy0FNBhtcAuK668C7FZXLnoB4qJH26yzOrORf9EcWROiGCSvgug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"WOULD YOU DRIVE 90 MINUTES? Because that’s how far a one way drive from Rockwall to Tia Juanita’s Fish Camp in Athens is. We first discovered the Cajun-Tex-Mex Fusion restaurant in Beaumont. The SE Texas chain has steadily been growing its footprint north, but the closest one you can find to DFW is actually in Athens. This place is next level, and combines the best elements of Louisiana and Texas cultural cuisine in a way that just feels right.

But I’m seriously asking: would any of you reading drive 90 minutes just to eat dinner, and then 90 minutes back? Because to me, the 3 hours of cruising the Texas backroads and enjoying music while the sun was setting was a part of the entire nights experience.

It would be very easy if not expected to be caloricly negligent at a place like Tia Juanita’s. I wouldn’t blame you for easily consuming 2,000+ calories in a single sitting here. Chips and Salsa, Gumbo, Powerful frozen cocktails, bacon wrapped shrimp drenched in garlic butter. Boudin Quesadillas. More than I can type.

Jessica found a way to keep it on track with a water to drink and a shrimp salad without any dressing. Basic stuff, but better than skipping the whole place.

I ordered Steak Fajitas, but skipped the tortillas to save a few hundred calories there.

Sometimes when I come to a place like this, I get really jealous that we don’t have one in Rockwall or anywhere in North Texas for that matter. The concept seems to be too perfect and hopefully it’s only a matter of time before one or more of these reach closer to DFW. I’m telling you now it’s going to be a slam dunk hit in a day comments.

Until then, maybe a short road trip to Athens is a very, very good idea. Just make sure you come hungry.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAtvjUCvnD672bKqJDphqCT&fid=0x0:0xe1bb45b7a5eb0d01"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Patrick Smiley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0wMHtzORsDeSMm0QFlD5Vi41DXdGZvtzQQVHuBPqkmiyevQ6y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We went to the Tia Juanita‘s in Athens. There’s one in Waco while there was nothing wrong with the food. It was not as flavorful as I would’ve expected from a Mexican Cajun place.  The one in Waco had a hour wait on a Saturday after lunch I would not wait more than 15 minutes to eat food here. My son said the best thing about the food was the raw oysters. Me and my wife and my son all had their specialties and they’re just wasn’t anything special. The shrimp and grits were nothing like the ones that I had in New Orleans. My wife’s blackened tilapia was nothing special and my son‘s blackened  Ahi tuna, he said, wasn’t that great I will have to say the gator bite was really good. The drink they do have live music that wasn’t obnoxiously loud even though we were set right in front of a speaker.  I would definitely go back to try their poor boys and fried baskets but definitely I wouldn’t wait very long to be seated.

The presentation on the food was really good","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAYJclJtCuShNMR_U1VZ7GH&fid=0x0:0xe1bb45b7a5eb0d01"],"When":"2025-10-5"},{"Name":"Kelly Michels","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtdVqmIVGsCR8UjKTgSt_-3E95RrsuFvYsePFN8mP6nN7V41RbKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A selection of Mexican food, seafood, and Cajun!   Portions are large and very fresh.  Amazing gumbo! Large selection of menu choices.
Our waitress, Brie, was amazing too!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYHSEbm89f0pVP9sHAWji0&fid=0x0:0xe1bb45b7a5eb0d01"],"When":"2026-3-5"},{"Name":"Raised Spirit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjowergrwlwf-4fMJdNPvvJ-M69FlUqEyqhddUYAMXqfU6ziss=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This was a good find.  Beautiful restaurant.  The fried shrimp and fried oysters and pretty standard.  No special breading or flavor.  The boudin balls are really a good.  The 20 ounce Don Julio resposado margarita was excellent. Loved the bread pudding.  The sopapilla cheese cake was okay.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCG4k9vyXBONXoqQhNLX0_O&fid=0x0:0xe1bb45b7a5eb0d01"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Mike Tryner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlTwBVzmapziQ2C_16C6cLdbbsjU3lXRBQimqM7b5p5laDdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Normally this place is good but tonight was terrible! We sat at the middle of the bar and the server/bartender was very inattentive with our drink glasses empty 15 minutes or more each time. Our food took forever to come out and was barely warm when it did. The seafood gumbo was basically beef broth with a tiny bit of hard crunchy rice and 4 tiny shrimp. The crackers that came with it were crushed in the package to cracker dust.The shrimp and grits came out like soup with little flavor and tough chewy shrimp with soggy wet toasted bread. Both entrees as I said were barely warm. We had to ask the man who occasionally went behind the bar for refills.The server who was supposed to be there had a nasty attitude when we asked for refills stating,"I'M DOING 3 JOBS!!!" I WAS intending to get the grilled oysters until I saw the grill was filthy and covered with rust. There were cleaning supplies and dirty cleaning water all over the food prep area and the employee washing the wall behind the grill WHILE cooking food(the grill was pulled slightly from the wall) all the while, these cleaners and dirty water splashing all over the food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAdvc1ykicUu6zbsHzrFgVN&fid=0x0:0xe1bb45b7a5eb0d01"],"When":"2025-10-14"},{"Name":"Gregory Brown II","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOhV-dYwKvnTugxRe5bZ4WX0UHGEHDSXXFn8ZT5rWU7f4sYvE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While traveling to Athens on business, asked about a god place to eat lunch. This was a great recommendation.
Food was great and unique, real alligator bites. Po boys was great, bread made it even better, shrimp nachos was huge and had a really good cheese sauce.
We are a hour and a half away but we will drive back to eat there again!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQOV6oPHMd0SEFGYIkSKUE&fid=0x0:0xe1bb45b7a5eb0d01"],"When":"2025-8-7"},{"Name":"Todd Dionne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKbYtF5mJmSB-OM7TUHEfh2CJWABxg2Kv1eik8ofzci6LCOUBfcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Jake as our server and he was on point.  The atmosphere was cool, the food was great, and we really enjoyed our time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAsB8XydqFRoNWjMwoqM1t&fid=0x0:0xe1bb45b7a5eb0d01"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Lacey Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvqe4pXX67rm9okk5EuWPhxDQy1nxY7vG1RDXHPLN5GWGF0uxI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely loved this place. The best combination. Seafood, Mexican food, and live music. Service, food, and entertainment created the perfect atmosphere. My husband was not excited i made him take a pic before eating. Lol","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhey2hD8V7wEA3GAxN2qib&fid=0x0:0xe1bb45b7a5eb0d01"],"When":"2025-10-10"}]

[{"Name":"Yuan Feng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVhhgfSdCA4-WZzwXswuUF0UsOBTOhonKiCnpusJVV3l5X55-9t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I passed by this restaurant and immediately decided to have lunch here. I learned that it is a very interesting business compound that joins restaurant, market and hotel. It is very huge and very popular. I didn't have reservation so I got the sitting seats near the window. I ordered smoked cod fish and cod roe, both are very delicious, especially the cod roe. It is very soft and foamy, with well balanced taste of Salt and smoking. The quantity is generous and with the very special bread I even couldn't eat all of them. And for main dish I ordered Caesar salad and fried squid, both are delicious. Then I did some shopping at the market, where I bought nice olive oils and pistachio nuts. I do like this idea and I would like to visit it again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB32ehXFJ8Yf5SKQN_Q3b9L&fid=0x0:0xaa86101dffae44d8"],"When":"2026-2-25"},{"Name":"Leah S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLj_DyNeiLjTuMko1mmwyH2tubgkta3KJM6sfw1Hmo99ofi5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We chose ERGON House Athens for the Athens leg of our Honeymoon last August. We were referred to ERGON House by a local chef/restaurant owner here in the United States. We are so grateful for his recommendation as it was the perfect place to stay as a newly married couple who loves food.

We chose the Medium size room as we knew that we would be spending less time lounging in Athens and more time exploring. The Medium size room was the perfect size for us. We found the beds to be comfortable and there was ample space to store our belongings for two nights.  Even though we stayed on the same floor as the check in desk, we did not find noise to be an issue at all.

The location was spectacular as we were able to walk to all of the sites of Athens that we were interested in seeing. We were close to The Acropolis, Plaka, Monastiraki, and countless restaurants and bars. The only ride we needed was a car service getting to and from the airport. While Ergon house offered to assist with these rides, we decided to book them privately ahead of time.

There is a small gym that was nothing spectacular but got the job done to get a quick workout in. This did not bother us as we certainly got enough steps in exploring Athens.

The absolute best part of our stay at ERGON House Athens was the complimentary breakfast. The breakfast was absolutely incredible. The poached eggs on a bagel with Greek yogurt was unlike any dish we have ever had - we day dream of it often!! Also phenomenal was the pancakes and spanakopita. We also asked for fresh fruit each morning. Each day started off on the right food after such a great breakfast here!! We also stopped at the ERGON Bake House across the street for pastries, which were equally as good!! Not to mention, we loved going to the rooftop for a cocktail at the end of the night after a great day of exploring!!

We would absolutely recommend ERGON House Athens to anyone traveling to Athens!! When we have the opportunity to return to Athens, we will not look anywhere else for a great stay!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCboDs7NkVj6_QQanoWRfBb&fid=0x0:0xaa86101dffae44d8"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Ale Vit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVtY4SXzUKcqNc7lFHMJZefTz5PBZNaQg_rg-mwYhtpJPWBg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An exceptional stay in the heart of Athens - it’s a must if you’re a foodie!

Ergon House Athens is a truly special place. The design is thoughtful and warm, perfectly balancing contemporary style with Greek identity. The entire staff is incredibly kind and welcoming, offering a level of hospitality that feels genuine and personal.

The hotel’s signature scent is unforgettable, carried through to the room via beautiful locally made shampoo and shower gel. Cleanliness is impeccable throughout.

I have been traveling for many years and have dined in several Michelin-starred restaurants, yet the breakfasts and food at Ergon House are truly unmatched. An atmosphere so inviting that leaving the hotel is genuinely difficult.

Highly recommended - I will come back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linfred Yap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKr97KzUxYOPpj-0OwtpXo6qMopPyg9JwpwvTgEdppRLucqhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I really wanted to like this place. The interiors are great, with the best location but the staff -😫. Another story all together. Was already seated for 40 minutes and had to eventually walk out after repeatedly asking, no, BEGGING for the staff’s attention.

Even though the menu looked great and I could see our neighbors enjoying their meals, I wasn’t up for this sort of treatment. Had a word with the manager who was now then ready to take our orders but we decided to take our business elsewhere.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Boaz Bagrish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpnhfI7fP1VMJuhZw5ToQPdAZUynoZAsRSFdPYl7p4MQxWbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exceptional humanity and world-class service!
I cannot praise Ergon House enough.
Due to extreme unforeseen circumstances and airspace closure in my country, I was unable to make it to my reservation.
Despite having a non-refundable booking, the hotel team showed incredible empathy and integrity.
They went above and beyond to coordinate a full refund, proving that they truly care about their guests as human beings, not just as booking numbers.
I am already planning my next stay here and will book directly with them.
A hotel with such a big heart is rare to find.
Thank you, Ergon House!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Radu Gheorghiu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXT62t-D-e8OXQ2JD0hj6UQYl5C4E0XNcHRKmEZdOxiTRW5ecd2-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Review just for the restaurant:

The food was wonderful and it came pretty fast.

The athmosphere, while the place is nice, it is somewhat noisy and crowded. I do not mind that but if you are looking for a quiet fancy restaurant, this is not for you.

The staff was very helpful as well.

I would eat here very often because the food is very tasty.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephenie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJeyNv-PoImnKaHrFpLhGOTC-ILoDJIX8vZycmvKp9R97gE2Xs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gourmet lovers get ready! Fresh meat, seafood, gourmet groceries, deli and Greek specialties like olives, olive oils, ouzo, mastiha and Ergon brand dishes, spices and more. Oh AND it’s a full restaurant with indoor and outdoor seating!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Fabian Pereyra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi_mPInv81DdapBhMEmI1gZ8SuB75526o-S5BvDICwISWa6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The concept is incredibly nice, a kind of an organic supermarket below the hotel with restaurants and delicacies to buy. The rooms... Well, windows to the inside of the restaurant space. Noisy at times, no fresh air or view of any kind, being in a city like Athens, is a downside for me. Good breakfast though!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Laura W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1T8h-B8fgZJsUhDu49LY_eEe-7lF6bv5uSeMh8hBZeVY4Ne0K=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really lovely restaurant! I ate here twice in my short visit to Athens. The first night I had the free range chicken, which was lightly fried with a delicious creamy sauce and served with fries. The chicken was so tender and the sauce was so delicious!! Also worth noting is I was able to ask for a modification (no peppers) which was successful. I also had the orange cake special which was very tasty. The second night I had delicious moussaka and bread and was so full from it I didn't order dessert. The portions are very generous and filling. The service was fantastic with many servers and they were friendly and spoke good English. But there were both tourists and Greeks dining (always a good sign) and it was quite busy both days, even in the off season, so I would definitely recommend booking a reservation here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCqXZqMjY1SDTqUveuTahQQ&fid=0x0:0x8c00306a91fb5c65"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Milena Di Pardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJPCHeXuiSvfI1yRZhgFeAI1WUe93mGqq1mm23_VOa-z0D3etg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great restaurant, lovely atmosphere, friendly and kind staff. Food is delicious and authentic.
Only down side , you can’t book but waiting time is not much so if you end up there with a long queue is worth waiting, trust me.

My favourite dishes have been the Feta Antitamos , Moussaka, grilled Lamb chops. Absolutely delicious, accompanied by red house wine jar. Fairly priced compare to other places and just next to the restaurant lots of bars to continue your night out.

At the end of the meal they take a little sweet at the table , baklava .

Been there 4-5 times in row for dinner during my holidays in Athens and I can confirm was best restaurant we been to .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD0_fWqLDYJ28p4qcePU_nH&fid=0x0:0x8c00306a91fb5c65"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"Micah Ang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9_KPUluuWrz3gSWpu97Z9avvwk8UsBqPQvmVdn6hPjYkoWak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was excellent. Unfortunately, we had to wait about an hour for the main dish due to confusion in the kitchen. The staff sincerely apologized, and although we had ordered baklava, they did not charge us for it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCP4F9tJ2Dxue5lHRQPd-QU&fid=0x0:0x8c00306a91fb5c65"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Natia Sirabidze","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVO1YMB-qRHzP5bb0xDNOGha30dykYyE1qkLvSMvftj_FhFZvh6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious dishes served in huge portions, with a nice environment and friendly staff. The surroundings might feel a bit intimidating at first, but the food is definitely worth trying. And they serve you with complimentary greek desert for free!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKVYEPkR9TIfmSpGJ7olCC&fid=0x0:0x8c00306a91fb5c65"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"M Faleni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfSKmZHRgtofa0alJ8U15_bX1Ruv6o1iqxNADkRq2eBKi17g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the freshest ingredients. The lamb was absolutely divine. The portion sizes are massive! There was no way a single person could finish the lamb but we are not complaining. It was delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtCmYSUjuUn4sEFJqdBELs&fid=0x0:0x8c00306a91fb5c65"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"loveislikeakiss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJv3NmV-oPAHrAmTlUAhrKo6N1ijZ83FUb2vgOm7zzdpbQezA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It was fine eating. I got one of the specials which was chicken souvlaki. Chicken was on the dry side. They also asked when i got my vegetables if i wanted pita, i said sure, and then the suvlaki came and it also had pita. I don't mind an upsell but this was a shame","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCoBf9fQynxB4cBCTHFCvPf&fid=0x0:0x8c00306a91fb5c65"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"Hatice MERİÇ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvDOP8hp2fUtCf98_t2av-PC7dyc1nLpz4RcdmzWPwhlV0UBi2Sg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ordered tzatziki, dolma, grilled sardines, and fried zucchini. Everything tasted amazing. For dessert, we had lemon pie. The atmosphere was very nice, and the staff were attentive and friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmo1ka4WrMjbMTDeKc8HG-&fid=0x0:0x8c00306a91fb5c65"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Cameron C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4OhMFFSxTEYhKL0KoAUk2dpLp6oQucBy4xTuwXx8BvQL9Cg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service was fast, portions were pretty good. We loved the potatoes with feta and dolmades! We didn’t have a reservation but managed to get a table (had to wait maybe 10-15 minutes).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAqNey6Ydeewwv3ermwmG2_&fid=0x0:0x8c00306a91fb5c65"],"When":"2025-9-23"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sara Wade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVriqIjQBV90nfAABDgNnuQZKrpuSQOQyww1Twa2ccJag2f_pM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is so good. The food is food, the atmosphere is good, and the service is phenomenal. The restaurant was not too busy when we came in to eat, just enough people for a moderate noise level. I ordered the Hot Chicken Sandwich and my friend ordered the three sides.

We had a great server, Cam, who also is the bartender. He was attentive and helpful with the menu. This place is a great restaurant downtown. I would definitely return & recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCYpdSXMoidnh2GefckqUD9&fid=0x0:0x9f6623f0cf31cc31"],"When":"2025-11-25"},{"Name":"TopDawg Junk Removal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUJOknoQZIPRzbANLvxPYDYZOxPz9KQdJz_FJKbMIvBCrulM68=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful dining experience at South Kitchen + Bar! This downtown Athens favorite offers creative Southern cuisine with modern twists — from hearty Low Country shrimp and grits to flavorful Nashville hot chicken and duck‑fat tots. The food was rich, well‑seasoned, and beautifully presented, and the atmosphere was relaxed yet special. The staff were attentive and knowledgeable about their craft beers and cocktails, making it a great spot for dinner with friends or a date night. Highly recommend if you’re craving elevated Southern comfort food!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvnbEAIZI_eCgMP4pZtm_Q&fid=0x0:0x9f6623f0cf31cc31"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Derek Curtis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwxqlk8dck9shCM1v2ekbyTDE0FhV6-TZiQ42WxgCN99hR7HJ9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was a fantastic place to eat. We started with the tots appetizer and it was so good. I had the Paneed Chicken and my son had the BBQ Blue Plate. Both were really good, though my chicken was a little over cooked. I would definitely come back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARGaJ3HBAwbH_uGdLBe-pS&fid=0x0:0x9f6623f0cf31cc31"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Christopher Scoma, DC, NMT","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDHD_ERrPZ-3vifooaxh-Sm0Q9T83YYwP0h6I8a0a9EkI-kZkt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful dining experience at South Kitchen + Bar. The food was outstanding—beautifully prepared and full of flavor. The cocktail was perfectly balanced and thoughtfully made, the kind you slow down for because it’s just right.

What really tied it all together was the service: friendly, attentive, and genuinely welcoming without ever feeling rushed. A relaxed, enjoyable evening from start to finish. I’ll absolutely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBX16njTeJsHnVdiV0W6MTJ&fid=0x0:0x9f6623f0cf31cc31"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Heidi Lambert-Payton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3YwKvv_naZ0Gn7vGuV-rpXrZltCtmPiKPMQwrK7nKVzeCstsk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Delicious food, tons of choices.  Great vegetarian options.  Unique drink options also. Recommend reservations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDef_FprejUsrTT8mfX3_dy&fid=0x0:0x9f6623f0cf31cc31"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Amanda Derby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFNyDIeSZB98aNO6TViDpftPk946mt7AsYWvQjf9gcg6uDbT8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quaint with some good southern charm. Food was good and delicious and we were seated very fast! Parking is weird. The meters on the street barely work, they’re probably southern fried by the sun honestly. There’s not really any parking decks nearby that we saw. I’d recommend this place for a chill lunch or dinner for sure other than the strange parking meters!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDC3pwHxstuj6nwHRT7O2Rs&fid=0x0:0x9f6623f0cf31cc31"],"When":"2025-8-13"},{"Name":"A- Lane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjO9cmlgdAGyoWJfz05Gw5DvT4rH3mZXKQhZwK-tE-2_JW99eK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the warm pleasure of dining at South Kitchen + Bar in downtown Athens after receiving my master’s degree from the University of Georgia, and the experience was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment we arrived, everything about the evening was perfect, thanks in large part to our outstanding server, Erin Wilson.

Erin made our party of eight feel special and well-cared for throughout the night. She struck the perfect balance of professionalism and personality, making us laugh while seamlessly managing our large group. Her knowledge of the menu was impressive—she recommended the best drinks, expertly guided us through gluten-free options for a couple of guests, and ensured we never went without refills. Even though there was a large event happening in another room, her attentiveness never wavered.

The restaurant itself is gorgeous, with a warm, clean, and inviting atmosphere. It was the perfect spot for such a special occasion. I was fortunate to snag a reservation after another party canceled, and it felt like fate. Who wouldn’t want to dine there after becoming a UGA alumni!

South Kitchen + Bar exceeded all expectations, and Erin Wilson elevated the experience even further. If you’re looking for incredible service, a stunning environment, and top-notch food and drink in Athens, I can’t recommend this place enough. Thank you, Erin, for helping make such a memorable day even more unforgettable!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICvs8fVMQ&fid=0x0:0x9f6623f0cf31cc31"],"When":"2024-12-14"},{"Name":"Tia Ames","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfHkZCBO1wAsR3LIE8d1sEDx7ezCiBqUh_X_KWqiuNyVl3kg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful Brunch on Sunday with family! George was a fantastic server! He was very attentive and kind! Beautiful restaurant!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDkAuO--1ALxdRz8q32F4R3&fid=0x0:0x9f6623f0cf31cc31"],"When":"2026-2-9"}]

[{"Name":"RICA KEE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAMqgSI24ECIWy2OzRjHY8HTQhJQ9NVVsvEySH1voF1kv04UJI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s around the acropolis museum, great value taking into account the location, service food quality and even portion that you get.

Pork souvlaki and sea bass are both so good! They have catch of the day 68€ for 2people but we didn’t order that this time.

Homemade cheesecake made their chef and limoncello on the house after meal🥺 The cheesecake is so good as well, it’s more gelatinous, similar to flan.

Service is great, Vasilis especially. Felt like he is either owner/manager. Overall really satisfied!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7aHHq1ZheD2__q93atIDU&fid=0x0:0x5375251fed021bbf"],"When":"2025-11-18"},{"Name":"Cc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYeqPH9YODDYB8v_GK6KoyAYiyQiSc9phYnFoothXOIHP4FJE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is amazing. This service is fantastic.
We will recommend to anyone come to Athens . Catch of the day ,wild sea bass grilled with vegetables and mushroom. So delicious.only 60 euro enough for 3-4 people.
Free desert with lemonchalo . House wine is exceptional. Cheer for life.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAz7ORVFeEiH1I5WLkGFg40&fid=0x0:0x5375251fed021bbf"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Mohammed Aldawood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJvcekj-HXxy9KPSJNCX8kF3QRlKIJmZ7iVLNF9tpXbImK0oe3X=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a great spot for authentic Greek food with a cozy vibe. The tzatziki was super fresh, the calamari perfectly crispy, and the saganaki rich and cheesy. The grilled fish was tender and full of flavor, but the prawns in mushroom cream sauce stole the show, so good. We finished with galaktoboureko with ice cream, both amazing. Overall, delicious food, great portions, and definitely worth a visit if you’re craving real Greek flavors.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOjVKCZ9I_HO5d1nFweSEg&fid=0x0:0x5375251fed021bbf"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Justice Kali Di Quartuccio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbHgdvwB5uBuR_zrxogVgrhKR8Dmijqxkz2W7Vk70PcfwSux8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Went here because the restaurant is mentioned in all the guidebooks and won awards.

If you want to eat at Ken’s Mojo Dojo Casa House, then you will enjoy a side of machismo with your moussaka.

Otherwise, the menu is the same as every other offering in the Greek restaurants across Athens.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDTnhmbQ4zVJO4Gv9mMI0uD&fid=0x0:0x5375251fed021bbf"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"Terence Luk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV01jBgfctyNI5VFtJITtczYighNPrCByqt4vPQtD2DRcb1vyyI_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"All of the restaurant workers were extremely friendly and the food was exceptional. We ordered a catch of the day white grouper along with a fried calamari as an appetizer. Our stomachs were way too full for dessert so we just asked for the bill and the waiter brought us two small portions of cheese cake and 2 lemon shots. The cheesecake was one of the best I’ve ever had and I found the offer to be very thoughtful. Highly recommend this restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBnkpArMQf5rs-qZ8lDcj_t&fid=0x0:0x5375251fed021bbf"],"When":"2025-11-3"},{"Name":"Lauren Kenny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0jb6lCVM_hdWM8aA_9Cd0lpRmLqxxBRmtuJBBhx-GuX-gtgM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My favourite meal in Athens and one of my favourite meals ever. Everything we had was just such good quality. We had really friendly service and the waiters were confident to give recommendations as the food quality was so good. They had awards on the walls and I can see why! Would definitely recommend here if you’re visiting Athens.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCcFGUNwT0ELwvVYBsAbOdA&fid=0x0:0x5375251fed021bbf"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"C DC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzfobY1pAEOgaced666E1bHFidcEPx7XIum6EX_qcCSoD5nQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Tourist trap, we came here all the way just for the "best" mousakka in Athens based on Google reviews, apparently even won an award!!
The mousakka had hardly any meat and was under-seasoned.
The waiters are super nice though and prices are steep.
If you're looking for the best mousakka, this is definitely not the place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCJrB_zVrWmyqnI1TmZUvJe&fid=0x0:0x5375251fed021bbf"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Bequita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1HT4yByp6sdw04zvypWQ0_CXGZmEMD9M9JCk-kqxBrAZvnA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We really enjoyed this restaurant -- I'm a huge fan of traditional Greek food and my friend enjoyed trying the mezze dishes. Dolmadakia were delicious, with a nice taste of pomegranate. Mushrooms too were very tasty. The gyros plate is huge! It was to our chagrin that we didn't have enough room to put all that away, but immense value for money. Staff are very friendly and amenable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5bWVCyd1wkjeydc_ApwDS&fid=0x0:0x5375251fed021bbf"],"When":"2025-10-21"}]

title: Nolan
descriptions: Compact, stylish, light-filled restaurant serving an eclectic menu of elevated Asian fusion cuisine.

[{"Name":"Londoner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9r7VawaTFZCzevrzBrBm6f7LF8iEhjdVoZUQQltghWiBMqb_LFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Top notch! Really nice Japanese fusion cuisine. We really enjoyed it. The service was excellent and the food was very tasty. It's not cheap but definitely its worth every penny. I highly recommend it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5kePTyDMA2mdWeXz5WG97&fid=0x0:0x113a66113070941"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Thorsten Marco (tm)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrJpExp-RslN9NNDu-IpFWJSrRjbdhZALJ9Sq4f32UpPgkNKZd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Friendly service, nice place and amazing food. The menu consists of classical food with interesting twists. I ate smashed cucumber with Greek yogurt, sesame and roasted zucchini. It came with a flavorful dressing. The bread with kefir-Butter is also worthy a try. The sea bass was excellent as well. All other meals I saw looked great, too. The olive lemonade was another nice experience- it tested fresh with a very light hint of olive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArjd3b5yyvTT0JWQIACE7h&fid=0x0:0x113a66113070941"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Elisaveta Skogoreva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjZLrlhjDQmzHJ-d4FaF-ouzjEe_UGJHg_nOZrdvnaLLD6Pw8U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An excellent restaurant for fine dining.
A beautiful approach to flavor and menu creation — everything is refined, subtle, and classy. We appreciated each dish for what it was. Some were more impressive than others, but overall the experience was truly admirable.

This is a place you visit not just to eat, but to savor flavors, discover new nuances, and open new culinary dimensions.

Special thanks to the wonderful staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPqyfcH_BO7hQvd3QYVDUw&fid=0x0:0x113a66113070941"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Adam Smoak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwLOlBmLGrtJ8vwODOZtOvQbFqDnpNpXSRqFQ4LUX1HbcOqADx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely restaurant I discovered from some travel blogs and articles and it is worth it.  We had a combination of items, the cabbage, the burger, a dumpling soup, and the pumpkin.  It’s more a fusion restaurant than a Greek restaurant; though the combinations were interesting.  I would never have thought of adding grapefruit to pumpkin, but it was delicious!  The service was great, and the neighborhood (north side of Plaka) has a cool vibe.  Only complaint was the indoor seating was a little tight:  that is only a minor issue though.  Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANc3T5_7_Ig8FVoJgXtbpx&fid=0x0:0x113a66113070941"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Elizzie __","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWI-nFhb-al4ahHLHkQl9y59VUMaKR4ezXOVIDOvhJQS-Pr3yk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A fantastic restaurant in the heart of Athens. The fusion cuisine is creative and full of exciting, delicious flavors, with every dish thoughtfully crafted. The dessert was an absolute highlight and truly impressive. On top of that, the staff is super friendly, attentive & welcoming.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAipEQyb_omett2JKGYtvf7&fid=0x0:0x113a66113070941"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"maria k","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcEvHKAEipXr-I8AXZ9ECj32IKj7Kj0HwIjBovVh9DPsjc0bci=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Most of the food was good. However, the presentation and service were very poor. They didn't change the plates or remove the forks at all; by the end, I had about 8 forks and spoons piled up on the table. Four different waiters served the table, and in the end, they insisted on a 20% tip, which would have amounted to €24 of the bill. So, you end up feeling awkward choosing a 0% tip, even though it's not mandatory. I can say that crab dish and bread were especially good, but overall nothing exceptional.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzSSTN_sWwx49CteVkUBkS&fid=0x0:0x113a66113070941"],"When":"2025-10-4"},{"Name":"Rathasart “Vin” Cherkong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWz9b_en3CvLfnYmMEVSYfVldh2CaFDCQneLomsRXbXkSdKGfSQqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dining at Nolan in Athens was such a wonderful experience. Every dish was beautifully prepared, but the pork in particular stood out—it was perfectly cooked, full of flavor, and simply unforgettable. The entire team here was warm, friendly, and incredibly attentive, making us feel truly welcomed from the moment we walked in. Their service was beyond excellent, the kind where you can tell they genuinely care about your experience. It’s the kind of place where great food and heartfelt hospitality come together perfectly","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBSHBKa1EQ7XnvQ00NfwXsJ&fid=0x0:0x113a66113070941"],"When":"2025-8-9"},{"Name":"Denis Demo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU89Vd5qsnI_jD6tkfi4Zd8c1nquRkP3tR_RIbgjwaqGYcj30hOIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was amazing. If you have dairy intolerance , they can give all butter sauces to the side , so you can enjoy atleast some of it. The place is somewhat little too dark, and if you plan to visit in the winter time, prepare for cold. I was sitting there entire time in winter coat, because they have outside terrace seating which they visit very often, hence the door is almost every time often and the cold creeps inside the restaurant, as for the cocktails,  I don't recommend them, we had margarita, which was super basic and for the high price not enjoyable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZasZZCPrhpNDGWBOWaew_&fid=0x0:0x113a66113070941"],"When":"2026-1-3"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Anna Prelevic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWO2cjiBJlOsFwV4CrAY_0odgF_OPqYWEhlHOE97efQ23AqhKH8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a big foodie who has tried many restaurants in Athens, I can honestly say that Anthes goes straight to the top of my list. Every single dish was a 10/10 - incredible quality, beautiful presentation, and the taste… wow! Even the bread was perfect. The service was impeccable, and the atmosphere was just as amazing. Truly one of the standout dining spots in the heart of Athens.

You absolutely have to try the Shrimp giouvetsi and the Calamarata Iberico… OMG!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCAo96cDosm01gvqmaIBVip&fid=0x0:0x5506120ec4e13a0e"],"When":"2026-2-20"},{"Name":"Sogol","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKUEvkUH43zTmN_iAX6AHk41fd4xo8aP-vUlw8Bu5p-74GG9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely sensational and delicious. Every dish is innovatively created while still respecting the greek classics. The potato pie, moussaka, steak and pork pasta were all out of this world. A proper foodie spot. Definitely coming back next time i am in athens.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjpoJX9IknwDCQ_DNF9bKD&fid=0x0:0x5506120ec4e13a0e"],"When":"2026-3-9"},{"Name":"Marilina Douloudi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVci1TSbNiFIBHW8o5gAI3-YIKOEF90iuP7J9bkpCUWjHyUFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Anthes is an incredible restaurant!! Every dish was exceptional, especially the moussaka, the sea bass with kiwi ceviche, the fish and chips, and the calamarata iberico. The pistachio tiramisu was on another level—even better than some of the best Italian ones.

Bravo to the talented chef Konstantina Panagiotopoulou. I will definitely be back on my next visit to Athens and already looking forward to it. ✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB-OcZDsfZUmr1wAmueteg5&fid=0x0:0x5506120ec4e13a0e"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Rhonda Yee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVlhmERxbO2-FxZjJbRxtUMaa9lLm3eFLG8bsxKEZ9dEpsQ8E=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visiting from the United States, we happily stumbled upon this chic Athens restaurant after a long day of travel, and
first day of exploring the city—and what a find it was! Wanting to taste as much as possible, we shared several small plates, and every dish delivered. The tyrokafteri was light with wonderful red pepper flavor and just the right touch of heat. The lamb croquettes were our favorite—perfect texture and incredible flavor, elevated by the accompanying tomato tapenade and creamy cheese. The potato pie was another standout, with thinly sliced potatoes, leeks, and rich cheese—an elevated take on chips and dip. The restaurant’s take on moussaka was also fantastic, with flavors that truly melted in your mouth. Having attended the Food & Wine Classic just last month, we can honestly say the food here was on par with—if not better than—many of the standout dishes we tasted there.

Service was just as memorable. Demetrius made excellent recommendations, and the server took care to explain and highlight each one as it arrived. We ended the meal with the Armenovil dessert, which was packed with nuts and flavor and paired with a complimentary cordial—an unexpected and delightful finish. From start to finish, everything was outstanding, and definitely recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3ArJ7AdfMzVeu5pejyaQ6&fid=0x0:0x5506120ec4e13a0e"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Olesia Artyshchuk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXi5Rb9jgjlKspE32PP4eNSa4TrNUfE3s2MblDC9LEYIAnvCysCPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I really love this place! ❤️
The atmosphere is so warm and welcoming, and the staff are always kind and friendly. 🥰The food is amazing — everything I tried was so tasty! The grouper tartar, pastitsio, and gyoza were especially interesting and something new for me, in the best way. 🤤The new menu was a great surprise, full of fresh and delicious flavors. And that yogurt dessert… 🫠oh, it’s the best way to end any dinner! You just can’t leave without trying it. Highly recommend! 😍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-bfGQN9hh0xRbdtWKeEJI&fid=0x0:0x5506120ec4e13a0e"],"When":"2025-11-7"},{"Name":"Venus Zha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-dj2h7vMpqHWUf7eyqNyTyWZ46WfLfZ-1Y2mt7oG3M_I25g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tonight marks the last day of our honeymoon, and we couldn’t think of a better way to end it than coming back here for a second time. We randomly discovered this restaurant yesterday, had dinner, and immediately knew we had to return — the food was simply outstanding, and the service exceptional.

Stephano has been incredibly attentive, making us feel truly welcomed, and all the staff are impressively knowledgeable about the menu. Dimitris, who served us yesterday, was also amazing — warm, professional, and genuinely passionate about what he does.

We absolutely love the team, the cozy environment, and of course, the delicious food. This is hands down our favorite restaurant of our entire Europe trip.

Thank you so much to everyone here for your wonderful hospitality — we’ll definitely come back when we visit Athens again! 💛🇬🇷","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFBnVKYLcYgHYu3o6d1vRQ&fid=0x0:0x5506120ec4e13a0e"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Marius Heß","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkqEhVFBafusHYKQ_s6W2vYpFl7DyJ7yoz7HTRfGLtfLEDAM1t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came in for lunch, and Dimitri gave us a perfect experience with an amazing selection of meze dishes. Everything tasted fantastic — fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. We’ll definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBMi1vZIsGEP6P2nTnm5oh2&fid=0x0:0x5506120ec4e13a0e"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Alexandra Salazar Cugia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUo2Xj3xKLJgVJ8YxYuPKjhCYahWZvsW6B5IgdW3ySwBZJoBU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious food, excellent service, in a beautiful restaurant! I made reservations while on vacation in Greece for my anniversary. The food exceeded my expectations, and the wait staff were incredibly helpful and friendly. The indoor garden was a romantic setting!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDmQIPU8oeOhxtmc99M4fx3&fid=0x0:0x5506120ec4e13a0e"],"When":"2025-10-8"}]

She still did a very good job.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Wood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUp751uv2G0d-ahrjzjYy4C6X7a42rtz1UXi0ddjBcyx3mKa9VV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Party of seven. Was seated promptly, pleasant server took our drink and appetizer order and returned quickly with the drinks and apps. We placed our food order. The server soon brought two of our party their entrees. The remaining members of the party did not receive their orders for almost an hour and then only after inquiries with our server. Mine eventually arrived cold. The server did comp 50% of our ticket.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kimberly Nichols","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbJb0r3r9Y614mcWYWAIPR3Oc8kkrK5K2dbOd12GGYRFt5JA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The waitress who we had today for lunch, Angela. She's so sweet, great personality, great customer service, funny and kind.
While waiting on our chicken fried steak dinners. My blood sugar dropped down to 71. I ask Angela I needed a Dr. Pepper. She responded fast.
Chicken fried steak was amazing and delicious. Crispy, tender and not greasy. Fries perfect not greasy. My husband got mashed potatoes and green beans. I took a taste of both delicious. Corn great. Gravy too. Rolls very fluffy and soft fresh.
Oh my butter cake with cream cheese filling with Caramel sauce drizzle n whipped cream yum! Angela went above beyond!!!
Definitely be coming back.
Angela check up me as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephanie Keys","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4XciyTCrmtwHcXv3RbgaTEcMUz6d23PIDGWYPrOZIwnTINg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love coming here. Amanda Splawn always makes my visit feel special. She's prompt and always has a smile for her customers. She always gets the order right no matter how many are at my table. She creates a family feeling. Oh, and the food is great too! I'm here often. 😊","Images":null,"When":""}]
