[{"Name":"Netanel Nesher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI8pE3gF_1ezfZclfO4lIPsBGr2M_NABCPPc1kaIyo3g0o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! Absolutely amazing restaurant!
If you’re in Athens, you have to eat in this culinary marvel!
The food is perfect, every dish was out of this world!!
The staff is super nice and welcoming!
We had a blast! 15/10!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbsII6bFByUwblE2l7-KiT&fid=0x0:0xf3766447ac571f6e"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"yijing lin (Quinn)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8PVl749QFLsAPvFlwtJ-e4CQMbbH45mdtNFg9LMx6iAzZp4s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Literally the best restaurant I had in Athen! Every dish I ordered was super fantastic! Even the bread, the butter with lemon sauce and miso sauce was amazing! The only shortage is that the waiting time is long. But it’s totally worthwhile!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBe9iUifzZWPavyEgHG0D2T&fid=0x0:0xf3766447ac571f6e"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Fabrice Lucien","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrDwVmcsj5D6e-RmzH2cOo477ggcykDVhj3AQ5p_OuXk2ITCvR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As someone who travels by eating, Yphes completely won me over. This is not just a restaurant, it’s a full sensory experience. Every dish was a masterclass in modern Greek cuisine: delicate flavors, beautifully balanced, and presented with the kind of care that shows deep respect for both tradition and innovation.

The service was among the best I’ve ever had, warm, attentive, and genuinely passionate. The team doesn’t just serve food; they curate moments. You leave feeling not only satisfied, but inspired.

If you’re a foodie visiting Athens, Yphes is an absolute must.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCotbMMajO9m1Mddz64Zfbh&fid=0x0:0xf3766447ac571f6e"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Cathy M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXR6xZNHwl-GQV32ycfd3wuMq_N99vyVGCztJNN6BqX1EPDCFg7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend the food here. The seabass dish was beautiful, plating and flavor. The skin was nice and crispy but tender flesh and everything else on the plate went so well with it. The crème brûlée was very good too, nice crispy sugar top.
There was no wait for a table and helpful staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAEAHvzGNhPt6qeV_EJDSoZ&fid=0x0:0xf3766447ac571f6e"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Rodney Lover","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtF1TcW-fCh2eVrxy02VEEDDhloTXxnpfYGQdyiqpfj8E7kZl3oQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gorgeous presentation and so delicious. Had dinner here after walking Ermou. Thankful we were fit in without a reservation. On a quiet street beside a little park so it was not only amazing food and service but quiet enough to chat and relax. Highly recommend the ceviche and short ribs. Oh and their “Another Aperol” was absolutely tasty and not just another.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAUYDqqfpuDKjQtXyef1F0y&fid=0x0:0xf3766447ac571f6e"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"Madeline Tosca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVf8-HVISena6q-VZn7cUblMhAFe5A-xbVczUFsJFflaX76ZBwa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I don’t travel alone a lot but I felt so at home and comfortable here - Andres and Mercini (I’m sorry if I spelled them wrong) are a dream team and everything they recommended was incredible, they made me feel so welcome and their vibe is just amazing

The seabass ceviche was honestly the best thing I have ever eaten - and that is not an exaggeration. The food is exceptional, the service is amazing - I promised myself a delicious meal at a beautiful restaurant while in Athens and I found that in my first night. Thank you so much to the team - I will DEFINITELY be back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-tqAW1n1_uF_A3vIcJjni&fid=0x0:0xf3766447ac571f6e"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"samar mhanna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOY61qWwcmNLngWws86OZWhjymtt2Scl_f_WMndNzdvDw_3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every dish was a marvel, very well balanced, the kind that gives you emotions at every bite. The bread & dips are made from scratch. The waiters were so kind & friendly & knew the details of every dish. Looking forward to coming again & taste the rest of the menu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxygQusyloBhL6V0bCfC69&fid=0x0:0xf3766447ac571f6e"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"Y S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLkPyCEcZUqrdx_8G0itwGf_CP7u46xIy8kvJm6gErPOK6NAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a hidden gem! This place is tucked away from the main streets — quiet, calm, and genuinely non-touristic, which makes it feel special right away.

The menu is amazing, full of thoughtful flavors and beautifully presented dishes.
We absolutely fell in love with the sourdough bread with homemade butter — soft, aromatic, with a hint of orange. OMG, 100/10! Easily one of the best breads we’ve ever had.

The Yphes salad, beef tartar, and pork belly were all perfection — balanced, flavorful, and cooked with real care. The potato croquettes were our least favorite (6/10), but still decent compared to everything else being outstanding.

Tiramisù — unbelievably light, creamy, and the perfect finish to an already perfect meal.

Thank you, Myrsini, for your kindness and hospitality.

Overall, this restaurant deserves way more attention. It’s calm, elegant, and feels like a secret spot locals would love to keep to themselves - highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7V1Nl0yyyAmPn7jbVQv2b&fid=0x0:0xf3766447ac571f6e"],"When":"2025-11-8"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Tyesha Powe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKLTrrIsqmsrmTxYjAoXXk2ezrTZCFvNZ82t_giL-h_xK5f6g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came here based on recommendation and this place lived up to the hype! Medina was our wonderful server who went above and beyond giving her favorites on the menu! We tried the most delicious food I’ve had in the city. If you’re looking for pizza, meatballs, tiramisu, and some excellent drinks. Give them a try you won’t regret it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZ876dUijXFAIv3LNf2Pop\u0026fid=0x0:0x536cf83571d46791"],"When":"2026-2-9"},{"Name":"Victoria Saab","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUK6kTCKWgtPpl_MCAjC-iiy99cUT9kmyN-uGbV1EP4WQTPTvTHMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was, without a doubt, the best restaurant we visited in Rome. The service is impeccable. They asked where we were from and we were assisted by someone who spoke our language — Vitória, who is also extremely kind. By the way, if possible, ask to be served by her. We ordered the lasagna, which was the best we’ve had in Europe; the spaghetti amatriciana was delicious, and the funghi pizza was light, soft, and very flavorful. For dessert, we tried the traditional coffee tiramisu for the first time and loved it. In short: excellent food, perfect service, and a very pleasant and comfortable atmosphere. 10/10.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDNk4w6vr51vbbxS7SzJrLh\u0026fid=0x0:0x536cf83571d46791"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Travis Hydzik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNakvew_XiQZisidqAD05fVKlH7gXMQUr-y17S_eqeqQDVwFrn-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found in the heart of Rome, Cantina e Cucina offered our family an absolute delight of a dinner that was surprisingly easy to walk into without a long wait for a table. The atmosphere was buzzing and vibrant, perfectly capturing the Roman spirit, but the true highlight was our server, Ophelie, who provided exceptional and attentive service throughout the night. We decided to order a variety of pasta dishes to share among the family, and every single plate was delicious, showcasing fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Between the warm hospitality, the incredible food, and the hassle-free seating experienced, this restaurant is a fantastic choice for anyone visiting the city.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvI1tXsUwMT_Kb_KhOMctm\u0026fid=0x0:0x536cf83571d46791"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Lusy Ke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbz4BN9Us32owkG5ERShEtv8lOnhb08eJhOZCwENTapAsYG5lJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best restaurant of our 5 days Rome trip. 20 days in Italy and this is one of our top few restaurants across the North of Italy.  Alfonso is extremely helpful and he try to introduce us best drink to pair with my food. The apprentv is so good. Appetiser was to die for.. all the pasta were finely and tastefully executed. Highly recommend","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDX3gwvtocSbSOr3qKFHPk3\u0026fid=0x0:0x536cf83571d46791"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"teo G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4behX61l2iLfWa32jxjOEeWHDLgBBfQpVJu30bz5rJ60xMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a really enjoyable experience here. The food was genuinely delicious — fresh, nicely prepared, and full of flavor. The place itself feels cozy, clean, and welcoming, which made the whole meal even better. What stood out the most, though, was the staff: everyone was incredibly friendly, attentive, and polite without being over the top. It’s the kind of place where you instantly feel comfortable and well taken care of. I would definitely come back again, and I totally recommend it to anyone who wants good food and a relaxed, pleasant atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATAI3TALJfQIv3Liz__83W\u0026fid=0x0:0x536cf83571d46791"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Konstantina Tziotziou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVleXYDWvcPT857BWCJIExSfxvtWikxmt6Wv5KuBiYlFSEbyTfb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited Rome twice this year and returned to this restaurant because we loved it so much the first time! The food is delicious! We tried both pasta and pizza. I’m especially obsessed with the lasagna, and I also really enjoyed the stuffed ravioli. The space is quite tight and it is usually really crowded, but we didn't wait for too long in the queue.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5mTZnHzEVZqvy547B6CWp\u0026fid=0x0:0x536cf83571d46791"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Amin Salehpour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0ypRAdMHb1cYHIFmuK0snzmw-vc2fl1MuPbDeqQiDjlZZjzLF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was absolutely delicious. every dish was full of flavor, beautifully presented, and clearly made with fresh ingredients. A special shoutout to our waitress, Soheyla she was incredibly kind, helpful, and attentive. Her warmth and professionalism added such value to the evening. She guided us through the menu, made great recommendations, and made sure we felt welcome. The interior is cozy and characterful, warm lighting, and a rustic yet elegant feel. It feels like dining in a place with soul, not just another tourist restaurant. Many guests praise the atmosphere and continuity of good service throughout the day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARG_sldA9T9qWleBHw-33a\u0026fid=0x0:0x536cf83571d46791"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Alfred Tao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWd_vvnDORbKKpC0Keujd5bu5YZDtaJRV3l6u5kM8hr3gMmYzMaZA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here is absolutely amazing. One of the more popular restaurants and hence there is a wait but luckily when we went it wasn’t too bad. Still had to wait about 15 minutes, and the place was still busy. There is good reason though, the food is delicious. The pasta was so good- the lasagna was divine, and everything else is really well cooked. The service is really solid, don’t expect to be rushed. The tiramisu was the star, so light and delicious at the same time. Definitely worth a visit when in Rome. The decor was so nice too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQelPdOKEdlgg4l25dLwOs\u0026fid=0x0:0x536cf83571d46791"],"When":"2025-9-7"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Frances Sophia Flores","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUebwmp9lqJt8eItNvgOvCvUwBnYjLWuaIAR6JD_5uBEgOyJIlU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Osteria da Fortunata was such a great experience! The food tasted very authentic and freshly made, especially the pasta. You can really tell that the dishes are high quality and prepared with care. One of the highlights for me was the tiramisu — it was creamy, rich, and perfectly balanced, definitely a must-try. The place has a warm and cozy Italian vibe, which makes the whole dining experience feel special. The staff were also friendly and attentive. Overall, I highly recommend this restaurant if you want authentic Italian food and a memorable dining experience.

⸻

🍝 Food:
The pasta was fresh, flavorful, and cooked perfectly. The sauces were rich and authentic. The tiramisu was also amazing — creamy, light, and not too sweet.

⸻

🤍 Service:
The staff were welcoming, attentive, and helpful. They made sure we had a pleasant and comfortable dining experience.

⸻

🌿 Atmosphere:
The restaurant has a cozy, warm, and authentic Italian ambiance. It feels very homey and perfect for dates, family, or special occasions.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCoNthAIuASMuQ8zpvn4HXZ&fid=0x0:0xe393531b25d31389"],"When":"2026-3-1"},{"Name":"Jozef Cisarik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQwtp9Q-ksi6mHHD-XGJLKE6MWeBXb-tvd_1cR26am8w5XrQm5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was already my third visit, and once again it did not disappoint. We had caprese as a starter and carbonara as the main course – both absolutely excellent. You can truly taste the quality and freshness in their handmade pasta.

We sat on the terrace, which had a wonderful atmosphere and authentic Italian vibe.

I will definitely come back and highly recommend it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPWlSOSv-8f-aE4l4ZQulx&fid=0x0:0xe393531b25d31389"],"When":"2026-3-1"},{"Name":"Paul REVIEWS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4gl2Xt8gYhLN2hJoqniDdaaGZFsN96bbSa2rH-Nh3whc3sg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I dined here recently and sat outside in their covered terrace area, which had a great atmosphere. The restaurant felt far less touristic than many others nearby and appeared to be full of locals, which is always a good sign. It also meant the pricing felt very fair rather than inflated for tourists.

I started with a Caprese salad, followed by oxtail pasta for my main and a ricotta tart with chocolate to finish. Everything was excellent. The pasta in particular was outstanding, rich, comforting and full of flavour, clearly made with care and tradition in mind. Dessert was equally enjoyable and a perfect way to end the meal.

To drink, I had a Coke, still water, a glass of their house white wine, a Moscato and a cortado, all of which were well served and reasonably priced. The total bill came to around £50 all in, which felt like great value for the quality and quantity.

All of the staff were extremely welcoming and polite, with nothing ever feeling like too much trouble. As is common in many places in Rome, card tips were not possible here, so instead I bought the team a bottle of wine of their choice to enjoy after their shift, which they seemed genuinely grateful for.

One of the highlights of the visit was being invited behind the counter to watch and film the nonne making fresh pasta. Seeing them work up close was a brilliant experience and really reinforced the authenticity of the place.

I would highly recommend Osteria da Fortunata to anyone visiting Rome. A fantastic meal, warm service and a true taste of local Roman dining.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfvEzGAe047pZM3yRdaIfQ&fid=0x0:0xe393531b25d31389"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Eli Owens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0bvTn43ThptdkT9HQSDZb2TG3VOnXJ3f9D3Z1vQo2i4SakA5N=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped in for lunch and ordered the Suppli to start and it was delicious! Think of it like a fried cheese and rice ball. It was tasty. Next we ordered the Amatriciana and the Sugo Con Coda Alla Vaccinara. Both dishes were fantastic. Service was also great and Francesco was very attentive and helpful with us ordering. Will come back again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDaOA3iyALs7t8R9bGW40RC&fid=0x0:0xe393531b25d31389"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Claudia Davison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9ZEMV3tSl1TkYfXlld3kmH8vOWE5SVhhEBMo6W2rSsqG8hA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here after a recommendation from a friend (4/3/26) Food was delicious and the waiters Peppe and David were wonderful. Let me know about the food, wine and where more than happy to sit me as a solo diner(which can sometimes be a struggle). Hose wine one lovely!

Lovely atmosphere, seating is a little tight but there’s enough room to feel comfortable and the outside area is coved and feels secure. Would definitely recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBZuDL3ra7y7HFNtUoRX8qj&fid=0x0:0xe393531b25d31389"],"When":"2026-3-4"},{"Name":"Danny Bates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2BSNCKtUGmVah68KFtRRpBWPUt6ywUMABjHFmQZL1FRfpEw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"WOW WOW WOW WOW. Scaloppine al limone was beautiful, the gnocchi was great. I had 8 tiramisus in 4 days (do not judge me 👀), and this topped it at number 1 for me. Absolutely delicious. The ragu was okay, but I would have chosen the amatriciana if I went again. The staff were lovely and accommodating and you are elbow to elbow with other tables - that could be a deal breaker for some, but id do it every day of my life to eat there. Make sure to book ahead","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCI_leyuBt5yA2NMgp2VM_b&fid=0x0:0xe393531b25d31389"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"K Tan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyxtulkNVvEhSW0PGl_N80EyohuBtiu9nTTo-7eoMINSrlSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"November 20, 2025

I recently had an excellent dining experience that deserves praise. The pasta was outstanding, especially the carbonara—perfectly al dente with a rich, velvety sauce that struck the ideal balance between creamy and savory. Every bite felt authentic and thoughtfully prepared.

The appetizers were just as impressive: fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented. Each dish complemented the next and set the stage for the meal perfectly.

A special shout-out goes to our server, Peppe. His warm personality, attentiveness, and genuine passion for good food made the evening even better. Peppe offered great recommendations and made us feel truly welcome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTOnyGQdanM_iwCNL6CMUl&fid=0x0:0xe393531b25d31389"],"When":"2025-11-20"},{"Name":"Benjamin Deljkovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqIjveIVd2GoIGgGWDCynfk0J1qhSXgi76cCEbH6oE2eO_zqQX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went for dinner here. The food was very nice but the service was exceptional. The waiter explained everything and was very friendly and patient. The pasta was very nice and so vas the tiramisu ( only a photo of the last bite, forgot the take a picture ). The caprese was phenomenal. The tastiest mozzarella i have eaten.
The only thing I didn't like was how jacked the tables were. It is very crowded. Also a bit pricy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDh0pj_8FEfxubCSka8lO9g&fid=0x0:0xe393531b25d31389"],"When":"2025-12-20"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Fiona Erika","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJ_aZ_4LY4VVHr4i7HlPQvKgUP9WehFLr4Weu8CThtzLwPGA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best quick bite place in the city of Rome. It was so good we went back here 3x! Service was quick and staff were friendly. Food taste amazing, bread was perfectly crisp on the outside and soft inside, toppings were generous. They also have an english menu so it was convenient. They have paper plates, forks, napkins, balsamic, olive oil on each table, making it convenient for us to grab what we need. 10/10 recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDek-6KB6jAQPrqEBcMiB_Z&fid=0x0:0xde60725cbaa29641"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Shubhi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZ09gtpuPUr361QrWIbL-JZ_O63QCrqvK3VOcFIzO0i3e-4sf8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The other reviews weren’t exaggerating with words like “exceptional.” These were genuinely some of the best sandwiches I’ve had in my life. The quality hits immediately - they make their own fresh ciabatta, and the fresh ingredients truly elevate the whole experience.

✅ Service & Experience
• Staff were warm, friendly, and patient, and actually helpful. We didn’t feel rushed during our meal.
• They guided us through the menu properly, including drink pairings.
• They were very allergy-aware, double-checking ingredients for me, which I really appreciated.
• Overall very welcoming, attentive, and relaxed.

🥪 Food
• We ordered two vegetarian sandwiches, and both were fantastic. I had Colosseo + partner had Navona
• They have a strong vegetarian selection, including egg-free options for anyone who needs that.
• Sandwiches were generous, balanced, and the homemade ciabatta was the star.

🍹 Drinks
• Aperol Spritz for me - well-made and balanced.
• White wine for my husband - staff helped us pick.

📍 Location
• Literally one lane away from the Trevi Fountain - incredibly central and easy to access. Considering the location (usually touristy and overpriced), the pricing feels very fair.

💶 Pricing
• €1 per person table charge (normal for Rome).
• Our total was €30 for: 2 sandwiches, 1 Aperol Spritz, 1 white wine
• For the quality, freshness, and the location, this felt like a good value.

🪑 Seating & Atmosphere
• Both indoor and outdoor seating available.
• We chose outdoor; the space heaters made it warm enough to be comfortable.
• Indoors looked equally cozy.
• They have washrooms for customers inside - not the cleanest, but works.

All in all, a place that nails flavour, service, and value — absolutely worth a visit. Fantastic sandwiches, kind staff, great hospitality, and fair pricing.

Highly recommend.

Description of our sandwiches from the menu (they had menus in a couple of languages, very helpful!):

From their menu
— COLOSSEO: STRACCIATELLA, EGGPLANTS, DRY TOMATOES, ARUGULA, OLIVE CREAM .......
€ 7,50
— NAVONA: PORCINI MUSHROOMS, PARMESAN, TRUFFLE CREAM ......
€ 8,00","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDod56jYP99Ryyy8okxM3V4&fid=0x0:0xde60725cbaa29641"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Eli Rafie nia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2XAuRi_3bMouFLQFsJhegGXC0-_bYGi27WAV7efooumhFkg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re looking for those famous Italian sandwiches, you’ve gotta try this place! The bread quality was incredible, and they definitely don't skimp on the fillings. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7nfy3ofgBzHGyh74ylA-e&fid=0x0:0xde60725cbaa29641"],"When":"2026-2-25"},{"Name":"Shabnam Jafari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV_ZZtgvKeDTC6LUWY9GtQzOmpatRQBrKa7vtiz9PXIfEZr-tF7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The service was friendly and helpful, and the food was genuinely tasty. Even though take-out boxes aren’t their usual practice, the staff kindly accommodated me and packed the leftovers, which I really appreciated.

The atmosphere was pleasant overall, I sat outside, which made it a nice, relaxed stop. I had the eggplant bruschetta with pesto and the U panini, both of which were flavorful and well made.

A solid spot for good food, friendly service, and a comfortable, no-stress experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCPfkcrQ_2rFFNOV1-QvTAG&fid=0x0:0xde60725cbaa29641"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Dianela Gahn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdE40eRTd-JcafdvRnO_Ya_WJzd1Cy0Pn1LcAJeqiVlVS-i-nIzw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exceptional Sandwiches!!!
As someone who spends a lot of time researching food experiences and how service is designed around them, Pan y Salame completely exceeded my expectations.

Let’s start with the sandwiches: they are, without exaggeration, some of the best I’ve had in my life. The quality of the ingredients is outstanding — every component is carefully selected, from the artisanal bread to the spreads and cured meats. I especially loved the truffle-based options — rich, flavorful, and beautifully balanced. You can tell that attention to taste and texture is a priority here.

But what really completes the experience is how well thought-out everything else is:
– The service is fast, kind, and multilingual (they offer menus in several languages), which makes the space welcoming to everyone, without losing local charm.
– The atmosphere is casual yet curated: good music, a lively vibe, and a layout that makes you feel comfortable whether you’re dining solo or with others.
– The wine list is small but well-chosen, with great pairings for the food. And the prices? Incredibly fair — especially considering it’s just steps from the Trevi Fountain, one of the most tourist-heavy areas of Rome.

This isn’t just a sandwich shop — it’s a reminder that when quality, hospitality, and design come together, even a quick lunch can become a memorable experience.
Highly recommended — a small gem that gets everything right.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAddwBaZNwUddXRJsl9kqxX&fid=0x0:0xde60725cbaa29641"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Luz Paola García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJznzLFUARTXbzabcImEFrLlPlAJ3JpUWiM6A0eD7HmJkjJLg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lowkey restaurant with great sandwiches, wine and saladas. Ingredients are fresh and the service was nice. We really enjoyed this lunch.

The food in the photo: A (ham+ mozarella) and M (spicy salami) + caprese salad","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBkh3c7ndVJ0nP-1hKXqsRN&fid=0x0:0xde60725cbaa29641"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Mayer Jeppson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUEfwhkDN3bzVc8xnGeIDvqCFNzDYEgLP5Midg0OyLDbAqhw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rome trip late NOV2025 (Thanksgiving week for USA). We waited in a short line around 1pm for maybe 8-minutes. The other reviews that highly rate this sandwich are accurate by my assessment. Wife had the double meat sandwich and I had the stracciatella with tuna (tonno). Both sandwiches were great. The tuna was better than the double meat. The bread was crispy on the outside (not to cut up the mouth) and spongy on the inside. The variety of flavors with each bite were lovely. Not too much fishy taste with the tuna and also creamy and balancing with the stracciatella. The wife’s double meat was messier with the sauce that would escape every bite, but it was appropriate to get stuff on the face and on the table in front while eating. The price was reasonable and the ambiance was busy-and-fun.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhEl9L-F3IhTYp2WGs-nwJ&fid=0x0:0xde60725cbaa29641"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Spiros Poullos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7ia_zPVISy3YlCye1JDNwdB1Uvt2CCnn0z4B4n7eTzhnvcL6s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a very nice night with a variety of cold cuts, cheese and bruschetes. Some porcheta with very crispy skin and a nice bottle of wine. Very happy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDQFH2zJvFyw17z59JJdgq&fid=0x0:0xde60725cbaa29641"],"When":"2026-1-29"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Diane InParis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZBIlX2xn0znluIzuocdMNGD_KqxEB72aePEXacU0oPoIrgvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mercato Centrale Roma is a vibrant and lively food hall that really captures the energy of Rome’s food scene. The space is beautifully designed, with a modern yet authentic atmosphere that makes it feel welcoming and exciting the moment you step inside. There’s an impressive variety of food stalls offering everything from traditional Italian dishes to pastries, pizza, pasta, coffee, and fresh bakery items.

Unfortunately, I didn’t have time to try any of the food due to a very tight schedule, which was disappointing because everything looked incredibly tempting and smelled amazing. Even without eating, it was enjoyable to walk through and experience the lively ambiance and see the wide range of options available.

Overall, it looks like a fantastic spot for food lovers, and I would definitely plan more time for it on my next visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4hWS-1bvKd4d7AmuBqtDZ&fid=0x0:0xc6574c1d49c0664d"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Vardan Arakelian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqOeHKwPzSPEivx5On7ZurUU8xAzO_RT-pt7sftUaVpvTOlsCfjw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mercato Centrale Roma is much more than just a food court; it is a true culinary destination in the heart of Rome, conveniently located right at Termini Station. It perfectly captures the essence of Italian gastronomy, offering everything from artisanal cheeses and fresh pasta to the legendary Trapizzino and authentic Neapolitan pizza. The atmosphere is vibrant, modern, and full of life.
​As a Project Manager who values efficiency and quality, I was thoroughly impressed by the organization of the venue. Despite the high volume of visitors, the service is streamlined and the quality of the ingredients remains top-tier. It is a fantastic spot for families because of the diverse options available—there is truly something for everyone. Whether you are waiting for a train or looking for a high-quality casual dining experience, this place is a must-visit. Excellent value for the quality provided!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqRhKGjjV62tfl9y_Loaew&fid=0x0:0xc6574c1d49c0664d"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Juliette Brown","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL3bX81k8JnUAXK7Jptk5B6xPyJv31vjxqEuz3DYuzHTwV3Yg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Beautiful food market with a variety to chose from! Choosing what to eat can be a challenge, as everything looks so good.
There’s everything for everyone.
The dessert!!! OMG!!! It’s too die for. It looks  and tastes good! 🤩

Anyways, let me not rave too much.
There’s a lot of seating. It’s great that this food market is right at the central station. You can relax and have a good meal before or after a trip.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmS2r-3TVph6WyWYruMYnF&fid=0x0:0xc6574c1d49c0664d"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Rahul S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWe_1eS4jWJq2rEBztaPCR1OP-6jmOo-VXPjZquG-4DzH6snpWF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food court right by the train station. Seemed to be popular with Italians as well as tourists. Wide selection pizza to burgers to coffee to beer. Plenty of place to sit.

Restrooms were clean with access from the QR code on your receipts, only for paying customers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCMLPa1d1qA3X7KRZL7nsqa&fid=0x0:0xc6574c1d49c0664d"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Laura Pariso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGDYNtEqbO6bGP9G_53-epSyWezyhs57LJWIAeiZ6oJapFeok=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pretty solid selection overall: pizza, pasta, vegan, Asian, meat lover options, bakery, wine, and desserts. I ended up choosing the truffle store, which serves pasta and also sells products you can take home(truffle oil etc). There were way more truffles than I expected! The staff in the market also go around to take drink orders.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFBsjM2sXD_0KpOT3F58LS&fid=0x0:0xc6574c1d49c0664d"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Jasmine Phenna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKows1V9RUyMfL2gJGqiXOZJ30A_Sn7akkkVyEye1OURvoN-N-n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went here every day because the station was just central to everywhere we went in Rome. The food was so nice there was a bit of everything in there for everyone. Pasta, pizza, chicken, burgers, noodles, desserts, a bar, a coffee shop, gelato etc. It was very reasonably priced for everything. You could go up to the counters to order or there was a QR code on the tables to order from your seat. There were plenty of vegetarian options too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3i-UeQUO0migV2rCEROHV&fid=0x0:0xc6574c1d49c0664d"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Julie Adair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDBPpts9W8d_Qer7TxN65Guswu6bELZhIuJbvPm-SkbX3rgWzZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just down from the main station, this food market - more like an upmarket food court, really - has amazing local specialties.  Sandwiches, arancini, supplí, pizza, pasta and wonderful cakes.   Don’t miss it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCacIzEjjsPIprqxFIYHdAT&fid=0x0:0xc6574c1d49c0664d"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Sunny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlSfkljsHmX3YGDVPWGgeZF6FVJB85O-Nvz5w1n35Z_zpU8zqqVA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"A market mainly for tourists, offering all kinds of food from different countries — from cold cuts to desserts and drinks. The prices are a bit high, but the displays are beautifully done and very eye-catching.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDK_mA7mynj1PYEj-4tBKi&fid=0x0:0xc6574c1d49c0664d"],"When":"2025-10-12"}]

[{"Name":"Jackie S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWysFxisGV-5Qm1Tqt-4u6JufnEg_fvw4xoSH34JKeugx4WobCtRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"September 2025.

Great casual meal situated along the main road towards Colosseum. So don't expect too much from quality and service.

Food was fine, simple and decent. Perfect for a quick bite and nothing spectacular.

Service was average probably because they were busy, tired and overwhelmed by tourists like us. Then again, all the restaurants and cafes along that street is the same.

We picked this one because it was bigger and we were able to get a table. Luck of the draw.

I would recommend it for a simple lunch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfKai3ldsbkBCDwJKipuNV&fid=0x0:0xd8e38b1e5db01c14"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"daisy haines","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVxBxDstuSrW4GiTq14gn60uz2004XwixeL6GSnIwILfkuxuVM1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love La Base! This is my second time in Rome and my FOURTH time coming to this restaurant! The vibes are so warm and cozy, the decor is super cute as well. I love the food and the prices are amazing, especially considering the location close to the colosseum. I also appreciate that they list the allergens on the menu, it is very helpful. They offer a huge hugo spritz and it is very tasty and good for the money. My favorite dish is the pesto Gnocchi!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1KOgoBmfM7ejBf9knfNgp&fid=0x0:0xd8e38b1e5db01c14"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Jessica Hill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi8bEOscQiZH0ms7qFzD27zj8gB-2piOT0bXPwMYo3bbA7fA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"GO TO LA BASE!!!
Best BEST food we ate in Rome, we went back 2x for dinner and once more for dessert because nothing else could compare for that price.
I can't remember the exact name, but the Market Place pasta was to die for (mushroom and truffle pasta), along with the four cheese penne pasta. The tiramisu and chocolate cake was excellent as well.
Shout out to Vikam (I'm sorry if i get his name wrong but i know thats close) for excellent service every time, and everyone else in the restaurant was also lovely.
It has a Cool atmosphere as well, with art all over the walls and fun mood lighting.
I can't recommend this place highly enough and I'm going back first thing the next time I'm in Rome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBESUFYKSktYj1N-SeXMoCp&fid=0x0:0xd8e38b1e5db01c14"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Samantha Davidson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlURqMBZ64tAe22ip6njRj2OyLEDYR1nmixMVeSRA8grUqEVk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The atmosphere was fantastic, the food was delicious, and the serviced was truly amazing.

The ZEPPOLETTE was a stand out! The pizza was great","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAESSpV8rIYksz6V4alZLIz&fid=0x0:0xd8e38b1e5db01c14"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Nofar s","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_dyO3IyHMS2Z3Y2c57saO_57DARk6hsArZ843lmoRdd6cJw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We came looking for rissoto mashrooms. We saw the place had high rating (4.2) so we came.
The rissoto was bad, didn't taste like mushrooms, the mushrooms felt like they were from a can, which might be since they have such a big menu.
The other dish that was  just pork and fries was good. Disappointing overall.
But the service was good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWZgFA6nUCw7d1-wzHPCOb&fid=0x0:0xd8e38b1e5db01c14"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Agenace Yuggu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7JC5fuvrZP4b83DZFuCjEEPxtvPD38r6uRnEFY3nwPKi_pWW9Nw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honestly the best family restaurant in town. Food was amazing, great customer  service. It went there twice, couldn't get enough of the place. Sadly we only discovered this restaurant the day before we left Rome, so we only managed to dine in twice. Absolutely we'll revisit when in Rome again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXPtNihB9rpg7o5HmRD_Ku&fid=0x0:0xd8e38b1e5db01c14"],"When":"2025-8-29"},{"Name":"B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIf-B7mf9ir0Q5G_EaSmJWAXoQTde_9RF2jlG-Sg82Yznw-bOB_=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Garlic bread & penne alla vodka was divine, super affordable pricing too. Quick service and not too busy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQliFS0s14G2Ck5Ll6OFbA&fid=0x0:0xd8e38b1e5db01c14"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Martin Maťovčík","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQ9jGn2JOqffNvhSSDeLJEWyQs8ILbSdabaDlh4c8V4vhHHwCymA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Really good carbonara and other pasta. This was our plan B but we enjoyed it. Can recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTChgiitBUaqWqKKkvktND&fid=0x0:0xd8e38b1e5db01c14"],"When":"2025-10-24"}]

[{"Name":"David Augustus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGNSp7wkH_gAmBH2MzWHR_Lzl99Qi98twh6sgNTBasHzr-PR9j5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We stumbled upon La Locanda del Tempio by chance and were lucky enough to enjoy an outstanding carbonara with truffles, along with a delicious pepperoni pizza. Every bite was full of flavor! The place itself was charming and welcoming, which made the whole experience even better. We truly enjoyed our time here and would absolutely recommend trying the food if you’re nearby.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5-5NjwoDbU2SNmuwoQBDZ&fid=0x0:0x7cf48b5e29780329"],"When":"2026-2-4"},{"Name":"Mila Väth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_g5XqLiCUfHTnTF_8Opf0aoDDjodsV1CK6wkvxvNkuElTfoVk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
La Locanda del Tempio offers an exceptional dining experience and, without doubt, some of the finest pasta in Rome. The seafood pasta was exquisite—perfectly balanced, incredibly fresh, and full of authentic flavor. Each dish was prepared with great care and served promptly.

Our sincere thanks to Simone, whose professionalism, warmth, and impeccable wine recommendation elevated the evening to something truly special. A memorable culinary experience in a beautiful Roman setting. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCI2TeHHdMzEJ6dPKENTF0P&fid=0x0:0x7cf48b5e29780329"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"kostas kioussis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMSWDEI5-djv5RFGO_-rUYGgNRSVdAW0n4nGVNFuM4-L6UxXiiqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went with my family 4.1.2026 at night. We ate spaghetti  aloghlio, pizza margarita and fettuccine bolognese. All the plates were fantastic and the came very quickly. We also ordered a salad Ceasars which was very tasty. Our waiter was fantastic, Mr Simone. We strongly recommend to visit this restaurant which is purely Italian. The owner an old woman was also around the table taking care of the clients. Very warm restaurant 👌","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDizGYhewGZLroCbBUbeoBh&fid=0x0:0x7cf48b5e29780329"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Luz Paola García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJznzLFUARTXbzabcImEFrLlPlAJ3JpUWiM6A0eD7HmJkjJLg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Not sure why this has more than 4.5. To me this was sort of a tourist trap. The salad and pasta with truffle we had was below average for Italy. Pizza was better but still nothing you will remember in 24hrs.

Service is below average as well. Would definitely not recommend if asked. Very disappointing","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZjOnKByXFjzK9efF9Grsy&fid=0x0:0x7cf48b5e29780329"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Shirleen Kusnadi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8sFfgBL2tUrFfayXcObHtP-lyvOYoDza4dHeCdnINndKzaA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was really good. The waiters are very friendly. especially, simone and the team on that night who really helpful to recommend us the menu. The atmosphere is also really nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9740vXwXwz7fdB49sLUMq&fid=0x0:0x7cf48b5e29780329"],"When":"2026-2-26"},{"Name":"yin travis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJM5pZRMy7wJz_QVMRGopMnGdUvNzihSCVPHkEuozXI5P1ysQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ordered a Margherita pizza and a tomato seafood pasta at this restaurant. The Margherita pizza was served very quickly and was extremely delicious. The portion was quite generous, and I think it’s suitable for one person to eat or for two people to share. The tomato seafood pasta took a bit longer to prepare, and the portion was approximately for one person. It contained shrimp, clams, mussels, and squid, and the pasta was very flavorful. To my personal taste, it was a bit salty, but it was still very delicious. The service was also excellent, with a particularly fast response speed. I highly recommend everyone to come and eat here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBJTm7jWJgkYry6DtNqpBkE&fid=0x0:0x7cf48b5e29780329"],"When":"2025-10-5"},{"Name":"Devika Agarwal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImyCMlWA33hOwi2bnbhSDQlXiBTboW46ZZEGPxzcuztYPFFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a wonderful dining experience here. The food and drinks were excellent, with the funghi pasta being a clear standout — rich, flavourful, and perfectly cooked. The service truly enhanced the experience as well. Sultan, who attended to us, was extremely courteous, attentive, and warm throughout our dinner. Would definitely recommend this place and look forward to coming back again when I visit Rome next time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_Swz2YQS49kh0Ouvsi_gC&fid=0x0:0x7cf48b5e29780329"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Hu Yang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQ96mfi3oYIRpN7C2zy-3OwlN0ut44rAOQvdi-UG6g5OqECQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Overall, the food was just average, nothing special—very normal flavors. The two of us only ordered two pasta dishes, but the portions were quite small and the prices were high, making the overall value very poor. The lobster pasta cost €28, yet there was only a very small amount of lobster meat.

In addition, a service charge was added, but the service itself was mediocre. The staff kept walking around constantly, and there was an unpleasant body odor, which suggests that more attention should be paid to personal hygiene. The service attitude was also just average.

No free tap water was provided, and despite that, a service fee was still charged. Overall, I would not recommend this restaurant—it is not worth the price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBLlSqcJ7h67zTzGXpgkDK2&fid=0x0:0x7cf48b5e29780329"],"When":"2025-12-19"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Esther Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjLAZoXhiLxjtEeZLidRQS7UJWLfrRAAtthdUnhotMUjLEiyMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Found this place on tiktok and wanted to give it a try. The store is quite small so when we arrived and saw there was a couple already inside, we had to wait outside for them to exit before we went in. The sandwiches are laid out for you to see but there is also a menu with ingredients listed if that is what you prefer. There were some sort of tarts and Roman desserts also for sale and drinks. I ordered the Boschetto.
As we waited for our sandwiches to be heated up, we were given a piece of bread each to sample some meat pieces that were set out on the counter. These were delicious!!!!!!!!

The sandwich was great but the dried tomatoes didn’t taste great, I would have preferred fresh tomatoes. The meat was slightly too salty and the bread would have been nicer a bit thicker.

Despite all this, the sandwich tasted good! There was a small bench outside the store were you could eat but as it was raining we had to find seating elsewhere.

The worker was very kind aswell!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBGZ2jU0xZ9DTHqeJ7Q9CGs&fid=0x0:0x6a4df4281fc96dcb"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Michael Serpico","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJ0hN06T2FPDztPyA2KmVL1fqwXPZqsaK8B3HXEFInttd9Tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is incredible for their amazing sandwiches. First saw this place on TikTok and immediately bookmarked it for our upcoming trip to Rome. I have to say it completely exceeded the hype, we were blown away just how fresh and incredible the sandwiches were. To top that, the service was also amazing, very friendly and inviting, very patient, and able to customize any sandwich to put on or takeoff what we did or didn’t want. We very, very, highly recommended this place. If you’re in Rome for any period of time, please stop and visit them. You will not be disappointed!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDLu0rTWgQGaEKdFYrgXF6B&fid=0x0:0x6a4df4281fc96dcb"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Justin Wall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVmx_8w9kLO0cRMQrFLsoxs3BRMyFDkuz-ny8xA3aazRFD3XaOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These sandwiches were wonderful and the size of your head or larger we had the mortadella and pesto, prosciutto and buffalo mozzarella and ham and cheese their beer and wine selection was large for the size of establishment, the service was quick the food was delicious and a perfect Street eat if you're in the area. Don't sleep on the mortadella it was the best!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBaJDFahDjOS8lvMeYQxV9k&fid=0x0:0x6a4df4281fc96dcb"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Tomas Schurmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhy_Xt8H9TBwDCF_BIz4ZaarPrFzD5rGeVGKGhGX_zcmWryA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Some of the best sandwiches we‘ve had. They have many classic fillings and some really interesting ones, like pumpkin cream. The bread is soft, crispy and a little salty. Had to come back here the next morning.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrqP0HGheTYLrlduoW0FoP&fid=0x0:0x6a4df4281fc96dcb"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Thiya Damayanti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcuI1oc469SuSBqk-PlC3ZPC0O4q2HO1tiP9K7lYRP5dBy3cU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a lovely little gem! It’s a small place, but the food was incredibly delicious. The lady who served us was really sweet and friendly. We don’t eat pork, but there were great alternatives — mine was with beef, and it was absolutely tasty. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA6FUDaLLw3xDG1UQXumFyS&fid=0x0:0x6a4df4281fc96dcb"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"Matt Quinn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7GDEOGTZu-QTl5p5L8RF9jBwxDooloP5JNYTig_r4AtnfcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really cool lunch spot. We had to wait about 15 minutes in line but it was worth it. The sandwiches are huge and the bread/meats are fresh.

Pro tip: get one sandwich and ask them to cut it in half. [{"Name":"Theo A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjH7rVTPYY7ybWknojU9zSHlRsJj6_Y4_kzeOf1H3zG-ZNwBnr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a pleasant time here, what can I say, foodie paradise. Close to Fontana di Trevi, quick service and welcoming staff. The osso bucco was so tender and juicy it really was up to par with the expectations, the risotto was also really good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfiNXBS3R4S4W5zjVdKu3U&fid=0x0:0x1059060ea154e852"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"anca ramona","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRBDIl7jlFD057QD4hKosMKMY9-49JC6kGAeoMsK2BxHDmwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The bistecca alla Fiorentina at Osteria Bacco is nothing short of spectacular. Thick-cut, perfectly charred on the outside and beautifully rare at the center, it’s rich, tender, and seasoned with just the right touch of salt and olive oil to let the quality of the beef shine.
What truly elevated the meal was the service — warm, knowledgeable, and genuinely attentive. The staff guided us through the cut and cooking with pride and precision, making the entire experience feel personal and special.
A flawless steak and unforgettable hospitality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqsL2fRE-1QlV-O3Zj9eY1&fid=0x0:0x1059060ea154e852"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Naive travelled","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXNyOjrC8PjPJCKJXwuPBTBZJ6-gBFpt1wOOx0UmnS1pMxHD0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the seafood risotto, my wife had the gnocchi with tomato and clams. We shared a sea bass with potato’s. A half bottle of Pinot Grigio.

Food was fantastic, service was very kind and patient, we sat outside in the rain and the mood at 9pm was fantastic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhD8tek6g4Gh-u-ddnC1s_&fid=0x0:0x1059060ea154e852"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"svetlana s","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK7EauzkCMBpyd-leWxMXUnq_KNSHiYL6jyrbA3CSbUcxG1Ww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While the atmosphere outside on the terrace isn’t very cozy, the food, presentation, and service were excellent. The wine was served in elegant glasses, the T-bone steak was well-cooked, and the sea bass was extremely good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3kXi5h_XIIdjQDB7BrjmL&fid=0x0:0x1059060ea154e852"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Mya Pacheco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7j0LwMc-44zzOiqdUsusv7-v7RtSmcpnGOdKDpmR-AP_cRw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best restaurant in Roma!!! We are sad to have found it out last night in Roma! It was my dream meal: filet carpaccio with truffles and risotto with mushrooms and crispy melt in your mouth bacon. This is the first review I have ever left because it was too delicious not too!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnqvBqg4Bw-DRDJuY96bUl&fid=0x0:0x1059060ea154e852"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Crisley Ramírez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhOpTh4mGN7zHuaXYLhM6zaxHsv21oXTnmjFRv4CyGxKMMLeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything was perfect, from the food to the service. The staff was sooo nice,  we left with a full stomach for a very good price.
Very worth it :3","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBwN_9e_NHvbPUJmy9fJLi&fid=0x0:0x1059060ea154e852"],"When":"2026-2-26"},{"Name":"Kamil Ateş","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8lSOyvEd2jc94V78EhVaV5MWTNynRypSgTZPKpQinltqXuEcI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We experienced just a perfect dinner with amazing staff at this Restaurant.

First of all welcoming of staff and their attitude thought the night was utterly professional and friendly. This was the key poind that made our dinner an unforgettable experience.

We ordered a "bistecca a la fiorentina" which stand for T-bone steak. First of all mest was super juicy and soft and extra delicious. At first place they Cook it rare without asking you, but do not worry, they serve it on a Hot pot and you will still be able to Cook it as medium or well done on your table!

We ordered french fries but then change our minds as baked potatoes. Later a plate of french fries came to the table, even before realised it our waiter took it and change with baked ones immediately. Was such a quick and professional attitude to correct the wistake.

We did enjoy a bottles of White wine as per recommend action of our waiter and it was delicious (name can be found at pictures) highly aromatik delicious wine.

Befor we leave, staff surprise us with a sweet looking biscuit plate and delicious digestives called "limoncello"

Place is in the heart of downtown and so colorful. Meat was sooo delicious. And when these compined with professional and friendly service; then it is called perfection.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnsNKIdNenj2IpqR6roJgR&fid=0x0:0x1059060ea154e852"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Farah Mahmud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfZ4TNKnZtDsdAFtFvbPw532m5XG-rrnH_AMkJGI3kEtpNcWf1uA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food and staff was very accommodating for our large group of 7! They got all our orders correct and the Aperol spritz was very good! Inside if air conditioned which was great in this June heat","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDSmaG40xGFl2MmvdhPMhjh&fid=0x0:0x1059060ea154e852"],"When":"2025-6-22"}]

[{"Name":"Gabi Gabi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWR77IY73Jvjh5DTISPYftIhR3ev2MaS9fcu4k5r_9xxSR8EPv2jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A lucky find! We walked by, saw a note that they serve an all-you-can-eat lunch buffet, and had a delicious meal! Lots of vegan options, everything was fresh and tasty. Drink and coffee were included in the price. Beautiful little courtyard with fountain. Would check it out as place to stay when in Rome next time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZ1krAEdA090GMFCGBgMkA&fid=0x0:0xcd2239d05db64102"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Megan Hawkless","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJgL5WiVpa6rOQ9sbTunU4BWtT_9GzCyZbmO1RZwU_AjGMrNarkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delightful affordable food and so easy if you're staying at the hostel. The staff treated me so well as I was a little under the weather 🥰 so grateful!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBeVl-1CtV1ZXMJl4zFNQst&fid=0x0:0xcd2239d05db64102"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Saurav Samar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqYT6ZZU5yZRrnV51nJ9VAGsYo_b1fJ-3Qi40jrQ4OyonkdsRUXA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jo&Joe Roma’s restaurant is a hidden gem in the heart of the city. The atmosphere is modern, vibrant, and social, making it a great place to grab a meal whether you’re staying at the hostel or just passing by.

The menu offers a good mix of Italian and international dishes, with something for everyone. While not a fine-dining experience, the food is fresh, flavorful, and reasonably priced. Portions are generous, and the quality is solid for the price point.

The staff are friendly and efficient, creating a welcoming and laid-back vibe. Plus, the location is fantastic—perfect for grabbing a meal before exploring Rome’s attractions.

Overall, Jo&Joe Roma’s restaurant is a great casual dining spot with good food, a lively atmosphere, and fair prices. Definitely worth a visit if you’re in the area!

⭐ Rating: 4.5/5 (Great food, nice vibe, good value for money)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQiKT-9QE&fid=0x0:0xcd2239d05db64102"],"When":"2025-3-8"},{"Name":"dave latour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVeqruYNA8jIYU6mqVo4Z1Ar515IzKLN2QGaZExuRL2tMghW-Rr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is definitely not your average hostel. Feels much more like a hotel experience. The best quality fitout, very relaxed vibe. Do not let the club, bar included scare you off, it is not a backpacker hostel. More adult quiet drink spot with fantastic food options Highly, highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7qab3zQE&fid=0x0:0xcd2239d05db64102"],"When":"2024-8-25"},{"Name":"Дария Листопадова","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL_cgk_hRdLVPwfCd_el0mKikFU2E-IYvdRMH70N2LN7Y9E8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious food! Good service! The dessert was especially delicious! I recommend it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBotP4OaFP1p89WbiVp4B7A&fid=0x0:0xcd2239d05db64102"],"When":"2026-3-1"},{"Name":"Lefteris Kakapouras","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuWOmYtgQUfreD2S_-q825Nauzxp5M2w-8VqzR_RhnAMc5cw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great hostel! Friendly, efficient, helpful staff.
And most importantly, the food 🤤 Here’s a few photos of the tiramisu & pulled pork sandwich. Delicious!!
The accomodation was lovely too!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn85SvSA&fid=0x0:0xcd2239d05db64102"],"When":"2024-9-29"}]

If you want high quality food, at quite reasonable prices, try this restaurant, you won't be dissapointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDwNLLgu2iTa_pyMxx9VuCJ&fid=0x0:0x72f75637822fd020"],"When":"2026-2-28"},{"Name":"Nicholas Henry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGedK7OF92T1I3Xbbamvluld3tnL-I2vxGcEVNPzki-R-SueL1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The restaurant is in a busy alley way so there is quite a bit of commotion from all sides. But that aside, the staff were polite, the food was decent. We had the ravioli which tasted like spaghetti O's sauce (from America). The lasagna was pretty decent. Aperol Spritz was definitely worth it. Overall would recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnTGVlkAFlpQCRNNRr3U0f&fid=0x0:0x72f75637822fd020"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Gill Y","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxeyb7XnbcpGoxJaiNqyCF2nPRnEDl5cBeG1vGbwVc2UxwqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Although in a very touristy spot, this restaurant did not disappoint! Our party of 4 ordered 4 different pastas, and they were all very delicious. They were big helpings, so for smaller appetites, you could easily share. Service is very fast paced as they are so busy. Diners are hustled in and out at speed, but that suited us just fine.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3OGgJMuGW04TMebAGg9Gq&fid=0x0:0x72f75637822fd020"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Maelen van Dam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv6hwJDZuBR3RngtZgRTDktEGLRMZAbqzK_OaHx4CD3hmk0h89rQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Absolutely superb food. If you’re looking for some good, authentic Italian food near the Pantheon, I recommend. However, service was awful. The host was unwelcoming and rude. Our server, even worse. We are American and expected some glares, however this was incredibly unwelcoming. We asked to split the bill 4 ways and he visibly rolled his eyes and complained to our faces about doing his job. He coerced us into paying with cash. The manager yells at his staff in front of the guests which added entertainment, but is unprofessional. We asked for the toilet and got very rude responses, often one word or less. There were 2 nice guys, the food runners in vests who were very kind. Amazing food though, partially made up for the service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA6Xw3QN3j7rvF-KHtmpc5Q&fid=0x0:0x72f75637822fd020"],"When":"2026-2-19"},{"Name":"Elena Marina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuiQtGkf89U0834isNL2DcF1Xqysk1QpvrIjuiGCpQBZzfjN5MMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"i had had carbonara only twice in my entire life: once from a jar at the supermarket and then made by a friend in spain (it looked more like scrambled eggs and pasta than carbonara). i kinda enjoyed it but deep down knew i wanted to try the real thing.

i was looking for a nice restaurant to eat a plate of carbonara without being scammed or overcharged. achille ended up being perfect.

it’s a popular spot, so be prepared (i had to queue just to go to the bathroom). but the positives really outdo the negatives. this place has the perfect roman vibes, with large outdoor seating overlooking the central narrow streets of rome, close to the pantheon.

you would genuinely think a place in that location would rip you off…but it's totally the opposite. the waiters were very nice and accommodating. the food came quick and it was delicious; they even gave us complementary bread. the bill came out to be very cheap too because they don’t charge you for coperto.

i totally would go back here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCfeGHdZn22a98CAtiHTQmr&fid=0x0:0x72f75637822fd020"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Pablito","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgU0S8i01ybv4XiymbSmvAE7iGCVqowJl83ttiKXx2xqsVuLWS2w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Considering the overall ratings, I'm surprised I had such a disappointing experience. On the surface, everything seems to be in the right place. Unfortunately, the food itself turned out to be underwhelming, which, especially for central Rome, can be doubly disappointing. The main problem is the lack of spices – as if the owners were afraid that tourists might criticize the local specialties because they didn't meet international standards (and those can, of course, vary, so there is no point to be “neutral"). Carbonara, a Roman classic, was worse than the one I can make at home. A suspiciously yellow sauce, no flavor, no pepper, and some strange oily aroma. In short, it wasn't awful, but I felt like I was eating only pasta. The oxtails were tender and tasty, but the tomato sauce was again not seasoned, tasted like it came right from a can. The lamb, on the other hand, was full of bones and gristle. Hard to choek, hard to disintegrate, monotonous. And again, without any additional seasoning. Of course, there was pecorino cheese on the table, but I guess that I am not supposed to prepare my own sauce for carbonary when I have it already on my plate. The overall experience is worth 3 stars, but I'm taking one away for messing up the pasta, as that's a crime they're committing against themselves.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeHfmda5ccTC83keEm0DJB&fid=0x0:0x72f75637822fd020"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"ezgi gelec","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9PIg2ktMph-RSdJxQNESwWFd73xVWaGvhLN3OTwOX3iHSjC4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited this place twice during my trip. My very first dinner and also my last dinner. Both times I had the grilled lamb, and it was excellent.

The food is very high quality and the service is genuinely great. All of the staff were kind, attentive, and welcoming, but I especially want to thank Manuel. Manuel is an amazing person and made me feel truly welcome from the moment I arrived. His hospitality made a real difference, especially as a solo traveler.

If you are traveling alone and not sure where to go, this is absolutely the right address. Great food, great service, and a warm atmosphere.

Thank you Manuel and thank you all the staff. I will never forget this experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQIkDkQNeWCKbgF79mt1ec&fid=0x0:0x72f75637822fd020"],"When":"2026-2-10"},{"Name":"Hammi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWu92FrrBEVwrRt4G5g0AMWI7BwMRR2ulSM1hcYfm91SmIPPwhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I 100% recommend it. Great food, friendly staff, and amazing location. We got the seafood spaghetti and seafood rice, was delicious. Also got two desserts and soda, and water. Everything was 65 euros. We got the same food more or less somewhere else, which was also great for 45 euros, but the 20 euros was worth it for me, just because of the quality of the service and the location/sitting area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3m5e5s-ElPU_F8eDVaD_K&fid=0x0:0x72f75637822fd020"],"When":"2026-2-10"}]

[{"Name":"Emil Odagiu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3_6ZZR6Rq5Y7-KOS-b26UiXThkpXeoJwYlTy1tr99HFyg3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food and service. The waiter was very knowledgeable in matching our preferences and available menu options. The wine selection was great as well. Had a great experience overall.

Highly recommended the fish carpaccio (catch of the day), we had amber jack, an exquisite flavour with great sauce pairing.

We had the fried fish basket (fritto di mare) as our main, which was great flavour wise but I found that some of the components carried a bit too much of batter... but that might be a personal preference. The roman artichokes were amazing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDer7JUzKcN4_dS__TFUz7E&fid=0x0:0x31aeccf34c0e27fa"],"When":"2026-2-9"},{"Name":"Nicole Love","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2OZh5nz6FJDTAa47UnC19TOfLulRdH_VYbivsWzh3mY-UQrouXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The service, location and food were all incredible. We visited Rome for the rugby and came to dine with my parents, brother and aunt and uncle and were seated in the private back room. The atmosphere was incredible and the service impeccable. Every dish was superb, the pasta fresh and delicious and the wine list has something for everyone. Couldn’t recommend Cipasso more highly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcOg3qlpKaabKYFf9uvBNS&fid=0x0:0x31aeccf34c0e27fa"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Tiffany Hunt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyYI_cJKm9HRsMoR6-9y517uob6x23b6cDEGNrp5IiJPhcEAE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best meals of my life. The duck ragu was absolutely incredible and anything with a truffle can’t be missed. They have an extensive wine by the glass list and were helpful with pairing throughout my meal. The food was Michelin worthy without an air of pretension. We are already looking for reservations to bookend our trip.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbInKOzDGPR1OKAS9SqvRf&fid=0x0:0x31aeccf34c0e27fa"],"When":"2026-2-26"},{"Name":"Rakel Sara Björnsdóttir","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1RGpwEoKNS0Jo21j2XOquxzkVwlpEx2Ke62fw-9_VsRhX7Mp0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What an amazing experience dining at CiPASSO. Will highly recomend to anyone visiting Rome. We booked a table with them for 6 people for a celebration while we were in Rome. They offered us a table in a private setting, which was very nice and suited us really well. The staff were very nice and attentive, checking regularly if everything was okay and to our liking.

The food was amazing. We had the scallops and crispy eggs as starters, along with a basket of bread. The scallops was a standout for me personally. Then everyone had a pasta for the main course, the parpadelle and duck, lobster linguine and the black truffle tagliolini. Since white truffles were in season we were offered to swap out the black truffles for the white truffles. We opted for that in one of the courses and it certainly did not dissapoint. We also had some wonderful sides and desserts. We all found it hard to pick one favorite since everything was to our liking.

This is without a doubt my favorite restaurant from our visit to Rome.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtoZugu4PueCD_Q5QAlJpO&fid=0x0:0x31aeccf34c0e27fa"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Isabel Van Veen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuYWih04tDdxx0ZFVGsT3JoKQpXQ91wCPvQOSXr4xYN7eP2UZC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was incredible! The antipasti was so good, and the pasta was just wow. Its hard to portray how good it was! The tiramisu was the first in our trip, and it set the bar with how light and fluffy it tasted. Our server was also really fun and added to our experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB2kkCvrKJ-40b9bteTgHi3&fid=0x0:0x31aeccf34c0e27fa"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Justin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCZhaTSFr7AE-xEP9S18Sf3JTs2oF3OTDhp7rzLlqtLtQ69JgU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a late Valentine’s dinner here (with a reservations) and the staff was amazing. Everything was delicious especially the fried egg and black truffle tagliolini. We will definitely be coming back when we’re back in Rome!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWKGP8LvWbIDULMxfh4dky&fid=0x0:0x31aeccf34c0e27fa"],"When":"2026-2-18"},{"Name":"Kyung ah Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJAFQQaWjcUPXznrHcIY6N7AsNrOA-DJZXPZL0j36_3aKXc3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful our anniversary dinner there last summer. The hall manager Loris helped us to get the table without reservation in advance and that’s the last night in Rome. We stopped by the restaurant a day early to make a reservation for next day but it is all booked but Loris kindly suggested that we could come back next day on a specific time in case. We didn’t tell him it’s our Anniversary day since  we didn’t want him to feel too much pressure on it, but we made it! When we got there next day he recognized us right away and welcomed us with a table pleasantly!
Food was excellent with both flavor and presentation and service is great with a timely manner.
Space isn’t big enough to get reservations easily but that cozy size makes it more warm and authentic vibe to us.
Obviously next time when we visit Rome, we will definitely make a reservation in advance and visit again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC-1N93vCqP8Ux9EbImwr1H&fid=0x0:0x31aeccf34c0e27fa"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"L Marie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLVe51eeum9y-OPUDjnHJNZE2fATgEODlIbDvJOT-GnaRJ3uqZn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So good 3 years ago. And yet tonight was even better.

Make a reservation since there is a reason this restaurant is popular.

Reasonable prices for excellent quality and depth of flavor along with great presentation.

Thank you to our outstanding server, Adrianne along with the entire CiPasso team. We are grateful to all of you in making our evening at CiPasso one of the most memorable nights on our visit.

Arrivederci!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCLlslz_vyJvZwI4ciiQ-QW&fid=0x0:0x31aeccf34c0e27fa"],"When":"2025-11-29"}]
