user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Panna Bordas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIC-2yybygdjOUtJeYz6cp-i6kL7dP7E6GapkHCtMQZoLAsJA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had dinner at Roscioli, and everything was absolutely outstanding. The food was divine, every bite full of flavor and care, and the service was simply impeccable.

Paula, our server, was incredibly kind, attentive, and warm — she truly made the evening special and made us feel genuinely welcome.

I have been coming to Rome for 20 years, but this was without a doubt the best restaurant experience I’ve ever had here. The atmosphere, the food, and the hospitality came together perfectly, and I felt truly happy and at ease throughout the entire evening.

A memorable experience that I will cherish, and a place I will most definitely return to.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBINFVCbkkYMtJNTUn1gEas&fid=0x0:0x260f74732f55ad49"],"When":"2026-2-8"},{"Name":"Daniel A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKy9D6MB0LhRfIzG3bd79pukyaLo_CxPXEYnOLlQ268PV7oHA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came for the restaurant, as some of my friends visited the place earlier to buy some nice salami, and the smell caught their noses.

Well, we arrived, and my first impression was that the place was very crowded and hectic. "How can someone enjoy a dinner like that?" That was the question I asked myself.

However, the goal is not to be biased, but to enjoy good food. So, to the food:

We started with a beef tartare, a dish that is part of my top-10 foods. It was pleasant; you could feel the gentle salt, the vinegar, and the fresh yolk. All to the point.

For pasta, we shared the Oxtail Tortellini, with the foie gras sauce and a touch of fig.

Wow, what pasta. The dough was perfectly al dente, the oxtail meat was delicious, with deep flavors and the right texture. And the sauce, oh, the sauce. A beautiful extraction of the foie gras flavors, with fig hints that added a bit of sweetness.

For dessert, we had the Tiramisu. If you appreciate a place that puts a decent amount of espresso and cacao in its tiramisu, then you must try that one.

Regarding the service - very professional, pleasant, despite the challenges of walking into the restaurant.

Highly recommended for those who seek great local food yet with a unique atmosphere..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzSMRPHJIGj5ZaCiU7V4e1&fid=0x0:0x260f74732f55ad49"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Jenny Z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVbiLx8boAMZsve6NjBVHlxqwkV16TL-goAhT88gTdXOPZc09wZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was the highlight of my trip to Rome. I loved it so much I went there for both lunch and dinner in the same day. Great food and extensive selection of wine. They have some of the sweetest women working at the reception and behind the bar, super friendly and helpful. Met new friends sitting at the bar seat at dinner and had one of my best dining experiences. Love this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_DuWvLxw2BsFPHi0mgFi6&fid=0x0:0x260f74732f55ad49"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"Wilberth Dekker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxfUfNqDe8CygS7m9uKachdE8u2ldr3TEFSt6lgsSBCld7rw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Roscioli is an absolute must visit in Rome. We had the carbonara and it was simply outstanding. Perfectly creamy, rich, and authentic. This is what real Roman carbonara should taste like.
The atmosphere is cozy and welcoming, and the staff was attentive and friendly. Everything about our experience was top notch from the food quality to the service.
If you are in Rome and love good food, do not miss Roscioli. The carbonara alone is worth the visit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"beth d","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL-L8p_YI2HlU-e_oukqs9AqYszIVcjCCxxwwjcj6n1ti9eFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Disappointing.

Service wasn't great (I don't blame the staff as they seemed to be rushed off of their feet, way too little service staff for the amount of covers). It took a full 30 minutes for our order (including drinks order) to be taken, during this time we were given a bottle of water and then ignored until we requested to order after half an hour. A table nearby were ordering a lot of very expensive wine and food were given a lot of attention, with the staff going to the table frequently whilst ignoring us, take from this what you will.

The food was okay, 2 out of 3 meals were barely warm so 1 had to be sent back (it was returned less than a minute later piping hot which made me think it had been heated in a microwave, not what youd expect from this sort of establishment). For the price I expected much higher quality food than what we received.

We were with our 3 year old son, and when asking if they could do a small portion for him, we were told they could do a half portion, which is what we ordered. When we got the bill they charged us just £2 less than the full price of the dish, despite the dish being tiny. Had we known that the half portion would be charged at 85% of the price of the full meal, we would have just ordered him the full meal.

This was the 3rd restaurant we visited during our trip to Rome, the first 2 being more traditional, informal establishments. The price for the food at Roscioli was nearly double, and the quality less than half of the previous places we visited.

Overall a pretentious place, not great for families with young children. Perhaps a nice place if you have an extortionate amount of spare money and time, but if you are just a regular group/ family looking for good food and good atmosphere in Rome, then I would not recommend.

Such a shame as we were expecting so much from this place and left unhappy and disappointed, wish we had spent our money and time elsewhere. Would not recommend.

Go to De Enzo in Trastevere!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clare","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5sDfXoFm-jAmrNDSO2py4EksMJXV_823X_HNlnYjjivo0OQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The restaurant uses a time-slot reservation system and, although it was a bit busy, the overall atmosphere was pleasant. Most of the staff were friendly and welcoming.

Unfortunately, one staff member significantly impacted our experience.
She was an older woman working at the bar, taking orders and serving drinks. I noticed her handling ice for cocktails with her bare hands, which was quite concerning and immediately affected my appetite.

More importantly, her interaction with an elderly woman at the bar was uncomfortable to watch. She appeared impatient while taking her order. When the elderly customer mentioned that her first wine tasted sour, the lady did not seem to understand and instead responded by emphasizing that another wine was more expensive, with a dismissive expression.
When explaining a truffle dish, she repeatedly gestured that truffle would incur an extra charge rather than politely clarifying, which felt rude rather than informative.

The carbonara was described as Roman style and naturally salty, but it was excessively salty to the point that we couldn’t finish it.
Service is just as important as food, and unfortunately this experience made it hard to enjoy the meal.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lily Bilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIp-nHsSajy-QLDWc7kwExyIQJhyocizjRFdJ7tTP7_Ik7SxA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best meal and service and I had in Rome. I was traveling alone and despite being fully booked they found me a table. The menu was delectable and everything was sensational. My waiter, Daniele was charming and attentive. It was a very special evening.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICpqI31Qw&fid=0x0:0x260f74732f55ad49"],"When":"2023-7-27"},{"Name":"Aleksander Pławski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXo4-K9GFsPMAIm0fmyMhDWzHmw3yjHyDnIb-_Lo727nSEhsEG0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to this restaurant twice, for lunch and dinner. We knew it was a popular spot in Rome, but we didn't think it would be difficult to find a table for lunch during the "off-season." Unfortunately, we were informed that they were fully booked. We left, but five minutes later we returned to make a reservation for the following day. That's when we learned that reservations are only made online. Fortunately, the maître d'hôtel (a lovely woman) told us that if we wanted one, she would have a table for us in half an hour. We returned at the appointed time and enjoyed a light, delicious lunch. We enjoyed it so much that we returned at noon the next day to inquire about a table for dinner. The same lovely woman somehow found us a table again. We send her our warmest regards :) Overall, the food was delicious. The fresh white truffle enhanced the flavor of the dishes we ordered. The extensive wine list is also a big plus for this place. The service was excellent. Both the first time (unfortunately I don't remember the name of the wonderful waitress) and the second time (thank you Gianni for your professionalism and friendly atmosphere!) We will definitely come back on our next visit to Rome!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCU_y6O-6fFWbc4xC6GFMyr&fid=0x0:0x260f74732f55ad49"],"When":"2025-12-18"}]

[{"Name":"Nicholas Henry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGedK7OF92T1I3Xbbamvluld3tnL-I2vxGcEVNPzki-R-SueL1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The atmosphere of the restaurant is very upscale. Decent music and the food felt like it was professionally cooked just for us. The drinks were quite personally made and even a Zuma stamped ice ball for whiskey drinks. The fried calamari seemed fresh and tasty. Sweet potato was very flavorful. Overall the food was quite good and would definitely recommend but I would suggest a reservation. It seemed to get quite busy after 7pm.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHrxk6c80PZ1jJiWyS7hPq&fid=0x0:0x6e6b101dffb13d09"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Behnam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcddT6lcZbensjTeqQzS1TqsBW2t2UeMgvdgW65_gozs_lLQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Zuma never disappoints. One of the best asian food restaurants in Rome.

Everything is perfect from drinks and appetizers to main courses. Sushis were also great and I enjoyed every one of them.
The way they served the ribeye steak was completely new for me and I enjoyed it.

The staff were really nice and professional.
It’s definitely a place I’ll come back to when I visit Rome again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDoPIF7NI21miigq1rZPleb&fid=0x0:0x6e6b101dffb13d09"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Fanni Fabian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUs1Ta8ncz2qPdSj6LCpvSSeY62KI1JtqI4glFKFVVK0QyIizM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I still absolutely LOVE Zuma! This was my second time here in Zuma, after the Miami location, and it did not disappoint. My partner and I had the brunch menu and we were soo satisfied. It was so much food, we struggled to eat the menu. Everything was delicious and the restaurant itself was at a quite lovely location- on top of the Fendi store, accessible by elevator. It had a private feel, yet you could see downtown Rome which made it kinda romantic. My rose lychee cocktail was one of the most delicious cocktails I have ever tasted- perfect harmony of flavors and amount of alcohol. As my main, I chose the ibérico pork with yuzu kosho and truffle sauce- needless to say it was heavenly. My partner chose the beef medium rare and it was quite tasty too. Sushi and sashimi as well as dessert were wonderful. The lava chocolate cake is a must!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD3FNporHP_6DpPrUXYsf1i&fid=0x0:0x6e6b101dffb13d09"],"When":"2026-2-3"},{"Name":"DYK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuEMFc3wo8zF6H8i8ba3KEPOE6ao0TteZ2h8aAK8wMz8W49m0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You start in the bar on the 5th floor that has a cool setting and then you go down to the restaurant on the 4th floor. Greeted by the cooks like in Japan, excellent service, good cocktails and very good food. Small servings that are great for sharing with a mixture of flavors. A bit expensive but worth it for a fun experience with beautiful Italian people.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAUHvJRN3sZyihucsjJGvbn&fid=0x0:0x6e6b101dffb13d09"],"When":"2026-2-11"},{"Name":"Kristina Kudryavtseva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX11wzRSuWZNBFkaY_XL3_nPTw8sqnSFiCg9xV5HududaYsebfMiA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice ambience and atmosphere. My dietary restrictions were nicely accommodated, but if you are gluten free take into consideration that they can adjust set menus (possibly for other restrictions as well). Nice mocktails, quick service. Our waiter was really amazing, but the sommelier wasn’t so knowledgeable (maybe it was a language barrier).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCV69iuDMuoX89nbgxABoEj&fid=0x0:0x6e6b101dffb13d09"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Amit Krivoshey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8PLiV3KTB6DlIGNkmhTmk75pH5_gJGmEJxTgL_Up-5oeAhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the best Asian restaurants I’ve ever been to.
The food was outstanding. I asked the waiter to choose the starters, sushi, main course, and dessert for me, and every single dish was exceptional.
The prices are not cheap, but the quality of the food and the atmosphere are absolutely worth every euro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBgbRQt4CXwG4yjj1UWw1uS&fid=0x0:0x6e6b101dffb13d09"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"nina kohne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKflDn23DcgPDW0miU6FUFu-lFPgYB-DIXFxYqzK_v61bYvRg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place for special dinners. Also have a great rooftop for lunch. Food was great! Looooved the eggplant and broccoli. Also tasty selection of raw fish.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCNcwOK1VtHPkV9OMp40JJK&fid=0x0:0x6e6b101dffb13d09"],"When":"2026-3-2"},{"Name":"Martina Terakaj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJhYKDJaDDGyDuUbjVqP7w-pnH_m0V5cb-MTIKUsrDatw_QA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We had been waiting for the opportunity to travel to a city that has Zuma and to go there for dinner, expecting exceptional service and food, as the restaurant’s reputation suggests. I made the reservation more than a month and a half in advance. We arrived on time, but when we approached the table, the hostess said she needed to check again if that was indeed our table, so we stood waiting in the middle of the restaurant for a few minutes before being seated.

I asked if we could move to a table by the wall because I didn’t feel comfortable sitting in the middle, surrounded by other tables that were too close together, but unfortunately, that wasn’t possible since the restaurant was full. Still, I expected we would get a better table considering that I booked well in advance, at a time when all time slots were still available, meaning the restaurant wasn’t anywhere near fully booked back then.

The waiter gave us the menus, which were very interesting and extensive. However, since this is an oriental fusion restaurant, it was quite difficult to decide what to order because the dishes and names are not something you encounter every day. The waiter never came to ask if we needed help choosing, to make a recommendation, or to explain any of the dish names, which would have been very helpful.

We ordered cocktails twice, and both times the waitress, upon reaching our table, had to ask another waiter whether those drinks were meant for us. We noticed the same thing happening with food at other tables, the waiters seemed rushed and unsure where to take each dish, completely lacking any expression or warmth.

Our reservation was at 8:00 p.m. Around 9:20 p.m., we asked for the menu again because we wanted to order more sushi, after already having had three starters and two main dishes. At that point, we were told that a new reservation was coming in and we needed to leave the table. If the policy is that each table can only be occupied for 1 hour and 30 minutes, then the hostess should have told us that upon arrival, and the waiter should have reminded us before taking the last order.

In the end, we simply asked for the bill and didn’t order any dessert, even though I was really looking forward to trying Zuma’s desserts. I’m very disappointed because Zuma turned out to be such a letdown, even though we were so excited to go there and try this interesting cuisine. They should really work on improving their service and the overall experience, which, in addition to good food, should include attentive and engaged staff who assist with the menu, check if everything is all right with the meal, and genuinely make guests feel taken care of.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5dR8-M9B0OpAaOvThqax-&fid=0x0:0x6e6b101dffb13d09"],"When":"2025-10-22"}]

[{"Name":"Petrit Hoxha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWE5asUZaBDb6cET1md0NfWiD9BVQyxim_MhCgjqjC2eiV8RXub=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An Unforgettable Dining Experience in Rome

From the very first moment we stepped into Klass Restaurant, we were welcomed with exceptional warmth and genuine hospitality. The owner and the entire staff went above and beyond to make us feel special, offering thoughtful recommendations and ensuring every detail of our evening was perfect. Their passion for what they do truly shines through.

The food? Simply outstanding.

Every dish is prepared with the freshest ingredients and crafted by the chef’s truly gifted hands. You can taste the quality, the balance, and the love in every bite.

If you’re looking for the perfect starter, you absolutely cannot go wrong with the BOUQUET DI MELANZANE — a beautifully presented and incredibly flavorful appetizer that sets the tone for an extraordinary meal.

The pasta selection is equally impressive, but if you want something that will stay in your memory long after you leave Rome, order the TONNARELLI CACIO, GAMBERI E LIME. The combination of creamy cacio, delicate prawns, and the refreshing hint of lime creates a perfectly balanced, elegant, and unforgettable dish. It’s refined yet comforting — simply perfection on a plate.

Klass Restaurant is not just a place to eat; it’s a complete dining experience. If you’re in Rome and appreciate fresh ingredients, masterful cooking, and impeccable hospitality, this is a must-visit destination.

Highly, highly recommended — we will definitely return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCIKPl047pDL6butEvU9aIB&fid=0x0:0x4266dc4e597a6508"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Andreea Olteanu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuoz24Y09uR_yaDM-wHui-LkGhs7UsbrYDWjFyDBUCMUZt_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here is amazing.
The carbonara is creamy and perfectly balanced.
The pizza is baked just right, with a delicious crust and fresh toppings.
The risotto is flavorful and cooked to perfection.
The tiramisu is light, fresh, and just like it should be.

The staff is friendly and attentive.
They help quickly, explain the menu, and make you feel welcome.

The atmosphere is cozy and enjoyable, perfect for lunch or dinner.
Great for both tourists and locals.

I highly recommend Klass Restaurant in Rome.
Delicious food, excellent service, worth every visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABICyHahcASlMyPcpgmSJS&fid=0x0:0x4266dc4e597a6508"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"Arlind Celina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcnjFSMOwwlc4eOPQyPvIMTsX8_IBvZTzamUGCLsaOgGgbl9cDEA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A fantastic experience! The restaurant is located very close to the Trevi Fountain, in a warm and elegant setting. The welcome was flawless and the staff exceptionally kind and professional. The service was fast, attentive, and always delivered with a smile. An ideal choice for anyone visiting the area and looking for high quality in every detail.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArKC9jo0TfLQbYpwmZ7ir0&fid=0x0:0x4266dc4e597a6508"],"When":"2026-2-14"},{"Name":"Pam Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWv6OxG81mc5TqThy7DS2K4LDVcB19RZTVkQfZqrg2N1t29skqAUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stumbled across this restaurant for dinner this evening & was delighted that we did. The staff were very welcoming & hospitable. The food was delicious & the portions were huge! We had ordered French fries as a side & they were hands down the nicest French fries we've had. The pizza was delicious, as was the pasta. Lovely restaurant & definitely one I'd recommend 👌","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPF401GUoihYjB7WJPH59u&fid=0x0:0x4266dc4e597a6508"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"James King","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxfPrmWiYCEst4tIMhnm_TTTZpPp5Wtu4O5YuebKPZPKulNX2R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Amazing service. Food was really nice. Carbonara very good sauce. Not using guanciale though, which for the pice was a bit of a shame.

Souffle was amazing. Very tourist friendly if you want quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAORfCeuICcj-YStT5LYQ6E&fid=0x0:0x4266dc4e597a6508"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Charles Chow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkG356MLZnryuA0sWljmiDuRgG2pgMY9F9GGTquLJWrvvOhoBo5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Not a bad joint for food. It was good honest italian fare. We had the Vongole, pizza and the bolognese pasta. They were all very decent and I wouldn't mind returning if I was in the area.
